16.4: Azu nœ tshakpesheke á endje dœ aekpe azu yé á zazatœ endje fœ Ndjaba nene, sœ kœyɔndœ ambárá! Kashe endje wu anga angbɨ ambárá bale nene, kolœ œnœ Yona œ ka ye. Manda nœ, tshe katœ endje tɨ kpœtœmœ yé œ ro daye.» Kœyisœrœ nœ Afarisayi œdœ Asadukayi (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 8.14-21)
16.5: Lɔkɔ kœzu ayambarœ ga itshi kota, œndœ kœko kœzɨrœ djerœ endje ye.
16.6: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Ala 'e gbɔ dœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa nœ Afarisayi dœ pe Asadukayi kane.»
16.7: Ayambarœnœ te lima tœ kœpa ugurutœ endje adœke: «Tshe sœ kœpa ataa mbœrœ á a nana dœ mapa nene.»
16.8: Kashe Yisu wu lima sœ gbetshelœ nœ endje, yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «E'e dœ azu á kœyindœrœ nœ 'e sœ teasho, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœyutœ 'e ugurutœ 'e adœke 'e gugu dœ mapa nene a?
16.9: Œrrr kpesheke, 'e wuwu damba sœ œrœ nene a? Œndœ mapa mindu á 'e kurutshelœ nœ tœ azu kutu mindu (5.000) œdœ kingi kotoo á 'e ko lima dœ udunœ, djerœ 'e ye a?
16.10: Œndœ mapa mindu dœ bisha (7) á 'e kuru lima tshelœ nœ tœ azu kutu vana œdœ kingi kotoo á 'e ko lima dœ udunœ, djerœ 'e ye a?
16.11: Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e wuwusœ nœ adœke mœ sœsœ lima kœpa o'o tœ mapa fœ 'e nene lɔkɔ á mœ sœ lima kœpa fœ 'e adœke: Ala 'e gbɔ tœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa nœ Afarisayi dœ Asadukayi a?»
16.12: Yé á ayambarœnœ kœwusœ nœ adœke tshe papa o'o tœ upu nœ kœsœ dœ gbɔdjela tœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa nene, kashe tshe pa tœ kœyisœrœ nœ Afarisayi dœ pe Asadukayi. Petro mɨndœ nœ adœke Yisu kœdœ Kristu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 8.27-30; Luk 9.18-21)
16.13: Lɔkɔ á Yisu yi kumu ye ga lœ ogo Sezaré, ogo gbozu Filipo, tshe yu ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Azu sœ kœpa má kotoo tœ upu nœ Gbolo nœ uzu a?»
16.14: Endje gi adœke: «Anga azu sœ kœpa adœke, œɓœ kœdœ Yowane ayi kœza batisimu; anga endje sœ kœpa ndje adœke œɓœ kœdœ Eliya; yé anga endje kpa sœ kœ pa œnœ endje adœke, œɓœ kœdœ Yilimiya too anga ayi kœgbara o'o ugurutœ aayi kœgbara o'o liya.»
16.15: Yé Yisu kœyu endje adœke: «Yé ka e'e a, 'e sœ kœpa má œnœ 'e adœke œmœ kœdœ ɗe?»
16.16: Shimu Petro za o'o yé á gi adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ Kristu, Gbolo nœ Ndjaba nœ soro.»
16.17: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Yanga nœ zœ, Shimu gbolo nœ Yona, mbœrœ œ dœ́dœ́ ɔkɔ dœ indji dá pandœ o'o asœ fœ ɓœ nene, kashe Aba mœ á tshe sœ ɓa lafo dá pandœ nœ.
16.18: Yé œmœ, mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ fœ ɓœ adœke œɓœ kœdœ Badja, ga pa badjanœ asœmœ dá mœ mɔ bala Ikrizia nœ mœ, yé kuzu œ sœ bala dœ gbɔgbɔ ga pa Ikrizianœ nene.
16.19: Mœ za bala herela nœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo fœ ɓœ; œrœ kɔ á ɓœ i ga tœnœ ɓa pa ɔshɔ, Ndjaba œ i ndje ga tœnœ ɓa lafo; œrœ kɔ á ɓœ vwara tshelœnœ ɓa pa ɔshɔ, Ndjaba œ vwara ndje tshelœnœ ɓa lafo.»
16.20: Manda nœ, Yisu kœkɔ lima ayambarœ nœ ye dœ ɔgbɔ adœke endje papandœ nœ fœ uzu bale adœke œne kœdœ Kristu nene. Yisu pandœ o'o kuzu dœ pe kœshe nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 8.31–9.1; Luk 9.22-27)
16.21: Kœto kpœtœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, Yisu Kristu tetœ kœpandœ nœ fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Œ li adœke mœ ro ga lœ Yerusaleme yé œ wu œrœ kanga waa tshakane agbozu Ikrizia, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba ndje dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa yekane. Endje wo mœ, yé manda olo votɔ, Ndjaba œ she mœ lœ akuzu.»
16.22: Yé Petro gi she ga ɨndɨrɨnœ yé œ tetœ kœgbagbara she adœke: «Gbozu, Ndjaba œ gbɔndœ zœ lœnœ ye! Œrœ ataa œ wuta ga tœ zœ nene.»
16.23: Kashe Yisu fatœ yé œ pa fœ Petro adœke: «Gitœ zœ tœ mœ, Satana! Œɓœ kœdœ uzu nœ kœza o'o ga pa mœ adœke mœ te. Gbetshelœ nœ zœ lili dœ œnœ Ndjaba bale nene, kashe œ li dœ œnœ azu.»
16.24: Manda nœ, Yisu pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Œdœ uzu kœyindœ kœna manda mœ, œ li adœke tshe vwaratœ ye tœ undu ye dœ tœ ye, œ za kurushi nœ ye yeka á kœna manda mœ.
16.25: Gbambanœ nene, uzu kɔ á tshe sœ dœ ogo kœsœ dœ soro œ tshu ye; kashe tsheneke á tshe tshu mbœrœ mœ, œshe dá sœ dœ soro.
16.26: Ataa uzu kœgbɔ œrœ tshapashɔ asœke kɔ gbaa, œ sœ dœ she kotoo ɓata á soro ye ndɨ a? Œrœ gaɗe dá tshe ka á kpa yɔ dœ soro ye a?
16.27: Gbolo nœ uzu œ kwa bala tœ ye awa bale dœ aandjelu nœ ye lœ mokɔ nœ Abanœ, yé tshe gi bala fœ uzu dœ uzu liaka akwa tshelœ ye.
16.28: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, ugurutœ 'e á 'e sœ asœ, anga 'e œ tshu nene utshu kœwu Gbolo nœ uzu kœna ɓata gbozugo.»

17.1: Manda olo mindu dœ bale, Yisu za Petro, Jake œdœ pe ayanœ dœ Yowane po tœ ye, œ gitœ ye dœ endje ga ɨndɨrɨnœ ga pa egerœ kaga.
17.2: Tshe fatœ ye dœ ala endje; tshatshu ye tetœ kœtshi tœnœ ɓata ɔlɔ, lœba ye wuta tœ imbinœ urrr ɓata ɨshirɨ osho.
17.3: Ngbewo, Eliya œdœ Moyize wuta ga utshu endje, yé œ sœ kœpa tshama endje dœ Yisu.
17.4: Petro pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Gbozu, œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke a lœ kpœke. Œdœ ɓœ kœyindœ nœ, mœ mɔ anda tande votɔ: Bale fœ ɓœ, bale fœ Moyize œdœ bale ndje fœ Eliya.»
17.5: Tshe sœpe damba kœpa 'o atake, trale ondoro jerœ ga pa endje, yé anga tshama wu ɓa lœnœ adœke: «Tsheneke kœdœ Gbolo nœ mœ á mœ yindœ ye waa, mœ za yanga nœ mœ djigi ga ndœ ye. 'E dji she!»
17.6: Lɔkɔ á ayambarœ dji tshamanœ asœmœ ataa, awa litœ endje kpakpakpa yé endje yo ga atɨ œ fa tshatshu endje ga tœ ɔshɔ.
17.7: Yisu na ndoo dœ endje œ turutœ endje yé á pa adœke: «'E alafo, 'e sœsœ dœ awa nene.»
17.8: Kœmesho ga lafo atake, endje wu kolœ Yisu kutɨ ye.
17.9: Ɓata endje sœ lima kœjerœ kaga, Yisu kɔ endje adœke: «'E papandœ œrœ kɔ á 'e wu asœke fœ uzu bale nene, œrrr ga tœ adœke Gbolo nœ uzu she lœ akuzu yekane.»
17.10: Yé ayambarœ nœ ye yu she adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ayi kœyisœ awa akwa pa lima adœke Eliya œ na utshunœ yekane a?»
17.11: Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «Adjapu, Eliya œ na utshunœ mbœrœ kœguma œrœ kɔkɔ.
17.12: Kashe mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke: Eliya na ɓa lima ye, yé azu yiyindœ ye nene, kashe endje mbœrœ fœ she œneke kɔ á endje yi lima ndœ nœ. Awa bale ndje endje mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ Gbolo nœ uzu.»
17.13: Yé á ayambarœ nœ ye kœwusœ nœ adœke, tshe sœ lima kœpa o'onœ fœ œne tœ Yowane ayi kœza batisimu. Yisu she gbolo á tshe sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 9.14-29; Luk 9.37-43a)
17.14: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta lima ndoo dœ ukpulu azu, anga yakoshe bale na ga ndœ Yisu, œ gote dœ matshukuda ye ga utshu ye á pa adœke:
17.15: «Gbozu, wu oyo gbolo yakoshe nœ mœ. Tshe sœ dœ koɓa ɔkɔ á sœ ndœ kœka she waa, œ geta she kpala kpala ga tawo too ga langu.
17.16: Mœ na dœ she fœ ayambarœ nœ zœ, kashe endje lili tœ kœshe she nene.»
17.17: Yisu kœpa adœke: «E'e kœdœ aekpe azu, yé 'e gugu dœ kœyindœrœ nene! Mœ kpa sœpe dœ 'e œrrr manda olo koto yekane a? Mœ kpa ru lɔsu mœ mbœrœ 'e manda olo koto o? 'E na dœ gbolonœ fœ mœ ga mœ.»
17.18: Yisu nga fœ ekpe ɨshirɨnœ; tshe wuta lœ gbolonœ yé á tshe kœshe pe dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ ye.
17.19: Ayambarœ gitœ endje ndoo dœ Yisu, yé á yu she yaa adœke: «Yé ká a'a, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'a lili má œnœ 'a kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨnœ nene a?»
17.20: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e sœ teasho. Mœ sœ kœpa tœnœ fœ 'e dœ adjapu, œdœ anga ɔlɔ bale 'e kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ á sœ dœ egerœnœ ɓata ele ɔyɔ á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ mutarde, 'e pa fœ kaga asœke adœke: “Aafo kpœke œ tɔ ɓa e”, kaga œ mbœrœtœ ye liakanœ ye. Œrœ bale á sœ dœ sharapu ɓa ndœ 'e œ gugu nene. [
17.21: Kashe kolœ lœ awa nœ avwala œdœ lœ œnœ kœyotshelœma dá endje li kœgɔrɔ dœ mara ekpe ɨshirɨnœ asœke.]» Yisu kpa pa o'o kuzu œdœ kœshe nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 9.30-32; Luk 9.43b-45)
17.22: Anga ɔlɔ bale, ayambarœ ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje ɓa lœ ogo Galilayi, Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Endje ka Gbolo nœ uzu ga tshaabrœ azu;
17.23: endje wo she yé manda olo votɔ, Ndjaba œ she she lœ akuzu.» Ayambarœ nœ ye sœ lima dœ oyo waa. Yisu dœ Petro yɔ lapo
17.24: Ɔlɔ á endje li ga lœ Kaparnawumu, azu á endje ka lapo ɓa lœ Tepelo na ga ndœ Petro, yé á pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu nœ 'e œ yɔ lapo nœ Tepelo nene a?»
17.25: Petro gi adœke: «Œ̃, tshe yɔ ye.» Ɔlɔ á Petro yi kumu ye ga sœnda, Yisu yu she adœke: «Gbetshelœ nœ zœ kœdœ gaɗe Shimu? Aɗe dá yɔ walaka lapo nœ agbozugo nœ tshapashɔ a? Agbolo nœ endje too anga angbɨ azu?»
17.26: Petro gi adœke: «Angbɨ azu.» Yé Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Agbolo nœ endje yɔyɔ ka nene.
17.27: Kashe a yɔ œnœ azœ ye, mbœrœ á kœzaza ókó fœ azunœ asœ nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ, na ga la kota œ vwi ngada; ali ageatshalangu á ɓœ djɔ she, a tshelœma ye, ɓœ gbɔ langere ngendja lœnœ. Za œ gu dœ tœnœ, œ za fœ endje mbœrœ mœ œdœ pe ɓœ.»

18.1: Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, ayambarœ nœ Yisu gitœ endje ga ɨndɨrɨ ye, yé á pa fœ she adœke: «Œɗe dá ropa azu kɔ ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo a?»
18.2: Yisu e anga gbolo œ za she tɔ ga ugurutœ endje
18.3: yé œ pa adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, œdœ 'e kœyayapatœ 'e yé á sœ ɓata aya agbolo nene, 'e li bala ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo nene.
18.4: Ataa, tsheneke á tshe mbœrœtœ ye ɓata aya gbolonœ asœ, œshe dá ropa azu kɔ ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo.
18.5: Uzu á tshe za osho kœsœ fœ gbolo lœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ ɓata tsheneke asœ, za osho kœsœ fœ mœ dœ tœ mœ ye. Ɔgbɔ kœmɨ upu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 9.42-48; Luk 17.1-2)
18.6: «Kashe uzu á tshe mbœrœ adœke anga aya gbolo bale ugurutœ agbolo asœke á endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ, li ga lœ ekperœ, œ li adœke endje du egerœ badja ga lœ ɨgɨ ye, œ na dœ́ œ geta she ga la egerœ ungu.
18.7: Oyo nœ azu tshapashɔ á endje sœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu li ga lœ ekperœ! Œ li adœke œrœ ataa mbœrœtœ endje, kashe oyo nœ uzu neke á yanganœ œ te mbœrœ she.
18.8: Œdœ kane zœ too ada zœ dá sœ kœmbœrœ adœke ɓœ te, wa œ ko va e zara tœ zœ; œ li dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ li ga lœ adja soro dœ kane zœ bale too dœ ada zœ bale, tœ œsœnœ adœke ɓœ sœpe dœ kane zœ bibisha œdœ pe ada zœ bibisha yé endje vwi ɓœ ga lœ kudu owo á ru nene.
18.9: Yé œdœ ala zœ kœvwa ɓœ ndœ ekperœ, vwata yé œ za vwi'i zara tœ zœ, œ li dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ li ga lœ adja soro dœ ala zœ bale, tœ œsœnœ adœke ɓœ sœpe dœ ala zœ bibisha yé endje vwi ɓœ ga lœ kudu owo nœ lifelo.»
18.10: «Ala 'e gbɔ adœke 'e kœgugu œsœ anga gbolo bale ugurutœ aya agbolo asœke nene. Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e, aandjelu nœ endje sœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ ɨndɨrɨ Aba mœ á tshe sœ ɓa lafo. [
18.11: Gbambanœ nene, Gbolo nœ uzu na ndœ kœshe azu á endje sœ lima lœ djingili.] Pata á tshe yiwa (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 15.3-7)
18.12: «'E gbe œnœ 'e koto o? Œdœ anga uzu kœsœ dœ apata kama bale (100), yé anga bale lœ ugurutœ endje kœyiwa, ataa tshe katœ udu endje zazu vana dœ ndjokpa dœ mindu dœ amanœ vana (99) ɓa pa kaga, ndœ kœna kœpara tsheneke tshebale á tshe yiwa asœmœ nene a?
18.13: Œ kœsœ adœke tshe gbɔ she, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, tshe sœ dœ yanga ye kœropa udu endje zazu vana dœ ndjokpa dœ mindu dœ amanœ vana (99) á endje yiyiwa nene asœmœ.
18.14: Awa bale, Aba 'e á tshe sœ ɓa lafo asœmœ, yiyindœ nœ adœke anga gbolo bale ugurutœ aya agbolonœ asœmœ yiwa nene.» Kœgi aya zœ á tshe sœ lœ djingili ga tœ ɔtshɔ awa
18.15: «Œdœ anga aya zœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ ga tœ zœ, na ga ndœ ye kutu zœ œ gbagbara she tœ ekperœ á tshe mbœrœ, œdœ tshe kœdji ɓœ, dá tshe kpa wuta aya zœ.
18.16: Œdœ tshe kœdjidji ɓœ nene, kpa za anga uzu bale too bisha ga ndœ zœ yeka á 'e kœwa o'onœ “mbœrœ œ li adœke atimu bisha too votɔ yindœ o'onœ yekane.”
18.17: Œdœ tshe kœvwaratœ ye ndœ kœdji endje, pandœ nœ ga lœ Ikrizia, yé tshe kœdjidji ndje azu Ikrizia nene, za she ɓata angbɨ uzu too ɓata ayi kœka lapo.
18.18: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke: Œrœ kɔ á 'e i ga tœnœ pa ɔshɔ asœ, endje i ndje ga tœnœ ɓa lafo; yé œrœ kɔ á 'e vwara tshelœ nœ pa ɔshɔ asœ, endje vwara ndje tshelœ nœ ɓa lafo.
18.19: «Mœ kpa sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, œdœ azu bisha ugurutœ 'e pa ɔshɔ kœpa upu ama endje bale ndœ kœyɔndœ œrœ gaɗe, Aba mœ ɓa lafo œ to œrœnœ asœmœ fœ endje ye.
18.20: Gbambanœ nene, osho á azu bisha too votɔ œ ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, mœ sœ ugurutœ endje zœ.» Ayi akwa á tshe vwaratœ ye Kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ ayanœ
18.21: Ataa, á Petro na ga ndœ ye á yu she adœke: «Gbozu, œdœ aya mœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ fœ mœ, mœ djerœndœ ekperœnœ awa kotoo? Œrrr ga tœ awa mindu dœ bisha a (7)?»
18.22: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Mœ papa fœ ɓœ adœke awa mindu dœ bisha nene, kashe œrrr ga tœ awa zazu votɔ dœ ndjokpa awa mindu dœ bisha.
18.23: Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo œ sœ bala kolœnœ ataa: Œ sœ ɓata anga gbozugo bale á tshe yi lima ndœ kœtondœ o'o tœ upu nœ kuɗa nœ ye dœ aayi akwa nœ ye.
18.24: Tœ ali nœ, endje na dœ anga ayi akwa á tshe sœ dœ kuɗa nœ ye tɔpanœ kpuru fœ she.
18.25: Ɓata á tshe sœsœ lima dœ œrœ bale ndœ kœgi tœnœ nene, gbozunœ za awa adœke endje za she yɔ œrœ dœ awonœ, agbolo nœ ye, œdœ ndje pe dœ œrœ kɔ á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ lœ okoro kuɗa nœ ye.
18.26: Ayi akwanœ gote ga tœ ada ye, œ dɨ tshelœma ye fœ she adœke: “Gbozu, sœ dœ ugu lɔsu ga ndœ mœ, yé mœ gi fœ ɓœ para zœ.”
18.27: Oyo za gbozu nœ ayi akwanœ, tshe katœ ye adœke tshe gu zœ yé œ katœ kuɗa nœ ye lœ kumu ye tɨ ye.
18.28: «Kœwuta ayi akwa asœmœ atake, tshe togba dœ anga yanganœ á tshe sœ dœ kuɗa nœ ye teasho lœ kumu ye; tshe za ɔngɔrɔ yanganœ kperœ ndœ kœwo she dœ kœpa fœ she adœke: “Gi kuɗa nœ mœ fœ mœ.”
18.29: Ayi akwa nganœ sœmœ kœgote ga tœ ada ye, yé œ dɨ tshelœma ye fœ she dœ kœpa adœke: “Sœ dœ ugu lɔsu ga ndœ mœ, mœ gi fœ ɓœ zœ.”
18.30: Kashe tshe vwaratœ ye, yé ga pa nœ tshe na dœ she œ za she vwi ga lœ anda kánga ndœ kœkate adœke tshe gi kuɗa nœ œne yekane.
18.31: Kœwu œrœ á tshe mbœrœ asœmœ ataa, œ za oyo tœ lɔsu aayi akwa anganœ, yé endje na œ pandœ œrœ kɔ á ro asœmœ fœ gbozu nœ endje.
18.32: Yé gbozu e she, á pa fœ she adœke: “Ekpe ayi akwa, mœ katœ kuɗa nœ mœ lœ kumu zœ tɨ kɔ mbœrœ á ɓœ dɨtshelœma zœ fœ mœ.
18.33: Œɓœ ndje, ɓœ lili má ndœ kœwu oyo ayi akwa nga zœ ɓata á œmœ dœ tœmœ mœ wu oyo zœ nene a?”
18.34: Oko za gbozu, tshe za she vwi ga lœ anda kánga ndœ kœkate ndje adœke tshe kœgi kuɗa nœ œne kɔ fœ œne yekane.»
18.35: «Ataa, Aba mœ ɓa lafo œ mbœrœ bala mara œrœnœ asœmœ fœ 'e, œdœ uzu dœ uzu ugurutœ 'e kœdjedjerœndœ ekperœ nœ ayanœ dœ lɔsu ye bale nene.»

19.1: Ɔlɔ á Yisu katœ kœmɨndœ upu asœmœ, tshe gitœ ye lœ Galilayi ndœ kœro ga lœ ogo Yuda ɓa kele ungu Yɔrdane.
19.2: Azu ndjoro na manda ye, yé ɓa zœ tshe sœ kœshe endje.
19.3: Anga Afarisayi na ga ndœ ye dœ gbetshelœ nœ kœgɨ uku ga tœ awa ye, yé á yu she adœke: «Œ li dœ yakoshe kovwaratœ ye tœ awonœ lœ upu kɔ a?»
19.4: Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «'E dɨdɨ lima œneke á endje sú ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke, lœ kœmbœrœ œrœ ga pa ɔshɔ asœke, Ndjaba mbœrœ lima yakoshe œdœ yashe nene a?
19.5: Manda nœ, tshe pa adœke: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa á yakoshe œ katœ abanœ dœ ayinœ tɨ, á sœ ga tœ œsœnœ dœ awonœ, yeka á endje bisha œ wuta undu uzu tshebale.
19.6: Ataa, endje kpa sœsœ azu bisha nene kashe undu uzu tshebale. Kaka adœke uzu ndjɔndjɔ tshelœ œneke á Ndjaba ngbɔɓa ga tœ nœ nene.»
19.7: Endje pa fœ she adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á Moyize za lima awa adœke yakoshe su mbeti kœkurutshelœ totœ ga tshakane yashe lɔkɔ á tshe kœkatœ ye tɨ a?»
19.8: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Moyize za lima awa ndœ kœkatœ awo 'e tɨ mbœrœ agbɔ lɔsu nœ 'e, kashe utshunœ œ sœsœ lima ataa nene.
19.9: Mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ fœ 'e adœke, œdœ uzu kœkatœ awonœ tɨ, á kœdœ́dœ́ tœ upu nœ angba budu nene, á tshe kpa to anga angbɨ yashe, tshe sœ kœpara awo uzu.»
19.10: Ayambarœ kœpa fœ she adœke: «Œdœ upu nœ kœtotœsho nœ yakoshe dœ yashe kœsœ ataa, ádá nœ kœtotœsho gugu nene.»
19.11: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ uzu kɔ dá dji tshelœ kata o'o asœ nene, kashe kolœ endjeneke á Ndjaba za awa fœ endje.
19.12: Gbambanœ nene, ádá á azu œ vwaratœ endje kœto ayashe sœ ndjoro: Endje zu anga azu dœ koɓa kutshu; anga kœsœ angara to tshakane azu; yé anga azu yiyindœ kœto ayashe nene mbœrœ kœpara Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo. Uzu á tshe li kœdji tshelœkata o'o asœke kɔ, kaka tshe dji!» Yisu to kane ye ga pa agbolo (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 10.13-16; Luk 18.15-17)
19.13: Azu na dœ agbolo fœ Yisu adœke tshe to kane ye ga pa endje kashe ayambarœ nœ ye sœ lima kœgeta endje.
19.14: Yisu pa adœke: «'E katœ agbolo endje na ga ndœ mœ, 'e kɔkɔ endje nene mbœrœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo sœ mbœrœ azu á endje lœ ɓata endje.»
19.15: Yé manda kœto kane ye ga pa endje, tshe gitœ ye kpœtœmœ ye. Gbolo modo ayi kœgbɔrœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 10.17-31; Luk 18.18-30)
19.16: Anga uzu bale na ga ndœ Yisu, yé œ yu she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, ɔtshɔrœ gaɗe dá mœ kœmbœrœ yeka á kœgbɔ soro neke á ka nene a?»
19.17: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ sœ kœyu mœ pa ɔtshɔrœ a? Kolœ Ndjaba kutɨ ye dá dœ ɔtshɔ uzu. Œdœ ɓœ kœyindœ kœgbɔ soro, gbɔndœ awa o'o ama Ndjaba.»
19.18: Tshe yu Yisu adœke: «Œneketa a?» Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ wo uzu nene, ɓœ para awo uzu nene, ɓœ zɨ angba nene, ɓœ wa o'o dœ wala ga pa uzu nene.
19.19: Lɨ œsœ aba zœ dœ ayi zœ, yé ɓœ yindœ yanga zœ ɓata á ɓœ yindœtœ zœ dœ tœ zœ.»
19.20: Gbolo modonœ gi fœ she adœke: «Œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ, mœ sœ kœmbœrœtœ mœ liakanœ zœ. Œrœ gaɗe dá kpa sœpe adœke mœ mbœrœ a?»
19.21: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ kœyindœ kœsœ ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba, gu œ ka œrœ nœ zœ, œ kurutshelœnœ tœ aayi oyo, yé ɓœ gbɔ bala kœgbɔrœ ɓa lafo. Manda nœ, fatœ zœ œ na manda mœ.»
19.22: Manda o'onœ asœmœ, tshe gu dœ oyo tœ ye, mbœrœ tshe sœ lima dœ œrœ waa.
19.23: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e, œ sœ tœ ɔgbɔnœ bala tœ ayi kœgbɔrœ kœli ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo.
19.24: Yisu kpa pa fœ endje adœke: Œ gbɔɔgbɔ adœke agea á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ shamo li tɔlœ ogoro ɨmbɨlɨ. Kashe œ kpa gbɔ kœrosœ nœ adœke ayi kœgbɔrœ li ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.»
19.25: Kœdji o'onœ asœmœ ataa, ayambarœ katœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ, yé œ pa adœke: «Atamœ, uzu ɗe dá li kœshe tœnœ a?»
19.26: Yisu tondœ endje, yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Ɓa tœ azu, œ li nene; kashe ɓa tœ Ndjaba, œrœ kɔ li ye.»
19.27: Yé Petro kœza 'o, á kœpa fœ she adœke: «Wu kane, 'a katœ œrœ nœ 'a tɨ kɔ á na manda zœ asœ; œ sœ bala dœ a'a koto o?.»
19.28: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke: Ɔlɔ á Ndjaba kpa mbœrœ tshandœ œrœ kɔ tœ tafonœ, olo á Gbolo nœ uzu œ sœ ga lœ ngande mokɔ nœ ye ndœ kœwa ngbanga, e'e á 'e na lima manda mœ, 'e sœ ndje ga pa ngande tshagbozu mokɔ ndjokpa dœ bisha ndœ kœwa ngbanga pa mara azu Israyele ndjokpa dœ bisha.
19.29: Yé uzu kɔ á tshe katœ anda nœ ye, dœ aayanœ, ayingɔnœ, abanœ, aayinœ, agbolo nœ ye, kɨndɨ nœ ye tɨ mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, tshe kpa gbɔ œrœ kœropanœ ye, tshe gbɔ ndje soro nœ waa dœ waa.
19.30: Azu ndjoro á endje sœ utshunœ, endje sœ bala tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ, yé endje nœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ œ te bala azu nœ tshatshunœ.»

20.1: «Kœgbɔ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo sœ ɓata anga gbozu akwa, á tshe wuta dœ amazɨ kœpara aayi akwa nœ tshelœ kɨndɨ vinu nœ ye.
20.2: Tshe djitœ ye dœ endje dœ ɔtshɔnœ pa denari bale á li adœke endje gbɔ dœ ɔlɔ bale, yeka á vwa endje ga lœ kɨndɨ vinu nœ ye.
20.3: Kœwuta she dœ ada ɔlɔ mindu dœ vana utshu kakpi ɔlɔ, tshe wu anga azu, endje sœ gbambanœ,
20.4: tshe pa fœ endje adœke: “E'e ndje, 'e na ga lœ kɨndɨ vinu nœ mœ, mœ to ndje ngendja á li dœ ɔlɔ bale fœ 'e.”
20.5: Endje ro ndje da ye. Tshe kpa wuta dœ kakpi ɔlɔ œdœ dœ ada ɔlɔ votɔ manda kakpi ɔlɔ, œ pa kolœnœ ata fœ anga azu á tshe gbɔ endje.
20.6: Kœwuta ga pa œrœ nœ́ ada ɔlɔ mindu dœ adɨla, tshe kpa wuta ndje, œ kpa gbɔ anga azu á endje sœ ndje ɓa zœ yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: “Mbœrœ gaɗe dá 'e sœ kpœke œrrr kpii á mbœmbœrœ akwa nene a?”
20.7: Endje gi fœ she adœke: “Uzu bale zaza akwa fœ 'a nene.” Gbozu akwanœ kœpa fœ endje adœke: “E'e ndje, 'e na ga lœ kɨndɨ vinu nœ mœ.”
20.8: «Kœwuta ga tœ umbru osho, ayengɔ kɨndɨ vinunœ pa fœ kapeta adœke: “E ayi akwanœ para dœ́ œ ko ngendja tshangba akwa nœ endje fœ endje, kœto tœ endjeneke á mœ e endje tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ asœmœ œrrr ga tœ endjeneke á mœ e má endje utshunœ.”
20.9: Azunœ ada ɔlɔ mindu nœ adɨla na œ gbɔ uzu dœ uzu denari bale.
20.10: Kœwuta ga tœ azu á endje na má utshunœ, endje gbe œnœ endje adœke œne dá gbɔ tɔpanœ kpuru; kashe endje gbɔ ndje uzu dœ uzu denari bale.
20.11: Lɔkɔ á endje gbɔ ngendjanœ, endje te lima tœ kœpulœma endje tœ ayengɔ kɨndɨnœ.
20.12: Endje pa lima adœke: “Aayi akwa á endje na manda nœ, endje mbœrœ akwa kolœ manda ada ɔlɔ bale, ɓœ to ngendja fœ endje awa bale dœ 'a á a wu oyo œrrr kpii tshakudu ɔlɔ dœ kœwosho!”
20.13: Kashe tshe gi fœ anga bale ugurutœ endje adœke: “Yanga mœ, mœ mbœmbœrœ ekperœ fœ ɓœ nene; a djidjimatœ azœ dœ mœ tœ denari bale lœ ɔlɔ bale nene a?
20.14: Za œneke á sœ tshakane zœ asœmœ, œ gu dœ tœnœ zœ. Mœ yindœ kœto ngendja fœ uzu á tshe na tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ asœmœ awa bale dœ ɓœ.
20.15: Œ lili dœ mœ kœmbœrœ œneke á mœ yindœ nœ dœ œrœ nœ mœ nene a? Too ɓœ sœ dœ uku ga tœ mœ mbœrœ á mœ sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu a?”
20.16: Atamœ, azu á endje sœ tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ œ wuta bala azu utshunœ; yé endjeneke á endje sœ utshunœ, œ wuta tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ.» Yisu kpa pandœ mara kuzu dœ pe kœshe nœ ye tœ awa votɔ (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 10.32-34; Luk 18.31-34)
20.17: Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha (12) sœ lima kœro ga lœ Yerusaleme, yé á tshe sœ kœpa fœ endje na tœnœ tœ awa adœke:
20.18: «'E wu, a sœ kœɔ ga lœ Yerusaleme, ɓa tœ osho á endje ka Gbolo nœ uzu fœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ fœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa. Endje wa agbɔ ngbanga ga pa ye adœke endje wo she.
20.19: Yé œ za she fœ angbɨ azu mbœrœ á endje kœmɔ she, á kœsɔ she, á kœkuru she ga pa kurushi, yé manda olo votɔ Ndjaba œ she she lœ akuzu.» Kœyɔndœrœ nœ ayi agbolo yakoshe nœ Zebedayi (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 10.35-45; Luk 22.25-27)
20.20: Awo Zebedayi na ga ndœ Yisu dœ agbolo yakoshe nœ ye bisha, œ gote ga utshu ye mbœrœ kœyɔndœ œrœ bale.
20.21: Yisu yu she adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ gaɗe?» Tshe pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Mœ kɨ ga tœ zœ, ɓœ kœgu bala ga lœ ogo tshagbozu nœ zœ, lœ agbolo yakoshe nœ mœ bisha asœke, za anga bale ga tœ kuni zœ, yé anga bale ga tœ gele zœ.»
20.22: Yisu gi adœke: «'E wuwusœ œrœnœ á 'e esho ndœnœ asœmœ nene. Adja 'e li kœndjo ungu lœ yashi nœ œrœ kanga á mœ ndjo bala ye a?» Endje pa fœ Yisu adœke: «'A li dœ tœnœ ye.»
20.23: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Adjapu, 'e ndjo ungu lœ yashi œrœ kanganœ á mœ ndjo ye. Kashe tœ kœza awa fœ uzu kœsœ ga atɨ ga pa kuni mœ too ga pa gele mœ, asœmœ lili dœ mœ nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ kœdœ osho á sœ fœ endjeneke á Aba mœ guma endje.»
20.24: Udu ayambarœnœ ndjokpa dji o'onœ ataa œ tetœ kœso ókó ga tœ aayazu bisha, Ajake dœ Yowane.
20.25: Kashe Yisu e endje œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E wusœ nœ adœke agbozu sœ kœko azu ogo dœ ɔgbɔ ga tshakudu tshagbozu nœ endje, yé agboro azu sœ kœma gbɔgbɔ endje ga pa aaya azu.
20.26: Œ lili adœke œrœ ataa mbœrœtœ endje ɓa ugurutœ 'e nene. Kashe œdœ anga uzu bale kœgbe kœsœ tœ egerœ uzu ugurutœ 'e, œ li adœke tshe fatœ ye tœ ayi akwa nœ 'e yekane.
20.27: Yé œdœ anga uzu bale kœyindœ kœsœ utshunœ ugurutœ 'e, œ li adœke tshe dœ kanga nœ 'e.
20.28: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Gbolo nœ uzu nana adœke azu mbœrœ akwa fœ she nene, kashe tshe na kœmbœrœ akwa fœ azu dœ pe ndje kœzatœ ye fœ kuzu mbœrœ kœshe ukpu azu.» Yisu she aayibula bisha (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 10.46-52; Luk 18.35-43)
20.29: Lɔkɔ á endje sœ lima kœwuta lœ Yeriko, ukpulu azu te manda Yisu.
20.30: Anga aayibula bisha sœ lima ga atɨ ɨndɨrɨ awa. Kœdji adœke Yisu dá ro asœmœ, endje tetœ kœta rawa adœke: «Gbozu, ata Davidi, wu oyo 'a kane!»
20.31: Ukpulu azu sœ lima kœgbagbara endje adœke endje sœ koko, kashe endje kpa ta tshandœ rawanœ dœ agbɔ adœke: «Gbozu, ata Davidi, wu oyo 'a kane!»
20.32: Yisu ka, œ e endje, yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá 'e yindœ nœ adœke mœ mbœrœ fœ 'e a?»
20.33: Endje kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, kolœnœ adœke ala 'a kɔrɔ.»
20.34: Yisu wu oyo endje, yé œ goro ala endje. Trale ala endje kɔrɔ ye, yé endje te manda ye.

21.1: Lɔkɔ á endje ndo dœ ongbo Yerusaleme œdœ dœ tshalakpɨ Betefaje, ɓa pa gaga á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ kaga ɔyɔ Olive, Yisu vwa anga ayambarœ nœ ye bisha utshunœ
21.2: dœ kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E na ɓa lakpɨ á sœ utshu 'e ɓa e. Kœli 'e tshendja, 'e wu aya ane á endje du she kpœtœmœ dœ ayinœ, 'e vwara she œ gu dœ she fœ mœ.
21.3: Yé œdœ uzu kœpa o'o fœ 'e; 'e gi fœ she adœke: “Gbozu dá gbe dœ she.” Yé ataa, tshe gi kane ye tœ ye katsha fœ 'e ye.»
21.4: Œ wuta ataa mbœrœ á o'o á ayi kœgbara o'o pa lima kœmbœrœtœ endje. Tshe pa lima adœke:
21.5: «'E pandœ nœ fœ yawuru nœ Siyona adœke: Wu, gbozugo nœ zœ sœ kœna ga ndœ zœ. Tshe sœ kœna ɓata amba uzu. Tshe ɔ ga pa ayi ane, œdœ ga pa ayanœ á tshe dœ aya agea nœ akwa.»
21.6: Ayambarœ ro œ mbœrœ œneke á Yisu pa tœnœ fœ endje.
21.7: Endje gu dœ ayi ane œdœ ayanœ, yé endje ko lœba nœ endje œ guma ga pa endje, á Yisu ɔ á sœ ga pa nœ.
21.8: Ukpulu azu ndjoro saka lœba nœ endje ga tœ ala awa; anga endje de lima ganea ɔyɔ, yé œ guma ga tœ awa.
21.9: Azu á endje sœ lima kœna ɓa utshu ye dœ pe endjeneke á endje sœ lima kœna manda ye, sœ lima kœta rawa adœke: «Ozana nœ ata Davidi! Kaka Ndjaba to kane ye ga pa uzu á tshe na dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu! Ozana fœ Ndjaba á tshe sœ ɓa lafo!»
21.10: Ɔlɔ á Yisu li ga lœ Yerusaleme, tshelœ ongbo djigi turu, azu tetœ kœyu osho adœke: «Uzu ɗe dá a?»
21.11: Azu á endje na lima dœ Yisu gi adœke: «Ayi kœgbara o'o Yisu dœmœ, uzu Nazarete, lœ ogo Galilayi.» Yisu gɔrɔ aayi kœka œrœ lœ Tepelo (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 11.15-19; Luk 19.45-48; Yow 2.13-22)
21.12: Manda nœ, Yisu li ga lœ Tepelo, yé œ gɔrɔ azu á endje sœ lima kœka œrœ dœ pe endjeneke á endje sœ lima kœyɔ œrœ kɔ ga ushu. Tshe ɨvwɨ ndaba nœ azu kœyapa ngendja, œ geta ngande nœ aayi kœka ambepa.
21.13: Yé tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Endje sú ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Anda nœ mœ œ dœ bala anda nœ kœza avwala, kashe 'e fa tœ wutu nœ aayi angba!”»
21.14: Aayibula dœ pe agbangevweta na ga ndœ Yisu ɓa lœ Tepelo yeka á tshe she endje.
21.15: Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ pe aayi kœyisœ awa akwa so ókó ndœ kœwu mara œrœ kœza uvuru osho á tshe sœ lima kœmbœrœ tœnœ dœ pe agbolo á endje sœ lima kœta rawa ɓa lœ Tepelo adœke: «Ozana nœ ata Davidi!»
21.16: Yé endje pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ɓœ sœ kœdji œneke á endje pa asœ zœ a?» Kashe Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ dji ye, ataa 'e dɨdɨ lima mbetinœ asœmœ nene a? Mbetinœ á pa adœke: “Ɓœ mbœrœ dœ mara adœke œdœ agbolo dœ pe aayi mangɔ donga ɓœ.”»
21.17: Manda nœ, tshe katœ endje lœ ongbonœ asœmœ, œ gu kœlo ɓa lœ Betani. Yisu darandœ ɔyɔ fige (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 11.12-14,20-24)
21.18: Osho kɔrɔ panœ dœ amazɨ, lɔkɔ á tshe sœ kœkwatœ ye ga lœ ongbonœ, ogo mi she.
21.19: Tshe wu anga ɔyɔ fige ndoo dœ ama awa, œ na ndoo dœ tœnœ, kashe tshe gbɔgbɔ elenœ bale nene, kolœ kakonœ. Yé tshe pa fœ ɔyɔ figenœ adœke: «Ɓœ kpa le bale nene!» Trale, ɔyɔ figenœ asœmœ ɔrɔ ye.
21.20: Kœwu œrœnœ ataa, ayambarœ katœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ, yé œ yu Yisu adœke: «Kotoo trale á ɔyɔ fige asœke ɔrɔ ata a?»
21.21: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e dœ adjapu, œdœ anga ɔlɔ bale á 'e kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ yé á sœsœ dœ sharapu nene, 'e mbœrœ kolœ œrœ á mœ mbœrœ tœ ɔyɔ fige asœ nene, kashe œdœ 'e kœpa fœ kaga asœ adœke: “Gitœ zœ kpœke dœ́ œ na œ te ga la egerœ ungu adanga”, œ mbœrœ ndje tœ endje liaka nœ.
21.22: Œrœ kɔ á 'e yɔndœ nœ lœ avwala dœ kœyindœrœ, 'e gbɔ ye.» Kœyu o'o tœ tshagbozu nœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 11.27-33; Luk 20.1-8)
21.23: Ɔlɔ á tshe li ga lœ Tepelo, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe agbozu Ikrizia na ga ndœ ye ɔlɔ á tshe sœ kœyisœ œrœ, á yu she adœke: «Ɓœ gbɔ awa kœmbœrœ akwa nœ zœ asœke kpœta a? Œɗe dá za awa kœmbœrœ akwa ata fœ ɓœ a?»
21.24: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ yindœ kœyu 'e dœ o'o bale, œ kœsœ adœke 'e gi o'o fœ mœ gbá yekane á mœ kœyisœ osho á mœ gbɔ awa kœmbœrœ dœ œrœnœ asœ kɔ fœ 'e.
21.25: Œɗe dá vwa lima Yowane kœza batisimu fœ azu a? Œ dœ lima Ndjaba too azu?» Yé endje tetœ kœmirœtshelœ endje ugurutœ endje yé œ pa adœke: «Œdœ a kœgi fœ she adœke: “Ndjaba dá vwa lima she”, tshe yu azœ adœke: “Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e yiyi lima ndœ o'o ama ye nene a?”
21.26: Yé a kpa pa adœke: “Azu dá vwa lima she”, œ li adœke a kpa awa ukpulu azu, mbœrœ azu para wusœ nœ adœke Yowane kœdœ lima ayi kœgbara o'o.»
21.27: Yé á endje gi fœ Yisu adœke: «'A wuwusœ nœ nene.» A Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ ndje awa bale, mœ pa ndje ndœ uzu á tshe za awa nœ kœmbœrœ œrœnœ asœke kɔ fœ 'e nene.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ agbolo yakoshe bisha
21.28: «'E gbe œneke adœ gaɗe tœ o'o asœ a? Anga yakoshe sœ dœ agbolo yakoshe bisha. Tshe na ga ndœ ali gbolonœ, œ pa fœ she adœke: “Na kpesheke ga lœ kɨndɨ vinu œ mbœrœ akwa ɓa zœ.”
21.29: Alinœ gi fœ she adœke: “Œ ngba mœ ye;” manda nœ tshe gbetshelœ ye œ na da ye.
21.30: Tshe kpa na ga ndœ bishanœ, œ pa kolœ nœ ata fœ she. Tsheneke asœ gi fœ she adœke: “Mœ na zœ Gbozu”, kashe tshe nana ga zœ nene.
21.31: Uzu ɗe ugurutœ endje bisha dá mbœrœ gbetshelœ nœ abanœ a?» Endje gi adœke: «Ali gbolonœ.» Á Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Dœ adjapu, mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e, ayi kœko ngendja lapo dœ pe ayi angba budu œ wuta utshu 'e ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.
21.32: Gbambanœ nene, Yowane na lima ndœ kœyisœ awa á sœ ndjii fœ 'e, 'e yiyindœ nœ nene. Kashe aayi kœko ngendja lapo dœ pe aayi angba budu dá yindœ ye. Yé ataa 'e wu gbaa, 'e fafatshalɔsu 'e ndœ kpa kœyindœ ye nene.» Ndœma toro nœ ayi kœdjo kɨndɨ (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 12.1-12; Luk 20.9-19)
21.33: «'E kpa dji anga ndœma toro. Anga uzu bale djo kɨndɨ vinu. Tshe tɔ gbadjadja dji tœnœ tshakpata, œ dji kudu mbœrœ kœpu ele vinunœ ga lœnœ, yé œ mɔ anda kœgbɔndœ œrœ ga lœ nœ. Manda nœ, tshe za kɨndɨ nœ fœ aayi akwa kɨndɨ vinu, yé œ na ana.
21.34: Ɔlɔ kœkɔ ele vinunœ li, tshe vwa anga aayi akwa nœ ye fœ aayi akwa kɨndɨ vinunœ adœke endje vwa œsœ œnœ œne ele vinu nœ fœ œne.
21.35: Kashe endje ko aayi akwa nœ ye asœmœ, œ ɓi anga bale, œ wo anga yé œ wo votɔnœ dœ badja.
21.36: Tshe kpa vwa anga aayi akwa ndjoro, kœropa endjeneke má utshunœ, endje mbœrœ kolœ nœ fœ endje awa bale.
21.37: Tœ ndɔngɔlɔ nœ, tshe vwa gbolo yakoshe nœ ye fœ endje dœ gbetshelœ adœke: “Endje kpa lɨ ndara œsœ ye yé.”
21.38: Kashe lɔkɔ á endje wu gbolonœ kœna ga ndœ endje, endje guma o'o lœ ugurutœ endje adœke: “'E wu, gbolonœ á tshe sœpe dœ œrœ manda abanœ dœke. A wo she yeka á kɨndɨnœ kœte œnœ azœ.”
21.39: Endje za she œ vwi she ga ushu lœ kɨndɨ vinunœ yeka á wo she.»
21.40: «Ataa, lɔkɔ á ayengɔ kɨndɨnœ kœna, tshe mbœrœ œrœ gaɗe tœ aayi akwa kɨndɨ vinunœ a?»
21.41: Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Tshe na œ wo aayi akwa kɨndɨnœ kɔ dœ oyo nene yé œ kpa za kɨndɨnœ fœ anga angbɨ aayi akwa á endje li kœko ele vinunœ fœ she liaka olo á tshe gbe dœ tœnœ.»
21.42: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E dɨdɨ damba o'onœ asœke ala buku nœ Ndjaba nene a? Endje su adœke: “Badja á ayi kœmɔ anda za vwi'i, tœnœ dá wuta sharagunda. Œ to ɓa ndœ Gbozu, yé œ ga tœ ala 'a waa!”»
21.43: «Mœ kpa pa ndje fœ 'e adœke: Endje gi 'e lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba, yé œ za fœ angbɨ azu á endje li kœmbœrœ akwa á œrœ tshangbanœ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ. [
21.44: Uzu á tshe te pa badja asœmœ, tshe kɔ ngende ngende. Yé tsheneke á badja œ te ga pa ye, œ ndɨ tshelœ ye krœna.]»
21.45: Manda kœdji o'o asœmœ, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe Afarisayi wusœ nœ adœke Yisu sœ kœpa o'o asœ tœ œne.
21.46: Endje para lima awa ndœ kœtepa ye, kashe endje kpa awa ukpulu azu, mbœrœ endje sœ lima kœza she ɓata ayi kœgbara o'o.

22.1: Yisu tetœ kœpa 'o fœ endje dœ ndœma toro adœke:
22.2: «Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo sœ ɓata anga gbozugo á tshe guma kœzɨrœ angbo totœ nœ gbolo yakoshe nœ ye.
22.3: Tshe vwa aayi akwa nœ ye fœ azu á tshe e má endje ndœ angbonœ, kashe endje yiyindœ kœna tœnœ nene.
22.4: Tshe kpa vwa anga angbɨ aayi akwa ndœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ azu á tshe e endje adœke: “'E na ga mœ ngɔngɔ asœ, mœ guma kœzɨrœnœ ye; mœ wo angombe nœ mœ dœ pe agea ojoro. 'E na ga mœ ndœ angbo totœnœ, œrœ kɔ gumatœ endje ye.”
22.5: Kashe azunœ gbegbe dœ angbonœ nene, yé œ na ndœ akwa nœ endje: Anga na ga lœ kɨndɨ, anga na kœpara ngendja nœ ye;
22.6: anga endje tepa aayi akwanœ, á mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ endje yé á wo endje.
22.7: Gbozugo su dœ ókó, œ vwa aturugu nœ ye endje wo azu á endje wo aayi akwa nœ ye, yé œ sho ongbo nœ endje.
22.8: Manda nœ, tshe pa fœ aayi akwa nœ ye adœke: “Mœ guma kœzɨrœ angbo ye, kashe azu á mœ e endje, œ dœ́dœ́ azu á li má adœke mœ e endje dœmœ nene.
22.9: 'E ro ɓa lœ shangbeda awa, dœ́ œ e azu kɔ á 'e gbɔ endje gu tœnœ ndœ kœzɨrœ.”
22.10: Aayi akwanœ asœmœ wuta ga lœ shangbeda awa, œ ngbɔɓa azu kɔ á endje gbɔ endje gu tœnœ: Œdœ aekpe azu, œdœ ɔtshɔ azu. Yé dœ tœnœ ataa, anda angbonœ su kperœ dœ azu.
22.11: «Lɔkɔ á gbozugo li ndœ kœwu azu á endje sœ pa ndaba nœ kœzɨrœ, tshe wu anga uzu bale, tshe veverœ lœba angbonœ nene.
22.12: Tshe yu she adœke: “Yanga mœ, ɓœ sœsœ dœ lœba angbo nene, ɓœ li ga mœ koto o?” Tshe gigi o'o nene.
22.13: Yé á gbozugo kœpandœ nœ fœ aayi akwa nœ ye adœke: “'E i ada ye dœ kane ye ga tœnœ, œ vwi she ga ushu ɓa lœ ubu osho, osho á azu sœ kœkɨ tœnœ dœ kœzɨ tshelœ daji endje gbagbara gbagbara.”
22.14: Adjapu, endje e azu ndjoro, kashe endjeneke á endje ke endje ngbangba nene.» Lapo nœ Sezare (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 12.13-17; Luk 20.20-26)
22.15: Yé Afarisayi ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ ndœ kœvwarandœ Yisu adœke œne gbɔ she tœ o'o ama ye.
22.16: Endje vwa anga ayambarœ nœ endje dœ pe azu nœ Erode mbœrœ kœpa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, 'a wusœ nœ adœke ɓœ sœ kœpa okporo o'o, ɓœ sœ kœyisœ adja awa Ndjaba, ɓœ sœ ndje kœkatœ zœ tɨ fœ uzu adœke tshe li ga lœ zœ dœ ekpe o'o nene. Ɓœ kpakpa awa uzu nene, œ wuwu ndje tshatshu uzu nene.
22.17: Ataa, pandœ gbetshelœ nœ zœ fœ a'a kane: œ li adœke azu yɔ lapo nœ Sezare a, too nene?»
22.18: Kashe Yisu wu lima sœ ekpe gbetshelœ nœ endje ye, yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Awulapatshɔ, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœyu tshelœma mœ a?
22.19: 'E ma anga ngendja bale nœ kœyɔ dœ laponœ gamœ mœ wu kane.» Endje ma anga denarinœ bale fœ she.
22.20: Yisu yu endje adœke: «Tshatshu uzu asœke dœ pe ɨ'ɨrɨ á endje sú asœke kœdœ œnœ ɗe?»
22.21: Endje gi adœke: «Œnœ Sezare». Yé Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E gi œrœ nœ Sezare fœ Sezare, œnœ Ndjaba fœ Ndjaba.»
22.22: Kœdji o'onœ asœmœ ataa, endje katœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ, œ katœ ye yé œ ro da ye. Upu nœ kœshe lœ akuzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 12.18-27; Luk 20.27-40)
22.23: Kolœ dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, anga Asadukayi na ga ndœ Yisu. Endje dá sœ kœpa adœke kœshe lœ akuzu gugu nene. Á endje yu Yisu adœke:
22.24: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, Moyize pa adœke, œdœ uzu kœtshu á kœzuzu gbolo nene, ayanœ œ to koyanœ manda ye mbœrœ á tshe kœmbœrœ angwa fœ ayanœ á tshe tshu asœmœ.
22.25: Andaa ɓa ndœ 'a, 'a sœ dœ anga ayazu mindu dœ bisha (7). Alinœ to yashe, œ zuzu gbolo dœ she nene, œ tshu ye; ɓata á endje zuzu lima dœ yashenœ asœmœ nene, tshe katœ ye tɨ fœ ayanœ.
22.26: Œ mbœrœtœ endje awa bale ataa ga tœ bisha ayanœ, ga tœ votɔ ayanœ œrrr ga tœ tshenœ mindu dœ bisha.
22.27: Manda endje para, yashenœ kœtshu ye.
22.28: Atamœ, dœ olo kœshe lœ akuzu yashenœ asœmœ œdœ awo ɗe? Mbœrœ endje mindu dœ bisha (7) kɔ to lima she tœ awo endje yema a!»
22.29: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «'E sœ lœ djingili, mbœrœ 'e wuwusœ buku nœ Ndjaba dœ pe gbɔgbɔ nœ ye nene.
22.30: Ɔlɔ kœshe lœ akuzu, ayakoshe dœ ayashe œ totœ endje nene kashe endje lœ ɓata aandjelu ɓa lafo.
22.31: Œ kœdœ tœ o'o nœ kœshe lœ akuzu, 'e dɨdɨ o'o á Ndjaba pa fœ 'e ala buku nœ ye nene a? Tshe pa adœke:
22.32: “Œmœ kœdœ Ndjaba nœ Abrayamo, Ndjaba nœ Izaka œdœ Ndjaba nœ Yakobo.” Yisu kpa pa adœke, Ndjaba kœdœ Ndjaba nœ asoro kashe tshenœ akuzu nene.»
22.33: Kœdji o'onœ ataa, ukpulu azu za lima ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ tœ kœyisœrœ nœ ye. Awa o'o á ropa anganœ kɔ (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 12.28-34; Luk 10.25-28)
22.34: Lɔkɔ á Afarisayi dji adœke Yisu ngbɔ ama Asadukayi ga tœnœ, endje ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ.
22.35: Yé anga ayi kœyisœ awa akwa yu she ndœ kœdji gbetshelœ nœ ye adœke:
22.36: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, awa o'o gaɗe dá ropa anganœ lœ awa akwa a?»
22.37: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Œ li adœke ɓœ yindœ Gbozu Ndjaba nœ zœ dœ lɔsu zœ bale, dœ ɨshirɨ zœ kɔ, dœ pe gbetshelœ nœ zœ kɔ.
22.38: Asœmœ kœdœ awa o'o á ropa anganœ yé œ sœ ndje dœ ádá waa.
22.39: Bisha awa o'onœ á sœ ndje dœ ádá waa awa bale dœke: “Ɓœ yindœ yanga zœ ɓata á ɓœ yindœtœ zœ dœ tœ zœ.”
22.40: Awa akwa kɔ œdœ pe aayi kœgbara o'o kɔ to lœ awa o'onœ bisha asœke.» Masiya œdœ Davidi (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 12.35-37; Luk 20.41-44)
22.41: Afarisayi ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje ga tœnœ yé Yisu yu endje dœ o'o atake:
22.42: «'E gbe má œnœ 'e kotoo tœ upu nœ Masiya a? Œshe kœdœ ata ɗe?» Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Ata Davidi.»
22.43: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Koto yeka á ɨshirɨ pa lima fœ Davidi adœke tshe e she “Gbozu” a? Gbambanœ nene, Davidi pa adœke:
22.44: “Gbozu pa fœ Gbozu nœ mœ adœke: na œ sœ ga pa kuni mœ, œrrr ga tœnœ adœke mœ ko ayingba zœ ga tshakudu ada zœ yekane.”
22.45: «Œdœ Davidi kœ'e she lima Gbozu ataa, koto á tshe pkpa dœ ata nœ a?»
22.46: Uzu bale lili lima kœgi o'o fœ she nene. Yé kœto kpœtœ olonœ asœmœ, uzu bale kpa yuyu she dœ o'o nene.

23.1: Yé Yisu sœ lima kœpa 'o fœ ukpulu azu dœ pe fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke:
23.2: «Aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ Afarisayi kœdœ azu á endje sœ mbœrœ kœpandœ awa akwa nœ Moyize.
23.3: Ataa, 'e mbœrœtœ 'e lindœ o'o endje yé œ mbœrœ œneke kɔ á endje pa fœ 'e; Kashe 'e zaza angwa kœmbœrœ œrœ nœ endje nene, mbœrœ endje sœsœ kœza œneke á endje sœ kœyisœ nœ ga tœ akwa nene.
23.4: Endje sœ kœi kɨkɨlɨ kongba yé œ sœ kœko ga pa kanga azu; kashe endje dœ tœ endje, endje gogoro bale dœ yɔkɔne endje nene.
23.5: Œrœ kɔ á endje sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ, endje sœ kœmbœrœ dœ mara adœke azu wusœ œne. Ataa, œnœ endje ndœma lœba á endje sú o'o ama Ndjaba ga tœnœ yé á i ga pa ala endje too ga tœ kane endje sœ tœ egerœnœ. Œnœ endje apara yɔgbɔdɔ lœba sœ kpi tœ œnœ anga endje.
23.6: Endje yindœ kœsœ ɓa utshunœ ɓa tœ osho á œsœnœ lɨ œdœ kœsœ lœ ngande á sœ ɓa utshunœ lœ Sinagoga.
23.7: Endje yindœ nœ adœke azu bala œne tœ osho angbɔtœ yé œ e œne “Rabi ” yekane.
23.8: «Kashe e'e, 'e eetœ 'e “Rabi” nene, mbœrœ e'e kɔ kœdœ ayazu, yé 'e sœ dœ Rabi kolœ tshebale.
23.9: 'E ee uzu bale pa ɔshɔ asœ “Aba” nene, mbœrœ 'e sœ dœ Aba 'e kolœ tshebale á tshe sœ ɓa lafo.
23.10: 'E yiyindœ nœ adœke endje e 'e “Agbangba kœyisœrœ” nene, mbœrœ 'e sœ kolœ dœ gbangba kœyisœrœ bale á tshe kœdœ Kristu.
23.11: Œ li adœke uzu á tshe dœ egerœ uzu ugurutœ 'e dœ ayi akwa nœ 'e.
23.12: Uzu á tshe tɨtœ ye ga lafo, endje ku she ga atɨ, yé tsheneke á tshe zatœ ye ga atɨ, endje tɨ she ga lafo.» Yisu gbagbara wulapatshɔ nœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 12.40; Luk 11.39-52; Luk 20.45-47)
23.13: «Oyo nœ 'e dœ ayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ awulapatshɔ Afarisayi! 'E sœ kœtshu manda Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo utshu azu. E'e dœ tœ 'e, 'e sœsœ kœli ga zœ nene, yé 'e sœ kœkɔ endjeneke á endje gbe ndœ kœli tœnœ, kœli ga zœ.» [
23.14: «Oyo nœ 'e dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ awulapatshɔ Afarisayi; 'e sœ kœpara awa kɔ kœko œrœ á ayashe koya sœ dœ tœnœ kɔ tœ endje, 'e sœ ndje kœza avwala dœ o'o ndjoro mbœrœ kœmatœ 'e. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Ndjaba œ wa bala ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ 'e.]»
23.15: «Oyo nœ 'e dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ awulapatshɔ Afarisayi, 'e sœ kœkɔrɔ na tœnœ djezœ mbœrœ kœpara anga uzu bale adœke tshe fatshalɔsu ye, yé lɔndɔ á 'e mbœrœ á tshe fatshalɔsu ye, 'e kpa sœ kœyi she ga lœ kudu owo nœ lifelo awa bisha kœropa 'e.»
23.16: «Oyo nœ 'e, agbozu aayibula! 'E sœ kœpa adœke: “Œdœ uzu kœdarama ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ anda Ndjaba, œ sœsœ dœ o'o nene; kashe œdœ uzu kœdarama ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ɔrœ á sœ ɓa lœ anda Ndjaba, dá tshe mbœrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.”
23.17: Aayi ɨndɨ, aayibula, œrœ gaɗe dá sœ dœ ádá kœropa nœ a: Ɔrœ too Tepelo á mbœrœ adœke ɔrœnœ wuta yerœ a?
23.18: 'E kpa sœ kœpa adœke: “Œdœ uzu kœdarama ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ndaba á endje to œrœ ga panœ fœ Ndjaba, œ sœsœ dœ o'o nene; kashe œdœ uzu kœdarama ye tœ tokóró á endje ko ga panœ, dá tshe mbœrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.”
23.19: Aayibula! Œrœ gaɗe dá sœ dœ ádá kœropa nœ a: Tokóró too ndaba á mbœrœ adœke tokórónœ wuta yerœ a?
23.20: Ataa, uzu á tshe dara ama ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ndaba, dá tshe dara ama ye pa ndabanœ œdœ ndje pe pa œrœ kɔ á sœ panœ.
23.21: Uzu á tshe dara ama ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Tepelo, dá tshe dara ndje ama ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Ndjaba á tshe sœ ɓa zœ.
23.22: Uzu á tshe dara ama ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ tshalafo, dá tshe dara ama ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ngande tshagbozu œdœ ndje dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Ndjaba á tshe sœ panœ.»
23.23: «Oyo nœ 'e, aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ awulapatshɔ Afarisayi! 'E sœ kœko bale lœ ndjokpa lœ kako dɔngɔ á tshafunœ ga waa, kashe 'e sœsœ kœmbœrœtœ 'e lindœ awa akwa á sœ dœ ádá waa nene ɓata: Kœsœ ndjii, kœwu oyo azu dœ pe kœyindœrœ. Œrœ á li má adœke 'e za ga tœ akwa dœmœ, yé œ tshapu kœmbœrœ udunœ nene.
23.24: Agbozu ayibula! 'E sœ kœsa ipi mbœrœ kœwo dœ aya voma, kashe 'e sœ kœmerœ shamo!»
23.25: «Oyo nœ 'e, aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ awulapatshɔ Afarisayi! 'E sœ kœdjutɔ tshapa yashi œdœ pe tshapa saani, kashe tshelœnœ su dœ œrœ nœ angba œdœ dœ œrœ nœ ogo ekperœ nœ 'e.
23.26: Farisayi ayibula, djutɔ tshelœ yashi utshunœ yeka á tshapa nœ kœga ndje.»
23.27: «Oyo nœ 'e, aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ awulapatshɔ Afarisayi! 'E sœ ɓata udu á endje dja tshapanœ dœ imbi ngbeya, á ga kolœ dja ga pa nœ, kashe tshelœnœ su kperœ dœ ngbabi akuzu œdœ dœ tshelœ aka mara ufu œrœ kɔ.
23.28: E'e ndje awa bale dja ga ushu, 'e sœ kœmatœ 'e ɓata azu á endje sœ ndjii tœ ala azu, kashe ɓa lœ 'e, e'e kœdœ awulapatshɔ œdœ aayi ngbɨndɨrœ.»
23.29: «Oyo nœ 'e, aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ awulapatshɔ Afarisayi! 'E sœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ udu mbœrœ aayi kœgbara o'o, yé œ sœ kœguma tshapadu azu á endje sœ ndjii dœ ambara.
23.30: Yé 'e sœ kœpa adœke: “Œdœ 'a kœsœ lima lɔndɔ nœ alata 'a zœ, 'a ngbɔtœ 'a lima dœ endje ndœ kœwo aayi kœgbara o'o nene.”
23.31: Ataa, 'e wusœ nœ dœ tœ 'e adœke e'e kœdœ aata azu á endje wo lima aayi kœgbara o'o ye!
23.32: Yé ngɔngɔ asœke, 'e te lœ kumu kœmbœrœ udu akwa nœ aata 'e!
23.33: E'e kœdœ ayakoro, ukpulu akatsha ayakoro! 'E gbe koto kœkpa awa adœke endje wa ngbanga djofele nœ lifelo 'e a?
23.34: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ kœvwa aayi kœgbara o'o, dœ aayi kœwusœtœ dœ pe aayi kœyisœ awa akwa fœ 'e. 'E wo anga endje, œ kuru anga endje ga pa kurushi, 'e kpa sɔ anga endje dœ ndjapa ɓa lœ Sinagoga nœ 'e œ gɔrɔ endje lœ ongbo dœ ongbo.
23.35: Yé indji azu á endje sœ ndjii á tu lima ga pa ɔshɔ asœmœ, sœ ga pa kumu 'e, kœto ɓa tœ indji Abele á tshe sœ ndjii œrrr ga tœ indji Zakariya, gbolo nœ Barashi á 'e wo lima she ɓa ugurutœ œyerœ osho œdœ ndaba lœ anda Ndjaba.
23.36: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke: Tshangba œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ œ sœ ga pa kumu 'e dœ azu nœ tshakpesheke asœke!» Kœpulœma tœ upu nœ Yerusaleme (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 13.34-35)
23.37: «Yerusaleme, Yerusaleme, œɓœ á ɓœ sœ kœwo aayi kœgbara o'o yé á sœ kœve endjeneke á Ndjaba sœ kœvwa endje fœ ɓœ dœ badja, awa ndjoro mœ yi lima ndœ kœngbɔɓa azu nœ zœ ga tœ œsœnœ bale ɓata á ayi ngato œ ngbɔɓa ayanœ ga tshakudu ombo ye, kashe 'e yiyi lima ndœ nœ nene!
23.38: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Ndjaba œ gi ala ye pa anda nœ 'e, yé anga œrœ bale kpa gu nene.
23.39: Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke: Kœto ngɔngɔnœ asœke, 'e kpa wu mœ nene œrrr ga tœ lɔkɔ á 'e pa adœke: “Kaka Ndjaba to kane ye ga pa uzu á tshe na dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu.”»

24.1: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wuta lima lœ Tepelo á tetœ kœro tœnœ, ayambarœ nœ ye na ndoo dœ she mbœrœ kœma mara á endje mɔ dœ Tepelo.
24.2: Yisu za o'o yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E wu œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ? Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu adœke anga badja bale œ kpa ka ga pa anganœ nene; tshelœnœ œ ndɨ para ye.» Oyo œdœ œrœ kanga (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 13.3-13; Luk 21.7-19)
24.3: Lɔkɔ á Yisu sœ ga atɨ ɓa pa kaga ɔyɔ olive, ayambarœ nœ ye gitœ endje ndoo dœ she ga ɨndɨrɨnœ, yé œ yu she adœke: «Pa fœ 'a kane, dœ ɔlɔ gaɗe dá œrœnœ asœmœ œ mbœrœ má tœ endje a? Yé ambárá gaɗe dá matœ endje dœ olo kœkwa ɓœ œdœ dœ olo kœka tshapashɔ a?»
24.4: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Ala 'e gbɔ, uzu bale fafara 'e nene.
24.5: Gbambanœ nene, azu ndjoro œ na bala dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, œ pa adœke: “Œmœ kœdœ Masiya!” Yé endje fara azu ndjoro.
24.6: Ɔlɔ á 'e kœdjindœ upu nœ koshe á sœ lœ ondonœ œdœ œneke á sœ lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ, awa zaza 'e nene; œ li adœke œrœ ataa wuta yeka, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ damba kœka tshapashɔ dœmœ nene.
24.7: Ogo bale œ nga koshe dœ anga ogo, yé ogo gbozu bale œ nga koshe dœ anga ogo gbozu, egerœ ogo œdœ kœturu ɔshɔ œ za osho ngbangbangba.
24.8: Œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ œ sœ bala ɓata ali kœka œrœ á ka yashe utshu kœzu gbolo.
24.9: «Azu œ ko 'e bala mbœrœ adœke endje ndanga 'e yé œ wo 'e. Angbɨ azu kɔ œ yiangba 'e mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ.
24.10: Yé azu ndjoro œ katœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje; endje tɔ gbandatœ endje dœ pe kœyiangbatœ endje ugurutœ endje.
24.11: Ayi kœgbara o'o nœ wala œ wuta yé œ djingili tshelœ azu ndjoro.
24.12: Manda nœ, ngbɨndɨrœ œ gerœ lœ azu, yé kœyindœsho œ gerœ nene.
24.13: Kashe uzu neke á tshe ka ngbɨrɨ œrrr ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ, œshe asœmœ dá she.
24.14: Endje mɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o ogo gbozu pa ɔshɔ djigi; angbɨ azu kɔ œ dji yeka á manda nœ á tshapashɔ œ ka.» Egerœ oyo (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 13.14-23; Luk 21.20-24)
24.15: «'E wu bala tsheneke á endje e she “ayi kœndɨ œrœ” á ayi kœgbara o'o Daniyele pa lima tœ ye ɓa tœ œyerœ osho. Kaka tsheneke á tshe dɨ mbetinœ asœke wusœ ádánœ!
24.16: Yé œ li adœke endjeneke á endje sœ ɓa lœ ogo Yuda, kpa ga pa kaga.
24.17: Tsheneke á tshe kœsœ ɓa pa anda, œ lili adœke tshe jerœ ga atɨ mbœrœ kœko gbarœ nœ ye ɓa sœnda nœ ye nene.
24.18: Tsheneke á tshe kœsœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ, œ lili adœke tshe kwatœ ye ndœ kœza yɔgbɔdɔ lœba nœ ye nene.
24.19: «Oyo nœ ayashe nguzu œdœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœko ɔngɔ ga lœ ama agbolo dœ olonœ asœmœ!
24.20: 'E za avwala fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ á 'e kœkpakpa dœ yapu nœ ɨzɨ too dœ olo sabata nene.
24.21: Gbambanœ nene, dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, egerœ oyo œ sœ zœ; œ sœ tœ egerœnœ kœrosœ œneke á endje wu ɓa lima kœto kpœtœ ali kœmbœrœ tshapashɔ œrrr ga tœ ngɔngɔ asœke, yé mara œrœ ataa œ kpa mbœrœtœ endje bale nene.
24.22: Œdœ Gbozu kœgbe má lima tœ kœgi ata olonœ nene, uzu bale œ sœpe má dœ soro nene; kashe mbœrœ endjeneke á tshe ke endje dá tshe kundœ átá olonœ asœmœ.
24.23: «Yé œdœ anga uzu kœpa fœ 'e adœke: “Masiya sœ ɓa ke” too “tshe sœ ɓa e”, 'e yiyindœ nœ fœ she nene.
24.24: Gbambanœ nene, aekpe masiya œdœ aayi kœgbara o'o nœ wala œ wuta ndjoro. Endje mbœrœ afá yé œ ma ambárá œrœ ndjoro dœ mara adœke œne djingili tshelœ kumu azu. Œdœ œ kœli ndje, endje mbœrœ ndje awa bale fœ endjeneke á Ndjaba ke endje.
24.25: 'E dji kane! Mœ va tshelœ utu 'e tœnœ utshunœ ye.
24.26: «Œdœ endje kœpa fœ 'e adœke: “'E wu, tshe sœ ɓa lœ kpagagasho”, 'e nana ga zœ nene. Too œdœ endje kœpa fœ 'e adœke: “'e wu, tshe zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ ɓa ke”, 'e yiyindœ nœ nene.
24.27: Ɓata á yavuru œ yerœwa ɓa lafo, kœto ɓa tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ wuta tœnœ œrrr ga tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ li tœnœ, dœ mara ataa dá Gbolo nœ uzu œ na bala dœ tœnœ.
24.28: Osho á oko uzu sœ tœnœ dá adivumbala œ ngbɔtœ endje ɓa zœ.» Ambárá kœna Gbolo nœ uzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 13.24-27; Luk 21.25-28)
24.29: «Manda kœwu oyo nœ olonœ asœmœ, ɔlɔ œ te ubunœ, yapu œ kpa tɔ nene, angerepe œ to ɓa lafo œ yo ga atɨ, gbɔgbɔ nœ tshalafo œ turu.
24.30: Yé ambárá Gbolo nœ uzu œ wuta ɓa lafo; azu kɔ pa ɔshɔ œ dɨtshelœma endje, endje wu Gbolo nœ uzu kœna lœ ondoro dœ gbɔgbɔ djigi œdœ lœ mokɔ.
24.31: Tshe vwa bala aandjelu nœ ye ndœ kœ'uru ngbake tœ osho kɔ pa ɔshɔ: Tshe ngbɔɓa bala endjeneke á tshe ke endje tœ osho kɔ ga tœnœ.» Kœyisœrœ á to lœ ɔyɔ fige (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 13.28-31; Luk 21.29-33)
24.32: «'E dji ádá kœyisœrœ á to lœ ɔyɔ fige: Lɔndɔ á ganeanœ kœyɔrɔtshelœtœ endje, 'e wusœ nœ adœke yapu kœlu ngwarœ ndo ye.
24.33: Œ sœ ndje atamœ fœ 'e, ɔlɔ á 'e kœwu ndje œrœ ataa kœmbœrœtœ endje, 'e wusœ nœ adœke Gbolo nœ uzu ndo ye, tshe sœ lœ manda 'e.
24.34: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu, azu nœ tshakpesheke, endje tshu kɔ nene á œrœnœ œ mbœrœtœ endje.
24.35: Tshalafo dœ tshapa ɔshɔ œ ro ye, kashe o'o ama mœ œ ro nene.» Ndjaba kutɨ ye dá wusœ ndɔngɔlɔ olo (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 13.32-37; Luk 17.26-30,34-36)
24.36: «Kashe olonœ œdœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, uzu bale wuwusœ nœ nene; œdœ aandjelu ɓa lafo, œdœ Gbolo nœ uzu, endje wuwusœ nœ nene, Aba kutɨ ye dá wusœ nœ.
24.37: Lɔndɔ nœ kœna Gbolo nœ uzu, œrœ œ mbœrœtœ endje kolœ ɓata mara œrœ á mbœrœ lima tœ endje dœ lɔkɔ nœ Nowa.
24.38: Gbambanœ nene, dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, utshu lɔkɔ egerœ kœsu ungu pa ɔshɔ djigi, azu sœ lima kœzɨrœ dœ kœndjorœ, endje sœ lima kœtotœ endje too kœko ayawuru nœ endje ndœ totœ œrrr ga tœ olo á Nowa li lima ga lœ egerœ agba.
24.39: Endje sœsœ lima kœgbe dœ œrœ bale nene œrrr á egerœ kœsu ungu na, á endje tara para kɔkɔ. Œ sœ ndje ataa lɔkɔ á Gbolo nœ uzu œ na bala.
24.40: Yé ayakoshe bisha œ sœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ, endje za anga bale, œ katœ anga tɨ.
24.41: Ayashe bisha œ sœ kœtɔ œrœ lœ kafuru, endje za anga bale, œ katœ anga tɨ.
24.42: Ataa, ala 'e gbɔ mbœrœ 'e wuwusœ olo neke á Gbozu nœ 'e œ na dœ tœnœ nene.
24.43: 'E wusœ nœ adœke, œdœ ayengɔ anda kœwusœ ada ɔlɔ nœ butshɔ á ayi angba œ na kœzɨ angba œrœ nœ ye, tshe lo olo nene yé tshe katœ ye adœke tshe to ogoro lœ anda nœ ye nene.
24.44: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, e'e ndje, ala 'e gbɔ mbœrœ Gbolo nœ uzu œ na dœ ada ɔlɔ neke á 'e wuwusœ nœ nene.» Ayi akwa á tshe sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ nœ (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 12.41-48)
24.45: «Ataa, œɗe dá dœ ayi akwa á tshe sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ o'o gbozu nœ ye, yé á sœ ndje dœ kœwusœrœ á gbozu akwa nœ ye za she tœ kapeta nœ anganœ, mbœrœ kœto kœzɨrœ fœ endje liaka ada ɔlɔ dali a?
24.46: Yanga nœ ayi akwanœ asœmœ œdœ gbozunœ kœgu á gbɔ she lœma akwanœ!
24.47: Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e: gbozu œ za she tœ kapeta tshapa œrœ nœ ye kɔ.
24.48: Kashe œdœ œshe kœdœ ekpe ayi akwa, á pa ɓa lɔsu ye adœke: “Gbozu nœ mœ œ gu katsha nene”,
24.49: yé á tetœ kœɓi aayi akwa anganœ, kœzɨ œrœ dœ pe kœndjo œrœ awa bale dœ aayi kœndjorœ,
24.50: gbozu nœ ayi akwanœ asœmœ œ gu dœ olo œdœ dœ ada ɔlɔ á ayi akwanœ wuwusœ nœ nene.
24.51: Tshe gɔrɔ ayi akwanœ, œ mbœrœ œrœ kanga nœ awulapatshɔ fœ she, ɓa tœ osho á azu œ kɨ dœ pe kœzɨ tshelœ daji endje gbagbara gbagbara.»

25.1: «Yé Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo sœ ɓata ɔkpɔ ayawuru ndjokpa á endje ko miinda nœ endje, yé á wuta kœna kœtogba dœ yakoshe totœ.
25.2: Anga endje mindu kœdœ aayi ɨndɨ, anga endje mindu kœdœ aayi kœwusœrœ.
25.3: Kœko miindanœ, aayi ɨndɨnœ mindu susu lima kada ga lœ œnœ endje nene;
25.4: kashe aayi kœwusœrœnœ mindu su lima kada ga lœ anga á na dœ tœnœ dœ miinda nœ endje.
25.5: Ɓata œndœ yakoshenœ sœ lima kœdɨ tœnœ waa, olo mbœrœ endje, endje lo para ye.
25.6: «Lœ ɔgbɔ butshɔ, anga uzu bale tetœ rawa adœke: “'E wu, yakoshenœ dá yi kumu ye asœ; 'e wuta ndœ ye.”
25.7: Ɔkpɔ ayawurunœ kœjo para yé kœtetœ kœguma miinda nœ endje.
25.8: Aayi ɨndɨnœ kœpa fœ ayi kœwusœrœ adœke: “'E su anga kada nœ 'e fœ 'a mbœrœ œnœ 'a miindanœ sœ kœru tœnœ.”
25.9: Aayi kœwusœrœ kœgi fœ endje adœke: “Œ ngba 'a ye, œ gegerœ yeka á 'a kœsu mbœrœ 'a œdœ fœ 'e nene. 'E na œ yɔ œne 'e ɓa ndœ aayi kœka œrœ.”
25.10: Lɔndɔ á aayi ɨndɨnœ ro kœyɔ kadanœ ga zœ atake, yakoshe totœnœ yi kumu ye. Akpɔ ayawuru mindu á endje guma má tœ endje yindjindjinœ asœmœ, li dœ she ga sœnda angbo totœnœ, yé endje kœtshu mandanœ ga tœnœ ye.
25.11: Œndœnœ dɨ manda nœ, ɔkpɔ ayawuru ɨndɨnœ gu œ tetœ kœ'e osho adœke: “Gbozu, gbozu, kɔrɔ manda fœ 'a ka!”
25.12: Kashe tshe gi adœke: “Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke, mœ wuwusœ 'e nene.”
25.13: Atamœ, ala 'e gbɔ, mbœrœ 'e wuwusœ olo dœ pe ada ɔlɔ nene.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ ngendja (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 19.11-27)
25.14: «Œ sœ bala ɓata anga yakoshe á tshe yi lima ndœ kœna ana: Tshe e aayi akwa nœ ye œ katœ œrœ nœ ye fœ endje.
25.15: Tshe ko fœ anga talata mindu, anga talata bisha, fœ votɔnœ talata bale: Tshe ko fœ uzu dœ uzu liaka gbɔgbɔ nœ ye. Manda nœ, tshe ro daye.
25.16: Ayi akwa á tshe gbɔ talata mindu gu œ za ga tœ akwa, yé œ kpa gbɔ anganœ mindu ga panœ.
25.17: Tsheneke á tshe gbɔ talata bisha mbœrœ ndje awa bale, yé œ kpa gbɔ talata bisha ga panœ.
25.18: Kashe tsheneke á tshe gbɔ talata bale, gu œ dji kudu ɓa lœ ɔshɔ, yé œ za talata bale nœ gbozu akwa nœ ye yiwa tœnœ ga lœ nœ.»
25.19: «Œndœnœ kœdɨ œrrr manda nœ, gbozu nœ aayi akwanœ asœmœ gu, yé œ tetœ kœyu endje tœ akwa á tshe ka lima tœnœ fœ endje.
25.20: Tsheneke á tshe gbɔ lima talata mindu gitœ ye ndoo, œ pa adœke: “Gbozu, wu, ɓœ ko lima talata mindu fœ mœ. Anganœ mindu á mœ gbɔ ga panœ dœke.”
25.21: Gbozu nœ ye pa fœ she adœke: “Œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, œɓœ kœdœ ɔtshɔ ayi akwa yé ɓœ mbœrœtœ zœ lindœ nœ. Ɓata á ɓœ mbœrœtœ zœ lindœ nœ lœ aya akwa ataa, mœ za ɓœ ga pa egerœnœ. Na ga mœ œ sœ dœ yanga awa bale dœ gbozu nœ zœ.”
25.22: Tsheneke á tshe gbɔ lima talata bisha na ndje œne ye, yé œ pa adœke: “Gbozu, ɓœ ko lima talata bisha fœ mœ. Anganœ bisha á mœ gbɔ ga panœ dœke.”
25.23: Gbozu nœ ye pa fœ she adœke: “Œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, œɓœ kœdœ ɔtshɔ ayi akwa yé ɓœ mbœrœtœ zœ lindœ nœ. Ɓata á ɓœ mbœrœtœ zœ lindœ nœ lœ aya akwa ataa, mœ za ɓœ ga pa egerœnœ. Na ga mœ œ sœ dœ yanga awa bale dœ gbozu nœ zœ.”
25.24: «Tsheneke á tshe gbɔ lima talata bale kœna, yé á kœpa œnœ ye adœke: “Gbozu, mœ wu lima sœ nœ adœke œɓœ kœdœ gbozu á ɓœ ngaanga: Ɓœ sœ kœkɔ ngwarœ á œ dœ́dœ́ ɓœ dá lu nene, ɓœ sœ kœkɔ ngwarœ ɓa tœ osho á ɓœ lulu œrœ bale nene.
25.25: Awa za mœ, yé á mœ na á za talata nœ zœ yiwa tœnœ ga lœ ɔshɔ. Wu, œrœ nœ zœ dœke.”
25.26: Kashe gbozu nœ ye gi fœ she adœke: “Ekpe ayi akwa, ayi ɔdɔ! Ɓœ wu lima sœ nœ adœke mœ sœ kœkɔ ngwarœ á œ dœ́dœ́ mœ dá lu nene, mœ sœ kœkɔ ngwarœ ɓa tœ osho á mœ lulu œrœ bale nene.
25.27: Ataa, œ li má adœke ɓœ ko ngendja nœ mœ ga lœ anda kœgumasœ ngendja, yé á mœ kœgu má atake, á kœgbɔ anga œrœ nœ mœ ga pa nœ.
25.28: 'E za talatanœ asœmœ bale tœ ye, yé œ za fœ tsheneke á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ ndjokpa asœmœ.
25.29: Gbambanœ nene, uzu kɔ á tshe sœ dœ œrœ ndjoro, endje to anganœ ga panœ fœ she. Tsheneke á tshe gugu dœ œrœ nene, endje ko œneke teasho á tshe sœpe dœ tœnœ, tœ ye yé.
25.30: Tœ ayi akwanœ á ádá ye gugu nene asœ, 'e vwi she ga lœ ubu osho ɓa shu: Ɓa zœ kœdœ kolœ ɨkɨ œdœ kœ zɨ tshelœ daji gbagbara gbagbara.”» Ndɔngɔlɔ kœwa ngbanga
25.31: «Lɔkɔ á Gbolo nœ uzu œ na bala lœ mokɔ nœ ye dœ aandjelu para, tshe sœ ɓa pa ngande tshagbozu nœ mokɔ nœ ye.
25.32: Azu ogo kɔ pa ɔshɔ œ ngbɔtœ endje ɓa utshu ye, yé tshe kurutshelœ azu dœ azu ɓata á ayi kœgbɔndœ ayarœ œ kurutshelœ apata dœ ayaburu.
25.33: Tshe ko apata ga tœ kuni ye, yé œ ko ayaburu ga tœ gele ye.
25.34: Yé gbozugo œ pa fœ endjeneke á endje sœ ga tœ kuni ye adœke: “'E na ga mœ, e'e á Aba mœ to kane ye ga pa 'e. 'E li ga lœ ogo tshagbozu á endje guma ɓa lima sœ nœ fœ 'e, kœtotœ kœmbœrœ tshapashɔ.
25.35: Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ lima dœ ogo yé 'e to kœzɨrœ fœ mœ; mœ sœ lima dœ ogo ungu yé 'e su ungu fœ mœ; mœ dœ lima gene yé 'e za osho kœsœ fœ mœ;
25.36: mœ sœ lima kpendronœ yé 'e za lœba fœ mœ; mœ sœ lima dœ koɓa yé 'e na ndœ kœtɨtœ mœ; mœ sœ lima lœ anda kánga yé 'e na kœwu mœ.”
25.37: «Yé azu á endje sœ ndjii gi fœ she adœke: “Gbozu, lɔkɔ gaɗe á 'a wu lima ɓœ dœ ogo yé á to kœzɨrœ fœ ɓœ a, dœ ogo ungu yé á su ungu fœ ɓœ a?
25.38: Lɔkɔ gaɗe á 'a wu lima ɓœ tœ gene yé á za osho kœsœ fœ ɓœ a? Lɔkɔ gaɗe dá 'a wu lima ɓœ kpendronœ yé á za lœba fœ ɓœ a?
25.39: Lɔkɔ gaɗe dá 'a wu lima ɓœ dœ koɓa too lœ anda kánga yé á 'a na kœwu ɓœ a?”
25.40: Yé gbozugo œ gi fœ endje adœke: “Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke: Ɔlɔ kɔ á 'e sœ lima kœmbœrœ œrœnœ asœmœ fœ anga aaya lœ aaya mœ á œsœ endje lɨlɨ nene, œmœ dá 'e sœ lima kœmbœrœ tœnœ fœ mœ asœmœ.”
25.41: «Manda nœ, tshe pa bala fœ endjeneke á endje sœ ga pa gele ye adœke: “'E gitœ 'e zara tœ mœ, e'e dœ azu á endje darandœ 'e! 'E na œ yo ga la owo á ru nene, á endje guma fœ djaboro dœ aandjelu nœ ye.
25.42: Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ lima dœ ogo yé 'e toto kœzɨrœ fœ mœ nene; mœ sœ lima dœ ogo ungu yé 'e susu ungu kœndjo tœnœ fœ mœ nene;
25.43: mœ na lima tœ gene yé 'e zaza osho kœsœ fœ mœ nene; mœ sœ lima kpendronœ yé 'e zaza lœba fœ mœ nene; mœ sœ lima dœ koɓa yé 'e nana œ tɨtœ mœ nene; mœ sœ lima lœ anda kánga yé 'e nana œ wu mœ nene.”
25.44: Yé endje ndje, endje gi bala adœke: “Gbozu, ɔlɔ gaɗe dá 'a wu lima ɓœ dœ ogo too dœ ogo ungu, tœ gene too kpendronœ a, dœ koɓa too lœ anda kánga yeka á gbegbe lima dœ ɓœ nene a?”
25.45: Yé tshe gi bala fœ endje adœke: “Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu, ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ á 'e mbœmbœrœ lima œrœnœ asœmœ fœ anga aya bale ugurutœ aaya mœ á œsœ endje lɨlɨ nene, 'e mbœmbœrœ ndje lima fœ mœ nene.”
25.46: Yé endjeneke œ li bala ga lœ djofele neke á ka nene. Andaa, azu á endje sœ ndjii œ li bala ga lœ soro nœ waa dœ waa.»

26.1: Lɔkɔ á Yisu mɨndœ upunœ asœmœ kɔkɔ ye, tshe pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke:
26.2: «'E wusœ nœ adœke œ sœpe olo bisha kœwuta ga tœ angbo nœ pake: Endje za Gbolo nœ uzu yɔ œrœ ndœ kœkuru she ga pa kurushi.»
26.3: Yé agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe agbozu Ikrizia ngbɔtœ endje ɓa sœnda nœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Kayifa.
26.4: Endje djitœ endje yé œ wa adœke œne frandœ Yisu œ tepa ye yeka á kœ wo she.
26.5: Endje sœ lima kœpa adœke: «Œ lili adœke a za she dœ lɔndɔ angbonœ nene, ete nene azu œ oma ye.» Anga yashe su yombo ga lœ kumu Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 14.3-9; Yow 12.1-8)
26.6: Lɔkɔ á Yisu sœ lima ɓa lœ Betani ɓa sœnda nœ ayi boroma Shimu,
26.7: anga yashe bale na dœ yombo nœ ye lœ anga á endje mbœrœ dœ albatre , ama yombonœ gbɔ waa. Tshe su yombonœ ga lœ kumu Yisu lɔndɔ á tshe sœ pa ndaba kœzɨ œrœ.
26.8: Lɔkɔ á ayambarœ nœ ye wu ataa, endje sœ dœ ekpe lɔsu yé œ pa adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á tshe ndɨ ungu yombonœ asœ ataa?
26.9: Œ li má adœke endje ka yombonœ asœmœ dœ amanœ tœ ɔgbɔnœ yé œ kurutshelœ ngendjanœ tœ aayi oyo.»
26.10: Yisu wusœ nœ lima adœke endje sœ kœpa ataa, yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœndanga yashenœ asœke a? Œrœ á tshe mbœrœ fœ mœ kœdœ ɔtshɔrœ.
26.11: Gbambanœ nene, 'e sœ tœ œsœnœ dœ aayi oyo ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ. Kashe œmœ, 'e sœ dœ mœ awa bale waa nene.
26.12: Tshe su yombonœ asœmœ kpɔɔ ga tœ ɔkɔ mœ mbœrœ kœguma mœ ndœ kœshi mœ.
26.13: Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke: Osho kɔ á endje pandœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœke tœnœ pa tshapashɔ djigi, endje pandœ œrœ á yashe asœke mbœrœ, yé endje gbe dœ she.» Kœvatɔ osho nœ Yuda (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 14.10-11; Luk 22.3-6)
26.14: Yé anga yambarœ bale lœ andjokpa dœ bisha á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yudasi Isikariote, na ga ndœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba,
26.15: yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá 'e za fœ mœ œdœ mœ kœza she yɔ œrœ fœ 'e a?» Endje dɨ langere ngendja zazu bale dœ ndjokpa (30), yé á ko fœ she.
26.16: Kœto pe dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, Yuda tetœ kœpara awa ndœ kœza Yisu fœ endje. Yisu zɨ œrœ angbo pake dœ ayambarœ nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 14.12-21; Luk 22.7-14,21-23; Yow 13.21-30)
26.17: Dœ ali olo nœ angbo nœ mapa á susuku nene, ayambarœ na kœyu Yisu adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ nœ adœke 'a guma kœzɨrœ nœ pake fœ ɓœ kpœta a?»
26.18: Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «'E na ɓa ndœ anga uzu bale lœ ongbo yé œ pa fœ she adœke: “Gbozu pa adœke: Ada ɔlɔ nœ mœ li ye; mœ mbœrœ angbo pake dœ ayambarœ nœ mœ ɓa ndœ zœ.”»
26.19: Ayambarœnœ mbœrœ ɓata á tshe pa tœnœ fœ endje, yé œ guma œrœ angbo Pakenœ.
26.20: Lɔkɔ á ɔlɔ dɨ, Yisu sœ pa ndaba kœzɨrœ dœ ayambarœ ndjokpa dœ bisha.
26.21: Lɔndɔ á endje sœ kœzɨrœ, tshe kœpa adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu, anga yanga 'e bale œ za mœ yɔ œrœ zœ.»
26.22: Oyo kœza endje, endje kœtetœ kœyu she uzu dœ uzu adœke: Œ dœ mœ a, Gbozu?
26.23: Tshe kœgi adœke: «Œshe á tshe ngbɔ kane ye lœ gbarœ kœzɨrœ awa bale dœ mœ asœmœ, œshe dá za mœ yɔ œrœ.
26.24: Gbolo nœ uzu œ tshu ɓata á endje sú lima ala buku nœ Ndjaba tœ upu nœ ye. Kashe oyo nœ uzu á tshe za Gbolo nœ uzu yɔ œrœ. Œ sœ má dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ uzunœ adœke adja endje zuzu she nene!»
26.25: Yudasi, á tshe sœ kœza she yɔ œrœ, za o'o œ pa adœke: «Œdœ mœ a, Gbozu?» Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ dœ tœ zœ ɓœ pa ye.» Ndɔngɔlɔ kœzɨrœ nœ Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 14.22-26; Luk 22.14-20; 1Ko 11.23-25)
26.26: Dœ lɔndɔ kœzɨ œrœ, Yisu za mapa œ donga Ndjaba, œ kavwa tshelœnœ, œ ko fœ ayambarœ nœ ye, yé œ pa adœke: «'E ko œ zɨ, asœ kœdœ undu mœ.»
26.27: Manda nœ, tshe za ndje yashi vinu, œ donga Ndjaba, yé œ za fœ endje dœ kœpa adœke: «E'e kɔ 'e ndjo,
26.28: mbœrœ asœke kœdœ indji mœ, indji á guma ayo ugurutœ Ndjaba dœ azu, indji á tu mbœrœ azu ndjoro œdœ mbœrœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ azu.
26.29: Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke, mœ kpa ndjo vinu nene œrrr ga tœ lɔkɔ á mœ ndjo bala tafonœ dœ 'e ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Aba mœ.»
26.30: Manda kœdonga Ndjaba dœ itshi, endje wuta ndœ kœɔ ga pa kaga ɔyɔ Olive. Yisu pa adœke Petro œ 'ea œne (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 14.27-31; Luk 22.31-34; Yow 13.36-38)
26.31: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Lœ butshɔ asœ, e'e kɔ 'e katœ mœ tɨ ye. Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Mœ ɓi bala ayi kœgbɔndœ apata, yé ukpulu apatanœ œ ndjɔtshelœtœ endje.”
26.32: Kashe, Yisu kpa pa adœke: Lɔkɔ á Ndjaba kœshe mœ lœ kuzu, mœ na utshu 'e ga lœ Galilayi.»
26.33: Petro za o'o œ pa fœ she adœke: «Œdœ azu kɔ kœkatœ zœ tɨ, œmœ, mœ katœ zœ tɨ nene.»
26.34: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Mœ pa fœ ɓœ dœ adjapu adœke, dœ butshɔnœ asœke utshunœ adœke kɔngato kɨ, ɓœ 'ea mœ awa votɔ.»
26.35: Petro pa fœ she adœke: «Œdœ œ kœsœ adœke a tshu dœ ɓœ, mœ 'ea ɓœ bale nene.» Yé ayambarœnœ kɔ pa ndje awa bale. Yisu ɓa lœ Getesemane (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 14.32-42; Luk 22.39-46)
26.36: Yisu wuta dœ ayambarœ nœ ye ɓa tœ anga osho á endje e ɨ'ɨrɨnœ Getesemane, yé á pa fœ endje adœke: «'E sœ ga atɨ kpœke, mœ sœ kœna kœza avwala ɓa 'e.»
26.37: Tshe za Petro œdœ agbolo yakoshe nœ Zebedayi bisha á na dœ endje. Tshe tetœ kœgbɔ oyo tœ lɔsu ye, yé awa li she gɔrɔ.
26.38: Yé á tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Lɔsu mœ su kperœ dœ oyo nœ kuzu. 'E sœ kpœke yé œ lolo nene awa bale dœ mœ.»
26.39: Tshe gitœ ye zara œ te dœ tshatshu ye ga tœ ɔshɔ, œ za avwala adœke: «Aba mœ, œdœ œ kœli, gi yashi œrœ kanganœ asœke zara tœ mœ ye. Œ sœsœ adœke ɓœ mbœrœ œneke á mœ yindœ nœ nene, kashe mbœrœ ɓata á ɓœ yindœ nœ.»
26.40: Manda nœ, tshe gu ga ndœ ayambarœ yé œ gbɔ endje lœ olo. Tshe pa fœ Petro adœke: «Shimu, 'e sœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœsœ dœ uburu ala 'e awa bale dœ mœ manda ada ɔlɔ bale nene a?
26.41: 'E lolo nene yé œ za avwala mbœrœ adœke 'e yoyo ga lœ kœwu lɔsu nene. Ɨshirɨ uzu su dœ gbɔgbɔ, kashe undu ye gugu dœ gbɔgbɔ nene.»
26.42: Tshe kpa gitœ ye zara tœ bishanœ kœza avwala dœ kœpa adœke: «Aba mœ, œdœ œ kœli, za yashi œrœ kanganœ asœke adœke mœ ndjondjo nene. Kaka ɓœ mbœrœ ɓata á ɓœ yindœ nœ!»
26.43: Tshe kpa gu ga ndœ ayambarœ nœ ye, œ gbɔ endje kolœ lœ olo, mbœrœ ala endje sœ lima dœ kɨkɨlɨnœ, awa kœkɔrɔ tœnœ gugu nene.
26.44: Tshe kpa gitœ ye, yé œ za avwala tœ votɔnœ kolœ dœ kœpa tshetœ o'onœ asœmœ.
26.45: Manda nœ, tshe kpa gu ga ndœ ayambarœ œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E sœpe kœlo tœnœ œdœ pe kœyatœ 'e! Ngɔngɔnœ asœke, ada ɔlɔ á endje za Gbolo nœ uzu ga tshakane aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ li ye.
26.46: 'E alafo, a na zœ. Ayi kumu mœ á tshe za mœ ga tshakane endje na ye.» Kœza Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 14.43-50; Luk 22.47-53; Yow 18.3-12)
26.47: Yisu sœpe kœpa o'o kolœnœ atake, Yudasi, anga yambarœ bale lœ andjokpa dœ bisha yi kumu ye. Tshe na awa bale dœ ukpulu azu ndjoro dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba œdœ pe ndɨndɨ ɔyɔ tshakane endje. Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ agbozu Ikrizia dá vwa endje.
26.48: Uzu á tshe za Yisu ga tshakane endje yi lima œsœ ambárá œrœ adœke: «Uzu á mœ kœ'uru tshelœ utu ye, dá œshe dœmœ; 'e za she.»
26.49: Trale atake, Yudasi wuta œ na ga ndœ Yisu á pa fœ she adœke: «Abala, Rabi!» Manda nœ, tshe 'uru tshelœ utu ye.
26.50: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Yanga mœ, mbœrœ œrœ á ɓœ gbe dœ tœnœ.» Yé azunœ tepa ye, á za she.
26.51: Anga bale lœ ugurutœ endje á endje na dœ Yisu gbota ɨngɨrɨ yakamba nœ ye á de anga ayi akwa nœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba, yé á wa utu ye ndja tœnœ.
26.52: Á Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Gi ɨngɨrɨ yakamba nœ zœ ga mangbanœ, mbœrœ azu kɔ á endje nga koshe dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba, endje tshu kolœ kuzu nœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba.
26.53: Ɓœ wuwusœ nœ adœke œdœ mœ kœyɔndœ azu ɓa ndœ Aba mœ, tshe vwa ngɔngɔnœ asœ ukpulu aandjelu kœro pa ndjokpa dœ bisha fœ mœ adœke endje tɨ kane mœ nene a?
26.54: Kashe, tœ œneke, dœ mara gaɗe dá o'o ala buku nœ Ndjaba li kœmbœrœtœ endje lindœnœ adœke œ sœ ataa.»
26.55: Dœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, Yisu pa fœ ukpulu azu adœke: «'E na kœza mœ dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba œdœ pe dœ ndɨndɨ ɔyɔ, ɓata œmœ kœdœ ayi angba a? Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, mœ sœ lima kœsœ ga atɨ ɓa lœ Tepelo kœyisœ œrœ, yé 'e zaza lima mœ nene.
26.56: Kashe œneke kɔ wuta mbœrœ á o'o aayi kœgbara o'o pa lima kœmbœrœtœ endje.» Yé, ayambarœ kɔ katœ ye tɨ, œ kpa ye. Yisu ɓa utshu ayi kœwa ngbanga (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 14.53-65; Luk 22.54-55,63-71; Yow 18.13-14,19-24)
26.57: Endje á endje za lima Yisu, gu dœ she ɓa ndœ Kayifa, egerœ nganga Ndjaba á aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ ndje dœ agbozu Ikrizia ngbɔtœ endje ɓa ndœ ye.
26.58: Petro sœ lima kœna manda Yisu yima yima lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ œrrr ɓa lœ gbagba nœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba. Tshe li ga zœ œ sœ ga ɨndɨrɨ aayi akwa ndœ kœwu mara á o'onœ œ ka dœ tœnœ.
26.59: Andaa, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe aayi kœwa ngbanga nœ azu nœ Ndjaba kɔ, lœ lima kœpara awa adœke œne gbɔ anga uzu á tshe kœpa anga ekpe o'o goro œsœ Yisu yeka á œne kœgbɔ awa kœwa ngbanga nœ kuzu ga tœ ye.
26.60: Kashe ataa aayi kœpa ekpe o'onœ ma lima tœ endje ndjoro gbaa, endje gbɔgbɔ œrœ bale nene. Kwata œrrr, anga endje bisha matœ endje
26.61: yé œ pa adœke: «Uzunœ asœ pa adœke: “Mœ li kœndɨ tshelœ Tepelo nœ Ndjaba yé œ mɔ ga mangbanœ manda olo votɔ.”»
26.62: Egerœ nganga Ndjaba álafo œ pa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ gugu dœ o'o kœgi tœnœ tœ œneke kɔ á azu asœ pa ga pa zœ nene a?»
26.63: Kashe Yisu sœ lima kokoko. Yé egerœ nganga Ndjabanœ kœyu she adœke: «Mœ sœ kœyu ɓœ, ɓœ dara ama zœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Ndjaba nœ soro: Œɓœ kœdœ Masiya Gbolo nœ Ndjaba a?»
26.64: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ pa dœ tœ zœ ye. Kashe mœ sœ kœpa ngbɨ fœ 'e adœke: Kœto ngɔngɔnœ asœ, 'e wu Gbolo nœ uzu kœsœ ga atɨ ga tœ kuni Ndjaba nœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ; 'e wu ndje she kœjerœ ɓa pa ondoro ɓa lafo.»
26.65: Yé egerœ nganga Ndjaba suru tshelœ lœba tœ ye œ pa adœke: «Tshe gu œsœ Ndjaba! A kpa gbegbe dœ atimu nene! 'E totœ kœdji kœgu osho á tshe gu tœ Ndjaba ye.
26.66: 'E gbe má œne 'e tœnœ kotoo?» Endje gi adœke: «Tshe li dœ kuzu.»
26.67: Manda nœ, endje tetœ kœtu ngusha ga tshatshu ye œ sœ kœdu she, yé anga endje sœ kœda ala ye.
26.68: Endje pa fœ she adœke: «Masiya, œdœ ɓœ kœdœ ayi kœgbara o'o, pandœ nœ fœ 'a: Œɗe dá ɓi ɓœ a?» Petro 'ea Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 14.66-72; Luk 22.56-62; Yow 18.15-18,25-27)
26.69: Andaa Petro sœ lima ga atɨ ɓa ushu ɓa lœ gbagba, anga yashe akwa na ndoo dœ she yé œ pa fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ ndje, ɓœ sœ lima awa bale dœ Yisu uzu Galilayi!»
26.70: Kashe tshe vusœ nœ utshu azu kɔ dœ kœpa adœke: «Mœ wuwusœ o'onœ á ɓœ yindœ kœpa tœnœ asœ nene.»
26.71: Ɓata á tshe sœ lima kœna gu ndœ œsœ manda gbagbanœ, anga angbɨ yashe akwa kpa wu she yé œ pa fœ azu á endje sœ lima kpœtœmœ adœke: «Uzu asœ sœ lima awa bale dœ Yisu uzu Nazarete.»
26.72: Petro kpa vusœ nœ dœ kœdarama ye adœke: «Mœ wuwusœ uzunœ asœke nene.»
26.73: Manda nœ teasho, azu á endje sœ lima kpœtœmœ gitœ endje ndoo dœ Petro, yé œ pa fœ she adœke: «Adja, œɓœ kœdœ anga uzu nœ endje, yé o'o zœ sœ kœma ɓœ ataa.»
26.74: Yé Petro tetœ kœdarama ye dœ kœpa o'o adœke: «Kaka Ndjaba za djofele fœ mœ œdœ mœ kœpa wala! Mœ wuwusœ uzunœ asœke nene.» Ngbewo, kɔngato kɨ.
26.75: Yé Petro gbetshelœ ye ndœ o'onœ á Yisu pa lima fœ she adœke: «Utshunœ adœke kɔngato kɨ, ɓœ 'ea mœ awa votɔ adœke ɓœ wuwusœ mœ nene.» Tshe wuta ga ushu, yé kɨ dœ oyo.

27.1: Dœ amazɨ tuu, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba kɔ dœ pe agbozu Ikrizia ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ kœwa o'o ndœ kœwo Yisu.
27.2: Manda nœ, endje i Yisu ga tœnœ, œ na dœ she yé á za she fœ gbozugo á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Pilato. Kuzu Yudasi (Wu ɓa tœ Akw 1.18-19)
27.3: Yudasi á tshe za she yɔ œrœ, wu adœke endje wa ngbanga ndœ kœwo Yisu, egerœ gbetshelœ za she, tshe kwa œ gi langere ngendjanœ zazu bale dœ ndjokpa fœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe fœ agbozu Ikrizia,
27.4: yé á pa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ mbœrœ ekperœ, mœ za uzu á tshe mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene fœ kuzu.» Kashe endje gi fœ she adœke: «'A sœsœ lœnœ nene! Tœnœ kœdœ o'o nœ zœ!»
27.5: Yudasi ko ngendjanœ va ga lœ Tepelo, yé á na kœdu uwu ga lœ ɨgɨ ye ndœ kœwotœ ye.
27.6: Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba rɔ ngendjanœ yé á pa adœke: «Awa akwa nœ azœ yiyindœ nœ adœke a ko mara ngendja ataa ga ugurutœ kœgbɔrœ nœ Tepelo nene, mbœrœ tœnœ á to lœ ngendja indji uzu.»
27.7: Manda kœdjitœ endje, endje za œ yɔ dœ kɨndɨ nœ ayi kœmbœrœ lɔsú mbœrœ kœza tœ tshapa udu nœ agene.
27.8: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa œrrr ga tœ kpesheke, ɨ'ɨrɨ kɨndɨnœ asœmœ kœdœ: «Kɨndɨ indji uzu.»
27.9: Yé œ mbœrœtœ endje ataa mbœrœ o'o á ayi kœgbara o'o Yilimiya pa lima kœmbœrœtœ endje, tshe pa adœke: «Endje za ngendja zazu bale dœ ndjokpa, œtœnœ kœdœ ama ngendja á agbolo Israyele wa lima tœ upu nœ ye;
27.10: yeka á endje za ndœ kɨndɨ nœ ayi kœmbœrœ lɔsú, ɓata á Gbozu vwa lima mœ ndœ kœpandœ nœ.» Pilato sœ kœyu Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 15.2-5; Luk 23.3-5; Yow 18.33-38)
27.11: Yisu ka ɓa utshu gbozugo á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Pilato. Gbozugo yu she adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ gbozugo nœ Ayuda a?» Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ dá sœ kœpa ataa.»
27.12: Kashe o'o á agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe agbozu Ikrizia sœ kœpa ga pa ye, tshe gigi lima o'o nene.
27.13: Pilato pa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ djidji o'o á endje sœ kœpa ga pa zœ asœ nene a?»
27.14: Tshe gigi lima o'o ndœ nœ bale nene, yé gbozugo za lima ama ye tɨ ɔsɔ.
27.15: Dœ lɔndɔ angbo Pake bale dœ bale kɔ, gbozugo sœ lima kœvwara anga ayi kánga bale á ukpulu azu yindœ ye.
27.16: Andaa, endje sœ lima dœ anga ayi kánga á endje para wu lima sœ ye, ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yisu Barabase.
27.17: Pilato yu ukpulu azunœ á endje ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ adœke: «Œɗe dá 'e yindœ nœ adœke mœ katœ ye a? Yisu Barabase too Yisu á endje e she Kristu?»
27.18: Mbœrœ tshe wu lima sœ nœ adœke endje sœ dœ úkú ga tœ ye yeka á za she na tœnœ asœmœ.
27.19: Ɔlɔ á Pilato sœ kœwa ngbanganœ ɓa lœ anda kœwa ngbanga, awonœ pa fœ she adœke: «Lili ga lœ o'o nœ uzunœ asœ nene, tshe sœ ndjii. Mbœrœ mœ lu dœ abutshɔ asœ, lɔsu mœ ka mœ mbœrœ she waa.»
27.20: Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe agbozu Ikrizia sœ kœli ga lœ azu adœke endje katœ Barabase kashe œ wo Yisu.
27.21: Gbozugo kpa yu endje adœke: «Œɗe ugurutœ endje bisha á 'e yindœ nœ adœke mœ katœ ye fœ 'e a?.» Endje gi adœke: «Barabase.»
27.22: Pilato yu endje adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe á mœ kœmbœrœ tœ Yisu á endje e she Kristu a?» Endje para gi adœke: «'E kuru she ga pa kurushi.»
27.23: Pilato yu endje adœke: «Ekperœ gaɗe dá tshe mbœrœ a?» Kashe endje tetœ kœta rawa dœ agbɔ adœke: «'E kuru she ga pa kurushi.»
27.24: Lɔkɔ á tshe wu adœke œne kpa wusœ œrœ á œne mbœrœ nene, tshe su ungu œ djutɔ dœ kane ye utshu ukpulu azu dœ kœpa adœke: «Mœ dœ́dœ́ ayi kumu upu kuzu ye nene; œtœnœ kœdœ upu nœ 'e.» Gbambanœ nene, azu sœ lima kœoma dœ o'onœ waa.
27.25: Azu para gi adœke: «Kaka adœke indji ye sœ ga pa 'a dœ agbolo nœ 'a.»
27.26: Yeka á tshe kœkatœ Barabase, yé manda kœsɔ Yisu dœ ndjapa, tshe za she fœ endje adœke endje kœkuru she ga pa kurushi. Aturugu mɔ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 15.16-20; Yow 19.2-3)
27.27: Manda nœ aturugu nœ gbozugo gu dœ Yisu ga lœ gbagba nœ ye, yé ukpulu azu kpa dji she djikpata.
27.28: Endje verœ lœba tœ ye, yé á verœ yɔgbɔdɔ odoro lœba ga tœ ye.
27.29: Endje verœ kpoto nœ ishi ga tœ kumu ye ɓata gbozugo, endje za tshɔngbɔlɔ ga tœ kuni ye, á tetœ kœgote ga utshu ye dœ pe kœmɔ she adœke: «'A bala ɓœ gbozugo nœ Ayuda.»
27.30: Endje sœ kœtu ngusha ga tœ ye, œ za tshɔngbɔlɔnœ asœmœ á sɔ dœ kumu ye.
27.31: Manda kœmɔ she, endje verœ yɔgbɔdɔ lœbanœ tœ ye á gi œne ye ga tœ ye, yé á za she na tœnœ ndœ kœkuru she ga pa kurushi. Yisu ɓa pa kurushi (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 15.21-32; Luk 23.26-43; Yow 19.17-27)
27.32: Ɓata endje sœ lima kœwuta tœnœ, endje gbɔ uzu tshalakpɨ Sirene, á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Shimu, endje vwa she dœ agbɔ ndœ kœza átá kurushi tœ Yisu.
27.33: Endje wuta ga tœ osho á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Gologota, œ yindœ kœpa adœke «Osho gbayashi kɔrɔ.»
27.34: Endje sú ipi á endje ngbɔɓa dœ shundɔɗɔ œrœ œ za fœ Yisu adœke tshe ndjo. Tshe dji ɔtshɔnœ kashe tshe yiyi lima ndœ kœndjo tœnœ nene.
27.35: Endje kuru she ga pa kurushi yé œ ta wuka mbœrœ kœkurutshelœ lœba nœ ye.
27.36: Manda nœ, endje sœ ga atɨ ɓa zœ mbœrœ kœgbɔndœ ye.
27.37: Endje su ádá kœwo she ga pa tsheporo maɓaya yé œ za ga pa kumu ye. O'onœ pa adœke: «Uzu asœ kœdœ Yisu, gbozugo nœ Ayuda.»
27.38: Endje kuru anga aayi angba bisha ga pa kurushi ga ɨndɨrɨ ye; anga ga pa kuni, yé anga ga pa gele ye.
27.39: Azu á endje sœ lima kœvwanga tœnœ, sœ kœgu she dœ kœmea kumu endje,
27.40: yé œ sœ lima kœpa adœke: «Œɓœ á ɓœ pa lima adœke ɓœ ndɨ tshelœ Tepelo yé œ kpa mɔ anganœ manda olo votɔ; œdœ ɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba, shetœ zœ dœ tœ zœ yé œ jerœ pa kurushi ga atɨ!»
27.41: Awa bale, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba, aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ pe agbozu Ikrizia sœ lima kœmɔ she yé œ sœ kœpa adœke:
27.42: «Tshe she lima anga azu, tshe shetœ ye dœ tœ ye! Œshe kœdœ gbozugo nœ Israyele, tshe jerœ ngɔngɔnœ asœ pa kurushi yé a kœyindœ nœ ga ndœ ye.
27.43: Tshe za lɔsu ye ga pa Ndjaba yé œ pa ngbɨ adœke: “Œmœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba.” Œdœ Ndjaba kœyindœ ye, tshe she she ngɔngɔnœ asœ!»
27.44: Aayi angba á endje kuru lima endje ga pa kurushi dœ she gu ndje she awa bale dœ mara ataa. Kuzu Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 15.33-41; Luk 23.44-49; Yow 19.28-30)
27.45: Dœ kakpi ɔlɔ, osho bu kporokoto pa ogo djigi œrrr ga tœ ada ɔlɔ votɔ manda kakpi ɔlɔ.
27.46: Kœwuta ga tœ ada ɔlɔ votɔnœ asœmœ, Yisu ta rawa dœ ɔgbɔ tshama ye adœke: «Eli, Eli, lema sabakatani?» Œ yindœ kœpa adœke: «Ndjaba nœ mœ, Ndjaba nœ mœ, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ katœ mœ tɨ a?»
27.47: Anga azu ugurutœ endjeneke á endje sœ lima kpœtœmœ dji she yé œ pa adœke: «'E dji ka, tshe sœ kœ'e Eliya!»
27.48: Trale, anga uzu bale ugurutœ endje kpa œ nduru ndɔhɔrɔ ga la ikpi vinu yé œ vwele ga tœ kumu wara yeka á yi ga tœ ama ye adœke tshe ndjo.
27.49: Anga endje pa adœke: «'E kaka kane! A wu œdœ Eliya œ na kœshe she!»
27.50: Kashe Yisu kpa ta rawa dœ ɔgbɔ tshama ye, yé œ tshu ye.
27.51: Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, lœba á endje du ɓa lœ Tepelo suru tshelœtœ ye bisha kœto ɓa lafo œrrr ga atɨ. Ɔshɔ turu, tshelœ ogboro badja 'oro,
27.52: udu kɔrɔ, yé ayindœ Ndjaba ndjoro á endje tshu, kwatœ endje ga lœ soro.
27.53: Manda Ndjaba kœshe Yisu lœ akuzu, manda kœwuta endje lœ udu, endje li ga lœ œyerœ ongbo Yerusaleme, yé á azu ndjoro wu endje ɓa zœ.
27.54: Gbozu tshapa aturugu Roma œdœ aturugu á endje sœ kœgbɔ lima ndœ Yisu dœ she, wu ɔshɔ á turu œdœ œneke kɔ á wuta lima asœmœ, awa za endje tɔpanœ kpuru yé endje pa adœke: «Uzu asœke kœdœ lima adja Gbolo nœ Ndjaba tako.»
27.55: Ayashe ndjoro ka lima zara á sœ kœtondœ osho: Endje te lima mangba Yisu kœto ɓa lœ Galilayi mbœrœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ she.
27.56: Mareya uzu tshalakpɨ Magadala, dœ Mareya ayi Jake dœ Yozefu, œdœ pe ayi agbolo nœ Zebedayi, sœ lima ugurutœ endje. Kœshi yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 15.42-47; Luk 23.50-56; Yow 19.38-42)
27.57: Dœ adɨla, anga ayi kœgbɔrœ ɓa lœ Arimateyo á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yozefu yikumu ye; œshe kœdœ ndje lima yambarœ nœ Yisu.
27.58: Tshe na ga ndœ Pilato yé œ yu she tœ oko Yisu. Yé Pilato za awa adœke endje za fœ she.
27.59: Yozefu za oko Yisu œ vwele ga tœnœ dœ ɔtshɔ lœba,
27.60: yé á za ga lœ tafo udu á tshe totœ kœdji tœnœ ɓa lœ ɔngɔ badja. Manda nœ, tshe vwɨrɨ egerœ badja ga tœ mandanœ yé œ gu da ye.
27.61: Andaa, Mareya uzu Magadala œdœ anga angbɨ Mareyanœ sœ lima ga atɨ ɓa utshu udunœ. Kœgbɔndœ tshapa udu
27.62: Olo bale manda nœ, tœnœ kœdœ lima lɔkɔ utshu sabata, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe Afarisayi na awa bale ga ndœ Pilato.
27.63: Endje pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, 'a gbe dœ o'o á ayi wala asœ pa lima lɔkɔ á tshe sœpe dœ soro. Tshe pa lima adœke: “Manda olo votɔ, Ndjaba œ she mœ lœ akuzu ye.”
27.64: Za awa adœke endje gbɔndœ tshapa udu asœ œrrr ga tœ votɔ olo yekane, ete nene ayambarœ nœ ye œ zɨ angba ye, yé œ pa fœ azu adœke: “Ndjaba she lœ akuzu ye.” Yé walanœ asœ œ kpa ropa œneke lima utshunœ ye.»
27.65: Pilato kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Aturugu kœgbɔndœ œrœ dœke. 'E na dœ endje dœ́ endje gbɔndœ tshapa udunœ ɓata á 'e wa asœmœ.»
27.66: Ataa, endje na ga pa udu œ guma mara kœgbɔndœ nœ: Endje ɨvwɨ badjanœ œ tshu dœ mandanœ yé á katœ aturugu ndœ kœgbɔndœ nœ.

28.1: Manda olo sabata, kœli ga lœ ali olo nœ pɔsɔ, Mareya uzu Magadala dœ pe anga angbɨ Mareyanœ na kœwu tshapa udu.
28.2: Trale atake, ɔshɔ turu dœ agbɔnœ. Anga andjelu nœ Gbozu to ɓa lafo œ jerœ, œ vwɨrɨ egerœ badja tœ manda udunœ yé á sœ ga pa nœ.
28.3: Tshe sœ lima ɓata kœyerœwa yavuru, yé lœba ye sœ dœ imbinœ ɓata ondoro.
28.4: Aturugu sœ lima kœde gbaragbara dœ awa, yé œ sœ ɓata azu á endje tshu ye.
28.5: Kashe andjelu za o'o yé œ pa fœ ayashenœ adœke: «Awa zaza 'e nene, mœ wusœ nœ adœke 'e sœ kœpara Yisu á endje kuru she ga pa kurushi.
28.6: Tshe gugu kpeke nene, mbœrœ Ndjaba she she lœ akuzu ɓata á tshe pandœ nœ lima fœ 'e. 'E na ga mœ œ wu osho á tshe lo lima tœnœ.
28.7: Yé 'e gu katsha œ pandœ nœ fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: “Ndjaba shé she lœ akuzu ye, yé tshe ro utshu 'e ga lœ Galilayi da ye; 'e wu she ɓa zœ.” Œtœnœ dá mœ pandœ nœ fœ 'e asœmœ.»
28.8: Endje katœ tshapa udu tɨ dœ awa œdœ pe dœ yanga, œ kpagu kœpandœ nœ fœ ayambarœ nœ ye.
28.9: Trale, endje wu Yisu kœna ga ndœ endje, á pa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ bala 'e!» Endje gitœ endje ndoo ga ndœ ye, œ tepa ada ye yé á gote ga utshu ye.
28.10: Yé Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Awa zaza 'e bale nene. 'E gu œ pandœ nœ fœ aaya mœ adœke endje ro ga lœ Galilayi: ɓa zœ dá endje wu mœ.» O'o tœ upu nœ aayi kœgbɔndœ udu
28.11: Lɔkɔ á endje sœpe lima tœ ala awa, anga aturugu lœ ugurutœ aturugu kœgbɔndœ udu ro ga lœ ongbo, œ pandœ œrœ kɔ á ro ɓa zœ fœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba.
28.12: Manda kœngbɔtœ dœ kœdjitœ agbozu nganga Ndjaba dœ pe agbozu Ikrizia, endje to ngendja dœ egerœ nœ fœ aturugu,
28.13: yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E pa ngbɨ adœke: Lɔkɔ á 'e sœ tœ olo, ayambarœ nœ ye na dœ butshɔ œ za angba oko ye yé.
28.14: Yé œdœ gbozugo kœdji o'onœ asœ, a'a dá ru alanœ yé á mbœrœ adœke 'e gbɔgbɔ o'o nene.»
28.15: Aturugu za ngendjanœ yé œ tetœ kœmbœrœtœ endje lindœ o'onœ á endje za fœ endje asœmœ. Ataa, o'onœ asœ kaka osho ɓa ndœ Ayuda œrrr ga tœ kpesheke. Yisu matœ ye fœ ayambarœ nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 16.14-18; Luk 24.36-49; Yow 20.19-23; Akw 1.6-8)
28.16: Ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bale na ga lœ Galilayi ɓa pa kaga á Yisu yi lima sœ nœ fœ endje.
28.17: Lɔkɔ á endje wu lima she, endje gote ga utshu ye; kashe anga endje ugurutœ endje sœ lima dœ sharapu.
28.18: Yisu na ndoo dœ endje, œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Ndjaba za tshagbozu kɔ nœ œrœ tshalafo dœ pe œnœ tshapa shɔ fœ mœ.
28.19: 'E na djelœ ogo kɔ, 'e fa azu tœ ayambarœ nœ mœ, yé œ za batisimu fœ endje dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Aba, dœ Gbolo dœ pe Ɔtshɔ ɨshirɨ,
28.20: 'e yisœ nœ fœ endje adœke endje gbɔndœ œneke kɔ á mœ za lima dœ o'o fœ 'e. Yé œmœ, mœ sœ dœ 'e awa bale ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ œrrr ga tœ kœka tshapashɔ.»

1.1: Gbozu Teofile, ɓa la ali mbeti á mœ su fœ ɓœ, mœ pandœ œrœ kɔ á Yisu mbœrœ lima œdœ pe ndje œneke kɔ á tshe yi lima sœ nœ kœto ɓa tœ adanœ
1.2: œrrr ga tœ olo kœɔ she lima ga lafo. Utshu kœɔ she, tshe za o'o fœ aayi avwa nœ ye dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.
1.3: Tshe ma lima tœ ye fœ endje manda kuzu á tshe tshu tœ kœma fœ endje adœke tshe sœ dœ soro. Tshe ma lima tœ ye fœ endje yé œ tetœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba manda olo zazu bisha.
1.4: Anga lɔkɔ bale á tshe sœ lima kœzɨ œrœ dœ endje, tshe za o'o fœ endje adœke: «'E gigi damba tœ 'e lœ Yerusaleme nene kashe 'e kate œneke á Aba pa lima ndœ nœ adœke œne za fœ 'e ɓata á 'e dji lima lœ ama mœ.
1.5: Gbambanœ nene, Yowane za lima batisimu nœ ungu, kashe lœ ondonœ asœke, Ndjaba œ za batisimu nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ fœ 'e.» Yisu ɔ ga lafo
1.6: Aayi avwanœ á endje ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje, yu Yisu adœke: «Gbozu, kolœ ngɔngɔnœ asœke dá ɓœ gi tshagbozu nœ ogo Israyele a?»
1.7: Tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «O'o nœ 'e gugu mbœrœ kœwusœ ada ɔlɔnœ too olonœ á Aba za lœ tshagbozu nœ ye nene.
1.8: Kashe Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œ jerœ ga pa 'e, yé 'e gbɔ gbɔgbɔ mbœrœ kœna kœmɨndœ o'o nœ mœ lœ Yerusaleme, lœ ogo Yuda œdœ lœ Samariya djigi œrrr vesho ga tœ osho kɔ pa ɔshɔ.»
1.9: Manda kœgi o'onœ ataa, tshe ɔ ngarrr dœ ala endje ga lafo yé œ yiwa lœ ondoro tœ ala endje.
1.10: Ɓata á endje sœpe lima kœmesho ɨrɨrrr ga lafo, anga azu bisha dœ imbi lœba á endje ka lima ndoo dœ endje
1.11: kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Azu Galilayi, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœpe kœmesho ga lafo a? Yisunœ á tshe ɔ dœ ala 'e asœmœ, tshe kwa ndje bala tœ ye ɓata á 'e wu she kœɔ tœnœ ga lafo asœmœ.» Matiase za akwa manda Yudasi
1.12: Manda nœ, aayi avwanœ to ɓa pa kaga ɔyɔ Olive yé œ jerœ ga lœ Yerusaleme; kaganœ sœ lima ga pa œrœ nœ́ Kelometere bale tœ Yerusaleme.
1.13: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta, endje li ga lœ gbɔshɔ á endje lœ lima kœlo lœ nœ ɓa lafo. Œ dœ lima Petro, Yowane, Jake dœ Andere; Filipo dœ Toma; Bartelemi dœ Matie; Jake gbolo nœ Alefe, Shimu uzu kœ'e osho ndœ lipanda œdœ pe Yudasi gbolo nœ Jake.
1.14: Endje kɔ, endje sœ lima dœ gbetshelœ bale, yé œ ngbɔɓatœ endje mbœrœ kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ awa bale dœ anga ayashe ɓata Mareya á tshe zu Yisu œdœ pe ndje aaya Yisu.
1.15: Lœ anga olonœ asœmœ bale, Petro áalafo ɓa ugurutœ ayindœ Yisu kama bale dœ zazu bale á endje ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje, yé œ pa ngbɨ adœke:
1.16: «Aaya, œ li adœke o'o á Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ pa lima ndœ nœ ala Buku nœ Ndjaba, lœ ama gbozu Davidi tœ upu nœ Yudasi á tshe to lima azu na tœnœ ndœ kœza Yisu, mbœrœtœ endje.
1.17: Andaa Yudasi sœ lima awa bale dœ 'a yé tshe sœ lima ndje dœ akwa nœ ye.
