16.1: Polo li ndje ga lœ Derbe dœ pe Listre. Ɓa zœ anga yindœ Yisu á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Timote, gbolo yakoshe nœ anga uyu Yuda á tshe yindœ Yisu, abanœ dœ́dœ́ Yuda nene.
16.2: Ɔtshɔ ye ga lima waa ugurutœ aayanœ lœ Listre dœ pe Ikoniyume.
16.3: Polo gbe lima kœgu dœ she awa bale. Kœwu adœke Ayuda lœ ndjoro tœ oshonœ ɓa zœ, tshe za she, œ wa she tœ gaza lindœ awa akwa nœ Ayudanœ, mbœrœ Ayuda kɔ á endje sœ lima dœ endje tœ œsœnœ wu lima sœ nœ adœke abanœ dœ́dœ́ Yuda nene.
16.4: Lœ ongbo á endje ro lima tœnœ, Polo dœ Sila sœ lima kœmɨndœ o'o á aayi avwa nœ Yisu dœ agbozu lœ Yerusaleme wa, á endje sœ kœpa fœ endje adœke endje mbœrœ tœ endje lindœ nœ.
16.5: Azu Ikrizia sœ lima kœru lɔsu endje lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje, ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ anga azu sœ lima kœli ga ndœ endje yé endje te lima kœngba tœnœ. Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ vwa Polo ga lœ Masedwane
16.6: Polo œdœ Sila na lœ Friji œdœ pe lœ Galate; gbambanœ nene, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ pakata lima endje kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o ɓa lœ Azi.
16.7: Kœwuta endje ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔ ogo Misi, endje gbe kœro ga lœ Bitini yeka á Ɨshirɨ nœ Yisu pakata endje.
16.8: Endje ro tɔ lœ Misi yé œ jerœ ga lœ Trowase.
16.9: Anga butshɔ bale, Polo kœwu œrœ lœ ulu: anga yakoshe Masedwane bale na ga ndœ ye, œ ka kœdɨ tshelœma ye fœ she adœke: «Fa djaga lœ Masedwane, mbœrœ kœtɨ kane 'a ga lafo!»
16.10: Manda kœwu œrœ lœ ulu nœ Polo asœmœ, trale 'a para awa kœro ga lœ Masedwane, mbœrœ 'a wu lima sœ nœ adœke Ndjaba sœ kœ e 'a kœna kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o ɓa zœ. Kœfatshalɔsu Lidi ɓa lœ Filipo
16.11: 'A ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba lœ Trowase, 'a za awa ndjii ndœ Samotrase mbœrœ á osho kœkɔrɔ á 'a kœwuta ga lœ Neyapolise.
16.12: Yé ɓa zœ 'a na ga lœ Filipo, egerœ ongbo lœ ogo Masedwane, azu á endje sœ lœ nœ sœ tshakudu tshagbozu nœ ogo Roma. Œndœ 'a dɨ lima teasho lœ ongbonœ asœmœ.
16.13: Dœ lɔkɔ sabata, 'a wuta lœ ongbonœ kœna ga lakpɨ ogo neke á sœ ndoo dœ ama ungu, tœnœ kœdœ lima œsœ osho nœ kœdonga Ndjaba, yeka á 'a sœ ga atɨ, á pa o'o dœ ayashe á endje ngbɔtœ endje kpœtœmœ.
16.14: Anga bale ugurutœ endje, ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Lidi, œshe kœdœ lima yashe lœ ongbo Tiyatire á tshe sœ kœka odoro lœba yé á wu lima sœ kœdonga Ndjaba. Tshe dji 'a yé Ndjaba kɔrɔ gbetshelœ nœ ye adœke tshe yindœ o'o kɔ á Polo pa.
16.15: Manda kœgbɔ batisimu, œshe dœ azu sœnda nœ ye para, tshe pa fœ 'a adœke: «Œdœ 'e kœwusœ nœ adœke, œmœ kœdœ uzu á mœ yindœ Ndjaba ye, 'e na œ lo ɓa ndœ mœ.» Yé tshe tovworogbo 'a kœyindœ nœ. Polo œdœ Sila lœ kánga
16.16: Ɔlɔ bale á 'a sœ lima kœna ndœ kœ e Ndjaba, anga yashe kanga bale á tshe sœ lima dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ nœ kœgbara o'o sœ ugurutœ 'a. Ayengɔ ye sœ lima kœgbɔ œrœ waa manda akwa nœ ye.
16.17: Tshe te manda 'a dœ Polo, yé œ sœ kœpa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Ayakoshenœ asœ kœdœ aayi akwa nœ Ndjaba á tshe ropa œrœ kɔ; endje sœ kœyisœ awa kœgbɔ kœshe fœ 'e.»
16.18: Yé tshe mbœrœ ataa manda olo ndjoro. Polo mɔ dœ she, á kœfatœ ye yé á kœpa fœ ɨshirɨnœ adœke: «Dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu Kristu, mœ pa fœ ɓœ adœke: wuta lœ yashe asœke!» Trale ɨshirɨ wuta lœ ye yé.
16.19: Ɓata aayengɔ yashe kanga asœmœ wu adœke œne kpa gbɔ œrœ lœ awa nœ ye nene, endje tepa Polo œdœ Sila œ gbota endje na tœnœ fœ agbozu kœwa ngbanga œrrr ɓa la wutu ga utshu azu kɔ.
16.20: Endje ko endje na tœnœ fœ agbozunœ asœmœ yé œ pa adœke: «Ayakoshenœ asœ kœdœ Ayuda, endje ndɨ tshalakpɨ nœ azœ kpa ye.
16.21: Endje sœ kœpara awa ndœ kœyisœ angbɨ mara kœsœ neke á azœ dœ́ azu Roma á lili adœke a mbœrœ nene.»
16.22: Yé œ ɨvwɨ azu kekeke ga tœ Polo œdœ Sila. Agbozu kœwa ngbanga kœza o'o adœke endje sɔ lœba tœ endje dœ́ œ ɓi endje dœ ndjapa.
16.23: Manda kœɓi endje dœ ndjaba, endje ko endje va ga lœ kánga, yé œ pa fœ ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga adœke ala ye gbɔ dœ endje.
16.24: Ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga dji ataa, œ ko endje li tœnœ waa ɓa ndœ kumu gbɔshɔ kánga yé œ soro ada endje dœ djingiri.
16.25: Dœ butshɔ, Polo œdœ Sila tetœ kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba dœ pe kœdonga she dœ itshi yé anga aayi kánga dji endje.
16.26: Kolœ ngbangi atake, ɔshɔ turu dœ ɔgbɔ, muru anda turu, Trale manda kɔrɔ wuu, yé tshelœ djingiri sɔ tœ aayi kánga para.
16.27: Ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga kœjo, œ kœwu adœke manda kánga kɔrɔ wuu á kœgbe adœke aayi kánga kpa para kɔkɔ ye. Tshe kœgbota ugu yakamba nœ ye á yindœ kœwotœ ye.
16.28: Á Polo kœra she dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Wowotœ zœ nene, 'a lœ para kɔkɔ zœ!»
16.29: Ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga kœ'e osho ndœ owo, kœgbɔgbɔtœ ye li tœnœ dœ awa, á kœgote ga tœ ada Polo dœ Sila.
16.30: Manda nœ, tshe kœto Polo œdœ Sila wuta tœnœ ga shu, á kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Agbozu, œrœ gaɗe dá mœ kœmbœrœ yeka á kœshe a?»
16.31: Polo œdœ Sila kœgi fœ she adœke: «Sœ dœ kœyindœrœ adœke Yisu kœdœ Gbozu yekane á tshe kœshe ɓœ awa bale dœ azu tshasœnda nœ zœ.»
16.32: Endje kœpandœ o'o ama Gbozu fœ she, dœ azu kɔ á endje sœ lima sœnda nœ ye.
16.33: Kolœ dœ abutshɔnœ asœmœ, ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga na dœ endje na tœnœ œ djutɔ uku tœ endje yé pe kpœtœmœ tshe gbɔ batisimu awa bale dœ azu tshasœnda nœ ye kɔ.
16.34: Tshe to Polo dœ Sila gu tœnœ ga sœnda nœ ye, œ to kœzɨrœ fœ endje, yé tshe sœ lima dœ yanga awa bale dœ azu tshasœnda nœ ye kɔ, mbœrœ endje yi lima ndœ Ndjaba.
16.35: Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, agbozu kœwa ngbanga vwa aturugu fœ ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga adœke: «Tshe za awa fœ azu asœmœ!»
16.36: Á tshe kœpa fœ Polo adœke: «Agbozu kœwa ngbanga vwa osho fœ mœ adœke mœ za awa fœ 'e. Ngɔngɔ asœke, 'e li kœwuta tœnœ, yé œ gu dœ kœsœ gee.»
16.37: Kashe Polo pa fœ aturugu adœke: «Endje yuyu lima 'a nene, œ ɓi 'a tœ ala azu kɔ, andaa a'a kœdœ adja azu Roma. Endje ko 'a va ga lœ kánga, yé endje yindœ kœko 'a ngɔngɔ asœ ga shu lœ ubunœ. Œ mbœrœtœ endje atamœ nene. Ɔtshɔ nœ kœdœ adœke endje na ga mœ dœ tœ endje œ ko 'a ga shu!»
16.38: Aturugunœ gu œ pandœ nœ fœ agbozu kœwa ngbanganœ, yé awa za endje mbœrœ kœdji adœke endje kœdœ ndje azu Roma.
16.39: Endje na kœkɨ fœ Polo dœ Sila adœke endje wu oyo œne. Manda nœ, endje za awa fœ endje kœwuta lœ kánga yé œ pa fœ endje adœke endje wuta lœ ongbo ye.
16.40: Manda kœwuta endje lœ kánganœ, endje na ga lœ Lidi. Ɓa zœ, endje gbɔ ayindœ Yisu œ pa fœ endje adœke endje shi gbɨ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje, yé manda nœ endje ro da ye.

17.1: Endje ro tɔ lœ Afipolisi dœ Apoloni yeka á wuta ga lœ Tesalonike, ɓa zœ Ayuda sœ lima dœ Sinagoga.
17.2: Ɓata á tshe mbœrœ ɓa lima katshatsha, Polo li ga lœ Sinagoganœ. Manda lɔkɔ sabata votɔ, tshe sœ lima kœpu o'o pa Buku nœ Ndjaba awa bale dœ azu á endje sœ kpœtœmœ.
17.3: Tshe sœ lima kœyisœ nœ fœ endje ngbɨ adœke, œ li adœke Masiya wu oyo, œ tshu, œ she ugurutœ akuzu. Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Yisunœ á mœ mɨndœ ye fœ 'e asœke kœdœ Masiyanœ.»
17.4: Anga Ayuda ugurutœ endje yindœ o'o á Polo pa, yé œ te ga ndœ Polo dœ Sila. Awa bale ndje dœ angbɨ azu Agrekenœ ndjoro á endje donga Ndjaba œdœ pe ndje ayashe ndjoro á azu sœ kœlɨsœ endje, te ga ndœ Polo dœ Sila.
17.5: Kashe anga Ayudanœ mbœrœ úkú. Endje rɔ anga ekpe azu á endje na tœ ala awa kpɔɔ, œ zɨ tshelœ o'o dœ endje yé œ ndɨ kœsœ gee lakpɨ ogo. Endje na ɓa sœnda nœ Jasone kœpara Polo dœ Sila á kœko endje wuta tœnœ ga utshu azu tshalakpɨnœ.
17.6: Ɓata á endje gbɔgbɔ Polo dœ Sila nene, endje za Jasone awa bale dœ anga ayindœ Yisu, œ gbota endje gu tœnœ ga utshu aayi kœwa ngbanga tshalakpɨnœ asœmœ, yé œ pa adœke: «Azu á endje djingili tshelœ kumu azu pa ɔshɔ djigi, endje dá wuta ngɔngɔ asœ ɓa ke asœke.
17.7: Jasone za osho kœsœ fœ endje ɓa sœnda nœ ye yé endje kɔ, endje mbœmbœrœ œrœ á awa akwa nœ gbozugo Roma yindœ nœ nene; endje pa adœke anga angbɨ gbozu kpi sœ zœ, yé ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yisu.»
17.8: O'o ama endje za ókó fœ azu para kɔkɔ, œ za ndje ókó fœ agbozu tshelœ ongbonœ,
17.9: yé endje dɨ lima ngendja fœ Jasone œdœ anga ayindœ Yisunœ yekane á endje za awa fœ endje adœke endje gu. Polo œdœ Sila ɓa lœ Bere
17.10: Pe dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ dœ abutshɔ, ayindœ Yisu gi Polo œdœ Sila ga tœ awa á endje ro ga lœ Bere. Endje wuta ɓa zœ yé œ na ga lœ Sinagoga nœ Ayuda.
17.11: Ayuda nœ Bere sœ lima dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu kœropa endjeneke lœ Tesalonike, endje yindœ Ɔtshɔ O'o dœ lɔsu endje djigi, yé ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, endje sœ lima kœdɨ Mbeti nœ Ndjaba, mbœrœ kœwu œdœ ádá o'onœ á Polo œdœ Sila pa asœmœ kœdœ adjapu.
17.12: Anga azu ndjoro ugurutœ endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu, yé ugurutœ azu Greke, ayashe ndjoro á azu œ lɨsœ endje dœ pe ayakoshe.
17.13: Kashe, ɔlɔ á Ayuda lœ Tesalonike dji adœke Polo sœ kpa kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o lœ Bere, endje wuta ɓa zœ yé œ tetœ kœndɨ tshelœ gbetshelœ nœ azu ndjoro.
17.14: Yé pe kpœtœmœ, ayindœ Yisu gi Polo na tœnœ ga tœ ama egerœ ungu kashe Asila dœ Timote lœpe lima œnœ endje kpœtœmœ lœ Bere.
17.15: Azu á endje za lima Polo kpatœnœ œrrr ɓa lœ Atene, endje gu dœ o'o adœke Sila dœ Timote ro katsha manda œne. Polo ɓa lœ Atene
17.16: Ɔlɔ á Polo sœ lima kœkate Asila dœ Timote lœ Atene, tshe sœ dœ oyo tœ lɔsu ye mbœrœ kœwu adœke ongbonœ sœ lima dœ andjaba waa lœnœ.
17.17: Tshe sœ lima kœpa o'o pa o'o ama Ndjaba dœ Ayuda œdœ angbɨ azu á endje sœ kœdonga Ndjaba lœ Sinagoga œdœ pe ndje azu neke á tshe li kœgbɔtœ ye dœ endje ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ ala wutunœ asœmœ.
17.18: Anga azu kœwusœrœ á endje sœ kœyisœ gbetshelœ nœ Aepikure ndje dœ astoyise tetœ kœpa o'o dœ she. Anga endje sœ lima kœpa adœke: «O'o gaɗe dá kulupunœ asœ œ pa ata a?» Anga endje á endje dji she kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ Yisu œdœ pe tœ o'o kœshe nœ ye lœ kuzu pa adœke: «Œ sœ ɓata tshe kœdœ ayi kœyisœ o'o ama andjaba tshelœ anga angbɨ ogo.»
17.19: Yé endje za she, œ ro dœ she ga tœ osho kœwa ngbanga tœnœ á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Areopaje yé œ yu she adœke: «'A li kœwusœ tafo kœyisœrœ nœ zœ á ɓœ sœ kœyisœ nœ asœ nene a?
17.20: Gbambanœ nene, asœ kɔ kœdœ tafo œrœ yé ɓœ sœ kœpa o'o á sœ kœko uvuru 'a lœnœ, yé 'a yindœ kœwusœ ádánœ.»
17.21: Mbœrœ azu kɔ lœ ogo Atene œdœ pe agene á endje sœ ɓa zœ, sœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ kolœ mbœrœ kœdji too mbœrœ kœpatœ œsœ tafo œrœnœ á wuta asœ.
17.22: Yé Polo ka kpœguru Areopaje, œ pa adœke: «E'e dœ azu lœ Atene, mœ wu adœke e'e kœdœ azu á 'e sœ kœzatœ 'e waa ga tœ andjaba nœ 'e.
17.23: Ɔlɔ á mœ sœ kœna lœ ongbo nœ 'e, mœ sœ kœwu œrœ á 'e gɨ á ko tɔ ɓata andjaba nœ 'e œdœ pe ndaba á 'e mbœrœ á su mbeti ga tœ nœ adœke: “Fœ anga ndjaba á 'a wuwusœ ye nene.” Andaa mœ na kœpandœ Ndjaba á 'e sœ kœdonga she, ataa 'e wuwusœ ye nene.
17.24: Ndjabanœ asœke kœdœ tsheneke á tshe mbœrœ tshapa ɔshɔ asœ dœ œrœ kɔ pa nœ, œshe kœdœ Gbozu nœ tshalafo dœ tsha atɨ. Tshe sœsœ lœ anda á azu mbœrœ dœ kane endje nene.
17.25: Tshe sœsœ dœ gbetshelœ adœke azu gbe dœ œne ɓata tshe sœ dœ ogo anga œrœ nene, kashe œshe dá sœ kœto soro fœ azu kɔ, dœ ɨzɨ á azu œ wu asœmœ œdœ pe udu œrœ kɔ.
17.26: «Kœto tœ uzu bale, tshe mbœrœ azu kɔ adœke endje sœ pa ɔshɔnœ asœke. Kashe utshu kœmbœrœ endje, tshe dɨ olo kœsœ nœ endje yé œ wa mapaka ogo kɔ á li adœke endje sœ tœnœ.
17.27: Ndjaba mbœrœ endje adœke endje para œne, œdœ endje kœsœ kœtaɓa osho na tœnœ, endje gbɔ œne á œne sœsœ lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ tœ azœ nene asœmœ.
17.28: Gbambanœ nene, “lœ awa nœ ye dá a sœ dœ soro, á sœ kœna ana, yé á sœpe dœ soro.”» «Mbœrœ tœnœ atamœ dá anga aayi kœsu itshi nœ 'e pa lima ndœ nœ adœke: “Azœ kœdœ ndje agbolo nœ ye.”»
17.29: «Ɓata azœ kœdœ agbolo nœ ye, a katœ kœgbe adœke Ndjaba li dœ œrœ á endje gɨ dœ ɔrœ, dœ kowo œdœ dœ badja á endje mbœrœ dœ kane liaka gbetshelœ nœ uzu.
17.30: Utshunœ liya, Ndjaba djerœndœ nœ kɔ gbambanœ nene, azu wuwu lima sœ œrœ á endje sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene. Kashe ngɔngɔ asœke, tshe pa fœ azu kɔ, tœ osho kɔ adœke endje fatshalɔsu endje.
17.31: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, tshe guma anga olo bale tœ kœwa ngbanga pa azu para dœ mara ndjii lœ awa nœ uzu á tshe ke she. Tshe she uzunœ asœmœ lœ akuzu mbœrœ kœma fœ azu adœke œne dá ke she.»
17.32: Kœdji adœke Polo pa o'o nœ kœshe lœ akuzu, anga endje tetœ ɔmɔ, yé anga endje pa fœ she adœke: «'A kpa dji ɓœ kœpa o'o asœ lœ anga olo.»
17.33: Ataa, Polo kœwuta lima ugurutœ endje.
17.34: Kashe, anga endje na lima manda ye, yé œ te ayindœ Yisu. Azunœ dœke: Denise anga ayi kœwa ngbanga lœ Areopaje dœ anga yashe bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Damarise œdœ pe anga azunœ.

18.1: Manda Atene, Polo ro ga lœ Koriti.
18.2: Tshe togba dœ anga uzu Yudanœ bale ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Akila, endje zu she ɓa lœ ogo Pone. Tshe to lima kolœ olonœ asœmœ ɓa lœ Itali awa bale dœ awonœ dœ Prisile, mbœrœ gbozugo Klode za o'o adœke Ayuda para wuta lœ Roma. Polo sœ lima kœna ga ndœ endje.
18.3: Yé ɓata á endje sœ lima lœ akwa bale, ayi kœmbœrœ ɔkɔ agea dœ gbanda, tshe gu ndœ kœlo ɓa ndœ endje yé endje sœ liya kœmbœrœ akwanœ asœmœ.
18.4: Lɔkɔ sabata bale dœ bale, Polo sœ lima kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o sœnda Sinagoga œdœ pe kœtetœ kœfa gbetshelœ nœ Ayuda dœ Agreke.
18.5: Lɔkɔ á Atimote dœ Sila yi lima kumu endje kœto lœ Masedwane, Polo zatœ ye tɨ djigi ndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o, tshe ma fœ Ayuda adœke Yisu kœdœ Masiya.
18.6: Kashe endje sœ lima kœshara she dœ kœgu she, Polo mea lœba ye, œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Indji 'e œ sœ pa kumu 'e dœ tœ 'e, mœ sœ yerœ lœ nœ, yé kœto kpesheke, mœ na ga ndœ angbɨ azu.»
18.7: Manda kœgitœ ye kpœtœmœ, tshe na ga ndœ anga uzu bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Titiuse Justuse, á tshe kœdœ uzu kœdonga Ndjaba nœ Ayuda yé anda nœ ye sœ lima ɨndɨrɨ Sinagoga.
18.8: Krispuse, gbozu tshapa Sinagoganœ asœmœ, yi lima ndœ Gbozu, œshe dœ azu tshasœnda nœ ye para. Anga azu ndjoro lœ Koriti á endje sœ ndje lima kœdji Polo, yi ndje ndœ Yisu yé œ gbɔ batisimu.
18.9: Anga butshɔ bale, Gbozu pa fœ Polo lœ ulu adœke: «Sœsœ dœ awa nene, sœsœ ndje koko nene,
18.10: gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ dœ ɓœ awa bale. Uzu bale œ li kœto kane ye ga tœ zœ á kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ ɓœ nene, mbœrœ ɨlɨ azu á endje sœ lœ ongbonœ asœ kœdœ azu nœ mœ.»
18.11: Polo lo lœ Koriti ungu bale dœ yapu mindu dœ bale, ndœ kœyisœ o'o ama Ndjaba. Kœpa ngbanga nœ Polo
18.12: Lɔkɔ á Galiyo kœdœ lima gbozugo Akayi, Ayuda zɨ tshelœ o'o ndœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ tœ Polo, endje za she œ na dœ she ɓa tœ osho kœwa ngbanga.
18.13: Yé œ pa adœke: «Uzu asœ sœ kœdjingili tshelœ kumu azu dœ o'o adœke endje donga Ndjaba neke á awa akwa ogo nœ azœ wa adœke 'a dodonga she nene.»
18.14: Polo kœyindœ kœpa o'o kane, Galiyo kœgi fœ Ayuda adœke: «Œ kœdœ má adœke uzu asœ mbœrœ ekperœ, too œ ta ɓango, mœ dji ma 'e ye.
18.15: Kashe ɓata œ sœ tœ upu nœ kœshara o'o ugurutœ ye tœ kœyisœrœ, dœ anga ɨ'ɨrɨ œdœ pe ndje awa o'o nœ 'e dœ tœ 'e, œ wu 'e. Mœ yiyindœ mara ngbanga atake nene.»
18.16: Yé á gɔrɔ endje tœ œsœ kœwa ngbanga ye.
18.17: Endje para tepa Sosetene gbozu tshapa Sinagoga, œ ɓi she ɓa utshu osho kœwa ngbanga. Kashe Galiyo gbegbe lima dœ tœnœ nene. Polo ro ga lœ Atiɔshe
18.18: Œndœ Polo dɨ lima waa lœ Koriti, manda nœ á tshe katœ aayanœ lœ Yisu, á za awa kœro ga lœ Siri. Prisile dœpe Akila ro lima tœ awanœ dœ she. Ɓa tœ mangu nœ ongbo Sakre utshu kœli she ga lœ egerœ agba, tshe tshowa sukumu ye pa ye mbœrœ uvu á tshe za liya fœ Ndjaba.
18.19: Ɔlɔ á endje wuta ga lœ Efeze, Polo katœ Akila dœ Prisile tɨ kpœtœmœ á na œnœ ye ga lœ Sinagoga ndœ kœpa o'o dœ Ayuda.
18.20: Ɓata endje kpœtœmœ sœ lima kœdɨ tshelœma endje adœke œndœ ye dɨ dœ œne kane, Polo vwaratœ ye.
18.21: Kashe ndœ kœro lima she ga utshunœ, tshe pa o'o fœ endje adœke: «Mœ kwa bala tœmœ ga ndœ 'e, œdœ Ndjaba kœyindœ nœ.» Tshe kœɔ ga lœ egerœ agba la ungu lœ Efeze.
18.22: Kœjerœ ga lœ Sezaré, tshe ro ga lœ Yerusaleme mbœrœ kœbala azu tshelœ anda Ndjaba, manda nœ dœ kœro she ga lœ Atiɔshe.
18.23: Ɓa zœ, olo ye ngbangba lima nene. Manda nœ, tshe kœkwa lakpɨ bale dœ bale lœ ogo Galate dœ Friji, tshe ka kœpa fœ ayindœ Yisu adœke endje shi gbɨ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje. Apolo lœ Efeze dœ Koriti
18.24: Anga uzu Yuda bale ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Apolo, uzu lakpɨ Alekezandri lœ ogo Ezipito, na lima ga lœ Efeze. Œshe kœdœ uzu nœ kœwusœ kœpa o'o dœ ɔtshɔnœ, œ wu ndje sœ Buku nœ Ndjaba tœ ɔtshɔnœ waa.
18.25: Endje yi lima sœ œrœ fœ she tœ upu nœ awa nœ Gbozu. Ɨshirɨ ye su dœ gbɔgbɔ, tshe mɨndœ o'o yé œ yisœ œrœ tœ pu nœ Yisu dœ ɔtshɔnœ waa. Kashe tshe wu lima kolœ œsœ batisimu á Yowane za lima fœ azu.
18.26: Tshe sœ lima kœpandœ Yisu dœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ lœ Sinagoga. Kashe manda kœdji she, Prisile œdœ Akila e she ɓa ndœ endje, yé œ kpa ma adja awa nœ Ndjaba fœ she.
18.27: Ɓata á tshe sœ lima dœ gbetshelœ nœ kœro ga lœ Akayi, ayanœ lœ Yisu sœ dœ yanga nœ agbe nœ ye, yé œ su mbeti fœ ayindœ Yisu ɓa zœ adœke endje za osho kœsœ fœ she. Manda kœwuta she ɓa zœ, tshe tɨ kane ayindœ Yisu ndjoro dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba.
18.28: Gbambanœ nene, tshe pa ngbɨ fœ Ayuda tœ ala azu adœke endje dji awa adja o'o, yé œ sœ lima kœma lœ awa nœ Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke Yisu kœdœ Masiya.

19.1: Ɔlɔ á Apolo sœ lima ɓa lœ Koriti, Polo ro lima tɔ lœ kaga lœ aya Azi yeka á jerœ ga lœ Efeze. Ɓa zœ, tshe gbɔ lima anga ayindœ Yisu,
19.2: á yu endje adœke: «'E gbɔ lima Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ ɔlɔ á 'e te ayindœ Yisu ye a?» Endje kœgi fœ she adœke: «'A djidji ndje anga nœ adœke Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ sœ zœ nene.»
19.3: Polo kpa kœyu endje adœke: «Ka batisimu gaɗe dá 'e gbɔ a?» Endje kœgi fœ she adœke: «'A gbɔ batisimunœ á Yowane ayi kœza Batisimu yisœ nœ.»
19.4: Polo kœgi adœke: «Adjapu Yowane sœ lima kœza batisimu fœ azu á endje fatshalɔsu endje, yé tshe sœ lima kœpa fœ endje adœke endje yindœ uzu á tshe na manda œne, œ yindœ kœpa adœke Yisu.»
19.5: Endje dji o'onœ asœmœ, yé œ gbɔ lima batisimu dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu Yisu.
19.6: Polo kœto kane ye ga pa endje, yé endje kœgbɔ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ. Endje tetœ kœpa tafo o'o ama ogo dœ pe kœmɨndœ o'o á to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba.
19.7: Azu wuta lima kɔkɔ ga pa œrœ nœ́ ndjokpa dœ bisha. Kœyisœrœ nœ Polo ɓa lœ ongbo Efeze
19.8: Polo sœ lima kœro ga lœ Sinagoga, yé lœ yapu votɔ, tshe sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ tœ upu nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba dœ awa nene, yé œ pa o'o dœ mara adœke endje á endje dji she, yindœ o'o á tshe sœ kœpa tœnœ.
19.9: Kashe anga azu sœ lima dœ gbɔkumu, œ vwaratœ endje tœ kœyindœ nœ yé œ sœ kœmɔ awa nœ Gbozu kpœtœ ala angbɔtœ. Polo katœ endje tɨ œ ko ayindœ Yisu potœ ye, yé œ tetœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ endje ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ ɓa lœ anda lakɔrɔ nœ Tiranuse.
19.10: Tshe mbœrœ lima ataa manda ungu bisha yeka á azu kɔ á endje sœ lœ ogo Azi, œdœ Ayuda œdœ Agreke, endje dji lima o'o nœ Gbozu. O'o tœ upu nœ kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ
19.11: Ndjaba sœ lima kœmbœrœ ogboro œrœ lœ awa nœ Polo.
19.12: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, anga azu sœ lima kœgu dœ siriki á goro ɔkɔ Polo fœ aayi koɓa. Koɓa nœ endje ka lima tœ endje yé ekpe ɨshirɨ gi lima tœ ye pa azu.
19.13: Anga Ayuda á endje sœ lima kœro dje tœ osho kɔ kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa azu koɓa asœmœ yamba lima kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu. Endje pa lima adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e adœke dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu Yisu á Polo œ yisœ œrœ tœ upu nœ ye asœmœ, 'e wuta ye!»
19.14: Azu á endje le lima œrœ nœ asœmœ kœdœ agbolo yakoshe mindu dœ bisha (7) nœ anga gbozu nganga Ndjaba nœ Ayuda á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Seva.
19.15: Kashe ɔlɔ bale, ekpe ɨshirɨ gi lima fœ endje adœke: «Yisu a? Mœ wusœ ye, yé mœ wu ndje sœ Polo. Kashe e'e a, 'e kœdœ aɗe e?»
19.16: Yé yakoshe á tshe sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨnœ pa ye kœi ga ugurutœ endje dœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ, œ kœtetœ kœɓi lima endje, œ suru tshelœ lœba, dœ pe kœtu uku tœ endje, á endje tɔ lima sœnda dœ ɔrɔ á kpa ye.
19.17: Azu para lœ Efeze, Ayuda dœ pe angbɨ azu dji lima o'onœ asœmœ, yé awa za endje yeka á endje lɨ lima œsœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu Yisu.
19.18: Azu ndjoro á endje yi lima ndœ Yisu, tetœ kœna tœnœ mbœrœ kœpandœ ekperœ á endje mbœrœ lima dœ tshama endje ga lafo.
19.19: Anga endje ndjoro á endje sœ lima kœfa œrœ tsharawo , ko œrœ nœ endje para ga shu, yé á endje sho lima ukpulunœ tœ ala azu para. Endje dɨ lima œrœnœ kɔ mbœrœ kœwusœ amanœ, œ wu lima adœke mbetinœ kɔ á endje sho li dœ Langere ngendja kutu zazu bisha dœ ndjokpa (250.000).
19.20: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Ɔtshɔ O'o za lima osho, azu ndjoro yi lima ndœ nœ lœ awa nœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Gbozu. Kœoma azu lœ Efeze
19.21: Manda o'onœ asœmœ, Polo wa o'o lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ kœro ga lœ Yerusaleme yé tshe vwanga tɔ lœ Masedwane dœ pe Akayi. Tshe pa ndje adœke: «Ɔlɔ á mœ kœwuta ɓa zœ, œ li ndje adœke mœ kpa ro ndje ga lœ Roma.»
19.22: Tshe vwa anga anganœ bisha, Atimote dœ Eraste ga lœ Masedwane, yé œ sœpe damba œnœ ye lima kœlo lœ Azi.
19.23: Kolœ dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ dá egerœ djingili wuta lima tœ upu nœ awa nœ Gbozu ɓa lœ Efeze.
19.24: Anga ayi kœfatshelœ ɔrœ, á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Demetriyuse, sœ lima kœmbœrœ a 'eara anda tepelo nœ Artemise dœ kœwo, yé œ sœ lima kœte ngendja fœ endje waa.
19.25: Tshe ngbɔɓa lima aayi kœfatshelœ ɔrœ dœ pe anga aayi akwa kɔ á endje sœ lima kœmbœrœ mara akwanœ asœmœ, á pa fœ endje adœke: «'E wusœ nœ ye anga mœ; a kœsœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, œ to kolœ manda akwa nœ azœ asœ.
19.26: Yé 'e sœ kœwu tœnœ too 'e sœ kœdji azu kœpa adœke: Polonœ asœmœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ adœke andjaba á azu mbœrœ endje dœ kane endje dœ́dœ́ ɔtshɔ andjaba nene. Azu ndjoro dji o'onœ yé œ fa lɔsu endje ndœ nœ. Tshe mbœmbœrœ kolœ ɓa lœ Efeze nene, kashe dje ndje lœ Azi para.
19.27: Œ dœ́dœ́ kolœ azœ dá o'onœ asœ œ ndɨ akwa nœ azœ nene, kashe œ ndɨ ndje anda Tepelo nœ egerœ ndjaba yashe Artemise. Azu œ wu andanœ gbambanœ yé endje kpa lɨsœ nœ nene. Mbœrœ Azi dœ pe ogo djigi sœ lima kœdonga ndjabanœ asœmœ.»
19.28: Manda kœpa o'onœ asœmœ ataa, azu kɔ á endje dji djerœ ókó, œ sœ kœta rawa adœke: «Artemise, egerœ ndjaba yashe lœ ongbo Efeze!»
19.29: Azu tshelœ ongbonœ djigi oma dœ o'o kekeke. Endje ko anga Polo á endje na tœ awa akwanœ bale dœ she, Agayuse dœ pe Aristarke azu Masedwane, na tœnœ ga la wutu mɔlɔ.
19.30: Polo yi lima ndœ kœwuta ga utshu azunœ ga zœ, kashe ayambarœ pakata she yé.
19.31: Anga aayi akwa nœ lita á endje dœ lima anga Polo mɨ lima upu fœ she adœke, tshe kpa nana ga la wutu mɔlɔnœ nene.
19.32: Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, uzu dœ uzu sœ lima kœta rawa nœ ye dœ o'o nœ ye kpikpikpi, yé azu ndjoro ugurutœ endje kpa wuwusœ ádá á endje ngbɔtœ endje ndœ nœ nene.
19.33: Anga azu lœ ukpulu azunœ mɨndœ upunœ fœ anga uzu bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Alekezandre á Ayuda gavwa she ɓa utshu endje. Á tshe yi kane ye ga lafo ndœ kœyu o'o.
19.34: Kashe ɔlɔ á ndje wusœ nœ adœke œshe kœdœ uzu Yuda, endje kpa ta rawa manda ada ɔlɔ bisha adœke: «A donga Artemise lœ Efeze!»
19.35: Manda nœ, anga gbozu tshelœ ongbonœ u endje ga tœnœ yé á pa adœke: «Azu Efeze, uzu ɗe dá wuwusœ nœ adœke ongbo Efeze sœ dœ anda tepelo nœ Artemise œdœ pe œrœ á endje gɨ á to ɓa lafo á te nene a?
19.36: Uzu bale œ shara o'onœ asœ nene, œ li adœke a sœ koko, yé a katœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á ádánœ gugu nene.
19.37: Azu á 'e to endje na tœnœ ga mœ asœ gugu œsœ ndjaba nœ azœ nene, endje zɨzɨ ndje angba nene.
19.38: Œ kœsœ adœke Demetriyuse dœ pe azu akwa nœ ye asœ sœ dœ o'o dœ uzu, uzunœ na œ tɔ meza pa ye, ayi kœwa o'o sœ zœ dœ pe olo ngbanga sœ ndje zœ.
19.39: Yé anga o'o kœsœ ndje zœ, osho á azu œ ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ kœguma o'o, œ wa o'onœ zœ.
19.40: A gbɔ o'o tœ œrœ á a ngbɔtœ azœ ga tœnœ kpesheke á mbœrœ asœ. Azu œ e azœ tœ aayi kœoma dœ o'o. Gbambanœ nene, anga uzu kœtɔ meza pa azœ, o'o nœ kœpa tœnœ œ gu nene.» Manda o'onœ asœ, tshe pa fœ azu adœke endje gu ga mangba endje.

20.1: Ɔlɔ á djingili o'onœ ka ye, Polo ngbɔɓa ayambarœ ga tœnœ œ mɨ upu fœ endje, œ bala endje dœ kœza awa ga lœ Masedwane.
20.2: Kœro she tɔ lœ ogonœ asœmœ, tshe mɨ lima upu waa fœ ayanœ lœ Yisu, manda nœ á wuta ga lœ Grese.
20.3: Tshe mbœrœ lima yapu votɔ ɓa zœ. Ɔlɔ á tshe yi lima ndœ kœɔ ga lœ egerœ agba kœro ga lœ Siri, ɓata Ayuda sœ lima kœvwarandœ ye á tshe dji, á kpa kwa dja ga lœ Masedwane.
20.4: Anganœ lœ ana kœdœ lima: Sapatrose gbolo yakoshe nœ Piruse uzu Bere, Aristarke dœ pe Sekunduse azu Tesalonike, Gayushi uzu Derbe, Timote, Tishike dœ pe Trofime azu ogo Azi.
20.5: Kœwuta ga lœ ogo Masedwane, endje ro lima œnœ endje utshunœ kœkate 'a ɓa lœ Trowase.
20.6: Yé a'a nœ 'a, manda angbo nœ mapa á susuku nene, á ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba tœ mangu Filipo œ mbœrœ olo mindu, á togba dœ endje lœ Trowase á mbœrœ pɔsɔ bale dœ endje. Kœshe nœ Etike lœ Trowase
20.7: Dœ ɔlɔ yenga dœ akɨdala, 'a ngbɔ lima tœ 'a ga tœnœ ndœ kœkurutshelœ mapa, Polo sœ kœmɨndœ 'o ama Ndjaba fœ aayanœ lœ Yisu œrrr ga tœ tshaguru butshɔ mbœrœ œ li lima adœke osho kœkɔrɔ tshe ro.
20.8: Miinda sœ lima zœ lœ gbɔshɔ ɓa lafo á angbɔtœ 'a ga lœ nœ.
20.9: Anga djagbala yakoshe á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Etike, tshe sœ lima ga tœ ape ɨzɨ, olo za she kpakpakpa, ɓata Polo kaka lima damba tœ o'onœ nene, lœ olo, tshe djɔ œ te kœto ɓa tœ votɔ gbɔshɔ ɓa lafo œrrr ɓa atɨ. Kœyindœ kœti she ga lafo atake tshe tshu lima ye.
20.10: Polo jerœ ga atɨ, á na katsha ga ndœ ye á za she ga lakoro ye á pa adœke: «Awa zaza 'e nene, tshe sœpe dœ soro!»
20.11: Kpa kœɔ she ga lafo ga zœ, Polo kurutshelœ mapa tœ endje yé endje zɨ, manda nœ tshe pa 'o œrrr o 'ara yeka á ro.
20.12: Gbolo yakoshe asœmœ she ye, endje gu dœ she ga ndœ endje, yé lɔsu azu para kɔkɔ zɨ tɨɨ. Polo na ga lœ Mile
20.13: 'A afo utshunœ, œ li ga lœ egerœ agba ndœ kœro ga lœ Asose. 'A yindœ kœza Polo ga ndœ 'a mbœrœ tshe yi lima ndœ kœro ga zœ dœ ada ye.
20.14: Ɔlɔ á tshe gbɔ 'a ɓa lœ Asose, 'a za she ga ndœ 'a ga lœ egerœ agba mbœrœ kœro ga lœ Mitilene.
20.15: Osho kɔrɔ panœ, 'a to kpœtœmœ 'a na ndoo dœ tshiki Kio. Manda olo bale 'a wuta ga tœ tshiki Samose, tœ bisha olo yeka á 'a wuta ga lœ Mile.
20.16: Polo wa lima adœke œne ka lœ Efeze nene, mbœrœ olo œ ro tœ œne lœ ogo Azi waa. Ogo nœ ye kœdœ lima kœwuta katsha ga lœ Yerusaleme lɔkɔ Patekɔte. Polo pu o'o fœ agbozu Ikrizia lœ Efeze
20.17: Ɓa lœ Mile, Polo vwa osho ndœ agbozu Ikrizia lœ Efeze.
20.18: Ɔlɔ á endje wuta ga ndœ ye, tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «'E wusœ ɔtshɔ mœ ugurutœ 'e, kœto tœ ali olo mœ á mœ na ga ndœ 'e lœ ogo Azi.
20.19: Mœ zaza tœmœ lœ ama akwa nœ Gbozu nene, mœ mbœrœ akwa dœ ngola lœ ala mœ, mœ wu oyo waa mbœrœ Ayuda sœ lima kœvwarandœ mœ.
20.20: Mœ zaza anga œrœ á li kœtɨ kane 'e yiwatœ nœ tœ 'e nene, mœ mɨndœ Yisu fœ 'e, mœ yisœ œrœ fœ 'e lœ ukpulu azu too ɓa sœnda nœ 'e.
20.21: O'o mœ sœ lima kœ'e Ayuda dœ Agreke adœke endje fa lɔsu endje fœ Ndjaba dœ pe kœyindœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu.
20.22: «Ngɔngɔ asœ, Ɨshirɨ sœ kœvwa mœ ga lœ Yerusaleme, mœ wuwusœ neke á wuta ga tœ mœ ɓa zœ nene.
20.23: Kashe œneke á mœ wusœ nœ kœdœ lœ ongbo kɔ á mœ ro lœ nœ, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ sœ kœma fœ mœ adœke, kánga dœ pe œrœ oyo kɔ sœ kœkate mœ.
20.24: Kashe mœ wu adœke soro mœ sœ ɓata œrœ gbambanœ, ogo nœ mœ kœdœ mœ na œrrr ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔ akwa nœ mœ, yé ga tœ kœka akwa á Gbozu Yisu za fœ mœ adœke: mœ mɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba ga ndœ azu.
20.25: «Ngɔngɔ nœ asœ, mœ wusœ nœ adœke 'e kpa wu mœ nene, e'e má mœ sœ lima ugurutœ 'e mbœrœ kœpandœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba fœ 'e.
20.26: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa á mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ fœ 'e kɔ kpesheke adœke: indji 'e œ tu ga lœ kumu mœ nene.
20.27: Gbambanœ nene, mœ zaza anga o'onœ yiwa tœnœ tœ 'e nene, mœ pandœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba para fœ 'e ye.
20.28: 'E gbɔndœtœ 'e dœ tœ 'e, yé œ gbɔndœ azu á Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ ko 'e tœ aayi kœgbɔndœ endje. 'E gbɔndœ Ikrizia nœ Ndjaba ɓata aayi kœgbɔndœ apata. 'E gbɔndœ nœ mbœrœ Ndjaba dá yɔ dœ indji Gbolo nœ ye dœ tœ ye.
20.29: Mœ wusœ nœ adœke aekpe azu œ na manda mœ, endje sœ ɓata amuru, endje wu oyo apatanœ nene.
20.30: Ugurutœ 'e ndje, anga anga 'e œ tetœ kœpa wala mbœrœ kœgbota ayindœ Yisu ga ndœ endje.
20.31: Ataa, ala 'e gbɔ, adja œndœ tœ 'e roro 'e nene. 'E gbe dœ ungu votɔ butshɔ dœ ɔlɔ dœ ngola lœ la mœ, mœ sœ lima kolœ kœna manda uzu dœ uzu ndœ kœgi she ga ugurutœ 'e.
20.32: «Yé ngɔngɔ asœ, mœ sœ kœko 'e ga tshakane Ndjaba, Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye gbɔndœ 'e, œ li kœza gbɔgbɔ fœ 'e ndje dœ kœko œrœ kɔ á tshe guma mbœrœ azu á tshe ke endje fœ 'e.
20.33: Mœ sœsœ lima dœ ogo œrœ nœ uzu bale nene, œdœ ngendja, ɔrœ too lœba.
20.34: 'E wusœ nœ dœ tœ 'e adœke mœ mbœrœ lima akwa dœ kane mœ dœ tœ mœ yé á gbɔ œrœ á li dœ mœ dœ pe anga mœ á mœ na tœ awanœ bale dœ endje.
20.35: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ lima kœma fœ 'e adœke, 'e mbœrœ akwa yeka á kœto œrœ fœ endjeneke á endje mɔmɔ ugurutœ 'e, 'e gbe dœ o'o á Gbozu Yisu pa dœ tœ ye lima adœke: “Yanga nœ kœto œrœ fœ azu ropa œnœ kœgbɔ tœnœ ye.”»
20.36: Manda o'onœ, Polo gote ga atɨ dœ endje para ndœ kœ e Ndjaba.
20.37: Endje para endje tetœ ɨkɨ ye, œ yo ga dagɨ Polo ndœ kœ'uru tshelœ utu ye.
20.38: Endje sœ lima dœ oyo mbœrœ Polo pa fœ endje adœke, œne kpa wutœ œne dœ endje nene. Manda nœ á endje gi she na tœnœ œrrr ga lœ egerœ agba.

21.1: Manda kœkurutshelœtœ 'a dœ endje, 'a li ga lœ egerœ agba, 'a ro ga lœ tshiki Kose, osho kɔrɔ panœ 'a wuta ga lœ Rode, kœto kpœtœmœ dá 'a ro ga lœ Patara.
21.2: Kpœtœmœ, 'a gbɔ anga egerœ agba á sœ kœro ga lœ Fenisi, yeka 'a ɔ ga lœ nœ á ro.
21.3: Kœndo dœ Shipre, 'a katœ tshikinœ ga pa gele 'a, 'a za awa Siri, 'a jerœ ɓa lœ Tire ɓa tœ osho á endje yi lima ndœ kœko œrœ lœ egerœ agba ga shu.
21.4: 'A mbœrœ lima pɔsɔ bale kpœtœmœ mbœrœ 'a gbɔ ayindœ Yisu. Lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ, endje pa fœ Polo adœke tshe nana ga lœ Yerusaleme nene.
21.5: Kashe ɔlɔ á olo 'a ka, endje na kœkatœ 'a ga tœ awa dœ awo endje dœ pe agbolo nœ endje. Yeka á 'a gote ɓa tœ mangu yé á za avwala.
21.6: Manda kœbala ndangba tœ 'a dœ endje, 'a ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba yeka á endje gu ga ndœ endje.
21.7: Kœto lœ Tire, 'a ro œrrr ga lœ Petolemayise, 'a mbœrœ kpœtœmœ olo bale ndœ kœbalatœ 'a dœ aaya 'a lœ Yisu.
21.8: Osho kɔrɔ panœ, 'a ro ga lœ Sezaré, ɓa zœ 'a ro ga ndœ ayi kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Filipo, 'a lo ɓa ndœ ye. Œshe kœdœ anga aayi kœtɨ kane aayi avwa á 'a ke lima endje mindu dœ bisha (7) lœ Yerusaleme.
21.9: Tshe sœ dœ ayawuru vana á endje sœpe dœ akpɔnœ, á sœ kœgbara o'o á to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba.
21.10: Yé 'a mbœrœ olo ndjoro lima kpœtœmœ, anga ayi kœgbara o'o to lœ Yuda œ na, ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Agabuse.
21.11: Kœgbɔ 'a, tshe za uwu tshapa lœba nœ Polo á i dœ ada ye dœ pe kane ye, á pa adœke: «Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ pa adœke mara á Ayuda œ i bala dœ ayengɔ uwu tshapa lœbanœ asœ ɓa lœ Yerusaleme á za she fœ anga angbɨ azu dœmœ.»
21.12: Manda kœdji o'onœ asœ, a'a dœ pe aaya lœ Yisu lœ ongbonœ, dɨ tshelœma 'a fœ Polo adœke, tshe nana ga lœ Yerusaleme nene.
21.13: Kashe Polo gi adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe dá 'e sœ kœkɨ tœnœ á sœ kœyi awa ga lɔsu mœ a? Mœ guma tœ mœ ndje adœke, endje za mœ ga lœ kánga dœ pe kœwo mœ ɓa lœ Yerusaleme mangba ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu Yisu ye.»
21.14: Ɓata á tshe yiyindœ o'o nœ 'a lima nene, 'a katœ kœshosho she yé á pa adœke: «Kaka adœke Gbozu mbœrœ lindœ gbetshelœ nœ ye.»
21.15: Manda olo teasho, 'a guma tœ 'a ndœ kœro ga lœ Yerusaleme.
21.16: Anga ayindœ Yisu lœ Sezaré á 'a ro tœ awanœ dœ endje lima, endje gbɔ osho kœlo tœnœ fœ 'a ɓa ndœ anga uzu bale lœ Shipre, ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Manasone, œshe kœdœ anga yindœ Yisu ɓalima katshatsha. Polo dœ Jake gbɔtœ endje ɓa lœ Yerusaleme
21.17: Ɔlɔ á 'a wuta ga lœ Yerusaleme, alaya lœ Yisu uru tshelœ utu 'a dœ yanga.
21.18: Osho kɔrɔ panœ, 'a ro tœ awanœ bale dœ Polo ga ndœ Jake, osho á agbozu kuma akwa kɔ lœ Ikrizia œ ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ.
21.19: Manda kœbala endje, Polo pandœ œrœ kɔ á Ndjaba mbœrœ lima dœ she awa bale lœma akwa nœ ye ugurutœ angbɨ azu.
21.20: Endje dji Polo, yé œ donga Ndjaba. Á pa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ wu, aya, Ayuda andjoro yindœ Yisu, endje kɔ sœ kœpara awa kœmbœrœtœ endje liaka awa akwa á Ndjaba za fœ Moyize dœ lɔsu endje bale.
21.21: Kashe endje dji adœke, ɓœ yisœ œrœ fœ Ayuda para á endje sœ lœ oporotœ angbɨ azu adœke, endje katœ awa akwa nœ Moyize yé œ ka ndje tœ kœwa agbolo nœ endje tœ gaza dœ pe kœmbœrœ œrœ mara ogo nœ azœ.
21.22: A mbœrœ kotoo? Mbœrœ endje dji ndœ zœ adœke ɓœ sœ kpœke zœ.
21.23: Mbœrœtœ zœ lindœ neke á 'a pa fœ ɓœ asœke. 'A sœ dœ anga azu vana á endje dra ama endje fœ Ndjaba.
21.24: Ko endje potœ zœ dœ́ 'e na œ mbœrœ adœke ɔkɔ 'e sœ yerœ, gi œrœ tokóró tshangba endje. Endje li ndje kœwa sukumu endje yé azu para œ gbe adœke o'o á kɨ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ kœdœ wala. Kashe œ li ndje adœke ɓœ mbœrœtœ zœ liaka awa akwa.
21.25: Yé mbœrœ angbɨ azu á endje te ayindœ Yisu, 'a su mbeti dœ o'o á 'a wa adœke: endje zɨzɨ œrœ á endje to dœ okoro fœ andjaba nene, indji, dœ agea á indji ye tutu ga atɨ nene, yé endje mbœmbœrœ angba budu nene.»
21.26: Osho kɔrɔ panœ, Polo ko ayakoshe asœmœ yé œ mbœrœ adœke ɔkɔ œne sœ yerœ awa bale dœ endje. Endje na dœ endje ga lœ Tepelo mbœrœ kœpandœ kœka olo nœ kœmbœrœ adœke ɔkɔ œne sœ yerœ, yekane á uzu dœ uzu kœzo agea tokórónœ ga utshu Ndjaba. Kœza Polo
21.27: Œ sœpe lima teasho adœke olo mindu dœ bisha nœ kœmbœrœ adœke ɔkɔ azu sœ yerœ ka, yeka Ayuda lœ ogo Azi wu Polo lœ Tepelo. Endje bɨlɨ azu ndjoro ndœ ye yé á za she.
21.28: Endje sœ lima kœta rawa adœke: «Azu Israyele, 'e na ga mœ œ tɨ kane 'a ga lafo! Uzunœ á tshe sœ kœyisœ œrœ fatœnœ djezœ, á tshe sœ kœndɨ tshelœ kœlɨsœtœ ogo Israyele, á yiyindœ awa akwa nœ Moyize nene, á tshe ko angbɨ azu ga lœ Tepelo, á ndɨ œyerœ osho dœke.»
21.29: Mbœrœ endje wu lima Trofime uzu Efeze dœ she ɓa lœ ongbo á gbe adœke Polo li dœ she ga lœ Tepelo.
21.30: Tshelœ ongbo djigi turu dœ o'onœ, yé azu ndjoro na lima ye. Endje tepa Polo lœ Tepelo œ wuta dœ she ga shu, trale dœ kœtshu mandanœ ga tœnœ.
21.31: Ɓata á endje sœ lima ndœ kœpara awa kœwo she, o'onœ wuta lima ɓa ndœ gbozu tshapa aturugu nœ Roma lœ Yerusaleme adœke: «Ekpe o'o li ga lœ Yerusaleme ye!»
21.32: Katsha, tshe ngbɔɓa aturugu dœ agbozu tshapa endje, á endje na ga tœ osho á o'o sœ tœnœ. Lɔkɔ á azu wu aturugu dœ gbozu tshapa endje yeka á katœ kœɓi Polo.
21.33: Yé gbozu tshapa aturugu na ndoo dœ she, á za 'o fœ endje adœke endje i Polo ga tœnœ dœ djingiri bisha. Manda nœ á tshe yu osho adœke œshe kœdœ ɗe yé œrœ gaɗe dá tshe mbœrœ a.
21.34: Kashe lœ ukpulu azu, uzu dœ uzu sœ kœta rawa dœ o'o nœ ye kpi, ɓata gbozu nœ aturugu sœ lima kœdji ádá o'onœ dœ ɔtshɔ nœ nene mbœrœ ukpulu azu, á wa adœke endje gu dœ Polo ga lœ pada nœ aturugu.
21.35: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta ga pa esekaliye, aturugu za Polo ga lafo mbœrœ azu sœ lima kœndanga endje waa.
21.36: Yé azu kɔ te manda endje dœ rawa adœke: «'E wo she!» Kœpa ngbanga nœ Polo ɓa utshu Ayuda
21.37: Ɔlɔ á endje yindœ kœli dœ she ga lœ padanœ, Polo pa fœ gbozu nœ aturugunœ adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ nœ adœke mœ pa o'o ye a?» Tshe gi fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ wu ndje sœ o'o ama Greke ye!
21.38: Œ dœ́dœ́ ɓœ kœdœ uzu Ezipito á tshe za djingili lœ olo á ro kpœke ga ugurutœ azu, yé á bɨlɨ azu á kpa ndje dœ azu koshe kutu vana ga lœ kpagagasho nene a?»
21.39: Polo gi fœ she adœke: «Œ̃œ̃ nene, œmœ kœdœ uzu Yuda, endje zu mœ lœ Tarse lœ ogo Silisi. Œmœ kœdœ gbolo ongbo á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ to waa. Wu oyo mœ, œ za awa fœ mœ, mœ pa o'o fœ azu.»
21.40: Tshe za awa fœ she, Polo ka ga pa esekaliye, œ tɨ kane ye ga lafo ndœ kœma adœke azu katœ kœta rawa, azu wu œ sœ kokoko. Yé tshe tetœ kœpa 'o fœ endje dœ o'o ama ogo Ayuda á dœ Ebre adœke:

22.1: «Alaba dœ pe alaya, 'e dji o'o ngbanga nœ mœ á mœ yindœ kœgi ngɔngɔ asœke ga utshu 'e kane.»
22.2: Kœdji adœke Polo sœ kœpa 'o fœ endje dœ o'o ama Ebre, osho kpa yi taa, yé á tshe pa fœ endje adœke:
22.3: «Œmœ kœdœ uzu Yuda, endje zu mœ lœ Tarse lœ ogo Silisi, kashe mœ gerœ lœ ongbonœ asœ, mœ mbœrœ lakɔrɔ á sœ kœyisœ o'o á pandœ awa akwa nœ aata azœ tshakudu Gamaliyele, œmœ kœdœ lima uzu á mœ zatœ mœ waa fœ Ndjaba ɓata 'e para kɔkɔ á 'e sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ kpesheke.
22.4: Mœ sœ ndje lima kœwo azu á ndje sœ kœza awa Gbozu, mœ ko ayakoshe dœ pe ayashe va ga lœ kánga.
22.5: Egerœ nganga Ndjaba dœ ukpulu agbozu tshapa azu o'o œ pa ndje ndœmanœ fœ 'e ye. Endje dá vwa lima mœ adœke mœ na œ katœ mbeti á sœ kœza awa fœ mœ kœro ndœ aaya mœ dœ Ayuda á endje sœ ɓa lœ Damaseke. Mœ na lima ga zœ ndœ kœko azunœ asœmœ, kœgu dœ endje ga lœ Yerusaleme mbœrœ á endje kœgbɔ djofele.» Polo pandœ mara á tshe fa lima tshalɔsu ye (Wu ɓa tœ Akw 9.1-19; Mat 26.12-18)
22.6: «Mœ sœ lima lœ awa ana, yé lɔkɔ á mœ ndo dœ tshalakpɨ Damaseke, ngbangi dœ gbɔku ɔlɔ atake, ɨshirɨ owo to ɓa lafo œ za mœ djigi.
22.7: Mœ te ga atɨ, yé œ dji tshama uzu kœ'e mœ adœke: “Sawulo, Sawulo, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ mœ ata a?”
22.8: Mœ gi adœke: “Œɓœ kœdœ œɗe, Gbozu?” Tshama uzu kpa pa adœke: “Œmœ kœdœ Yisu ɓa lœ Nazarete, œmœ dá ɓœ mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ mœ asœmœ.”
22.9: Anga mœ á 'a na lima dœ endje wu ɨshirɨ owonœ ye, kashe endje djidji lima o'onœ á uzunœ sœ kœpa tœnœ fœ mœ nene.
22.10: Mœ yu adœke: “Œrœ gaɗe dá mœ kœmbœrœ a, Gbozu nœ mœ?” Yeka á Gbozu gi fœ mœ adœke: “Alafo œ na ga lœ Damaseke, yé ɓa zœ, endje yisœ akwa á li adœke ɓœ mbœrœ.”
22.11: Ɓata ɨshirɨ owonœ bu lima ala mœ ye, anga mœ dá za kane mœ wuta tœnœ ga lœ Damaseke.
22.12: «Anga uzu lima bale ɓa zœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Anania, œshe kœdœ uzu nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu, tshe sœ kœgbɔndœ awa akwa nœ Moyize waa, yé Ayuda para á endje sœ lima kpœtœmœ sœ kœpa ɔtshɔ o'o nœ ye waa.
22.13: Tshe na œ gbɔ mœ œ pa fœ mœ adœke: “Sawulo, aya mœ, ala zœ kɔrɔ!” Trale ala mœ kɔrɔ yé mœ mesho œ wu she.
22.14: Yeka á tshe kœpa fœ mœ adœke: “Ndjaba nœ aata azœ ke ɓœ adœke ɓœ wusœ œrœ á tshe yindœ nœ, ɓœ wu uzu á tshe sœ ndjii yé ɓœ dji o'o nœ ye.
22.15: Mbœrœ ɓœ dœ́ bala timu nœ ye utshu azu para, tœ œrœ á ɓœ wu dœ pe neke á ɓœ dji.
22.16: Ɓœ sœ kœkate œrœ gaɗe? 'A ro ɓœ gbɔ batisimu dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu yé œ ta ɨ'ɨrɨ ye dœ́ ekperœ nœ zœ kœyiwa.”
22.17: «Mœ gu ga lœ Yerusaleme, yé anga ɔlɔ bale mœ sœ kœ'e Ndjaba ɓa lœ Tepelo, mœ wu œrœ lœ ulu.
22.18: Mœ wu lima Gbozu á tshe sœ kœpa fœ mœ adœke: “Katœ Yerusaleme ngɔngɔ asœ tɨ, mbœrœ azunœ œ yi bala ndœ o'o á ɓœ pa fœ endje dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ nene.”
22.19: Mœ gi adœke: “Kashe Gbozu, endje wusœ nœ adœke mœ sœ lima kœna kœli ga lœ Sinagoga kœko azu á endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ zœ, œ ɓi endje yé œ ko endje gu tœnœ ga lœ kánga.
22.20: Ɔlɔ á endje wo lima Etiene, timu nœ zœ, mœ sœ lima zœ; mœ yindœ nœ ga ndœ endje, yé œ gbɔndœ lœba nœ endje.”
22.21: Yeka á Gbozu pa fœ mœ adœke: “Na zœ, mœ yindœ kœvwa ɓœ lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ, ɓa ndœ angbɨ azu.”» Polo pa adœke œne kœdœ gbolo ogo Roma
22.22: Ayuda á endje sœ lima kpœtœmœ dji o'o nœ ataa, œ oma dœ Polo yé œ tetœ kœta rawa adœke: «'E wo mara uzu atake ye! Tshe lili kœsœpe dœ soro nene!»
22.23: Ɓata endje sœ lima kœta rawa, kœko lœba nœ endje va e dœ pe kœgɨ trusha ga lafo,
22.24: gbozu tshapa aturugu pa adœke endje za Polo li tœnœ ga lœ pada œ sɔ she, yeka á kœwusœ ádá rawanœ á endje ta pa ye asœmœ.
22.25: Endje sœ kœi she dœ uwu ga tœnœ, Polo yu gbozu nœ aturugu adœke: «Œ li adœke endje ɓi gbolo ogo Roma utshu kœwa ngbanga nœ ye ye a?»
22.26: Manda kœdji o'onœ ataa, gbozu nœ aturugunœ pandœ nœ fœ gbozu tshapa endje adœke: «Ɓœ mbœrœ kotoo! Mbœrœ uzu asœ kœdœ gbolo ogo Roma!»
22.27: Gbozu tshapa aturugu kwatœ ye œ yu Polo adœke: «Pandœ nœ fœ mœ ka, adja ɓœ kœdœ gbolo ogo Roma a?» Polo yindœ nœ adœke: «Œ̃.»
22.28: Gbozu tshapa aturugu kpa pa adœke: «Œmœ, mœ ko egerœ ngendja ndœ kœfa gbolo ogo Roma.» Polo pa adœke: «Œmœ, mœ kœdœ adja gbolo ogo Roma.»
22.29: Trale, azu á endje sœ lima kœɓi she, gitœ endje ɨndɨrɨ ye yé. Awa za ndje lima gbozu tshapa aturugunœ mbœrœ kœwusœ nœ adœke œnœ i gbolo ogo Roma ga tœnœ dœ uwu. Polo ɓa utshu aayi kœwa ngbanga
22.30: Osho kɔrɔ panœ, gbozu tshapa aturugu yindœ kœwusœ ádá á Ayuda sœ kœza o'o ga pa Polo. Tshe zu djingiri tœ ye, yé manda nœ á e angbɔtœ nœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe aayi kœwa ngbanga para, á jerœ dœ Polo, á za she tɔ ga utshu endje.

23.1: Polo ko ala ye tɔ lœ la agboro aayi kœwa ngbanganœ, á pa fœ endje adœke: «Alaya, soro mœ sœ yerœ utshu Ndjaba œrrr ga tœ ngɔngɔ asœke yé lɔsu mœ sœ dœ kœsœ gee mbœrœ tœnœ.»
23.2: Kashe egerœ nganga Ndjaba á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Anania za o'o fœ azu á endje sœ ndoo dœ Polo adœke endje du ama ye.
23.3: Yé Polo pa fœ she adœke: «Ndjaba œ ɓi ɓœ, ɓœ sœ ɓata imbi muru anda á kavwa! Ɓœ sœ ɓa zœ mbœrœ kœwa ngbanga pa mœ liaka œneke á awa akwa pandœ nœ, yé ɓœ kpa katœ awa akwa tɨ œ pa adœke endje da mœ a?»
23.4: Azu á endje ka lima ndoo dœ Polo pa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ gu egerœ nganga Ndjaba a?»
23.5: Polo gi fœ endje adœke: «Alaya, mœ wuwusœ nœ nene adœke œshe kœdœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba. Gbambanœ nene, Buku nœ Ndjaba pa adœke: “Ɓœ pa ekpe o'o goro œsœ gbozu tshapa azu nœ zœ nene.”»
23.6: Polo wu lima sœ nœ adœke anga aayi kœwa ngbanganœ kœdœ Asadukayi, yé anga endje kœdœ Afarisayi. Mbœrœ tœnœ, tshe pa o'o ga utshu endje adœke: «Aaya, œmœ kœdœ uzu Farisayi, aata mœ kœdœ Afarisayi. Endje yindœ kœwa ngbanga pa mœ mbœrœ á mœ za lɔsu mœ ga pa neke á pa adœke azu á endje tshu, endje she bala lœ akuzu ye.»
23.7: Trale manda o'onœ á Polo pa ataa, a'ea wuta ugurutœ Afarisayi dœ pe Asadukayi, yé endje kurutshelœtœ endje.
23.8: Gbambanœ nene, Asadukayi pa adœke azu á endje tshu endje she lœ akuzu nene yé aandjelu dœ pe ɨshirɨ azu gugu nene. Kashe Afarisayi yi œnœ endje ndœ o'onœ asœmœ kɔ.
23.9: O'o wuta lima ngbangbangba, yé anga aayi kœyisœ awa akwa á endje dœ Afarisayi áafo, œ vwaratœ endje dœ ɔgbɔ, œ pa adœke: «'A wuwusœ ekperœ bale á yakoshe asœ mbœrœ nene. Anganœ nene ɨshirɨ dá pa o'o fœ she a, too andjelu a?»
23.10: Ɓata o'onœ sœ lima kœgerœ tœnœ, kœkpa awa adœke endje súru tshelœ Polo nene, gbozu tshapa aturugu za o'o adœke aturugu jerœ œ za Polo ugurutœ endje dœ́ œ gi she ga lœ pada.
23.11: Dœ abutshɔ manda nœ, Gbozu wuta ga utshu Polo á pa fœ she adœke: «Ka ngbɨrɨ, ɓata á ɓœ pa djakata o'o tœ upu nœ mœ lœ Yerusaleme kpœke, awa bale œ li adœke ɓœ mbœrœ ndje ataa ɓa lœ Roma.» Ayuda vwarandœ Polo
23.12: Osho kɔrɔ panœ pe dœ amazɨ, anga Ayuda ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ mbœrœ kœvwarandœ o'o. Endje dara ama endje adœke, œne zɨ œrœ nene, œ ndjo ndje œrœ nene œrrr adœke œne wo Polo yekane.
23.13: Azu á endje dara lima ama endje sœ kœropa zazu bisha.
23.14: Endje ro ga ndœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ pe agbɔ Ayudanœ œ pa adœke: «'A dara ama 'a dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Ndjaba adœke, 'a kpa zɨ œrœ nene yé 'a ndjo ndje ungu nene œrrr adœke 'a wo Polo yekane.
23.15: Yé e'e dœ́ agboro aayi kœwa ngbanga kɔ, 'e vwa osho fœ gbozu tshapa aturugu adœke, endje za Polo na tœnœ mbœrœ 'e kpa tondœ o'o nœ ye kpœrœ kpœrœ kane. Kashe kolœ 'a, 'a gbe adœke 'a wo she utshunœ adœke tshe yi kumu ye kpœke.»
23.16: Kashe gbolo yakoshe nœ yingɔ Polo dji lengere o'onœ asœmœ, œ na ga lœ pada ndœ kœva Polo nea dœ o'onœ.
23.17: Yé Polo kœ'e anga turugu á tshe kœdœ gbozu tshapa aturugu kama, á kœpa fœ she adœke: «Na dœ gbolo yakoshe asœ fœ gbozu tshapa 'e, tshe sœ dœ o'o kœpandœ nœ fœ she.»
23.18: Turugunœ asœmœ kœna dœ gbolo yakoshenœ asœmœ fœ gbozu tshapa endje, œ kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ayi kánga Polo dá e mœ á pa adœke, mœ na dœ gbolo yakoshe asœ fœ ɓœ, mbœrœ tshe sœ dœ o'o kœpa fœ ɓœ.»
23.19: Gbozu tshapa aturugu kœza ama kane ye, kœgitœ ye dœ she ga ɨndɨrɨnœ, kœyu she adœke: «O'o gaɗe dá ɓœ yindœ kœpandœ nœ fœ mœ a?»
23.20: Gbolo yakoshenœ kœgi fœ she adœke: «Ayuda zɨ tshelœ o'o ndœ kœfara ɓœ adœke, ɓœ za Polo na tœnœ ɓa mbatsha ga utshu agboro aayi kœwa ngbanga. Endje mbœrœ adœke œne gbe kœtondœ o'o nœ ye dœ ɔtshɔnœ kane.
23.21: Kashe yiyindœ nœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, endje lœ kœropa azu zazu bisha á endje gɨ uku ga tœ awa ye. Endje dara ama endje dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Ndjaba adœke œne zɨ œrœ nene, œ ndjo ndje ungu nene œrrr adœke œne wo Polo yekane. Adja endje gumatœ endje kɔ yé œ sœ kolœ kœkate adœke ɓœ yindœ nœ awa bale dœ œne.»
23.22: Utshu kœza awa fœ gbolo yakoshenœ, gbozu tshapa aturugunœ pa fœ she adœke: «Kpa mɨmɨndœ nœ fœ anga uzu bale nene.» Kœvwa Polo ga lœ Sezaré
23.23: Gbozu tshapa aturugu kœ'e anga aturugu nœ ye bisha, kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E gumatœ 'e mbœrœ kœro ga lœ Sezaré, dœ ada ɔlɔ mindu dœ vana lœ butshɔ asœ, e ko aturugu kama bisha, endjeneke á endje ɔ ga pa ambarata zazu votɔ dœ ndjokpa dœ azu kœnɔ wele kama bisha.
23.24: 'E ko ndje ambarata mbœrœ kœgi dœ Polo dœ soro fœ gbozu Felikisi .»
23.26: «Abala nœ zœ. Œmœ Klode Lisiyase, mœ sœ kœsu mbetinœ asœke fœ ɓœ dœ gbozu Felikisi, á endje lɨsœ zœ waa asœmœ.
23.27: Ayuda za uzu asœ yé œ yindœ kœwo she. Lɔkɔ á mœ dji adœke œshe kœdœ gbolo ogo Roma, mœ na dœ aturugu nœ mœ á za she tshakane endje.
23.28: Ɓata á mœ yi lima ndœ kœwusœ ádá o'o á endje tɔ lima meza pa ye ndœ nœ, mœ na dœ she ga utshu agboro aayi kœwa ngbanga nœ Ayuda.
23.29: Mœ wu adœke, endje tɔ mezanœ pa ye mbœrœ o'o á wu awa akwa nœ endje dœ tœ endje. Kashe tshe mbœmbœrœ anga ekperœ bale á li adœke endje wo she too endje za she ga lœ kánga nene.
23.30: Ɓata endje pandœ nœ fœ mœ adœke, Ayuda sœ dœ ekpe gbetshelœ tœ kœwo she, mœ vwa she fœ ɓœ, œ pa fœ endje adœke endje na ndje kœtɔ mezanœ pa ye ɓa utshu zœ.»
23.31: Aturugu mbœrœtœ endje liaka o'o á gbozu tshapa endje pa. Endje za Polo yé œ gi she na tœnœ butshɔ butshɔ œrrr ga ndœ Atipatrisi.
23.32: Osho kɔrɔ panœ, aturugu á endje sœ lima kœna dœ ada endje kwatœ endje ga lœ padanœ, yé á katœ endjeneke á endje ɔ ga pa ambarata kœro tœ awanœ dœ Polo.
23.33: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta ga lœ Sezaré, ayi kœkpa dœ ambarata za mbetinœ fœ gbozu tshapa ogo lœ ongbonœ, yé œ katœ Polo tɨ ga tshakane ye.
23.34: Gbozu tshapa ogo lœ ongbo Yuda kœdɨ mbetinœ yé á yu Polo tœ kœwusœ ogo nœ ye. Manda kœwusœ nœ adœke œshe kœdœ uzu lœ ogo Silisi,
23.35: tshe pa fœ she adœke: «Mœ dji ɓœ dœ lɔkɔ á azu kœtɔ meza pa zœ kœyikumu endje.» Tshe kœpa fœ aturugu nœ ye adœke endje gbɔndœ Polo ɓa sœnda nœ gbozu Erode.

24.1: Manda olo mindu, gbozu nganga Ndjaba Anania wuta ɓa lœ Sezaré awa bale dœ agbɔ Ayuda ndje dœ ayi kɔkɔ bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Tertuluse. Endje wuta ga utshu gbozu Felikisi ndœ kœtɔ meza pa Polo.
24.2: Endje e Polo, yé Tertuluse tetœ kœpa œnœ ye ngbanganœ dœ o'o atake: «Gbozu Felikisi, mœ lɨsœ zœ waa! Œ ga mbœrœ kœwusœtœ nœ zœ dá ɓœ guma ogonœ asœ adœke œ ga waa. Mbœrœ ɓœ dá 'a sœ dœ adja kœsœ gee lœ ogo nœ 'a.
24.3: 'A lɨsœ zœ, gbozu Felikisi, mbœrœ œrœ kɔ 'a gbɔ tœ osho dœ osho.
24.4: Kashe mœ yiyindœ kœwo ada ɔlɔ nœ zœ nene. Mœ kɨ fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu ndœ kœdji mœ teasho kane.
24.5: 'A wu adœke uzu asœ kœdœ ekpe uzu tɔpanœ kpuru, tshe sœ kœli dœ djingili ga ugurutœ Ayuda tœ osho kɔ, yé œshe kœdœ gbozu tshapa Anazareye.
24.6: Tshe yi ndje lima ndœ kœndɨ Tepelo á dœ œyerœ anda nœ Ndjaba dœ uburu yeka á 'a za she. [ 'A yi lima ndœ kœwa ngbanga ga tœ ye liaka awa akwa nœ 'a,
24.7: kashe gbozu tshapa aturugu á tshe dœ́ Lisiyase, kakara she dœ ɔgbɔ tshakane 'a,
24.8: yeka á vwa 'a adœke 'a na kœtɔ meza pa ye ɓa ndœ zœ.] Œdœ ɓœ kœyu she dœ tœ zœ, ɓœ wu adœke o'o á 'a tɔ meza pa ye ndœ nœ kœdœ adja o'o.»
24.9: Manda o'o nœ ye, Ayuda para kœyindœ nœ adœke: «Adja upu dá tshe pa.» Kœpa ngbanga nœ Polo
24.10: Gbozu tshapa ogo lœ ongbo kœza awa fœ she ndœ kœpa o'o. Polo kœgi adœke: «Mœ wusœ nœ adœke œɓœ dá wa ngbanga ɓa lima lœ ogo nœ 'a manda ungu ndjoro. Mœ sœ dœ yanga ndœ kœpa o'o utshu zœ.
24.11: Ɓœ kœyu ndje osho dœ tœ zœ, œ mbœrœ kolœ olo ndjokpa dœ bisha ɔlɔ á mœ ro ga lœ Yerusaleme kœdonga Ndjaba.
24.12: Ɔlɔ bale á endje na á gbɔ mœ ɓa sœnda Tepelo too ɓa lœ Sinagoga too lœ ongbo, á mœ sœ tœ œbœrœ, too kœvwa azu adœke endje shoka ama dœ anga endje gugu nene.
24.13: Azu asœ tɔ meza pa mœ kolœnœ gbambanœ.
24.14: Andaa œneke á mœ yindœ nœ kœdœ adœke mœ sœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba nœ aata 'a lœ awa nœ Gbozu kashe endje pa adœke awanœ dœ́dœ́ ɔtshɔ awa nene. Mœ yi ndje ndœ o'o á endje sú ala mbeti nœ awa akwa œdœ pe œneke á aayi kœgbara o'o pa.
24.15: Œmœ dœ pe endje, 'a sœ kœza lɔsu 'a ga pa Ndjaba tœ œneke á pa adœke ɔtshɔ azu œdœ ekpe azu œ she bala lœ akuzu.
24.16: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa á mœ sœ kœpa avwara adœke mœ mbœrœ ekperœ utshu Ndjaba nœ mœ œdœ pe azu nene.
24.17: «Mœ mbœrœ ungu ndjoro lœ ana, yé á mœ gu mbœrœ kœto œrœ fœ azu ogo nœ mœ œdœ pe makabo fœ Ndjaba.
24.18: Yeka á endje na á gbɔ mœ lœ awa kœmbœrœ adœke ɔkɔ mœ sœ yerœ ɓa lœ Tepelo. Kashe azu sœsœ lima ndjoro nene, yé œbœrœ gugu ndje nene.
24.19: Anga Ayuda lœ Azi, endje dá sœ lima kpœtœmœ, endje dá li má ndœ kœtɔ meza pa mœ œdœ endje kœsœ má dœ o'o dœ mœ.
24.20: Yé azu á endje sœ asœ, endje pandœ ekperœ á mœ mbœrœ lima ɔlɔ á endje sœ kœyu mœ utshu ayi kœwa ngbanga.
24.21: Too kolœ manda rawa á mœ ta dœ o'o adœke: “Mbœrœ á mœ yindœ nœ adœke akuzu œ she lœ akuzu dá 'e yindœ kœwa ngbanga ga tœ mœ a?”»
24.22: Felikisi á tshe wu lima sœ o'o nœ ayindœ Yisu dœ ɔtshɔnœ, kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E gu zœ, ɔlɔ á Lisiyase gbozu tshapa aturugu œ na, dá mœ kœwa ngbanga nœ 'e.»
24.23: Tshe kœvwa anga turugu ndœ kœgi Polo ga lœ kánga. Kashe tshe sœsœ kœnga tœ ye nene, tshe za awa fœ azu nœ ye ndœ kœna kœwu she. Polo lœ kánga
24.24: Manda olo teasho, Felikisi kœna ɓa lœ kánga dœ awonœ á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Drusile, œshe kœdœ uyu Yuda. Tshe e Polo mbœrœ tshe sœ lima dœ ogo ndœ kœdji o'o nœ Yisu.
24.25: Kashe, ɓata á Polo sœ lima kœmɨndœ o'o nœ ɔtshɔ ɔtshɔ uzu, mara nœ kœgbɔndœ tœ zœ dœ uzu dœ pe mara á Ndjaba œ wa bala ngbanga nœ azu, awa za Felikisi yé tshe pa adœke: «Ɓœ lii kœgu œnœ zœ ngɔngɔ asœ da ye. Mœ e ɓœ bala manda nœ.»
24.26: Tshe sœ kœgbe adœke Polo œ to ngendja fœ œne, yeka á sœ lima kœ'e she kpœpanœ kpœpanœ ndœ kœpa o'o dœ she.
24.27: Manda ungu bisha, Porsiyuse Festuse kœza akwa manda Felikisi. Ɓata á Felikisi yindœ nœ adœke Ayuda yindœ œne, á ka lima tœ Polo tɨ lœ kánga.

25.1: Olo votɔ manda kœwuta Festuse ga lœ ogonœ asœmœ, tshe to ɓa lœ Sezaré œ ro ga lœ Yerusaleme.
25.2: Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe agbozu Yuda na kœtɔ meza pa Polo fœ she. Endje yu lima she kpœpanœ kpœpanœ adœke
25.3: tshe za awa fœ œne dœ́ œne to she gu tœnœ ga lœ Yerusaleme. Andaa, endje vwara lima ndœ kœwo she tœ ala awa.
25.4: Kashe Festuse gi adœke tshe sœ lœ kánga ɓa lœ Sezaré, yé œne yindœ kœro dœ tœ œne ga zœ ngɔngɔnœ asœke.
25.5: Tshe kpa pa ga pa nœ adœke: «Œ li adœke agbozu tshapa 'e ro tœ awanœ bale dœ mœ ɓa lœ Sezaré, yé œ kœsœ adœke uzunœ asœmœ mbœrœ lima ekperœ á endje kœtɔ mezanœ pa ye.»
25.6: Festuse mbœrœ lima kolœ olo mindu dœ votɔ too ndjokpa gbambanœ ɓa ndœ endje kpœtœmœ, yeka á gu ga lœ Sezaré. Osho kɔrɔpa nœ, tshe sœ ga atɨ ɓa tœ osho kœwa ngbanga yé á za awa adœke endje na œ to Polo na tœnœ.
25.7: Lɔkɔ á Polo yi kumu ye, Ayuda á endje to lima ɓa lœ Yerusaleme ndɨvwɨrɨ she yé œ te lima tœ kœpa ogboro o'o ga pa ye, ogboro o'o neke á endje kœyu endje tœ ádá o'onœ, endje li kœpandœ nœ nene.
25.8: Kashe Polo pa lima ngbanga nœ ye adœke: «Œdœ ga tœ awa akwa nœ Ayuda, œdœ ga tœ Tepelo too fœ egerœ gbozugo, mœ mbœmbœrœ ekperœ bale nene.»
25.9: Festuse yindœ kœza yanga fœ Ayuda yé œ yu Polo adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ kœro ga lœ Yerusaleme adœke endje wa ngbanga nœ zœ ɓa utshu mœ a?»
25.10: Polo gi adœke: «Mœ ka ga utshu osho kœwa ngbanga nœ egerœ gbozugo, yé kpœke dá endje wa ngbanga nœ mœ. Mœ mbœmbœrœ ekperœ bale fœ Ayuda nene ɓata á ɓœ wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔ nœ dœ tœ zœ asœmœ.
25.11: Œdœ adja mœ kœmbœrœ má ekperœ, yé á mbœrœ ekperœ neke á li dœ kuzu, mœ vwaratœ mœ ndœ kœtshu tœnœ nene. Kashe œdœ o'o á endje tɔ meza pa mœ ndœ nœ kœdœ́dœ́ okporo o'o nene, uzu bale á tshe za mœ ga tshakane endje gugu nene. Mœ yindœ nœ adœke mœ wuta ga utshu egerœ gbozugo.»
25.12: Festuse kœte ga ndœ aayi kœmɨ upu nœ ye, œ kœgi fœ Polo adœke: «Ɓata á ɓœ yindœ kœwu egerœ gbozugo ndœ kœwa ngbanga nœ zœ, ɓœ ro ga utshu ye tako.» Polo ɓa utshu Agripa dœ pe Berenise
25.13: Olo teasho manda nœ, gbozu Agripa dœ pe yingɔ nœ á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Berenise, ro ga lœ Sezaré yé œ na kœwu Festuse.
25.14: Ɓata œndœ ndje dɨ lima ndje kpœtœmœ, Festuse pandœ o'o nœ Polo fœ Agripa adœke: «Anga yakoshe bale á Felikisi ka lima tœ ye tɨ lœ kánga sœ kpœke.
25.15: Lɔkɔ á mœ na lima ga lœ Yerusaleme, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe agbɔ Ayuda na kœtɔ meza pa ye, yé endje pa fœ mœ adœke mœ wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ ye.
25.16: Yeka á mœ gi fœ endje adœke, awa akwa nœ azu Roma pa adœke: œdœ endje kœtɔ meza pa uzu, œ li adœke endje dji she tshe pa o'o ɔkɔ ye ɓa utshu aayi kœtɔ mezanœ yekane á endje kœwa ngbanga ga tœ ye.
25.17: Endje kœaafo, á 'a kœgu tœ awanœ dœ endje ga mœ. Mœ kpakpalatœ mœ lɔkɔ á osho kɔrɔ nene, yé mœ na œ sœ ga atɨ ɓa tœ osho kœwa ngbanga yeka á vwa osho adœke endje gu dœ uzunœ ga mœ.
25.18: Azunœ á endje tɔ meza pa ye áafo kashe endje papa anga ngbɨndɨ o'o tœ upu nœ ye liaka œneke á mœ gbe má kœdji tœnœ nene.
25.19: Endje sœ lima kœshara upu dœ she pa mara kœdonga Ndjaba nœ endje dœ tœ endje, ndje tœ upu nœ anga uzu á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yisu á tshe tshu ye, yeka á Polo kpa pa adœke, tshe sœ dœ soro zœ.
25.20: Mœ wuwu lima sœ œrœ á mœ mbœrœ tœ kœwa mara ngbanga atamœ nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ dá mœ yu Polo adœke tshe yindœ nœ dœ́ endje na ga lœ Yerusaleme adœke endje wa ngbanga pa ye tœ o'onœ asœmœ.
25.21: Kashe Polo yindœ nœ lima adœke œne wuta ɓa utshu egerœ gbozugo yeka á tshe kœwa ngbanga pa o'o nœ œne. Yé á kœpa adœke endje gbɔndœ ye lœ kánga œrrr ga tœ olo á mœ vwa she fœ egerœ gbozunœ.»
25.22: Agripa kœpa fœ Festuse adœke: «Mœ yi ndje ndœ kœdji ndje yakoshenœ asœmœ.» Festuse kœgi fœ Agripa adœke: «Ɓa mbatsha ɓœ dji she zœ.»
25.23: Osho kœkɔrɔ pa nœ, Agripa dœ Berenise na, dœ azu ndjoro, yé œ li dœ kœlɨsœtœ ga sœnda awa bale dœ agbozu tshapa aturugu dœ pe agbozu tshapa ongbo. Festuse vwa osho yé endje na œ za Polo gu tœnœ.
25.24: Festuse kœpa adœke: «Gbozu Agripa œdœ pe 'e kɔ á 'e sœ dœ 'a atɨ asœke, 'e wu yakoshenœ asœ. Ayuda ndjoro na kœtɔ meza pa ye ɓa ndœ mœ, ɓa lœ Yerusaleme, dœ pe ndje ɓa lakpɨnœ asœke. Endje pa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke, tshe lili kœsœpe dœ soro nene.
25.25: Ɓa ndœ mœ, mœ wusœ nœ adœke tshe mbœmbœrœ anga ekperœ bale á li adœke tshe tshu lœ kumunœ nene. Kashe ɓata á Polo dœ tœ ye yindœ nœ adœke, egerœ gbozu kœwa ngbanga pa œne, mœ wa o'o tœ kœvwa she fœ egerœ gbozunœ.
25.26: Ɓata á mœ wuwusœ o'o neke á mœ kœsu pa ye fœ egerœ gbozu nene, dá mœ sœ kœyu she utshu 'e, utshu œɓœ dœ gbozu Agripa, adœke ɓœ yu she yeka á mœ kœgbɔ o'o kœsu fœ she tœ upu nœ ye.
25.27: Mœ wu adœke œ sœsœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene kœvwa ayi kánga fœ egerœ gbozu œdœ ádá o'o á endje tɔ meza pa ye kœsœsœ ngbɨ nene.»

26.1: Agripa kœpa fœ Polo adœke: «Mœ za awa fœ ɓœ ndœ kœpa ngbanga nœ zœ.» Polo kœtɨ kane ye ga lafo ndœ kœpa o'o yé œ pa adœke:
26.2: «Gbozu Agripa, mœ sœ dœ yanga kpesheke ndœ kœpa ngbanga ɓa utshu zœ tœ o'o kɔ á Ayuda tɔ meza pa mœ tœnœ,
26.3: gbambanœ nene, ɓœ wusœ mara kœmbœrœtœ nœ Ayuda dœ pe kœshara upu pa mara kœdonga Ndjaba nœ endje dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Mœ kɨ fœ ɓœ adœke lɔsu zœ zɨ tɨɨ á ɓœ kœdji mœ.
26.4: «Ayuda para wusœ soro mœ pe dœ gbolo mœ ye, mbœrœ mœ gerœ lœ Yerusaleme ugurutœ azu ogo nœ mœ.
26.5: Endje wusœ mœ katshatsha. Œdœ endje kœyindœ nœ, endje pa adœke œmœ kœdœ anga Afarisayinœ á endje ro anga Ayuda dœ kœdonga Ndjaba dœ pe kœlɨsœ awa akwa nœ azœ waa.
26.6: Yé ngɔngɔ asœke, mœ sœ kœpa ngbanga mbœrœ á mœ za lɔsu mœ ga pa anga o'o á Ndjaba pa lima fœ aata azœ.
26.7: Mara azu ndjokpa dœ bisha (12) lœ Israyele sœ kœdonga Ndjaba butshɔ dœ ɔlɔ dœ lɔsu adœke œne wu œrœnœ asœmœ. Uu gbozu Agripa! Mangba o'onœ á mœ za lɔsu mœ ga tœ nœ asœmœ dá Ayuda tɔ meza pa mœ.
26.8: Ayuda, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e gbe adœke Ndjaba œ she azu á endje tshu lœ kuzu nene a?
26.9: «Œmœ ndje lima, mœ sœ kœpakata azu adœke endje yiyindœ Yisu uzu Nazarete nene.
26.10: Œtœnœ dá mœ mbœrœ lima lœ Yerusaleme. Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba za awa fœ mœ yé mœ ko ayindœ Yisu ndjoro gu tœnœ ga lœ kánga. Yé œ kœsœ lima adœke endje wo endje ye, mœ sœ lima kœyindœ nœ.
26.11: Mœ mbœrœ lima kɔ adœke endje wu œrœ kanga lœ Sinagoga, adœke endje katœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje ga ndœ Yisu tɨ ye. Tshelœ mœ fa lima ga tœ endje dœ mara adœke, mœ sœ lima kœza awa endje œrrr dje lœ ongbo á sœ lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ.» Polo pandœ kœfatshalɔsu nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Akw 9.1-19; Mat 22.6-16)
26.12: «Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ lima kœna ɔlɔ bale ga lœ Damaseke dœ mbeti á agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba su fœ mœ adœke œ za awa nœ kœmbœrœ œrœ fœ mœ.
26.13: Uu gbozu! Tɨ damba tœ ala awa, ndoo dœ midi, mœ wu ɨshirɨ owo á ropa ɔlɔ kœto ɓa lafo kœjerœ ga pa mœ, dœ pe anga mœ á 'a sœ lima kœro tœ awanœ dœ endje.
26.14: 'A kœyo kɔ ga lœ ɔshɔ, mœ kœdji tshama uzu kœ e mœ dœ o'o ama Ebre adœke: “Sawulo, Sawulo, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ mœ a? Ɓœ sœ kœwu oyo tœ zœ ɓata yaburu á ayengɔ ye du uwu ga lœ ɨgɨ ye á sœ kœgbota she á tshe sœ kœvwaratœ ye tœ kœna manda ye.”
26.15: «Mœ kœyu adœke: “Œɓœ kœdœ ɗe, Gbozu?” Gbozu kœpa adœke: “Œmœ kœdœ Yisu, œmœ dá ɓœ mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ mœ asœmœ.
26.16: Kashe alafo, œ ka dœ ada zœ! Wu, mœ wuta ga ndœ zœ mbœrœ kœfa ɓœ tœ ayi akwa nœ mœ. Ɓœ dœ́ timu nœ mœ adœke ɓœ pandœ nœ fœ azu mara á ɓœ wu dœ mœ kpesheke dœ pe œneke á mœ kpa yisœ nœ fœ ɓœ manda nœ.
26.17: Œdœ ɓa ndœ Ayuda, œdœ ɓa ndœ angbɨ azu, mœ gbɔndœ zœ tœ osho kɔ á mœ vwa ɓœ tœnœ,
26.18: mbœrœ kœkɔrɔ ala endje, ndœ kœgi endje lœ ubu osho ga tœ ɨngbɨsho, mbœrœ endje vwaratœ endje tœ Satana yé œ na ga ndœ Ndjaba. Œdœ endje kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ, mœ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ endje yé œ za osho kœsœ ugurutœ ayerœ azu nœ Ndjaba fœ endje.”»
26.19: «Kœto tœ olonœ asœmœ, gbozu Agripa, mœ mbœrœ œneke kɔ á to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba á tshe yisœ nœ fœ mœ.
26.20: Utshunœ, mœ tetœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ azu tshalakpɨ Damaseke dœ Yerusaleme. Manda nœ, mœ mɨndœ nœ fœ azu tshelœ ogo Yuda kɔ ndje dœ angbɨ azu. Mœ sœ kœpa fœ endje adœke endje fatshalɔsu endje, œ na ga ndœ Ndjaba yé œ mbœrœ akwa á sœ kœma adœke endje fa adja tshalɔsu endje ye.
26.21: Ádánœ á Ayuda tepa mœ ɓa lœ Tepelo, á yindœ kœwo mœ dœ mœ.
26.22: Kashe Ndjaba sœ kœgbɔndœ mœ œrrr ga tœ kpesheke, yé mœ sœpe damba dœ soro mbœrœ kœpa œneke asœke fœ azu para kɔkɔ, fœ agbolo ndje fœ agbozu. Œneke á mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ asœke kœdœ kolœ œneke á aayi kœgbara o'o œdœ mbeti nœ Moyize pa lima ndœ nœ adœke œ wuta.
26.23: Endje mɨ lima ndœ nœ adœke, Masiya œ wu oyo, yé œ tshu yeka á she lœ akuzu utshu azu kɔ. Tshe mɨndœ o'o nœ Ndjaba á sœ ɓata ɔlɔ á za kœshe fœ Ayuda dœ pe angbɨ azu.»
26.24: Polo sœpe damba kœpa ngbanga, á Festuse pa o'o dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Iyi te lœ kumu zœ a! Œrœnœ á ɓœ wusœ nœ waa dá mbœrœtœ zœ asœke a!»
26.25: Kashe Polo kœgi adœke: «Mœ sœsœ dœ iyi nene, gbozu Festuse, o'onœ á mœ sœ kœpa tœnœ kœdœ adja o'o, yé ádánœ sœ zœ.
26.26: Gbozu Agripa dji o'onœ asœke, yé mœ li kœpa o'o ɓa utshu ye dœ awa nene. Tshe wusœ o'onœ asœ bale bale kɔ, gbambanœ nene, œ mbœmbœrœtœ endje wutœnœ nene.
26.27: Gbozu Agripa, ɓœ yindœ o'o á aayi kœgbara o'o pa lima ye a? Mœ wusœ nœ adœke ɓœ yindœ nœ.»
26.28: Agripa kœpa fœ Polo adœke: «Œ sœpe teasho adœke ɓœ fa gbetshelœ nœ mœ adœke mœ wuta uzu nœ Kristu!»
26.29: Polo gi adœke: «Olo sœ ndoo, olo sœ lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ, mœ sœ kœ'e Ndjaba mbœrœ œɓœ dœ pe azu para á endje sœ kœdji mœ kpesheke asœ adœke 'e wuta ɓata mœ, kashe endje ii 'e dœ uwu ga tœnœ ɓata mœ nene!»
26.30: Gbozu Agripa kœaafo awa bale dœ gbozu ongbo Festuse dœ Berenise, dœ pe azu para á endje sœ lima kpœtœmœ,
26.31: yé kœgitœ endje ga ɨndɨrɨnœ, kœpa lœ ugurutœ endje adœke: «Uzunœ asœ mbœmbœrœ ekperœ á li adœke a wo she too a za she ga lœ kánga nene.»
26.32: Agripa kœpa fœ Festuse adœke: «Œdœ uzu asœ kœyɔyɔ lima ndœ nœ adœke gbozu Roma kœwa o'o nœ œne nene, dá a za má she ga shu ye.»

27.1: Ɔlɔ á endje gbe adœke 'a ro ga lœ Itali dœ egerœ agba, endje za Polo dœ pe anga aayi kánga fœ anga gbozu nœ aturugu bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Juliyuse, tshe kœdœ gbozu uguru ukpulu aturugu lœ ogo Roma á endje e endje adœke «ukpulu aturugu nœ egerœ gbozu.»
27.2: 'A ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba á to ɓa lœ Adramite á yindœ kœro kœka ga tœ mangu lœ ogo Azi. 'A ro lima tœ awanœ dœ Aristarke uzu Tesalonike lœ ogo Masedwane.
27.3: Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, 'a ka lima ɓa tœ Sidona, Juliyuse sœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ ga tœ Polo, á za awa fœ she kœna ndœ kœwu anganœ á endje kœto œrœ á tshe sœ dœ ogonœ fœ she.
27.4: Manda kœkatœ Sidona tɨ, 'a áafo, œ ro ndoo dœ tshiki lœ Shipre mbœrœ yugu sœ lima kœgi 'a ga ngbanœ.
27.5: 'A zu ungu kota ga tœ ama ungu ndoo dœ Silisi œdœ Pafili, yeka á 'a wuta ga lœ Mire lœ ogo Lisi.
27.6: Ɓa zœ, gbozu nœ aturugu wu anga egerœ agba á to ɓa lœ Alekezandri, á sœ kœro ga lœ Itali, á ko 'a ga lœ nœ.
27.7: 'A mbœrœ lima olo ndjoro la ngu mbœrœ egerœ agba sœ lima kœkpa yima yima, yé 'a wu lima oyo á wuta lima ga lœ Kinide. Ɓata 'a lili kœna ndjii ga zœ nene mbœrœ yugunœ á sœ kœndanga 'a, 'a fa dja ga lœ Salemone tœ osho á tshiki Krete ko 'a yiwa tœnœ tœ yugunœ.
27.8: Yé manda nœ, 'a mbœrœ oyo tœ 'a, á wuta ga tœ osho á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Ɔtshɔ Mangu ndoo dœ ongbo Lase.
27.9: Kashe œndœ 'a dɨ lima lœ ananœ waa, yé loko dopa nœ, awa adœke egerœ agba na ana gugu nene. Olo á Ayuda œ yo tshelœ ama endje ro lima ye , á Polo kœpa fœ endje adœke:
27.10: «Anga mœ, mœ wu adœke ana asœ ngaanga dœ azœ. Anganœ ete, egerœ agba dœ pe œrœ kɔ á sœ lœ nœ œ ndɨ, azœ ndje 'a tshu.»
27.11: Kashe gbozu nœ aturugu vwaratœ ye kœdji Polo, yé á dji kolœ ayi kœkpa dœ egerœ agba dœ pe ayingɔ egerœ agbanœ.
27.12: Ɓata mangunœ gaga lima adœke endje sœ tœnœ dœ lɔkɔ nœ ɨzɨ nene, ɨlɨ azu yindœ nœ adœke œne ro. Endje yindœ kœro ga lœ Fenikise, anga mangu ogo Krete, á sœ ga tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ li tœnœ. Ndavuru yugu
27.13: Aya yugu to ɓa aki á sœ kœna tœnœ, yé endje gbe adœke œne li kœmbœrœ œneke á œne yindœ nœ. Endje gbota longonœ yé œ afo kœro tœnœ kperœ tœ ama mangu tshiki Krete.
27.14: Kashe œndœnœ dɨ teasho, ndavuru yugu á to ga pa gele ndo dœ osho á ɔlɔ œ wuta tœnœ, ɓa pa kaga tshiki á jerœ ga pa endje.
27.15: Yugunœ gi agba dœ ɔgbɔ ga manda nœ, awa adœke 'a mbœrœ anga œrœ gugu nene yé 'a katœ nœ tɨ adœke œ gi 'a.
27.16: Á ro tɔ ɨndɨrɨ aya tshiki bale á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Koda á sœ lima kœwandœ ata gbɔgbɔ yugunœ pa 'a, yé uvuru 'a kpa lima lœ nœ tœ kœza aya agba kœshe dœ azu.
27.17: Manda kœtɨ tœnœ ga lafo, endje ko ogboro uwu á du ga tœ egerœ agbanœ mbœrœ loko kœkakavwa nene. Ɓata awa kœshi pa mindu dja ga tœ Libi sœ lima kœza endje, endje geta egerœ maɓaya á endje du ga tœ egerœ agbanœ vwi ga la ngu, á tetœ kœna la ngu yima yima.
27.18: Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, ɓata yugunœ sœpe lima kœvwi 'a dœ agbɔnœ, 'a tetœ kœko ata gbarœ va ga la ngu.
27.19: Yé olo bisha manda nœ, aayi kœmbœrœ akwa lœ egerœ agbanœ dœ tœ endje, te ndje tœ kœko œrœ kote egerœ agbanœ va e.
27.20: 'A kpa sœ lima kœwu ɔlɔ too angerepe nene, manda olo ndjoro, yugu sœ kœna kolœ dœ agbɔ, yé gbetshelœ nœ soro kpa gugu lima lœ kumu 'a nene.
27.21: Azu á endje lœ lima lœnœ zɨzɨ œrœ nene manda olo ndjoro, yé Polo afo ugurutœ endje á pa adœke: «'E wu, anga mœ, œdœ 'e kœdji lima o'o mœ, á 'a sœpe lœ Krete, gbarœ œdœ œrœ kote egerœ agba œ ndɨ má nene.
27.22: Kashe ngɔngɔ asœ, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke 'e ru lɔsu 'e, uzu bale ugurutœ 'e œ tshu nene, kolœ egerœ agba dá ndɨ.
27.23: Ndjaba nœ mœ á mœ mbœrœ akwa fœ she vwa anga andjelu fœ mœ dœ abutshɔnœ asœ.
27.24: Tshe pa fœ mœ adœke: “Polo, awa zaza ɓœ nene, œ li adœke ɓœ pa ngbanga utshu egerœ gbozu yeka. Ndjaba œ she azu para lœ egerœ agbanœ asœ mbœrœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ zœ.”
27.25: 'E ru lɔsu 'e alaya, gbambanœ nene, mœ za lɔsu mœ ga tœ Ndjaba yé œrœ œ mbœrœtœ ye liaka œneke á andjelu pandœ nœ fœ mœ asœmœ.
27.26: Kashe egerœ agbanœ œ zatœ ye tɔ ama ɔshɔ tœ ama anga tshiki bale.» Egerœ agba li ungu
27.27: Manda pɔsɔ bisha, egerœ yugunœ vwi 'a lima na tœnœ œrrr ga la egerœ ungu á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Adriyatike. Kœndo dœ ɔgbɔ butshɔ, azu akwa tshelœ egerœ agba gbe adœke 'a ndo dœ ama ɔshɔ ye.
27.28: Endje du uwu ga tœ badja, á vwi ga la ngu ndœ kœwusœ dili ungunœ. Endje wu adœke ungunœ li metere zazu bale dœ ndjokpa dœ amanœ mindu dœ bisha. Yé endje gitœ endje ga utshunœ, œ kpa vwi uwunœ, á wu adœke œ sœ dœ metere zazu bisha dœ amanœ mindu dœ votɔ.
27.29: Endje sœ lima dœ awa adœke egerœ agbanœ zazatœ ye tɔ badja nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, endje du longo vana ga tœ budunœ, á ko va ga la ngu, yé á sœ lima kœkate dœ lɔsu endje ga lafo adœke osho kɔrɔ.
27.30: Ɓata aayi akwa yi lima ndœ kœkpa tœnœ, endje gi lima aya agba kœshe dœ azu ga la ngu yé œ fara adœke œne jerœ ga lœ nœ á kœdu longonœ ga utshu egerœ agbanœ.
27.31: Polo kœpa fœ gbozu nœ aturugu dœ pe aturugu adœke: «Œdœ azu asœ kœsœsœpe lœ egerœ agbanœ asœ nene, e'e, 'e sœpe dœ soro nene.»
27.32: Yeka á aturugu na, á wa tshelœ uwu tœ aya agbanœ, yé á ka tœnœ tɨ á te ga la ngu.
27.33: Kœkate adœke osho kɔrɔ, Polo kœkɨ ga tœ azu para adœke endje zɨ œrœ. Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «'E wu, œ mbœrœ kpesheke pɔsɔ bisha á 'e sœ kœgugu dœ awa yugu yé á zɨzɨ anga œrœ bale nene asœke.
27.34: Mœ sœ kœkɨ ga tœ 'e adœke 'e zɨ œrœ, gbambanœ nene, œ li adœke 'e mbœrœ ataa yekane á kœshe. Uzu bale ugurutœ 'e œ tshu nene.»
27.35: Manda kœpa ataa, Polo za mapa, á gi mershe fœ Ndjaba tœ ala endje para, á tetœ kœzɨ tœnœ.
27.36: Yeka á endje gbɔ gbɔgbɔ á tetœ kœzɨ œnœ endje rœgonœ.
27.37: A'a para lœ egerœ agbanœ 'a sœ lima azu kama bisha dœ zazu votɔ dœ ndjokpa dœ amanœ mindu dœ bale.
27.38: Manda kœzɨrœ, uvu azu para su, yé endje tetœ kœko ble va ga la ngu mbœrœ egerœ agbanœ kœlɨlɨ nene.
27.39: Manda kœkɔrɔ osho, aayi kœmbœrœ akwa lœ egerœ agba wu adœke œne ndo dœ ɔshɔ ye. Kashe endje wuwu lima sœ ogo mangunœ nene, ɓata á endje wu osho á ungu li ga lœ mindu, endje gbe kœpara awa kœza agba ga tœ ama ɔshɔ ɓa zœ.
27.40: Endje wa uwu tœ longonœ á katœ nœ tɨ ga la egerœ ungunœ, endje vwara kayi œ jerœ ga la ngu. Manda nœ, endje du lœba siriki ga utshunœ adœke yugu kœmbœrœ tœnœ á kœvwi egerœ agbanœ ga utshunœ yé œ tetœ kœna gutœnœ ga tœ ama ɔshɔ.
27.41: Kashe egerœ agbanœ shi pa mindu á sœ uguru gbɔgbɔ ungu bisha. Tshatshu egerœ agbanœ li lima ga lœ mindu, œ sœsœ lima kœturutœ ye nene, yé gbɔgbɔ loko kavwa lima budunœ ye.
27.42: Aturugu kœwu adœke egerœ agba sœ kœndɨ tœnœ, á gbe kœwo aayi kánga mbœrœ endje kœdɔ ungu yeka á kœkpa nene.
27.43: Kashe gbozu nœ aturugu yindœ kœshe lima Polo, yé á pakata aturugunœ, yé á pa fœ azu neke á endje wusœ ungu adœke endje i ga la nœ, œ dɔ zutœnœ ga pa ɔshɔ.
27.44: Anga endje zu dœ maɓaya too dœ agba ndɨndɨ egerœ agbanœ. Mara á azu para zu lima ungu dœ ɔtshɔ nœ dœ mœ.

28.1: Manda kœshe 'a, 'a dji adœke ɨ'ɨrɨ tshikinœ asœ kœdœ Malte.
28.2: Ayengɔ ogonœ mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ fœ 'a. Endje ngbɔ egerœ owo, á e 'a para ga ɨndɨrɨnœ, mbœrœ yavuru sœ kœni tœnœ yé ɨzɨ sœ waa.
28.3: Polo rɔ lima agba yawo á za vwi ga ta wo, anga yakoro wuta mbœrœ katsha owonœ, á de kane ye á tɔpe tœnœ.
28.4: Kœwu adœke yakoronœ de kane Polo, ayengɔ ogonœ pa lœ tœ endje adœke: «Adjapu, yakoshe asœ kœdœ ayi kœwo azu, tshe tshɔ lœnœ la ngu, kashe ayi kœwa ngbanga tshalafo yiyindœ nœ adœke tshe sœ dœ soro nene.»
28.5: Yé Polo vwi tshelœ kane ye, yakoronœ te ga ta wo, kashe katsha yakoronœ mbœmbœrœ she nene.
28.6: Anga azunœ sœ lima kœkate kœwu mara á katsha yakoronœ œ mbœrœ she too ndje tshe gbɔ kukuku œ tshu, kashe endje ka œrrr anga œrœ bale mbœmbœrœ nene. Endje kœfa tshelœ o'o ama endje á kœpa adœke: «Yakoshe asœ kœdœ anga ndjaba.»
28.7: Egerœ uzu bale ndo dœ osho á sœ ɨndɨrɨnœ á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Publiyuse, sœ lima dœ osho kœsœ ndo dœ tshikinœ asœmœ kpœtœmœ. Tshe za osho kœsœ fœ 'a dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu yé 'a lo kpœtœmœ olo votɔ.
28.8: Aba Publiyuse sœ lima dœ koɓa biwa œdœ pe awa. Polo na kœwu she, á e Ndjaba tœ ayi koɓanœ, á to kane ye ga pa ye ngbewo á koɓa nœ ye kœka ye.
28.9: Manda nœ, anga azu tshikinœ á endje sœ lima dœ koɓa, na ga ndœ Polo ndœ kœgbɔ kœshe yé tshe she endje ye.
28.10: Endje lɨsœ 'a lima waa, ɔlɔ á 'a jerœ ga la ngu ndœ kœro tœnœ, endje to œrœ kɔ á 'a sœ lima dœ ogonœ fœ 'a. Kœto lœ tshiki Malte kœro ga lœ Roma
28.11: 'A mbœrœ yapu votɔ lœ Malte, manda nœ 'a ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba, á sœpe lima lœ tshiki lœ ɨzɨ á sœ ɓa zœ. Tœnœ kœdœ lima egerœ agba tshelœ Alekezandri á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ: «Ameya ndjaba.»
28.12: 'A na œrrr yé œ wuta ɓa lakpɨ Sirakuse, yé 'a mbœrœ kpœtœ olo votɔ.
28.13: Kœto kpœtœmœ, 'a afo kpœtœ, 'a za tshandɨrɨ mangunœ œ ro œrrr gbuu ga lœ Rejio. Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, yugu to dja ga mangba 'a yé á tagala 'a manda olo bisha á 'a wuta ga lœ Puzole.
28.14: Ɓa zœ, 'a gbɔ anga ayindœ Yisu, á endje kɨ ga tœ 'a adœke 'a mbœrœ dœ œne pɔsɔ bale, yeka manda nœ á 'a kœli ga lœ Roma.
28.15: Aaya lœ Yisu ɓa lœ Roma dji ndœ 'a, á na para tshatshu 'a, á kate 'a ɓa lœ zando Apiuse œdœ osho á endje e «anda agene». Lɔkɔ á Polo wu endje, tshe gbɔ gbɔgbɔ, yé œ za mershe fœ Ndjaba. Polo ɓa lœ Roma
28.16: Kœyi kumu 'a ga lœ Roma, endje za awa fœ Polo ndœ kœgbɔ anda nœ ye kœlo tœnœ dœ pe turugu á tshe sœ kœza ala ye tœ ye.
28.17: Manda olo votɔ, Polo kœvwa osho fœ agbozu tshapa Ayuda ndœ kœngbɔtœ endje ga tœ nœ. Ɔlɔ á endje ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ, Polo kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Alaya, mœ mbœmbœrœ ekperœ ga tœ azu ogo nœ azœ nene, too ga tœ o'o á aata azœ katœ nœ tɨ fœ azœ nene, yeka á Ayuda nœ Yerusaleme tɔ meza pa mœ fœ azu nœ Roma asœ.
28.18: Endje yu osho œ yindœ kœkatœ mœ; gbambanœ nene, endje gbɔgbɔ ekperœ bale á mœ mbœrœ yeka á endje kœwa o'o ndœ kœwo mœ nene.
28.19: Kashe Ayuda vwaratœ endje ye, mœ sœsœ lima dœ anga œrœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene, á mœ yɔndœ nœ adœke gbozugo Roma kœwa ngbanga nœ mœ. Kashe mœ sœsœ dœ gbetshelœ kœndɨ ogo nœ azœ nene.
28.20: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa á mœ vwa osho ndœ 'e adœke a pa 'o mbœrœ tœnœ kane. Adja upu adœke endje i kane mœ mbœrœ uzu á azu Israyele sœ kœza lɔsu endje ga tœ ye.»
28.21: Endje gi fœ she adœke: «'A gbɔgbɔ anga mbeti á to lœ Yuda mbœrœ o'o nœ zœ nene, yé lœ ugurutœ alaya á endje na asœ, anga bale á tshe na dœ ndœ trœrœ zœ too tshe pa ekpe o'o mbœrœ ɓœ gugu nene.
28.22: Kashe 'a yindœ kœdji ɓœ kœmɨndœ neke á ɓœ na dœ tœnœ mbœrœ osho kɔ, azu sœ kœvwaratœ endje tœ awa nœ zœ á ɓœ zatœ zœ ndœ nœ.»
28.23: Endje kœdɨ mbulu dœ Polo, yé lɔkɔnœ, endje kœna ndjoro ga lœ bɨngɨ nœ ye. Kœto dœ amazɨ œrrr kpii, Polo sœ kolœ kœyisœ 'o tœ upu nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba fœ endje kœto tœ mbeti nœ Moyize dœ pe œnœ aayi kœgbara o'o mbœrœ kœma fœ endje adœke endje yindœ Yisu.
28.24: Anga endje sœ lima kœyindœ o'o á tshe sœ kœpa tœnœ, kashe anga endje vwaratœ endje kœyindœ nœ ye.
28.25: Kœgu endje tœ awa, endje sœ lima kœdjitœ endje lœ tœ endje nene; á Polo kpa kœpa ga pa nœ fœ endje adœke: «Tœnœ kœdœ adja o'o nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ á ayi kœgbara o'o Isaya mɨ lima ndœ nœ fœ aata 'e adœke:
28.26: “Na ga ndœ azu asœmœ yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: 'e dji dœ ɔtshɔnœ kashe 'e wusœ adanœ nene, 'e mesho dœ ɔtshɔnœ kashe 'e wu dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene.
28.27: Gbambanœ nene, lɔsu azu asœ gbɔɔgbɔ; endje be utu endje dœ pe ala endje ye, mbœrœ endje yiyindœ kœwu œrœ nene, yé œ yiyi ndje ndœ kœdji o'o nene, endje yiyindœ kœfa lɔsu endje fœ mœ dœ́ Ndjaba nene. Yé mœ she bala endje koto o?”»
28.28: Polo kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E wusœ nœ adœke, Ndjaba vwa kœshe fœ anga angbɨ azu; endje, endje dji bala zœ.» [
28.29: Kœdji Polo ataa, Ayuda gitœ endje yé œ tetœ kœshara o'o ugurutœ endje dœ tœ endje.]
28.30: Polo mbœrœ lima ungu bisha tshakudu anda dœ ngendja nœ ye dœ tœ ye, yé tshe sœ kœpa o'o dœ azu kɔ á endje sœ lima kœna ga ndœ ye.
28.31: Tshe sœ lima kœmɨndœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba, kœyisœ o'o nœ Gbozu Yisu Kristu dœ awa nene, yé uzu bale kœpakata she gugu lima nene.

1.1: Œmœ Polo, ayi akwa nœ Yisu Kristu mœ sœ kœsu mbetinœ asœke fœ 'e. Ndjaba e mœ mbœrœ kœdœ ayi avwa yé tshe ke mœ ndœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ ye.
1.2: Ɔtshɔ O'onœ á Tshe pa lima ndœ nœ lœ awa nœ aayi kœgbara o'o ala œyerœ Buku,
1.3: tœ upu nœ Gbolo nœ ye, á endje zu she ɓata uzu lœ uwu aata Davidi.
1.4: Á lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, Ndjaba she lima she lœ akuzu. Tshe yi lima sœ nœ adœke, tshe kœdœ gbolo nœ œne á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ waa.
1.5: Dœ awa nœ ye œdœ mbœrœ mokɔ nœ ye dá Ndjaba ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ mœ yeka á e mœ adœke mœ te ayi avwa nœ ye, dœ́ mœ gbara fœ angbɨ azu kɔ adœke endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu Kristu, yé œ dji o'o ama ye.
1.6: E'e ndje, 'e lœ ugurutœ azunœ asœmœ mbœrœ á Yisu Kristu e ndje 'e.
1.7: Ga ndœ 'e dœ́ azu Roma kɔ, Ndjaba yindœ 'e yé tshe e 'e adœke 'e wuta ayerœ azu. Kaka adœke Aba azœ dœ Ndjaba œdœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ endje fœ 'e, yé œ za kœsœ gee fœ 'e. Polo yindœ kœna kœwu ayindœ Kristu tshelœ Roma
1.8: Utshunœ kɔ, mœ donga Ndjaba nœ mœ lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu mbœrœ 'e para kɔkɔ. Gbambanœ nene, tshapashɔ djigi sœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e.
1.9: Mœ kœsœ tœ kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba, mœ sœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ Ndjaba dœ lɔsu mœ bale. Yé tshe wusœ nœ adœke mœ sœ tœ kœpa adja o'o, adœke mœ sœ kœgbe dœ e'e lœ avwala nœ mœ.
1.10: Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, mœ sœ kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba adœke œdœ tshe kœyindœ nœ, tshe kɔrɔ awa fœ mœ dœ́ mœ wuta ga ndœ 'e.
1.11: Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ adja dœ ogo kœwutœ mœ dœ 'e yeka á gbɔgbɔ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ kœmatœ ye lœ 'e adœke kœyindœrœ nœ 'e kœgerœ.
1.12: Adja mœ yindœ kœna kœwutœ mœ dœ 'e mbœrœ a ngbɔɓa gbetshelœ nœ azœ lœ kœyindœrœ á a sœ dœ tœnœ á kœza gbɔgbɔ fœ azœ kɔ.
1.13: Aaya mœ, 'e wusœ nœ adœke mœ gbe tœ kœna ga ndœ 'e awa ndjoro kashe œrrr ngɔngɔ asœke, awa kɔkɔrɔ fœ mœ nene. Mœ yi lima ndœ nœ adœke ndœla akwa nœ mœ wuta ngbɨ ugurutœ 'e ɓata á wuta ndje ngbɨ ugurutœ anga angbɨ azu á endje wuwusœ Yisu nene.
1.14: Mœ sœ dœ kuɗa nœ azu kɔ: azu á ala endje kɔrɔ œdœ endjeneke á ala endje kɔkɔrɔ nene, azu á endje sœ dœ kœwusœrœ dœ endjeneke á endje gugu dœ kœwusœrœ nene;
1.15: kuɗanœ asœmœ kœdœ kœna kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ endje. Atamœ, mœ yi ndje ndœ kœna ɓa lœ Roma mbœrœ kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœmœ fœ 'e. Ɔtshɔ O'o kœdœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba
1.16: Mœ sœsœ dœ tshula mbœrœ kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nene. Tœnœ kœdœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba mbœrœ kœshe uzu kɔ á tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ: Ayuda utshunœ œdœ ndje angbɨ azu manda nœ.
1.17: Gbambanœ nene, Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœ dá yisœ kœsœ ndjii nœ Ndjaba á uzu œ wuta ga tœ nœ lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ. Mbœrœ endje sú ɓala Buku adœke: «Uzu neke á tshe wuta ndjii lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, tshe gbɔ soro.» Azu para kɔkɔ mbœrœ ekperœ
1.18: Ndjaba ma lima ókó nœ ye kœto ɓa lafo ga tœ ekperœ œdœ ga tœ azu kɔ á endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœsœ ndjii nene. Gbambanœ nene, ekperœnœ asœmœ sœ kœmbœrœ adœke endje za œrœ ku ala awa adja o'o.
1.19: Andaa, œneke á œ li adœke a wusœ nœ ɓa ndœ Ndjaba sœ ngbɨ mbœrœ azu kɔ. Ndjaba dœ tœ ye dá ma ngbɨ fœ endje.
1.20: Pe tœ ali kœmbœrœ tshapashɔ, œrœ á Ndjaba mbœrœ sœ kœma gbɔgbɔ nœ ye waa dœ waa œdœ ndje mara ye dœ tœ ye. Ataa, ɓata azu wuwusœ nœ nene adœke tshe kœdœ Ndjaba, endje gbɔ o'o ye.
1.21: Endje wusœ Ndjaba kashe endje sœsœ kœdonga she ɓata Ndjaba nene, œ sœsœ ndje kœgi mershe fœ she nene. Andaa gbetshelœ nœ endje ndɨ yé kœwusœrœ nœ endje sœ kolœ ubu osho.
1.22: Endje sœ kœpa adœke œne kœdœ azu nœ kœwusœtœ, andaa endje kœdœ aayi ɨndɨ.
1.23: Tœ œsœ kœdonga Ndjaba á tshe tshutshu nene, endje tetœ kœdonga œrœ á endje mbœrœ dœ kane azu á tshutshu, ɓata ayanu, agea too ayakoro.
1.24: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa dá Ndjaba katœ endje tɨ kœmbœrœ œneke á endje gbe dœ tœnœ, á endje lœ kœdjatœ endje lœ ngbɨndɨrœ yeka á sœ kœgbɔ tshula.
1.25: Endje ka ɓalima tœ Ndjaba tɨ œ yi kolœ ndœ wala, endje sœ kolœ kœdonga œrœ á Ndjaba mbœrœ. Kashe Ndjaba á tshe mbœrœ lima œrœ kɔ, endje yiyindœ kœdonga she nene. Œshe kœdœ Ndjaba má œ li adœke azu donga she waa dœ waa. Ame.
1.26: Ádánœ á Ndjaba katœ endje tɨ adœke endje za awa œrœ á endje gbɔ tshula manda nœ dœmœ. Awo endje sœsœ kœlo dœ ayakoshe nene, kashe endje lo kolœ dœ ayashe anga endje.
1.27: Ayakoshe mbœrœ ndje awa bale. Endje katœ kœlo dœ ayashe, œ sœ dœ ogo anga endje dœ ayakoshe, á sœ kœlo dœ endje. Endje mbœrœ ugurutœ endje œrœ á gaga nene yé endje gbɔ œrœ tshangba djingili nœ endje.
1.28: Ɓata á endje vwaratœ endje tœ kœwusœ Ndjaba, Ndjaba katœ endje tɨ adœke endje sœpe lœ ɨndɨ kœwusœrœ nœ endje. Ataa, endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á li adœke endje mbœrœ nene.
1.29: Endje su dœ tshelœ aka œrœ á sœsœ ndjii nene, dœ ekperœ, dœ egerœ lɔsu, kœmbœrœ anga endje dœ ɔgbɔ œrœ, endje sú dœ uku, dœ kœwo azu, dœ œbœrœ, afara, œdœ pe ndje kœpa wala,
1.30: kœpatœ osho, ayingba Ndjaba, kœgu osho, egerœ kumu œdœ pe kœzatœ endje. Endje sœ kœpara dœ awa kɔ ndœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, yé endje lɨlɨsœ aayi kœzu endje nene.
1.31: Endje gugu dœ kœwusœrœ nene, endje mbœmbœrœ œrœ liaka ndœma endje nene, endje sœ dœ ɔgbɔ lɔsu yé endje wuwu ndje oyo azu nene.
1.32: Endje wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke Ndjaba pa liya adœke: azu á endje mbœrœ mara œrœ ataa li dœ kuzu. Kashe endje lœ kolœ kœmbœrœ œrœ atake, yé œ sœ ndje dœ yanga azu á endje lœ kœmbœrœ mara ekperœ œrœ asœmœ.

2.1: Endje wu oyo zœ nene, œɓœ, œdœ ɓœ kœdœ œɗe, á sœ kœwa ngbanga pa anga zœ. Gbambanœ nene, ɓœ kœsœ kœwa ngbanga pa uzu, ɓœ sœ ndje kœwa o'o ga tœ zœ dœ tœ zœ mbœrœ ɓœ sœ ndje awa bale œɓœ á ɓœ sœ kœwa ngbanga.
2.2: Andaa a wusœ nœ adœke kœwa ngbanga nœ Ndjaba sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye lœ adja o'o mbœrœ azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ mara œrœ ataa.
2.3: Yé œɓœ á ɓœ sœ kœpa adœke azu sœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, andaa œɓœ ndje ɓœ sœ tœ kœmbœrœ awa bale, ɓœ gbe adœke Ndjaba œ wa ngbanga pa zœ nœ zœ nene a?
2.4: Ɓœ sœ kœwu egerœ ayo nœ Ndjaba, dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu ndje dœ ugu lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ zœ gbambanœ a? Ɓœ wuwusœ nœ nene adœke ayo nœ Ndjaba sœ kœmbœrœ adœke ɓœ fa lɔsu zœ a?
2.5: Kashe mbœrœ ɔgbɔ lɔsu nœ zœ, dœ gbɔkumu nœ zœ, ɓœ sœ kœpara adœke Ndjaba za egerœ djofele fœ ɓœ dœ lɔkɔ á tshe ma ókó á ma kœwa ngbanga nœ ye á sœ ndjii.
2.6: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba œ to fœ uzu dœ uzu kœli dœ œneke á tshe mbœrœ.
2.7: Ndjaba œ za soro á ka nene fœ azu neke á endje sœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa, á sœ dœ kœru lɔsu, á sœ kœpara awa kœgbɔ mokɔ, kœlɨsœtœ œdœ pe ɔkɔ á tshu nene.
2.8: Kashe azu á endje vwaratœ endje tœ adja o'o á tshapu kœza awa œrœ á sœ ndjii, ókó œdœ kœyiangbarœ nœ Ndjaba œ te ga pa endje.
2.9: Azu kɔ á endje sœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, œ wu kanga œdœ egerœ oyo: œdœ Ayuda œdœ ndje angbɨ Azu.
2.10: Kashe uzu kɔ á tshe kœsœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ, Ndjaba œ za mokɔ, kœlɨsœtœ œdœ kœsœ gee fœ she; Yuda utshunœ œdœ angbɨ uzu manda nœ.
2.11: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba wuwu tshatshu uzu nene.
2.12: Azu á endje wuwusœ awa akwa nene, œdœ endje kœtshu, awa akwa gugu dœ ádá bale pa endje nene. Kashe endjeneke kɔ á endje wusœ awa akwa, œdœ endje kœmbœrœ ekperœ, Ndjaba œ wa ngbanga pa endje liaka awa akwa.
2.13: Gbambanœ nene, azu á endje dji awa akwa kolœ ndœ kœdji tœnœ, endje sœsœ ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba nene. Kashe endjeneke á endje mbœrœtœ endje lindœ awa akwa, endje dá lœ ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba.
2.14: Lɔkɔ á angbɨ azu á endje wuwusœ awa akwa nene kœsœ kœmbœrœtœ endje lindœ nœ, œ sœ kœma ɓata œ sœ lœ endje andaa endje gugu dœ tœnœ nene.
2.15: Atamœ, œ sœ kœma ɓata endje sú awa akwanœ ga tœ lɔsu endje. Œdœ endje kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ, œdœ endje kœmbœrœ ndje ekperœ; gbetshelœ nœ endje sœ kœyisœ nœ fœ endje kɔ œdœ ndje œneke á sœ tœ lɔsu endje á sœ kœwa ngbanga too kœpa o'o tshapa endje.
2.16: Kɔkɔ asœke œ wuta bala ngbɨ dœ lɔkɔ á Ndjaba œ wa ngbanga pa kœmbœrœtœ lœ ubunœ nœ azu lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu. Asœ kœdœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ á mœ sœ tœ kœpandœ nœ. Sharapu nœ azu Israyele
2.17: Kashe œɓœ á ɓœ dœ Yuda, á ɓœ ka ga pa awa akwa á sœ tœ kœdu okoro zœ mbœrœ Ndjaba nœ zœ,
2.18: œɓœ á ɓœ wusœ gbetshelœ nœ ye, œɓœ á awa akwa nœ ye yisœ œrœ fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ wusœ kœke œrœ á sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ,
2.19: œɓœ á ɓœ gbe adœke ɓœ kœdœ ayi kœgbota aayibula, ɨngbɨsho mbœrœ azu á endje sœ lœ ubu osho,
2.20: œɓœ, ɓœ gbe adœke ɓœ kœdœ ayi kœmbœrœ ala fœ azu á endje wuwusœ œrœ nene œdœ amba azu. Ɓata á ɓœ wusœ awa akwa á dœ́ ada kœwusœrœ œdœ adja o'o.
2.21: Œɓœ á ɓœ kœdœ ayi kœyisœrœ fœ azu, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ sœsœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ ɓœ dœ tœ zœ nene a? Ɓœ sœ kœyisœ œrœ adœke: Zɨzɨ angba nene, yé mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ sœ kœzɨ angba a?
2.22: Ɓœ sœ kœpakata kœlo dœ awo azu, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ lo dœ awo azu a? Ɓœ sœ kœtshene andjaba, yé mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ kpa zɨ angba œrœ tshelœ anda kœdonga dœ andjaba a?
2.23: Ɓœ sœ kœdu okoro zœ adœke ɓœ wusœ awa akwa, kashe ɓœ sœsœ kœlɨsœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Ndjaba nene dœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ kœndɨ awa akwa.
2.24: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Angbɨ azu œ gu œsœ Ndjaba kolœ manda 'e.»
2.25: Ádá gaza sœ tœnœ œdœ ɓœ kœsœ kœmbœrœtœ zœ lindœ awa akwa. Ká ɓœ kœsœsœ kœmbœrœtœ zœ lindœ awa akwa nene, ɓœ li ndje dœ uzu á tshe wawa gaza nene.
2.26: Œdœ angbɨ uzu á tshe wawa gaza nene kœsœ kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ awa akwa, endje wu ndje she ɓata uzu á tshe wa gaza.
2.27: Uzu á tshe wawa gaza nene, á tshe kœsœ kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ awa akwa, tshe wa ngbanga pa zœ; œɓœ á ɓœ wa gaza, á sœ dœ awa akwa kashe á sœsœ kœmbœrœtœ zœ lindœ nœ nene.
2.28: Œ dœ́dœ́ œneke á a wu ɓa ushu dá mbœrœ uzu tœ Yuda nene, œ dœ́dœ́ ndje sherœwa uku gaza nœ ɔkɔ dá mbœrœ gaza nene.
2.29: Kashe adja Yuda kœdœ tsheneke á tshe dœ Yuda ɓa tœ lɔsu ye. Adja gaza kœdœ œnœ lɔsu uzu, œneke á to lœ Ɨshirɨ kashe œ toto lœ mbeti nœ awa akwa nene. Mara uzu ataa, kolœ Ndjaba dá donga she kashe azu nene.

3.1: Atamœ, Ayuda ropa angbɨ azu dœ gaɗe? Ɔtshɔrœ nœ kœwa gaza kœdœ gaɗe e?
3.2: Adjapu, ɔtshɔrœnœ sœ waa kashe œneke á ropa nœ kɔ utshunœ kœdœ adœke Ndjaba za lima o'o ama ye fœ Ayuda.
3.3: Atamœ, œdœ anga Ayudanœ kœvwaratœ endje tœ kœyindœ o'o ama Ndjaba, œ mbœrœ adœke Ndjaba kpa gbe dœ o'o ama ye á tshe pa nene a?
3.4: Œ sœ atamœ nene. A wusœ œneke: Ndjaba sœ kœpa adja o'o kashe uzu tshapashɔ kœdœ ayi wala. Ɓata endje sú ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Œ li adœke azu para kɔkɔ wusœ nœ adœke ɓœ sœ ndjii lœ o'o ama zœ, yé œdœ endje kœtɔ meza pa zœ ɓœ te dœ ngbanga nene.»
3.5: Kashe œdœ kœmbœrœ œrœ nœ azœ á sœsœ ndjii nene kœsœ kœma adœke Ndjaba sœ ndjii, atamœ a pa koto o? Mœ sœ kœyutœ mœ ɓata uzu kɔ œ yutœ ye: «Ndjaba sœsœ ndjii nene yeka á za djofele fœ azœ asœmœ a?» Mœ sœ kœpa o'o asœ ɓata azu.
