7.21: Œɓœ kœdœ lima kanga lɔkɔ á Ndjaba e ɓœ a? Tɔtɔ lɔsu zœ nene. Kashe œdœ awa kœsœ zœ adœke ɓœ wuta lœ kanga, mbœrœtœ zœ lindœ nœ.
7.22: Gbambanœ nene, kanga á Gbozu e she kœdœ uzu á tshe kpa dœ́dœ́ kanga nene yé tshe te uzu nœ Gbozu. Awa bale ndje dœ uzu á tshe dœ́dœ́ kanga nene yé á Ndjaba e lima she, œshe kœdœ kanga nœ Kristu.
7.23: Ndjaba yɔ lima 'e lœ kanga ye; 'e tete akanga nœ azu nene.
7.24: Aaya mœ, œ li adœke uzu dœ uzu sœpe tœ ala Ndjaba kolœ ɓata á tshe sœ lima utshunœ lɔkɔ á tshe e she. Aangara œdœ pe ayashe koya
7.25: Tœ upu nœ aangara, Gbozu kakatœ awa o'o tɨ fœ mœ nene, kashe mœ sœ kœza gbetshelœ nœ mœ ɓata uzu á tshe zatœ ye ndjii, mbœrœ Gbozu ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ mœ.
7.26: Mbœrœ oyo nœ ngɔngɔ asœke, œneke á mœ sœ kœgbe tœnœ dœke: œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke uzu dœ uzu sœ kolœnœ ɓata á tshe sœ asœmœ.
7.27: Œdœ ɓœ kœto yashe ye, papara adœke ɓœ kurutshelœtœ zœ dœ she nene. Œdœ ɓœ kœtoto yashe nene, papara ndje adœke ɓœ to yashe nene.
7.28: Kashe œdœ ɓœ kœto yashe, ɓœ mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene. Yé œdœ ovoro yawuru kœi yakoshe, tshe mbœmbœrœ ndje ekperœ nene. Kashe endje á endje totœ endje asœmœ, endje gbɔ kœndanga osho lœ soro nœ endje œnœ ɔkɔ, yé œmœ, mœ yi má ndœ kœgbɔndœ 'e mbœrœ tœnœ.
7.29: Aaya mœ, o'o á mœ yindœ kœpa fœ 'e dœke: a kpa sœsœpe dœ olo ndjoro nene. Kœto ngɔngɔnœ asœke, œ li adœke endjeneke á endje to ayashe, endje sœ ɓata endje gugu dœ ayashe nene;
7.30: endjeneke á endje sœ tœ ɨkɨ, endje sœ ɓata endje sœsœ tœ ɨkɨ nene; endjeneke á endje sœ dœ yanga, endje sœ ɓata endje gugu dœ yanga nene; endjeneke á endje sœ kœyɔ œrœ, endje sœ ɓata endje gugu dœ tœnœ nene.
7.31: Œ li adœke azu á endje sœ kœshe mbœrœ œrœ nœ tshapashɔ asœke, sœ ɓata endje sheshe mbœrœ tœnœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, tshapashɔnœ ɓata á sœ asœ, œndœnœ œ dɨ nene.
7.32: Mœ yiyindœ nœ adœke 'e sœ dœ gbetshelœ nene. Tsheneke á tshe toto yashe nene, tshe sœ kœzatœ ye ga tœ akwa nœ Gbozu: Tshe sœ kœpara adœke œne mbœrœ œrœ á sœ kœza yanga fœ Gbozu.
7.33: Kashe tsheneke á tshe to yashe ye, tshe sœ kœgbe kolœ dœ œrœ nœ tshapashɔ asœke: tshe sœ kœpara adœke œne mbœrœ œrœ á sœ kœza yanga fœ awo œne.
7.34: Yé dœ tœnœ ataa, lɔsu ye sœ ga pa œrœ bisha. Œ sœ ndje awa bale ataa mbœrœ yashe too ovoro yawuru á tshe i i yakoshe nene, yé á sœ kœgbe kolœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ Gbozu mbœrœ á kœsœ yerœ lœ undu ye œdœ lœ ɨshirɨ. Kashe yashe á tshe i yakoshe, tshe sœ kœgbe dœ œrœ nœ tshapashɔ asœke yé œ sœ kœpara adœke œne mbœrœ œrœ á sœ kœza yanga fœ akɔ œne.
7.35: Mœ pa o'onœ asœmœ mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ á sœ mbœrœ 'e, kashe mœ sœsœ kœkapa 'e nene. Mœ yindœ nœ adœke 'e mbœrœ œneke á li adœke 'e sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, yé œ zatœ 'e djigi fœ Gbozu.
7.36: Œdœ anga ovoro yakoshe kœyindœ kœto yashe, yé á endje kpa wa adœke œne totœ œne nene, endje mbœrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Á ovoro yakoshenœ kœwu adœke œne sœ dœ ogo awo œne tɔpanœ kpuru, yé á wu ndje adœke œne kœtoto she nene dá œne mbœrœ ekperœ, œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke endje totœ endje ɓata á endje gbe dœ tœnœ. Asœmœ dœ́dœ́ ekperœ nene.
7.37: Kashe œdœ ovoro yakoshenœ kœdjidji azu á endje sœ kœshosho she nene, yé á wa dœ tœ ye ɓa lɔsu ye adœke œne to koje nœ œne nene, œdœ tshe kœli kœru lɔsu ye tœ ogo ɔkɔ, tshe mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ.
7.38: Ataa, tsheneke á tshe kœto koje nœ ye, tshe mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ. Kashe tsheneke á tshe kœvwaratœ ye kœto koje nœ ye, œshe asœmœ kpa mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ kœrosœnœ.
7.39: Yashe á tshe dœ awo uzu, sœ tœ œsœnœ dœ ɔkɔnœ lɔkɔ á tshe sœpe dœ soro. Kashe œdœ akɔnœ kœtshu ye, tshe li kœi angbɨ yakoshe á tshe yindœ ye. Œ li ndje adœke yakoshenœ dœ yindœ Kristu.
7.40: Andaa, tœ mœ, mœ gbe adœke tshe sœ dœ yanga kœrosœ nœ œdœ tshe kœsœ kolœ ataa. Yé œmœ ndje, mœ wusœ nœ adœke Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba sœ dœ mœ awa bale.

8.1: Tœ upu nœ songba agea á endje to dœ tokóró fœ andjaba, œ sœ adjapu adœke azœ kɔ, a sœ dœ kœwusœrœ lœ nœ ɓata á 'e sœ kœpa tœnœ. Kœwusœrœ sœ kœza egerœ kumu fœ uzu, kashe kœyindœsho sœ kœto gbɔgbɔ ga ugurutœ azu.
8.2: Œdœ uzu kœsœ kœgbe adœke œne wusœ œrœ waa, asœmœ sœ kœma adœke tshe wuwu damba sœ œrœ ɓata á li má adœke tshe wusœ nœ nene.
8.3: Kashe tsheneke á tshe yindœ Ndjaba, Ndjaba wu ndje sœ ye yé.
8.4: Ataa, a li kœzɨ songba agea á endje za tœ tokóró fœ andjaba ye a? A wusœ nœ adœke andjaba kœdœ œrœ gbambanœ pa tshapashɔ, yé anga andjaba gugu nene, kolœ Ndjaba tshebabale.
8.5: Gbambanœ nene, ataa œdœ anga azu kœgbe adœke andjaba sœ ɓa lafo too ɓa pa ɔshɔ, œ sœ adjapu adœke andjaba œdœ agbozu sœ ndjoro,
8.6: a wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba sœ kolœ tshebabale. Œshe kœdœ Aba azœ á tshe mbœrœ œrœ kɔ, yé a sœ kœshe mbœrœ she. A sœ dœ Gbozu nœ azœ tshebabale Yisu Kristu. Lœ awa nœ ye dá Ndjaba mbœrœ œrœ kɔ, yé a sœ dœ soro mbœrœ she.
8.7: Kashe ayindœ Kristu kɔ wuwusœ adjapunœ asœ nene. Anga endje sœpe dœ gbetshelœ nœ andjabanœ asœmœ lœ kumu endje dœ mara adœke œdœ endje kœzɨ songba agea á endje to tœ tokóró fœ andjaba, endje sœ kœgbe adœke endje to fœ adja Ndjaba, yé endje mɔ lœ gbetshelœ nœ endje. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, endje gbe adœke œne kœdœ aayi uburu.
8.8: Andaa, œ dœ́dœ́ rœgo dá gi azœ ndoo dœ Ndjaba nene. Œdœ a kœvwaratœ azœ kœzɨ tœnœ, a sœ ga manda nœ nene. Yé œdœ a kœzɨ ndje gbaa na, a gbɔ œrœ bale nene.
8.9: Kashe, 'e sœ dœ gbɔdjela adœke mara á 'e sœ kœmbœrœ dœ œrœ kɔ asœmœ, yiyi endjeneke á endje mɔɔmɔ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje ga lœ ekperœ nene.
8.10: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ uzu á tshe mɔɔmɔ lœ kœwusœrœ nœ ye asœmœ kœwu ɓœ á ɓœ sœ dœ kœwusœrœ, yé á ɓœ li ga lœ Tepelo nœ andjaba, tshe gbɔ gbɔgbɔ nœ kœzɨ songba agea á endje to dœ tokóró fœ andjabanœ asœmœ nene a?
8.11: Yé mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, kœwusœrœ nœ zœ œ ndɨ uzu á tshe mɔɔmɔ asœmœ. Kashe wusœ nœ adœke œshe kœdœ aya zœ á Kristu tshu mbœrœ she!
8.12: Œdœ 'e kœmbœrœ mara ekperœ ataa ga tœ aaya 'e yé á ndɨ gbetshelœ nœ uzu á tshe mɔɔmɔ, dá 'e mbœrœ ekperœ fœ Kristu dœ tœ ye.
8.13: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œdœ kœzɨrœ kœsœ kœyi aya mœ ga lœ ekperœ, mœ kpa zɨ songba agea bale nene, mbœrœ á kœyiyi aya mœ ga lœ djingili nene.

9.1: Œmœ kœdœ kanga a? Mœ dœ́dœ́ ayi avwa nene a? Mœ wuwu Yisu á tshe dœ́ Gbozu nœ azœ nene a? 'E dœ́dœ́ azu ndœla akwa nœ mœ lœ Gbozu nene a?
9.2: Œdœ mbœrœ anga azu mœ kœdœ́dœ́ ayi avwa nene, kashe mbœrœ 'e nœ 'e, œmœ kœdœ ayi avwa. Gbambanœ nene, e'e kœdœ œrœ á sœ kœma tshambele akwa nœ mœ ɓata ayi avwa lœ Gbozu.
9.3: O'o á mœ sœ kœgi fœ azu á endje sœ kœpatœ mœ dœke:
9.4: 'A lili má kœyɔndœ kœzɨrœ too kœndjorœ ɓa ndœ 'e nene a?
9.5: 'A lili má kœna dœ anga yashe á tshe dœ yindœ Kristu ɓata anga aayi avwa, aaya Gbozu œdœ pe Petro sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene a?
9.6: Kolœ mœ kutu mœ œdœ Barnabase dá li ndœ kœmbœrœ akwa yeka á kœzɨ œrœ a?
9.7: Œɗe lœ akwa turugu dá mbœrœ akwa dœ ngendja nœ ye dœ tœ ye a? Œɗe dá lu ɔyɔ vinu, yé á zɨzɨ elenœ nene a? Too uzu ɗe dá sœ kœgbɔndœ angombe yé á ndjondjo ungu ɔngɔ endje nene a?
9.8: Tœnœ kœdœ kolœ o'o nœ azu dá mœ pa asœmœ, too awa akwa sœsœ kœpa awa bale ataa nene a?
9.9: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala buku nœ awa akwa nœ Moyize adœke: «Ɓœ i ama ngombe ga tœnœ nene lɔkɔ á ɓœ kœsœ kœmbœrœ she dœ akwa ble.» Ndjaba sœ kœkɨtœ œsœ angombe a?
9.10: Œ dœ́dœ́ azœ dá tshe sœ kœpa o'onœ tœ azœ nene a? Adjapu, endje sú o'onœ asœmœ mbœrœ azœ. Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe djo kɨndɨ dœ pe tsheneke á tshe ɓi indji ngwarœ, uzu dœ uzu sœ kœmbœrœ dœ gbetshelœ nœ kœgbɔ œsœ œnœ ye.
9.11: Œdœ 'a kœyi lima sœ o'o ama Ndjaba fœ 'e, œ sœ má dœ ekpenœ waa ye adœke 'a yɔndœ œrœ tœ 'e a?
9.12: Œdœ anga azu kœsœ kœyɔndœ œrœ tœ 'e, mbœrœ gaɗe á a'a nene a? Andaa, 'a yɔyɔ lima ndœ œrœ nene. Kashe 'a gbɔndœtœ 'a mbœrœ á 'a kœzaza œrœ ku lœ awa Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Kristu nene.
9.13: 'E wuwusœ nœ adœke azu neke á endje sœ kœmbœrœ akwa ɓa lœ anda nœ Ndjaba sœ kœgbɔ kœzɨrœ kpœtœmœ nene a? Yé endjeneke á endje sœ kœto tokóró ɓa pa ndaba, sœsœ ndje kœgbɔ œsœ œnœ endje kœzɨrœ kpœpa ndabanœ nene a?
9.14: Awa bale, Gbozu za awa tœ upu nœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o adœke endje sœ ndje dœ soro mbœrœ tœnœ.
9.15: Kashe œmœ, mœ zaza awa o'onœ asœmœ bale ga tœ akwa nene, yé mœ susu mbetinœ asœmœ mbœrœ kœyɔndœ œrœ nene. Mœ yi má ndœ kœtshu tœnœ, tœ œsœnœ adœke endje gbɔtœ upu nœ egerœ kumunœ asœ tœ mœ.
9.16: Dœ adjapu, kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o dœ́dœ́ œrœ nœ egerœ kumu ɓa ndœ mœ nene, kashe tœnœ kœdœ œrœ á li adœke mœ mbœrœ. Mœ sœ dœ oyo tœ lɔsu mœ œdœ mœ kœpapandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nene.
9.17: Œdœ mœ dœ tœ mœ dá wa lima adœke mœ mbœrœ akwanœ asœmœ, mœ yi má lima ndœ nœ adœke endje ko ngendja tshangbanœ fœ mœ ye. Kashe ɓata á endje za mœ dœ ɔgbɔ ga tœnœ, mœ mbœrœ kolœ akwa á Gbozu za fœ mœ.
9.18: Ataa, ngendja tshangba akwa nœ mœ kœdœ ga ɗe? Tœnœ kœdœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o gbambanœ á mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ, kashe mœ zaza awa o'o á Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœmœ za fœ mœ ga tœ akwa nene.
9.19: Mœ dœ́dœ́ kanga nœ uzu bale nene. Andaa, mœ zatœ mœ tœ kanga nœ azu para mbœrœ kœgbɔ azu ndjoro fœ Yisu.
9.20: Mœ sœ lima kœsœ ugurutœ Ayuda ɓata Yuda mbœrœ kœgbɔ Ayuda. Ataa mœ sœsœ tshakudu awa akwa nœ Moyize nene gbaa, mœ sœ kœmbœrœtœ mœ ɓata azu á endje sœ tshakudunœ mbœrœ kœgbɔ endjeneke á endje sœ tshakudu awa akwa.
9.21: Awa bale ndje, lɔkɔ á mœ kœsœ dœ endjeneke á endje sœsœ tshakudu awa akwa nene, mœ sœ kœmbœrœtœ mœ ɓata endje, kashe mœ sœsœ kœgbe dœ awa akwanœ asœmœ nene mbœrœ kœgbɔ endje. Œ yiyindœ kœpa adœke mœ wuwusœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba nene, gbambanœ nene, mœ zatœ mœ ga tshakudu awa akwa nœ Kristu.
9.22: Mœ sœ ugurutœ azu á endje mɔɔmɔ lœ kœyindœrœ ɓata œmœ ndje mœ mɔɔmɔ mbœrœ kœgbɔ endje. Mœ zatœ mœ djigi fœ endje para mbœrœ kœshe angata endje dœ mara kɔ.
9.23: Yé œneke asœmœ kɔ, mœ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ mbœrœ Ɔtshɔ O'o yeka á kœgbɔ œrœ á to lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœmœ.
9.24: 'E wuwusœ nœ adœke aayi kœkpa ɔrɔ kœkpa ɔrɔ nœ endje œrrr, kolœ anga bale dá gbɔ œrœ tshangbanœ nene a? 'E kpa ɔrɔnœ dœ mara adœke 'e wuta utshunœ.
9.25: Aayi mɔlɔ kɔ sœ kœpa avwara ndœ kœgbɔ kpoto tshagbozu á ndɨ bala ye, kashe œnœ azœ kœdœ kpoto tshagbozu á ndɨ bala bale nene.
9.26: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œmœ, mœ sœ kœkpa ɔrɔ dœ mara ataa: mœ sœsœ kœkpa ɔrɔ nœ ayibula nene; yé mœ sœ kœdu koshe atake: mœ dudu koshe lœ angbalanœ nene.
9.27: Kashe mœ sœ kœmbœrœ ɔgbɔrœ ga tœ undu mœ, yé œ sœ kœgbɔndœ nœ dœ ɔgbɔ kparawa adœke manda kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ anga azu, á Ndjaba kœvwaratœ ye tœ mœ nene.

10.1: Alaya, mœ yiyindœ nœ adœke œndœ œrœ á wuta lima ga tœ alata azœ lɔndɔ nœ Moyize djedjerœ 'e nene: ondoro gbɔ lima ndœ alata azœ para, endje para kɔkɔ zu lima tɔ la egerœ ungu.
10.2: Endje para gbɔ lima batisimu lœ kœngbɔtœ endje bale dœ Moyize ɓa lœ ondoro dœ pe la egerœ ungu.
10.3: Endje para sœ lima kœzɨ ala œrœ bale nœ ɨshirɨ.
10.4: Endje para sœ lima kœndjo ungu bale nœ ɨshirɨ. Gbambanœ nene, ungu á endje sœ lima kœndjo tœnœ to lœ badja nœ ɨshirɨ á sœ kœna dœ endje awa bale. Badjanœ asœmœ kœdœ lima Kristu.
10.5: Andaa, ɔtshɔ anga endje ndjoro ugurutœ endje gaga lima tœ ala Ndjaba nene, mbœrœ endje sœ lima kœtshu tœnœ kpɔɔ lœ kpagagasho.
10.6: Œrœ ataa mbœrœ lima tœ endje mbœrœ á ala azœ kœgbɔ adœke a kœsœsœ dœ ekpe ogo œrœ ɓata á endje sœ lima dœ tœnœ nene.
10.7: 'E dodonga andjaba ɓata anga endje ugurutœ endje mbœrœ nene. Ataa, endje sú ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Azu sœ lima ga atɨ ndœ kœzɨ œrœ dœ pe kœndjo œrœ; manda nœ endje alafo ndœ mɔlɔ.»
10.8: A kakatœ tœ azœ tɨ ndœ angba budu ɓata anga endje ugurutœ endje mbœrœ lima nene: azu tshu kutu zazu bale dœ votɔ (23.000) kolœ ndœ ɔlɔ bale.
10.9: A papara kœwu lɔsu Gbozu nœ azœ nene, ɓata anga azu ugurutœ endje mbœrœ yeka á tshu lima kuzu kœde osho nœ ayakoro.
10.10: Ataa, 'e pupu lœ ma 'e ɓata anga endje ugurutœ endje sœ lima kœpu lœ ma endje nene, yé á andjelu nœ kuzu wo lima endje.
10.11: Œrœ ataa wuta lima ga tœ endje mbœrœ adœke ala anga endje kœgbɔ, yé endje sú ga la mbeti ndœ kœmɨ dœ upu fœ azœ á a ndo dœ ndɔngɔlɔ tshapashɔ.
10.12: Ataa, kaka tsheneke á tshe gbe adœke œne ka dœ ada œne, zatœ ye ga lœ vola adœke œne tete nene.
10.13: Kœwu lɔsu á 'e sœ lœnœ, sœ awa bale mbœrœ azu kɔ. Ndjaba sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ o'o ye; tshe yindœ nœ adœke endje wu lɔsu 'e kœropa gbɔgbɔ nœ 'e nene. Lœ kœwu lɔsu, tshe yisœ mara nœ kœwuta lœ nœ œdœ gbɔgbɔ nœ kœshi gbɨ lœ nœ fœ 'e.
10.14: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa, 'e tɨtœ 'e tœ andjaba.
10.15: Mœ sœ kœpa o'o fœ 'e ɓata fœ azu á endje wusœ kœtondœ o'o, 'e wa œneke á mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e asœ dœ tœ 'e.
10.16: Yashi á a sœ kœdonga Ndjaba mbœrœ tœnœ, ngbɔngbɔɓa azœ ga tœnœ bale dœ indji Kristu nene a? Mapa á a sœ kœkavwatshelœ nœ, ngbɔngbɔɓa azœ ga tœnœ bale dœ undu Kristu nene a?
10.17: Mapa sœ tshebabale, ataa a sœ ndjoro gbaa, a wuta undu tshebabale. Gbambanœ nene, azœ para a sœ kœzɨ kolœ mapanœ á sœ tshebabale asœmœ.
10.18: 'E wu azu Israyele: endje á endje sœ kœzɨ agea á endje to tœ tokóró, ngbɔngbɔtœ endje awa bale ndœ kœdonga Ndjaba ɓa ɨndɨrɨ ndaba nene a?
10.19: O'o gaɗe dá mœ kœpa a? Songba agea á endje to tœ tokóró fœ andjaba too andjabanœ dœ tœ endje sœ dœ ádá waa ye a?
10.20: Œ̃ œ̃ nene! Kashe tokórónœ á ayingba Ndjaba sœ kœto tœnœ, kœdœ œnœ ekpe ɨshirɨ yé œ dœ́dœ́ œnœ Ndjaba nene. Mœ yiyindœ nœ adœke 'e ngbɔɓatœ 'e ga tœ œsœnœ bale dœ aekpe ɨshirɨ nene.
10.21: Œ lili adœke 'e sœ kœndjo œrœ dœ yashi nœ Gbozu œdœ ndje dœ œnœ ekpe ɨshirɨ nene. Œ lili adœke 'e zɨ œrœ pa ndaba kœzɨrœ nœ Gbozu œdœ ndje pa œnœ ekpe ɨshirɨ nene.
10.22: Too a yindœ kœɨvwɨ úkú nœ Gbozu ga lafo a? A sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœropa ye a? Œrœ kɔ sœ mbœrœ mokɔ nœ Ndjaba
10.23: «Endje papakata œrœ bale nene», kashe œ dœ́dœ́ œrœ kɔ dá ga nene. «Endje papakata œrœ bale nene», kashe œ dœ́dœ́ œrœ kɔ dá sœ kœmbœrœ adœke uzu gerœ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ ye nene.
10.24: Œ lili adœke uzu gbe kolœ dœ undu ye dœ tœ ye nene, kashe tshe gbe ndje dœ œnœ anga azu.
10.25: Œrœ kɔ á endje za yɔ œrœ ɓala wutu kœka songba agea, 'e zɨ, kashe 'e yuyu osho tœ ádánœ yeka á kœza oyo ga tœ lɔsu 'e nene.
10.26: Gbambanœ nene, ɔshɔ œdœ œrœ lœnœ kɔ kœdœ œnœ Gbozu.
10.27: Œdœ anga uzu á tshe yiyindœ Ndjaba nene kœ'e 'e, á 'e yindœ kœna ga ndœ ye, 'e zɨ œrœ kɔ á tshe to fœ 'e, yé 'e yuyu osho tœ ádánœ yeka á kœza oyo ga tœ lɔsu 'e nene.
10.28: Kashe œdœ anga uzu kœpa fœ 'e adœke: «Asœ kœdœ songba agea á endje to dœ tokóró fœ andjaba», 'e zɨzɨ nene, mangba uzunœ á tshe pandœ ádánœ fœ 'e, yé mbœrœ á kœzaza oyo ga tœ lɔsu nene.
10.29: Mœ sœsœ kœpa o'o ndœ lɔsu 'e nene, kashe ndœ œnœ uzunœ á tshe pa o'o nœ asœmœ. Kashe mbœrœ gaɗe á lɔsu anga angbɨ uzu œ wa mapaka pa œrœ á mœ li kœmbœrœ tœnœ a?
10.30: Œdœ mœ kœgi mershe fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ kœzɨrœ á mœ sœ kœzɨ tœnœ, mbœrœ gaɗe á endje yiangba mœ tœ œneke á mœ gi mershe fœ Ndjaba pa nœ a?
10.31: Œdœ 'e kœsœ kœzɨ œrœ, œdœ 'e kœsœ kœndjo œrœ, œdœ œrœ gaɗe á 'e yindœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ, 'e mbœrœ kɔ mbœrœ mokɔ nœ Ndjaba.
10.32: 'E mbœmbœrœ adœke uzu te mbœrœ 'e nene: œdœ Ayuda, œdœ Agreke, œdœ azu Ikrizia nœ Ndjaba.
10.33: 'E mbœrœtœ 'e ɓata œmœ: mœ sœ kœpa avwara tœ mœ dœ tœ mœ adœke mœ za yanga fœ azu kɔ lœ œrœ kɔ, mœ gbegbe kolœ dœ undu mœ dœ tœ mœ nene, kashe mœ gbe dœ œnœ ukpulu azu ndjoro mbœrœ adœke endje she.

11.1: 'E mbœrœtœ 'e liaka mœ ɓata á mœ sœ kœmbœrœtœ mœ liaka Kristu. Yakoshe œdœ yashe ɓa utshu Gbozu
11.2: Mœ sœ kœdonga 'e mbœrœ 'e sœ kœgbe dœ mœ lœ œrœ kɔ, yé 'e sœ kœgbɔndœ mara kœmbœrœtœ osho liaka œneke á mœ yi lima sœ nœ fœ 'e.
11.3: Andaa, mœ yindœ nœ adœke 'e wusœ neke: gbozu tshapa azu para kœdœ Kristu, gbozu tshapa yashe kœdœ yakoshe; gbozu tshapa Kristu kœdœ Ndjaba.
11.4: Yakoshe kɔ á tshe sœ kœza avwala too á tshe sœ kœgbara o'o ama Ndjaba á i kumu ye, gu œsœ gbozu nœ ye.
11.5: Kashe yashe kɔ á tshe sœ kœza avwala too á tshe sœ kœgbara o'o ama Ndjaba á i i kumu ye nene, gu œsœ gbozu nœ ye. Gbambanœ nene, œ sœ adja ɓata tshe lɨ sukumu ye pa ye.
11.6: Œdœ yashe kœi i kumu ye dœ siriki nene, tshe lɨ sukumu ye! Kashe œsœ tshula mbœrœ yashe kœlɨ sukumu ye too kœwa tshapanœ; œ li adœke tshe i kumu ye dœ siriki.
11.7: Œ lili adœke yakoshe i kumu ye dœ siriki nene; œshe kœdœ ɨshirɨ dœ pe mokɔ nœ Ndjaba. Kashe yashe kœdœ mokɔ nœ yakoshe.
11.8: Gbambanœ nene, œ dœ́dœ́ yakoshe dá to lœ yashe nene, kashe yashe dá to lœ yakoshe.
11.9: Yé Ndjaba mbœmbœrœ yakoshe mbœrœ yashe nene, kashe yashe dá tshe mbœrœ she mbœrœ yakoshe.
11.10: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œ li adœke yashe i kumu ye dœ siriki ndœ kœma ambárá tshagbozu nœ ye ɓa utshu aandjelu .
11.11: Andaa ɓa utshu Gbozu, yashe sœ mbœrœ yakoshe, yé yakoshe sœ mbœrœ yashe.
11.12: Gbambanœ nene, ataa yashe to lima lœ yakoshe gbaa, yashe dá zu yakoshe, yé kɔkɔ to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba.
11.13: 'E wa ngbanganœ dœ tœ 'e, œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke yashe kœsœ kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba, tshe i i kumu ye dœ siriki nene a?
11.14: Tshapashɔ dœ tœ ye yiyisœ œrœ fœ 'e adœke œ sœ dœ ekpenœ mbœrœ yakoshe kœsœ dœ ugu sukumu nene na a?
11.15: Tœnœ kœdœ mokɔ mbœrœ yashe, gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba to lima ugu sukumu fœ she tœ œsœ siriki.
11.16: Kashe œdœ uzu kœyindœ kœshara tœnœ, a'a œdœ azu Ikrizia nœ Ndjaba, 'a sœsœ dœ anga angbɨ mara kœsœ nene. Kœzɨrœ nœ Gbozu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.26-29; Mar 14.22-25; Luk 22.15-20)
11.17: Ɓata á mœ sœ kœmɨ upu fœ 'e, mœ sœsœ kœdonga 'e nene. Gbambanœ nene, angbɔtœ nœ 'e sœsœ kœgi 'e ga utshunœ nene, kashe œ sœ kœyi 'e ga lœ ekperœ.
11.18: Utshunœ kɔ, azu sœ kœpa fœ mœ adœke lɔkɔ á 'e sœ kœngbɔtœ 'e lœ angbɔtœ, 'e sœ kœkurutshelœtœ 'e ugurutœ 'e, yé mœ wu adœke anganœ, œtœnœ kœdœ adjapu.
11.19: Œ li adœke 'e kurutshelœtœ 'e ataa yeka á a kœwusœ endjeneke ugurutœ 'e á endje sœ kœshi gbɨ lœ kœwu lɔsunœ asœmœ.
11.20: Kashe, lɔkɔ á 'e sœ kœngbɔtœ 'e awa bale ndœ kœzɨrœ nœ Gbozu, œ dœ́dœ́ adja kœzɨrœ nœ Gbozu dá 'e sœ kœzɨ tœnœ nene.
11.21: Gbambanœ nene, dœ lɔkɔ kœzɨ œrœ, uzu dœ uzu sœ kœgbɔgbɔtœ ye ndœ kœzɨrœ nœ ye dœ tœ ye, dœ mara adœke anga uzu sœ dœ ogo, yé anga ndjo œrœ œ mbœrœ she.
11.22: Ataa, 'e sœsœ dœ anda ndœ kœzɨ œrœ dœ pe kœndjo œrœ nene a? Too 'e sœ kœtshene Ikrizia nœ Ndjaba yé œ yindœ kœgu endjeneke á endje gugu dœ œrœ nene a? O'o gaɗe á mœ kœpa fœ 'e a? Œ li adœke mœ donga 'e a? Bale nene, kpœpa o'onœ asœmœ, mœ sœsœ kœdonga 'e nene.
11.23: Yé, 'e wu œneke á mœ gbɔ ɓa ndœ Gbozu dá mœ sœ kœyisœ nœ fœ 'e asœ: Gbozu Yisu, lœ butshɔ á endje za lima she ga tshaabrœ azu asœmœ, tshe za mapa,
11.24: yé manda kœdonga Ndjaba, tshe kavwa tshelœnœ yé á pa adœke: «Asœke kœdœ undu mœ á sœ mbœrœ 'e, 'e mbœrœ atamœ mbœrœ kœgbe dœ mœ.»
11.25: Tshe mbœrœ awa bale ataa manda kœzɨrœ, œ za yashi á pa adœke: «Yashinœ asœke kœdœ tafo ayo lœ indji mœ, 'e mbœrœ ataa ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ á 'e kœsœ kœndjo tœnœ, mbœrœ kœgbe dœ mœ.»
11.26: Gbambanœ nene, ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ á 'e kœsœ kœzɨ mapa asœ dœ pe kœndjo vinu asœ, 'e sœ kœmɨndœ kuzu Gbozu œrrr ga tœ olo kœkwa she.
11.27: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, tsheneke á tshe sœ kœzɨ mapa too á tshe sœ kœndjo vinu nœ Gbozu dœ mara adœke tshe lɨlɨsœ ye nene, tshe gbɔ bala o'o mbœrœ undu œdœ indji Gbozu.
11.28: Uzu dœ uzu tondœtœ ye dœ tœ ye utshu nœ yeka á kœzɨ mapa œdœ kœndjo vinu asœ.
11.29: Gbambanœ nene, tsheneke á tshe zɨ yé á ndjo tœnœ, á wuwusœ ádánœ nene, sœ kœwa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ ye dœ tœ ye.
11.30: Wu mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, aayi koɓa dœ agbakɨndɨ sœ ugurutœ 'e ndjoro, yé anga endje ndjoro tshu ye.
11.31: Œdœ a kœsœ kœtondœtœ azœ dœ tœ azœ, Gbozu œ wa ngbanga ga tœ azœ nene.
11.32: Kashe Gbozu sœ kœwa ngbanga ga tœ azœ mbœrœ kœyɔrɔ azœ adœke endje kœwawa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ azœ œdœ azu nœ tshapashɔ nene.
11.33: Ataa, aaya mœ, lɔkɔ á 'e kœngbɔtœ 'e ndœ kœzɨ kœzɨrœ nœ Gbozu, 'e kate anga anga 'e.
11.34: Œdœ uzu kœsœ dœ ogo, tshe zɨ œrœ ɓa sœnda nœ ye mbœrœ adœke 'e kœgbogbota kœwa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga pa 'e lœ kœngbɔtœ 'e nene. Mbœrœ udu anga o'o, mœ guma dœ lɔkɔ á mœ na bala ga ndœ 'e.

12.1: Alaya, tœ upu nœ kœtorœ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, mœ yiyindœ nœ adœke 'e tshapu kœwusœ nœ nene.
12.2: 'E wusœ nœ adœke, lɔkɔ á 'e dœ́dœ́ lima ayindœ Yisu nene, 'e lili lima kœru lɔsu 'e nene kœna manda andjaba á endje sœsœ kœpa o'o nene.
12.3: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ fœ 'e adœke: uzu bale nene á tshe sœ dœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba, lili kœpa nene adœke: «Mœ darandœ Yisu» yé uzu bale nene lili kœpa nene adœke: «Yisu kœdœ Gbozu», œdœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ kœpapandœ nœ fœ she nene.
12.4: Tshelœ aka kœtorœ nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu ngba waa, kashe kolœ tshetœ Ɨshirɨnœ asœmœ kutu ye dá sœ kœkurutshelœ nœ.
12.5: Tshelœ aka kœmbœrœ akwa fœ Gbozu ngba waa, kashe a sœ kœmbœrœ kolœ fœ tshetœ Gbozu.
12.6: Tshelœ aka mara kœmbœrœ dœ akwa ngba waa, kashe kolœ Ndjaba tshebabale dá sœ kœza kɔ ga tœ akwa.
12.7: Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ sœ kœmatœ ye lœ uzu dœ uzu mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ nœ azu para.
12.8: Ɨshɨrɨ sœ kœto o'o nœ kœwusœtœ fœ anga uzu, yé tshetœ Ɨshirɨnœ asœmœ sœ kœto o'o nœ kœwusœrœ fœ anga.
12.9: Tshetœ Ɨshirɨnœ asœmœ sœ kœto egerœ kœyindœrœ fœ anga uzu, yé œ sœ kœto kœtorœ nœ kœshe azu lœ koɓa fœ anga.
12.10: Ɨshirɨ sœ kœto fœ anga uzu gbɔgbɔ nœ kœmbœrœ afá ndjoro; fœ anga, kœtorœ nœ kœgbara o'o; fœ anga uzu, kœtorœ nœ kœwusœ kœkurutshelœ ekpe ɨshirɨ dœ adja Ɨshɨrɨ; fœ anga uzu, kœtorœ nœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo ndjoro; yé fœ anga, kœtorœ nœ kœpandœ tshelœkata angbɨ o'o ama ogonœ.
12.11: Kashe œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ, kolœ tshetœ Ɨshirɨnœ á tshe sœ kœto mara kœtorœ ndjoro fœ uzu dœ uzu asœmœ, œ za tœnœ ga tœ akwa ɓata á tshe yindœ nœ. Undu uzu bale dœ œrœ kotœ ye ndjoro
12.12: Kristu sœ ɓata undu uzu á œrœ kotœnœ ngba waa, kashe œ ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ, yé œ wuta undu uzu bale.
12.13: Gbambanœ nene, azœ para, a gbɔ lima batisimu mbœrœ kœwuta undu bale lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ. Ayuda too Greke, akanga too akanga nene, kashe Ndjaba to Ɨshirɨ bale asœmœ ga lœ azœ kɔ.
12.14: Undu uzu bale sœsœ dœ œrœ kolœ bale nene, kashe dœ œrœ kotœnœ ndjoro.
12.15: Œdœ ada kœpa lima adœke: «Ɓata á mœ dœ́dœ́ kane nene, mœ dœ́dœ́ œrœ kotœ undu uzu nene», mbœrœ tœnœ ataa œ li má adœke tshe katœ kœsœ ga tœ undu uzu ye a?
12.16: Œdœ utu kœpa lima adœke: «Ɓata á mœ dœ́dœ́ ala nene, mœ dœ́dœ́ anga œrœ kotœ undu uzu nene», mbœrœ tœnœ ataa œ li má adœke tshe katœ kœsœ ga tœ undu uzu ye a?
12.17: Œdœ undu uzu djigi kœdœ lima ala ye, utu ye œ sœ má kpœta a? Œdœ undu uzu djigi kœdœ lima utu ye, ngawu œ sœ má kpœta a?
12.18: Kashe Ndjaba ko œrœ kotœ bale dœ bale ga tœ undu uzu dœ mara á tshe yindœ nœ.
12.19: Œdœ œrœ kotœ uzu kɔ kœsœ lima tshebale, ataa undu uzu œ sœ má koto o?
12.20: Dœ tœnœ ataa, œrœ kotœ undu uzu sœ ndjoro, kashe undu uzu sœ tshebale.
12.21: Ala lili kœpa fœ kane nene adœke: «Mœ gbegbe dœ ɓœ nene.» Yé kumu lili ndje ndœ kœpa fœ ada nene adœke: «Mœ gbegbe dœ 'e nene.»
12.22: Ga panœ, œrœ kotœ undu uzu á sœ ɓata œ gugu dœ gbɔgbɔ nene, sœ dœ ádá waa.
12.23: Yé œneke á a zaza dœ ádá nene, œtœnœ dá a sœ kœlɨsœ nœ. Œneke á sœ kœza tshula, a sœ kœgbɔndœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
12.24: Œneke á sœsœ kœza tshula fœ azœ nene, a sœsœ dœ ogo kœgbɔndœ nœ nene. Kashe Ndjaba mbœrœ undu uzu dœ mara adœke œrœ kotœnœ á gugu dœ ádá nene, endje lɨsœ nœ kœrosœ nœ:
12.25: ataa, undu uzu œ kurutshelœtœ ye nene, kashe œrœ kotœ kɔ sœ dœ gbetshelœ bale mbœrœ kœtɨ kane endje ugurutœ endje dœ anga endje.
12.26: Œdœ anga œrœ kotœ bale kœsœ dœ koɓa, undu uzu kɔ œ sœ dœ koɓa; œdœ endje kœlɨsœ anga œrœ kotœ bale, œrœ kotœ kɔ œ sœ dœ yanga awa bale dœ she.
12.27: Andaa, e'e kœdœ undu Kristu, yé uzu bale dœ bale ugurutœ 'e kœdœ anga œrœ kotœ bale nœ undunœ asœmœ.
12.28: Dœ tœnœ ataa dá Ndjaba kurutshelœ akwa kpikpikpi tœ azu lœ Ikrizia: utshunœ kœdœ aayi avwa, bishanœ kœdœ aayi kœgbara o'o yé votɔnœ kœdœ aayi kœyisœrœ. Manda nœ, tshe to kœtorœ nœ kœmbœrœ dœ afá, œnœ kœshe dœ aayi koɓa, œnœ kœtɨ kane osho, œnœ kœdœ gbozu tshapa akwa œdœ œnœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo.
12.29: Œ dœ́dœ́ endje kɔ dá dœ aayi avwa, aayi kœgbara o'o too aayi kœyisœrœ nene. Œ dœ́dœ́ endje kɔ dá sœ dœ kœtorœ nœ kœmbœrœ afá,
12.30: nœ kœshe dœ aayi koɓa, nœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo too nœ kœpa tshelœ katanœ nene.
12.31: Ataa, 'e sœ dœ egerœ agbe nœ kœtorœ á ga waa. Yé ga pa nœ, mœ yindœ kœyisœ awa nœ waa dœ waa á ropanœ kɔ fœ 'e.

13.1: Mœ li má kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo dœ pe œnœ aandjelu, kashe œdœ mœ kœgugu dœ kœyindœsho nene, œmœ kœdœ ngbongolo á sœ kœkɨ tœnœ too lenga á sœ kœkɨ klu klu klu.
13.2: Mœ li má kœsœ dœ kœtorœ nœ kœgbara o'o, œnœ kœwusœrœ nœ œrœ kɔ á zatœ ye yiwatœnœ dœ pe œnœ kœwusœrœ kɔ; mœ li má kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ djigi á li kœza kaga na tœnœ ga tœ anga osho, kashe œdœ mœ kœgugu dœ kœyindœsho nene, mœ sœ gbambanœ.
13.3: Mœ li má kœkurutshelœ œrœ nœ mœ kɔ tœ aayi ogo, mœ li má kœzatœ mœ adœke endje sho mœ dœ owo, kashe œdœ mœ kœgugu dœ kœyindœsho nene, mœ gbɔ œrœ bale nene.
13.4: Kœyindœsho kœdœ kœsœ dœ ugu lɔsu, tœnœ kœdœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ yanga zœ, œ sœsœ dœ úkú nene, œ sœsœ kœmatœ ye nene, œ sœsœ dœ egerœ kumu nene.
13.5: Kœyindœsho sœsœ kœmbœrœ œrœ tshula nene, œ sœsœ kœgbe kolœ dœ undu ye dœ tœ ye nene, œ sœsœ dœ oko nene, œ sœsœ dœ œ'ele nene.
13.6: Kœyindœsho sœsœ dœ yanga nœ ekperœ nene, kashe œ sœ dœ yanga lœ adjapu.
13.7: Kœyindœsho sœ kœru lɔsu tœ œrœ kɔ, œ sœ dœ kœyindœrœ lœ œrœ kɔ, œ sœ kœza lɔsu ga pa œrœ kɔ, œ sœ kœshi gbɨ lœ œrœ kɔ.
13.8: Kœyindœsho œ ka bale nene. Kashe kœgbara o'o œ kpa gu nene. Kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo œ ka ye. Kœwusœrœ œ kpa gu nene.
13.9: Gbambanœ nene, kœwusœrœ nœ azœ sœ dœ mapaka, yé kœgbara o'o nœ azœ sœsœ ga pa œrœ kɔ nene.
13.10: Kashe lɔkɔ á œrœ kɔ œ li bala, œneke á sœ dœ mapaka œ kpa gu nene.
13.11: Lɔkɔ á mœ sœ lima tœ gbolo, mœ sœ lima kœpa o'o ɓata gbolo, mœ sœ lima dœ gbetshelœ dœ pe kœwusœrœ ɓata gbolo. Lɔkɔ á mœ wuta gbozu, mœ katœ œrœ tshagbolo ye.
13.12: Ngɔngɔ asœke, a sœ kœwu ɨshirɨ ngbangbangba ala wushirɨ, kashe a wu bala tshatshu azœ dœ Ndjaba. Ngɔngɔ asœke, kœwusœrœ nœ mœ sœ dœ mapaka; yé dœ anga lɔndɔ bale, mœ wusœ Ndjaba ɓata á tshe wu ndje sœ mœ.
13.13: Ngɔngɔ asœke, œrœnœ asœmœ votɔ sœpe: kœyindœrœ, kœza lɔsu ga pa œrœ œdœ kœyindœsho; kashe kœyindœsho dá sœ tœ egerœnœ kœropanœ kɔ.

14.1: Utshunœ kɔ, 'e para kœyindœsho. 'E sœ dœ egerœ ogo ndœ kœgbɔ kœtorœ nœ Ɨshirɨ, kœropa nœ kɔ, œnœ kœgbara dœ o'o.
14.2: Gbambanœ nene, tsheneke á tshe sœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo, tshe sœsœ kœpa fœ azu nene, kashe tshe sœ kœpa fœ Ndjaba. Uzu bale œ dji tshelœ katanœ nene: lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ, tshe sœ kœpa tœ œrœ á a wuwusœ ádánœ nene.
14.3: Kashe tsheneke á tshe sœ kœgbara o'o sœ kœpa o'o fœ azu: tshe sœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu gboro lœ kœyindœrœ, tshe sœ kœto gbɔgbɔ fœ azu, yé œ sœ kœu endje ga tœnœ.
14.4: Tsheneke á tshe sœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo, tshe sœ kœmbœrœ adœke kolœ kœyindœrœ nœ œne kutɨ œne kœgerœ, kashe tsheneke á tshe sœ kœgbara o'o sœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu Ikrizia gboro lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje.
14.5: Mœ sœ kœyindœ nœ adœke e'e para kɔkɔ 'e pa angbɨ o'o ama ogo, kashe kœropa nœ kɔ, ogo nœ mœ kœdœ adœke 'e gbara o'o nœ Ndjaba. Uzu á tshe sœ kœgbara o'o nœ Ndjaba ropa tsheneke á tshe sœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo ye. Kashe tshe ropa ye nene œdœ uzu á tshe sœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo kœsœ dœ anga uzu á tshe wusœ kœpandœ ádánœ mbœrœ adœke azu Ikrizia gboro lœ kœyindœrœ.
14.6: Atamœ alaya, œ kœsœ adœke mœ kœna kœwu 'e yé á sœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo fœ 'e, mœ sœ dœ ádá ɓa ndœ 'e lœ œrœ gaɗe? Lœ œrœ bale nene. Mœ sœ dœ ádá ɓa ndœ 'e œdœ mœ kœpandœ o'o tœ upu nœ adjapu á zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ, tœ upu nœ kœwusœrœ, tœ upu nœ kœgbara o'o ama Ndjaba œdœ pe tœ upu nœ kœyisœrœ fœ 'e yekane.
14.7: Œ sœ ndje ataa tœ œrœ kœɓi dœ itshi, ɓata ngbake too kundi: œ kœsœsœ kœwa tshelœ itshinœ ngbɨ nene, ɓœ wusœ itshinœ á yindœ kœɓi tœnœ koto o?
14.8: Yé œdœ aga kœmama tshelœ ɨkɨnœ ngbɨɨ nene, œɗe dá guma tœ ye ndœ kœna ndœ koshe a?
14.9: E'e ndje, œdœ o'o á 'e kœsœ kœpa tœnœ kœsœsœ ngbɨ nene, azu œ dji tshelœkata œneke á 'e sœ kœpa tœnœ koto o? 'E pa o'o ga lœ yugu.
14.10: Mara o'o ama ogo ngba waa pa tshapashɔ, kashe anganœ bale á azu sœsœ kœdji ádánœ nene gugu nene.
14.11: Andaa, œdœ mœ kœsœsœ kœdji tshelœ kata angbɨ o'o ama ogo á uzu sœ kœpa tœnœ nene, mœ wu she ɓata gene, yé tshe wu ndje mœ ɓata gene.
14.12: E'e ndje awa bale, 'e sœ dœ egerœ ogo kœpara kœtorœ nœ Ɨshirɨ, kashe 'e para œneke á li adœke kœyindœrœ nœ azu Ikrizia gerœ.
14.13: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, uzu á tshe sœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo, œ li adœke tshe za avwala fœ Ndjaba á kœgbɔ kœtorœ nœ kœmɨndœ ádánœ.
14.14: Œdœ mœ kœsœ kœza avwala dœ angbɨ o'o ama ogo, Ɨshirɨ á sœ lœ mœ dá sœ kœmbœrœ akwa, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ kœwusœrœ nœ mœ nene.
14.15: Ataa, mœ mbœrœ koto o? Mœ za avwala lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ, kashe mœ za ndje avwala dœ mara nœ kœwusœrœ. Mœ ɓi itshi lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ, kashe mœ ɓi ndje itshi dœ mara nœ kœwusœrœ.
14.16: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ ɓœ kœsœ kœdonga Ndjaba kolœ lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ, uzu á tshe sœ kolœ kœdji o'onœ œ yindœ nœ adœke «Ame» kotoo ndœ avwala nœ kœgi mershe nœ zœ a? Gbambanœ nene, tshe djidji ndje ádá o'o á ɓœ sœ kœpa tœnœ nene.
14.17: Ataa avwala nœ kœgi mershe nœ zœ kœsœ dœ ádá waa ye gbaa, œ sœsœ kœmbœrœ adœke kœyindœrœ nœ anga uzu gerœ nene.
14.18: Mœ gi mershe fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ á mœ sœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo kœrosœ 'e kɔ.
14.19: Kashe lœ angbɔtœ, mœ sœ kœgbe kœpa o'o nœ kœwusœrœ mindu mbœrœ kœyi ndje sœ œrœ fœ anga azu tœ œsœnœ adœke mœ pa angbɨ o'o ama ogo kutu ndjokpa (10.000).
14.20: Alaya, 'e gbegbe o'o ɓata agbolo nene; lœ ekperœ, 'e sœ ɓata aaya agbolo, kashe 'e gbe o'o ɓata agbozu.
14.21: Endje su ɓala buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Gbozu pa adœke: “mœ pa o'o fœ azu nœ mœ lœ awa nœ angbɨ o'o ama ogo œdœ lœ awa nœ o'o ama agene.” Yé ataa atamœ gbaa, endje dji mœ nene.»
14.22: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo dœ́dœ́ ambárá mbœrœ ayindœ Ndjaba nene, kashe tœnœ kœdœ ambárá mbœrœ ayingba Ndjaba. Kœgbara o'o dœ́dœ́ ambárá mbœrœ ayingba Ndjaba nene, kashe œtœnœ kœdœ ambárá mbœrœ ayindœ Ndjaba.
14.23: Œdœ azu Ikrizia djigi kœngbɔtœ endje, yé á endje para sœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo, azu á endje sœ kœdjiidji gbambanœ too ayingba Ndjaba á endje li ga zœ, œ wu endje ɓa ta aayi iyi nene a?
14.24: Kashe œdœ azu para kœsœ kœgbara o'o, uzu á tshe dœ yingba Ndjaba too uzu á tshe djiidji gbambanœ yé á sœ kœli ga zœ, tshe wusœ ekperœ nœ ye yé œneke kɔ á tshe sœ kœdji tœnœ œ wa ngbanga nœ ye.
14.25: O'o á zatœ ye wutœnœ ɓa tœ lɔsu ye œ matœ endje ngbɨ ga shu. Tshe gote dœ kœfa tshatshu ye ga tœ ɔshɔ, yé œ donga Ndjaba dœ kœpa adœke: «Ndjaba sœ adja ugurutœ 'e!» Awa o'o ɓa lœ Ikrizia
14.26: Œrœ gaɗe dá a kœmbœrœ a, alaya? Lɔkɔ á 'e kœngbɔtœ 'e, uzu dœ uzu li ndœ kœɓi itshi, kœyisœ œrœ too kœpandœ adjapu á zatœ ye yiwatœnœ, kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo too kœpandœ ádánœ: œ li adœke œrœ ataa mbœrœtœ endje á kœyindœrœ nœ azu kœgerœ awa bale.
14.27: Œdœ azu kœtetœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo, œ li adœke azu bisha too votɔ kœropanœ pa ndje o'onœ asœmœ, uzu dœ uzu manda anga, yé anga uzu kœsœ kœpandœ ádánœ.
14.28: Œdœ uzu kœpandœ ádánœ kœgugu nene, ayi kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogonœ sœ koko lœ angbɔtœ yé œ pa o'o ga tœ ye dœ tœ ye œdœ fœ Ndjaba.
14.29: Tœ upu nœ kœgbara o'o, œ li adœke azu bisha too votɔ pa o'o yé anga endje kœwa o'onœ.
14.30: Œdœ anga uzu ugurutœ endje kœwusœ o'o á sœ kœto ɓa ndœ Ndjaba, œ li adœke tsheneke á tshe sœ kœpa o'o sœ koko.
14.31: E'e para, 'e li kœgbara o'o, kashe uzu dœ uzu pa œsœ œnœ ye mbœrœ adœke uzu kɔ kœwusœ œrœ, yé á kœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ.
14.32: Œ li adœke ayi kœgbara o'o dœ ayengɔ kœtorœ nœ kœgbara o'o nœ ɨshirɨ á sœ kœmbœrœ akwa lœ ye.
14.33: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba dœ́dœ́ Ndjaba nœ djingili nene, kashe œshe kœdœ Ndjaba nœ kœsœ gee. Ɓata á sœ kœmbœrœtœ endje lœ Ikrizia para nœ azu á endje sœ yerœ,
14.34: œ li adœke ayashe sœ koko lœ angbɔtœ: endje zaza awa fœ endje ndœ kœpapa o'o nene. Œ li adœke endje zatœ endje ga atɨ ɓata á awa akwa nœ Moyize sœ kœpa ndje tœ nœ.
14.35: Œdœ endje kœyindœ kœwusœ anga ádá o'o bale dœ bale, œ li adœke endje yu akɔ endje ɓa sœnda. Œ sœsœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene adœke yashe pa o'o lœ angbɔtœ.
14.36: 'E gbe adœke, o'o ama Ndjaba to ɓa ndœ 'e a? Œ na kolœnœ mbœrœ 'e a?
14.37: Œdœ uzu kœgbe adœke, œne kœdœ ayi kœgbara o'o too œne gbɔ Ɨshirɨ, œ li adœke tshe wusœ nœ adœke o'o á mœ su fœ 'e kœdœ awa o'o nœ Gbozu.
14.38: Œdœ uzu kœwuwusœ nœ nene, œ yindœ kœpa adœke Ndjaba wuwu ndje sœ ye nene.
14.39: Ataa, alaya mœ, 'e sœ dœ ogo nœ kœte aayi kœgbara o'o yé 'e papakata adœke endje pa angbɨ o'o ama ogo nene.
14.40: Kashe, 'e sœ dœ gbɔdjela adœke œrœnœ kɔ mbœrœtœ endje dœ ɔtshɔnœ œdœ pe dœ awanœ.

15.1: Alaya, mœ kpa yindœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o á mœ pa lima ndœ nœ fœ 'e, á 'e yi lima ndœ nœ, á 'e sœpe kœyindœ nœ œrrr kpesheke.
15.2: Œdœ 'e kœtepa nœ kperœ ɓata á mœ yisœ nœ fœ 'e, œ she 'e lœ awanœ ye. Œdœ 'e kœtete lima pa nœ kperœ nene, kœyindœrœ nœ 'e sœ má gbambanœ.
15.3: O'o nœ utshunœ kɔ kœdœ œneke á mœ gbɔ yé á mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e kœdœ adœke: Kristu tshu mbœrœ ekperœ nœ azœ, ɓata á endje sú lima ga la buku nœ Ndjaba.
15.4: Endje shi she, yé tœ votɔ olo, tshe she lœ ugurutœ akuzu, ɓata endje sú ɓala buku nœ Ndjaba.
15.5: Tshe wuta ga ndœ Petro, manda nœ ga ndœ Andjokpa dœ bisha (12).
15.6: Tshe kpa wuta ga ndœ ayambarœ nœ ye kœropa kama mindu (500), awa bale. Anga endje ndjoro ugurutœ endje sœpe dœ soro, kashe anga ata endje tshu ye.
15.7: Manda nœ, tshe kpa wuta ndje ga ndœ Jake, yé œ kpa wuta ga ndœ aayi avwa para.
15.8: Manda nœ para, tshe kpa wuta ga ndœ mœ ndje, œmœ á mœ sœ ɓata endje zu mœ tœ uzunœ.
15.9: Gbambanœ nene, œmœ kœdœ aya ayi avwa kœrosœnœ lœ ugurutœ aayi avwa para, œ lili adœke endje e mœ ayi avwa nene, mbœrœ mœ mbœrœ lima œrœ kanga fœ azu Ikrizia nœ Ndjaba.
15.10: Kashe lœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba dá mœ sœ ɓata á mœ sœ asœ. Ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ mœ sœsœ gbambanœ nene. Kashe mœ mbœrœ akwa kœrosœ endje para. Dœ adjapu, œ dœ́dœ́ mœ dá sœ kœmbœrœ akwa nene, kashe ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba dá sœ kœmbœrœ akwa lœ mœ.
15.11: Ataa, kœto ɓa ndœ mœ too ɓa ndœ anga aayi avwa, tœnœ kœdœ o'o kœshe nœ Yisu lœ akuzu á 'a mɨndœ nœ yé á 'e yindœ nœ. Kœshe lœ akuzu
15.12: Œdœ 'a kœsœ kœmɨndœ nœ adœke Kristu she lœ akuzu, mbœrœ gaɗe á anga azu ugurutœ 'e sœ kœpa adœke kœshe lœ akuzu gugu nene a?
15.13: Œdœ kœshe lœ akuzu kœgugu nene, Kristu sheshe ndje lœ akuzu nene,
15.14: œdœ Kristu kœsheshe lœ akuzu nene, kœpandœ o'o nœ 'a sœ gbambanœ, yé kœyindœrœ nœ 'e sœ ndje gbambanœ.
15.15: Œ sœ kœmatœ endje ɓata a'a kœdœ akpe atimu nœ Ndjaba, mbœrœ 'a pa wala kœyindœ nœ adœke Ndjaba she Kristu lœ akuzu andaa tshe sheshe she nene, œdœ œ kœsœ adjapu adœke akuzu œ she nene.
15.16: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ akuzu kœsheshe nene, Kristu sheshe ndje lœ akuzu nene.
15.17: Œdœ Kristu kœsheshe lœ akuzu nene, kœyindœrœ nœ 'e sœ gbambanœ, 'e sœpe damba lœ ekperœ nœ 'e.
15.18: Œ yindœ kœpa adœke, ataa endjeneke á endje tshu lœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Kristu, djingili ndje ye.
15.19: Œdœ œ kœsœ kolœ mbœrœ soronœ asœke dá a sœ kœza lɔsu azœ ga pa Kristu, azœ kœdœ aayi oyo kœropa azu para.
15.20: Kashe dœ adjapu, Kristu she lœ akuzu ye; tshe she lœ akuzu utshu endjeneke á endje tshu ɓalima ɓata ali ngwarœ á endje kɔ mbœrœ kœmɨndœ nœ adœke akuzu œ she bala lœ akuzu.
15.21: Ɓata á kuzu na lima lœ awa nœ uzu bale, kœshe lœ akuzu na ndje lœ awa nœ uzu bale:
15.22: ɓata azu para œ tshu lœ awa nœ Adamo, azu para œ gbɔ bala soro lœ awa nœ Kristu.
15.23: Kashe, uzu dœ uzu sœ dœ ɔlɔ nœ ye: Kristu dá sœ utshunœ, yé manda nœ kœdœ endjeneke á endje dœ azu nœ Kristu lɔkɔ á tshe kwa bala tœ ye.
15.24: Yé manda nœ kɔ, ndɔngɔlɔ osho œ na bala lɔkɔ á Kristu œ gi akwa nœ ogo tshagbozu fœ Aba azœ dœ Ndjaba manda kœndɨ tshelœ tshagbozu kɔ œdœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ɨshirɨ kɔ.
15.25: Gbamba nœ nene, œ li adœke Kristu mbœrœ akwa tshagbozu nœ ye œrrr ga tœ adœke Ndjaba fa ayingba ye ga tshada ye.
15.26: Ndɔngɔlɔ yingba á Ndjaba œ ndɨtshelœ ye kœdœ kuzu.
15.27: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Ndjaba ko œrœ kɔ ga tshakudu ada ye .» Kashe Ndjaba á tshe sœ kœko œrœ nœ kɔ ga tshakudu ada Kristu asœmœ, sœsœ lœ nœ nene.
15.28: Lɔkɔ á Ndjaba œ ko œrœ kɔ ga tshakudu ada Kristu, Gbolo nœ Ndjaba dœ tœ ye œ zatœ ye ga tshakudu Ndjaba á tshe ko œrœ kɔ ga tshakudu ada ye asœmœ. Ataa, Ndjaba œ dœ gbozu tshapa œrœ kɔ.
15.29: Œdœ œ kœsœ lima kpi, œrœ gaɗe dá azu á endje sœ kœgbɔ batisimu mbœrœ akuzu sœ lima kœpara tœ nœ a? Œ kœsœ adjapu adœke akuzu œ she lœ akuzu nene, mbœrœ gaɗe á azu sœ kœgbɔ batisimu mbœrœ endje a?
15.30: Yé a'a dœ tœ 'a, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'a sœ kœzatœ 'a ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ ga tœ œrœ á li kœndɨ 'a?
15.31: Alaya, ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ mœ sœ lœ kuzu. Œ sœ ndje adjapu adœke mœ sœ kœdu okoro mœ pa 'e mbœrœ á 'e ngbɔtœ 'e bale dœ Yisu Kristu á tshe dœ Gbozu nœ azœ.
15.32: Koshe á mœ nga ga tœ aagea ɓa lœ Efeze, œ mbœrœ má lima gaɗe ɓa ndœ mœ œdœ œ kœsœ má lima dœ mara kœtondœrœ nœ azu a? Œdœ akuzu kœsœsœ kœshe lœ akuzu nene, a zɨ œrœ œ ndjo œrœ, mbœrœ mbatsha a tshu ye.
15.33: 'E fafaratœ 'e nene: «Ekpe uzu á tshe na tœ awa dœ anga uzu, sœ kœndɨ ɔtshɔ tshasœmœ.»
15.34: 'E kwatœ 'e ndœ gbetshelœ nœ 'e ɓata á li, yé œ tshapu kœmbœrœ ekperœ! Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ kœpa o'onœ tœ œrœ tshula nœ 'e adœke anga azu ugurutœ 'e wuwusœ Ndjaba nene. Undu azu á endje she lœ akuzu
15.35: Kashe anga azu sœ kœyu osho adœke: «Dœ mara gaɗe á akuzu sœ kœshe lœ akuzu a? Endje sœ kœkwa dœ undu asœta a?»
15.36: Œɓœ kœdœ gbakɨndɨ! Œdœ ɓœ kœlu indji ngwarœ, œ tshu yeka á rœgo œ ko.
15.37: Yé œneke á ɓœ sœ kœlu tœnœ dœ́dœ́ dɔngɔ á sœ kœwuta tœnœ nene, kashe œtœnœ kœdœ djameya indji ngwarœ, indji ble too anga angbɨ œrœ.
15.38: Manda nœ, Ndjaba sœ kœmbœrœ adœke indji ngwarœ to undu fœ dɔngɔ ɓata á tshe yindœ nœ. Indji ngwarœ bale dœ bale sœ dœ ala dɔngɔ nœ ye dœ tœ ye.
15.39: Anga songba bale á liili dœ anganœ gugu nene: azu sœ dœ œne endje kpi, agea sœ dœ œne ndje kpi, ayanu sœ dœ œne endje kpi, ageatshalangu sœ ndje dœ œne endje kpi.
15.40: Œrœ tshalafo sœ zœ, yé œnœ tshapa ɔshɔ sœ ndje zœ, kashe kœtshinœ sœsœ awa bale nene.
15.41: Kœtshi ɔlɔ sœ kpi, kœtshi yapu sœ kpi, kœtshi angerepe sœ kpi. Angerepe ndje dœ tœ ye sœ kœtshi ndje kpi tœ anganœ.
15.42: Œsœ ndje ataa mbœrœ kœshe lœ akuzu nœ akuzu. Lɔkɔ á endje kœshi undu uzu, undu œ gba ye. Lɔkɔ á tshe kœshe lœ akuzu, tshe kpa tshu nene.
15.43: Lɔkɔ á endje kœshi undu uzu, œtœnœ kœdœ œrœ á gaga nene yé œ gugu dœ gbɔgbɔ nene. Lɔkɔ á œ kœshe lœ akuzu ye, œ sœ dœ mokɔ œdœ dœ gbɔgbɔ. Œ dœ undu uzu kœ sœ zœ,
15.44: Lɔkɔ á endje kœshi undu uzu, œtœnœ kœdœ amba undu uzu á sœ lima dœ soro. Lɔkɔ á œ kœshe lœ akuzu, œ fa undu uzu á sœ kœmbœrœ akwa lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ. Ataa, amba undu uzu á sœ dœ soro sœ zœ, yé undu uzu á sœ kœmbœrœ akwa lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ sœ ndje zœ.
15.45: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, endje sú ga la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Ali uzu lima, Adamo, fa lima uzu á tshe sœ dœ soro.» Kashe ndɔngɔlɔ Adamo kœdœ Ɨshirɨ á sœ kœza soro.
15.46: Œ dœ́dœ́ œneke á dœ Ɨshirɨ dá na utshunœ nene, kashe œneke á dœ amba undu uzu á sœ dœ soro. Œneke á sœ kœmbœrœ akwa lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ na manda nœ.
15.47: Ndjaba mbœrœ lima ali uzu dœ ɔshɔ. Bisha uzu to ɓa lafo.
15.48: Azu tshapa ɔshɔ liili dœ tsheneke á endje mbœrœ lima she dœ ɔshɔ, yé azu tshalafo liili ndje dœ uzu á tshe to ɓa lafo.
15.49: Yé awa bale a sœ ɓata ɨshirɨ uzu á endje mbœrœ she dœ ɔshɔ, awa bale ndje, a sœ ndje bala ɓata tœ ɨshirɨ uzu á tshe to ɓa lafo.
15.50: Alaya, 'e wu œneke á mœ yindœ kœpa tœnœ dœke: Œneke á to lœ songba œdœ lœ indji lili kœli ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba nene, yé œneke á gbaagba lili kœsœ awa bale dœ œneke á gba nene.
15.51: Mœ sœ ndœ kœma o'o neke á zatœ ye yiwatœnœ fœ 'e. A tshu kɔ nene, kashe a fa bala tœ azœ kɔ
15.52: ngbangi, dœ ɨkɨ aga ɓa tœ ndɔngɔlɔ osho. Gbambanœ nene, lɔkɔ á endje kœuru aga, akuzu œ she lœ kuzu dœ mara adœke endje kpa gba nene, yé azœ, a fatœ azœ bala ye.
15.53: Œ li adœke œneke á gbaagba fa tœ œrœ á gba nene, yé œneke á tshuutshu fatœ endje tœ œneke á tshu nene.
15.54: Ataa, lɔkɔ á œneke á gbaagba kœfa tœ œrœ á gba nene, yé œneke á tshuutshu kœfatœ endje tœ œneke á tshu nene, o'o ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba á mbœrœ bala tœ endje dœke: «Kuzu kpa gugu nene! Gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba ropa kuzu ye!»
15.55: «Kuzu, gbɔgbɔ nœ zœ sœ kpœta a? Kuzu, œrœ kowo kœwo dœ azu nœ zœ sœ kpœta a?»
15.56: Œrœ kowo nœ kuzu kœdœ ekperœ, yé gbɔgbɔ nœ ekperœ kœdœ awa akwa.
15.57: Kashe a donga Ndjaba á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ adœke a ropa ekperœ œdœ kuzu lœ awa nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu!
15.58: Ataa, alaya á mœ yindœ 'e waa, 'e shi gbɨ, 'e tuturutœ 'e nene, 'e zatœ 'e ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ ndœ akwa nœ Gbozu, mbœrœ á 'e wusœ nœ adœke ɔgbɔ akwa á 'e sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ sœsœ gbambanœ lœ akwa nœ Gbozu nene.

16.1: Tœ upu nœ kœngbɔɓa ngendja mbœrœ azu nœ Ndjaba ɓa lœ Yerusaleme, 'e mbœrœtœ 'e lindœ awa o'o á mœ za fœ azu Ikrizia kɔ ɓa lœ Galate.
16.2: Ali olo lœ pɔsɔ bale dœ bale, uzu dœ uzu œ ko ngendja á tshe gbɔndœ nœ ga ɨndɨrɨnœ mbœrœ adœke endje kpa kœkakate adœke mœ na yeka á endje kœngbɔɓa nene.
16.3: Lɔkɔ á mœ kœwuta ga zœ, mœ vwa endjeneke á 'e ke endje dœ mbeti adœke endje na dœ kœtorœ nœ 'e fœ azu Ikrizia ɓa lœ Yerusaleme.
16.4: Œ kœli adœke mœ na ga zœ dœ tœ mœ, endje na tœ awanœ bale dœ mœ. Kœgumatœsho ndœ ana gene
16.5: Mœ na ga ndœ 'e manda kœro tɔ lœ Masedwane; gbambanœ nene, œ li adœke mœ vwanga djaga zœ.
16.6: Mœ sœ kœwu adœke œndœ mœ ɨdɨ teasho kpœndœ 'e zœ, anganœ yapu nœ ɨzɨ djigi œ ro ye, mbœrœ á 'e kœtɨ kane mœ lœ udu ana gene nœ mœ.
16.7: Mœ yiyindœ kœwu 'e ndara kolœ lafo nene, œdœ Gbozu kœyindœ nœ, mœ gbe ndœ kœlo kpœtœ manda olo ndjoro.
16.8: Kashe mœ sœ lœ Efeze œrrr ga tœ olo nœ Patekɔte.
16.9: Gbambanœ nene, manda kɔrɔ kpœmœ dœ egerœnœ adœke mœ mbœrœ akwa nœ mœ ye, ataa ayingba sœ ndjoro gbaa.
16.10: Œdœ Timote kœna, 'e mbœrœ adœke tshe sœsœ dœ awa ugurutœ 'e nene, mbœrœ tshe sœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ Gbozu ɓata mœ.
16.11: Uzu bale vwavwaratœ ye tœ Timote nene. 'E tɨ kane ye ga lafo adœke tshe gu dœ kœsœ gee ga ndœ mœ, mbœrœ mœ sœ kœkate she dœ aaya lœ kœyindœrœ.
16.12: Tœ upu nœ aya azœ dœ Apolo, mœ sœ kœto gbɔgbɔ fœ she adœke tshe ro ga ndœ 'e, œshe dœ aaya lœ kœyindœrœ, kashe tshe yiyindœ kœna ngɔngɔnœ asœ nene. Tshe na ga zœ œdœ tshe kœgbɔ awa. Ndɔngɔlɔ o'o dœpe abala
16.13: Ala 'e gbɔ, 'e shi gbɨ lœ kœyindœrœ, 'e sœ tœ ayakoshe, 'e sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ.
16.15: Aaya lœ kœyindœrœ, anga o'o bale á kpa sœ mbœrœ 'e dœke: 'e wusœ nœ adœke Esetefanase dœ azu tshelœ bɨngɨ nœ ye kœdœ azu á endje yindœ Ndjaba utshunœ ɓa lœ Akayi; endje zatœ endje djigi ndœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ azu nœ Ndjaba.
16.16: Ataa, 'e mbœrœtœ 'e lindœ o'o mara azu ataa œdœ fœ endjeneke kɔ á endje sœ kœmbœrœ ɔgbɔ akwa awa bale dœ endje.
16.17: Mœ sœ dœ yanga ndœ kœwu Esetefanase, Fortunatuse dœ pe Akayikuse. Lɔkɔ á mœ wu endje, œsœ ɓata mœ wu 'e para.
16.18: Gbambanœ nene, endje mbœrœ adœke lɔsu mœ œdœ œnœ 'e sœ zɨtɨ. 'E wusœ kœlɨsœ mara azu ataa.
16.19: Azu lœ Ikrizia kɔ ɓa lœ Azi vwa abala fœ 'e. Akilase, Prisika œdœ pe azu Ikrizia á endje sœ kœngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ ɓa ndœ endje, vwa abala fœ 'e lœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu.
16.20: Alaya para kɔkɔ lœ kœyindœrœ bala 'e. 'E za œyerœ abala lœ ugurutœ 'e.
16.21: Œmœ Polo, mœ bala 'e, mœ su abala asœ dœ adja kane mœ dœ tœ mœ.
16.22: Œdœ uzu kœyiyindœ Gbozu nene, endje darandœ ye. Maranata !
16.23: Kaka ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Gbozu Yisu sœ dœ 'e.
16.24: Mœ yindœ 'e kɔ lœ kœngbɔtœ 'e bale dœ Yisu Kristu.

1.1: Œmœ Polo, Ndjaba e mœ lindœ gbetshelœ nœ ye adœke mœ te ayi avwa nœ Yisu Kristu. A'a dœ aya azœ dœ Timote dá su mbetinœ asœke fœ 'e dœ azu Ikrizia nœ Ndjaba ɓa lœ Koriti œdœ fœ ayerœ azu nœ Ndjaba kɔ ɓa lœ ogo Akayi djigi.
1.2: Kaka adœke Aba azœ dœ Ndjaba œdœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ 'e yé œ za kœsœ gee fœ 'e. Polo gi mershe fœ Ndjaba
1.3: A donga Ndjaba, Aba Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu, Aba á tshe sœ dœ lɔsu nœ kœwu oyo yé á dœ Ndjaba á tshe sœ kœto gbɔgbɔ fœ azœ dœ mara kɔ.
1.4: Tshe sœ kœto gbɔgbɔ fœ azœ lœ oyo nœ azœ kɔ mbœrœ adœke a li kœto ndje gbɔgbɔ á a gbɔ dœ tœ azœ ɓa ndœ Ndjaba fœ endjeneke á endje sœ lœ oyo.
1.5: Gbambanœ nene, ɓata á a ngbɔtœ azœ awa bale dœ Kristu lœ kœwu œrœ kanga nœ ye asœmœ, Ndjaba œ to ndje egerœ gbɔgbɔ fœ azœ lœ awa nœ Kristu.
1.6: Yé œdœ 'a kœsœ kœwu oyo, œ sœ mbœrœ adœke 'e gbɔ gbɔgbɔ œdœ kœshe. Œdœ 'a kœgbɔ gbɔgbɔ, œ sœ mbœrœ adœke 'e gbɔ gbɔgbɔ á mbœrœ adœke 'e shi gbɨ dœ ugu lɔsu lœ tshetœ oyo nœ 'a ndje á 'a sœ kœwu tœnœ.
1.7: Ataa, 'a ko lɔsu 'a djigi ga pa 'e. Gbambanœ nene, 'a wusœ nœ adœke ɓata á 'e wu oyo awa bale dœ 'a asœmœ, Ndjaba œ to ndje gbɔgbɔ á tshe to ndje fœ 'a asœmœ fœ 'e.
1.8: Alaya 'a, 'a yindœ nœ adœke 'e wusœ mara oyo á 'a wu ɓa lœ ogo Azi: kɨkɨlɨ oyo ro lima pa 'a ye, 'a lili lima kœru lɔsu 'a nene yé 'a kpa gbegbe lima adœke 'a sœ dœ soro nene.
1.9: Dœ adjapu, 'a sœ lima kœwu adœke endje wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga nœ kuzu ga tœ 'a. Œ mbœrœtœ ye lima ataa mbœrœ á 'a kœzaza lɔsu 'a ga tœ 'a dœ tœ 'a nene, kashe kolœ fœ Ndjaba á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœshe azu lœ kuzu.
1.10: Œshe dá she 'a lœ mara kuzu asœmœ, tshe kpa she 'a bala zœ. Dœ adjapu, 'a ko lɔsu 'a ga tœ ye adœke tshe kpa she 'a zœ.
1.11: E'e ndje, 'e sœ kœtɨ kane 'a ga lafo lœ awa nœ avwala nœ 'e. Ataa, Ndjaba œ ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu mangba avwala á azu ndjoro za tœ upu nœ 'a, tshe to bala ɔtshɔrœnœ asœmœ fœ 'a yé azu ndjoro œ gi bala mershe fœ she tœ upu nœ 'a. Polo fa gbetshelœ nœ ye lœ ana gene
1.12: Œrœ á a sœ kœzatœ azœ dœ yanga tœnœ dœke: ɓata á lɔsu 'a sœ kœma tœnœ, mara kœmbœrœtœ 'a pa tshapashɔnœ œdœ mara kœmbœrœtœ 'a ga ndœ 'e, 'a sœ kœmbœrœ dœ ɔmɔ lɔsu œdœ dœ adjapu nœ Ndjaba, 'a mbœmbœrœ dœ kœwusœtœ nœ azu nene, kashe 'a mbœrœ lœ awa nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba.
1.13: Yé ɓala mbeti nœ 'a, 'a su kolœ œneke á 'e sœ kœdɨ tœnœ yé á sœ kœwusœ ádánœ. Kashe mœ wu adœke 'e wu bala sœ ádá œneke dœ ɔtshɔnœ,
1.14: mbœrœ 'e wu kolœ sœ tshakalanœ: 'a dœ bala yanga nœ 'e ɓata e'e ndje, 'e dœ bala œnœ 'a dœ olo kœkwa Gbozu Yisu.
1.15: Yé lœ kœko lɔsu mœ asœmœ, mœ gbe lima kœna ga ndœ 'e utshunœ mbœrœ adœke Ndjaba to bisha ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye fœ 'e.
1.16: Mœ yi lima ndœ kœna ɓa ndœ 'e, manda nœ á kœro ga lœ Masedwane. Lɔkɔ á mœ katœ Masedwane tɨ, mœ kwatœ mœ ga ndœ 'e mbœrœ adœke 'e tɨ kane mœ lœ ana nœ mœ ga lœ ogo Yuda.
1.17: Lɔkɔ á mœ pa fœ 'e adœke mœ mbœrœ ataa, mœ pa o'o bisha lœ ama mœ a? Lɔkɔ á mœ kœka ga pa œneke á mœ yindœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ, mœ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ ɓata azu tshapashɔ dœ kœpa pa tshetœ œrœ adœke «œ̃» œdœ «œ̃œ̃» a?
1.18: Ndjaba kœdœ timu nœ mœ tœ œneke á mœ pa lima fœ 'e, mœ papa fœ 'e «œ̃» œdœ «œ̃œ̃» pa tshetœ œrœ bale nene.
1.19: Gbambanœ nene, Yisu Kristu, Gbolo nœ Ndjaba á 'a mɨndœ ye fœ 'e: Silve, Timote œdœ œmœ, papa «œ̃» œdœ «œ̃œ̃» pa tshetœ œrœ bale nene. Kashe, œshe kœdœ kolœ «œ̃».
1.20: Yé œshe kœdœ «œ̃» á sœ kœma œneke á Ndjaba pa tœnœ. Lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu dá 'a sœ kœpa «Ame» mbœrœ kœza mokɔ fœ Ndjaba.
1.21: Yé Ndjaba dœ tœ ye dá sœ kœtepa azœ dœ 'e ngbɨrɨ lœ kœngbɔtœ azœ dœ Kristu. Ndjaba dá sœ kœke azœ dœ tœ ye.
1.22: Tshe ta ambara á sœ kœma adœke azœ kœdœ agbolo nœ ye ga tœ azœ, yé œ to Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ ga lɔsu azœ ɓata ɔtshɔrœ á tshe gbɔndœ nœ fœ azœ.
1.23: Mœ za Ndjaba tœ timu œdœ mœ kœsœ kœpa wala, tshe wo mœ ye: œ sœ mbœrœ kœgbɔndœ 'e dá mœ wa adœke mœ kwatœ mœ ga lœ Koriti nene.
1.24: 'A sœsœ kœpara awa kœza œneke á li dœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e dœ ɔgbɔ fœ 'e nene, kashe 'a gbe ndœ kœte ga ndœ yanga nœ 'e mbœrœ á 'e zatœ 'e dœ ɔtshɔnœ lœ kœyindœrœ.

2.1: Tœ mœ nœ mœ, mœ wa adœke mœ kwatœ mœ ga ndœ 'e mbœrœ á kpa kœza oyo fœ 'e nene.
2.2: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ mœ kœza oyo fœ 'e, eɗe dá za yanga fœ mœ a? Œ dœ́dœ́ uzunœ á mœ za oyo fœ she asœmœ nene a?
2.3: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa dá mœ su mbetinœ asœ fœ 'e kparawa adœke lɔkɔ á mœ kœwuta ɓa zœ, azu á sœ má adœke endje za yanga fœ mœ kœzaza oyo fœ mœ nene. Andaa mœ wusœ 'e kɔ, mœ wusœ nœ adœke œdœ mœ kœsœ dœ yanga, e'e ndje kɔ 'e sœ dœ yanga.
2.4: Lɔkɔ á mœ su mbetinœ asœmœ fœ 'e, mœ sœ lima dœ oyo œdœ dœ gbetshelœ waa œrrr ga tœ ɨkɨ. Mœ susu mbetinœ mbœrœ kœza oyo fœ 'e nene, kashe mœ su mbœrœ 'e wusœ nœ adœke mœ yindœ 'e kœrosœ nœ. Kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ anga azœ
2.5: Œdœ uzu kœmbœrœ œrœ oyo fœ mœ, œ dœ́dœ́ kolœ fœ mœ kutɨ mœ dá tshe mbœrœ fœ mœ nene, kashe mbœrœ 'e kɔ yé a papa tœ œsœ nœ kœropanœ nene.
2.6: Mbœrœ mara uzu ataa, œ li adœke azu ndjoro ugurutœ 'e gbagbara she.
2.7: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, ngɔngɔnœ asœke, œ li adœke 'e ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu yé œ to gbɔgbɔ fœ she kparawa adœke tshe sœsœ kolœ lœ egerœ oyo waa nene.
2.8: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke, 'e ma kœyindœsho nœ 'e ga ndœ ye.
2.9: Gbambanœ nene, ádánœ á mœ su mbetinœ fœ 'e dœke: mœ yi má ndœ kœwu lɔsu 'e œdœ 'e kœsœ kœmbœrœtœ 'e djigi lindœ o'o ama mœ.
2.10: Œdœ 'e kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ uzu, mœ djerœ ndje ndœ nœ ye. Yé œdœ mœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ ye dœ mara ɓata á mœ mbœrœ asœmœ, mœ mbœrœ mbœrœ 'e ɓa utshu Kristu,
2.11: mbœrœ adœke Satana kœgbɔgbɔ awa kœfara azœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, a wusœ gbetshelœ nœ ye dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Polo ɓa lakpɨ Trowase
2.12: Lɔkɔ á mœ wuta ɓa lœ Trowase mbœrœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Kristu, mœ wu adœke Gbozu za lima ɔtshɔ awa á li fœ mœ adœke mœ pandœ nœ.
2.13: Andaa, mœ sœ lima dœ awa waa mbœrœ á mœ gbɔgbɔ lima aya mœ dœ Tito nene. Mœ ka lima tœ azu Trowase tɨ yé á ro ga lœ Masedwane. Kœropa koshe mbœrœ Kristu
2.14: A donga Ndjaba mbœrœ á tshe gi azœ na tœnœ adœke a ropa koshe lœ awa nœ Kristu, yé á sœ kœmbœrœ adœke tshafu yombo nœ kœwusœ ye za osho djigi lœ awa nœ azœ.
2.15: Yé azœ kœdœ yombo nœ Kristu á tshafunœ ga waa á tshe to fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ endjeneke á endje she œdœ endjeneke á endje sœ lœ djingili.
2.16: Mbœrœ anga azu, œtœnœ kœdœ tshafu kuzu á sœ kœyi osho ga lœ kuzu; mbœrœ anga endje, œtœnœ kœdœ tshafu soro á sœ kœyi osho ga lœ soro. Yé eɗe dá li kœmbœrœ mara akwanœ ata a?
2.17: 'A sœsœ ɓata anga azu á endje za o'o ama Ndjaba tœ kœyɔrœ nene, kashe mbœrœ á Ndjaba dá vwa 'a, 'a sœ kœpa dœ adjapu ɓa utshu ye lœ kœngbɔtœ 'a awa bale dœ Kristu.

3.1: 'A kpa donga tœ 'a dœ tœ 'a a? Too 'a gbe kœmbœrœ ɓata anga azu adœke 'a ma mbeti á endje donga 'a alanœ fœ 'e too 'a yɔshondœ nœ ɓa ndœ e'e a?
3.2: Mbeti nœ 'a kœdœ e'e, mbeti á endje sú ga lɔsu 'a á azu kɔ wusœ nœ ye á dɨ.
3.3: Œ sœ adjapu adœke, e'e kœdœ mbeti á Kristu su yé 'a sœ kœgbɔndœ nœ. Mbetinœ asœmœ, tshe susu dœ tadja nene kashe tshe su dœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba nœ soro; tshe susu tœnœ ga pa ndaba tame nene, kashe tshe su ga pa ndaba songba ɓa tœ lɔsu 'e.
3.4: 'A sœ kœpa ataa gbambanœ nene, 'a za lɔsu 'a ga pa Ndjaba lœ awa nœ Kristu.
3.5: 'A wusœ nœ adœke 'a lili kœmbœrœ ataa dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ 'a dœ tœ 'a nene, kashe gbɔgbɔ nœ 'a to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba.
3.6: Œshe dá to gbɔgbɔ fœ 'a adœke 'a wuta aayi akwa tœ upu nœ kœmɨndœ tafo ayo. Tafo ayonœ asœmœ dœ́dœ́ awa akwa á endje sú nene, kashe Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ dá sœ kœyisœ awa fœ 'a. Awa akwa á endje sú sœ kœyi azu ga lœ kuzu utshu Ndjaba, kashe Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ sœ kœto soro.
3.7: Ndjaba su lima akwa nœ kuzu dœ mbeti ga pa tame yé mokɔ nœ ye sœ lima kœtshi panœ. Tshatshu Moyize sœ lima kœtshi tœnœ dœ mara adœke azu Israyele li kœtondœ ye nene, andaa œndœ kœtshi tœnœ dɨdɨ lima nene.
3.8: Ataa, akwa neke á Ɨshirɨ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ œ sœ dœ mokɔ tɔpanœ kpuru nene a?
3.9: Yé œdœ akwa á sœ lima kœyi azu ga lœ kuzu kœsœ dœ mokɔ, œneke á sœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu sœ ndjii ɓa utshu Ndjaba œ sœ dœ mokɔ tɔpanœ kpuru ye!
3.10: A li kœpa ndje adœke mokɔ á sœ lima kœtshi tœnœ katshatsha, œ djerœwa ɓa utshu mokɔ neke á ropanœ ngɔngɔ asœke.
3.11: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ œneke á œndœnœ dɨdɨ lima nene kœsœ dœ mokɔ, œnœ œneke á sœ waa dœ waa œ sœ koto o?
3.12: Ɓata á 'a sœ kœko lɔsu 'a ga tœ adja o'onœ asœmœ ataa, 'a yindœ nœ dœ lɔsu 'a.
3.13: 'A sœsœ kœmbœrœ ɓata Moyize á tshe za lima siriki tshu ga utshu ye mbœrœ adœke agbolo Israyele kœwuwu mara á kœtshinœ, á œndœnœ dɨdɨ nene asœmœ, œ yiwa dœ tœnœ nene.
3.14: Kashe kœwusœrœ nœ endje sœ lima lœ ubu osho! Yé œrrr ga tœ olo asœke, tshetœ sirikinœ asœmœ sœ zœ lɔkɔ á endje kœsœ kœdɨ buku nœ ongboro ayo. Kolœ lœ awa nœ Kristu dá sirikinœ asœmœ œ yiwa.
3.15: Dœ adjapu, œrrr kpesheke nœ asœ, lɔkɔ bale dœ bale á endje kœsœ kœdɨ buku nœ Moyize, siriki sœ ɓa lɔsu endje.
3.16: Œ sœ kolœ lœ awa nœ kœfatshalɔsu ga ndœ Gbozu dá sirikinœ œ te.
3.17: Gbambanœ nene, Gbozu kœdœ Ɨshirɨ. Yé osho á Ɨshɨrɨ nœ Gbozu sœ tœnœ, œtœnœ kœdœ osho á azu dœ́dœ́ akanga nene.
3.18: Azœ kɔ a gi siriki tshatshu azœ ye, a ma mokɔ nœ Gbozu. Ataa, a fatœ azœ mbœrœ kœsœ awa bale ɓata Gbozu dœ mokɔ á sœ kolœ tœ egerœnœ lœ awa nœ ye á tshe dœ Ɨshirɨ.

4.1: Ɓata á Ndjaba wu oyo 'a yé á za akwanœ asœke fœ 'a, 'a mɔmɔ lœ ɔkɔ 'a nene.
4.2: 'A vwaratœ 'a tœ œrœ nœ tshula kɔ á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ, 'a sœsœ kœmbœrœ œrœ dœ afara nene yé œ sœsœ ndje kœfatshelœ o'o ama Ndjaba nene. Kashe 'a sœ kœyisœ adjapu ngbɨ, yé œ sœ kœpara awa adœke azu kɔ yindœ 'a ɓa utshu Ndjaba.
4.3: Andaa, œdœ Ɔtshɔ O'o á 'a sœ kœmɨndœ nœ kœsœsœ ngbɨ nene, œ sœ kolœ mbœrœ azu á endje sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ nene.
4.4: Endje sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ nene mbœrœ ndjaba nœ tshapashɔ asœke, bu ala endje dœ kœwusœrœ nœ endje ga tœnœ ye. Tshe sœ kœpakata endje adœke endje wu ɨshirɨ osho á Ɔtshɔ O'o tœ upu nœ mokɔ nœ Kristu á tshe dœ ɨshirɨ Ndjaba, sœ kœmɨndœ nœ.
4.5: 'A yiyisœ œrœ tœ 'a dœ tœ 'a nene, kashe á sœ kœyisœ œrœ tœ upu nœ Gbozu Yisu Kristu. Tœ a'a nœ 'a, 'a sœ kœpa ngbɨ adœke a'a kœdœ aayi akwa nœ 'e mangba Yisu.
4.6: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba á tshe pa lima adœke: «Kaka adœke ɨshirɨ osho tshi ɓa ugurutœ ubu osho narɨ!» Œshe dœ tœ ye dá tshi ɓa tœ lɔsu 'a mbœrœ kœto kœwusœrœ lœ mokɔ nœ ye á matœ ye ɓa tshatshu Kristu.
4.7: Kashe a'a dá Ndjaba za kœgbɔrœnœ asœmœ fœ 'a, yé á sœ kœgbɔndœ nœ ɓa lœ lɔsú. 'A sœ kœyisœ nœ adœke gbɔgbɔnœ á rosœ nœ asœmœ to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba, kashe œ toto ɓa ndœ a'a nene.
4.8: 'A sœ kœwu tshelœ áká oyo ngbangbangba kashe œ roropa 'a nene; 'a sœ dœ awa tœ lɔsu 'a, kashe 'a gigi lɔsu 'a tœ Ndjaba nene.
4.9: Azu mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ 'a, kashe Ndjaba kakatœ 'a nene. Endje ko 'a vesho, kashe 'a tshutshu nene.
4.10: Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, 'a sœ dœ koɓa kuzu nœ Yisu lœ ɔkɔ 'a mbœrœ adœke soro nœ ye yi ndje tœ ye ga lœ ɔkɔ 'a.
4.11: Lœ soro nœ 'a djigi, 'a sœ lœma kuzu mangba Yisu, mbœrœ adœke soro nœ ye li ndje ga lœ undu 'a œnœ kuzu.
4.12: Ataa, kuzu sœ kœli dœ akwa ga lœ 'a, kashe 'e sœ kœgbɔ soro.
4.13: Endje sú ɓa la Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Mœ sœ dœ kœyindœrœ mbœrœ tœnœ á mœ pa o'o.» A'a ndje lœ tshetœ gbetshelœ nœ kœyindœrœ asœmœ, 'a sœ dœ kœyindœrœ yé mbœrœ tœnœ dá 'a sœ kœpa o'o.
4.14: Gbambanœ nene, 'a wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba á tshe she Gbozu Yisu lœ akuzu, tshe she ndje azœ awa bale dœ Yisu yé œ ko 'a dœ 'e ga ɨndɨrɨ ye.
4.15: Œneke kɔ á 'a sœ kœshi gbɨ lœ nœ, œ sœ mbœrœ 'e mbœrœ adœke azu sœ kœli ga panœ ga panœ ga lœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba. Ataa, azu œ ngba mbœrœ kœgi mershe œdœ mbœrœ kœdonga mokɔ nœ Ndjaba. Soro lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ
4.16: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'a mɔmɔ nene. Ataa œdœ soro nœ 'a œnœ azu kœsœ kœmɔ tœnœ yima yima, soro nœ 'a œnœ ɨshirɨ sœ kœkwa tœnœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ.
4.17: Gbambanœ nene, oyo á 'a sœ kœwu tœnœ manda olo teasho, œ sœ kœguma mokɔ neke á sœ waa dœ waa yé á gerœ kœropanœ, fœ azœ.
4.18: 'A koko lɔsu 'a nene ga pa œrœ á a wu, kashe 'a ko lɔsu 'a ga pa œneke á a wuwu nene. Gbambanœ nene, œndœ œrœ á a wu dɨdɨ nene, kashe œndœ œneke á a wuwu nene sœ kœdɨ tœnœ waa dœ waa.

5.1: Gbambanœ nene, a wusœ nœ adœke œdœ undu azœ œnœ ɔshɔ asœke á sœ ɓata anda tande kœndɨ, a sœ dœ anga anda á Ndjaba mɔ á sœ waa dœ waa ɓa lafo. Œ dœ́dœ́ azu dá mɔ andanœ asœmœ dœ kane endje nene.
5.2: Ngɔngɔ asœke, a sœ kœpulœma azœ mbœrœ á a sœ dœ egerœ ogo adœke a li ga lœ anda œnœ tshalafo.
5.3: Œ mbœrœtœ endje kolœnœ adœke a sœ dœ lœba tœ azœ yé a sœsœ kpendronœ nene.
5.4: Adjapu, ɓata á a sœpe damba lœ anda tandenœ asœmœ, a pulœma zœ ɓata a gbɔ upu. Œ sœsœ adœke a yindœ kœ'eatœ azœ tœ ɔkɔ azœ œnœ tshapashɔ nene, a yindœ kœverœ tafo ɔkɔ azœ œnœ tshalafo ga panœ mbœrœ adœke œneke á tshuutshu, fa tœ œneke á tshu nene.
5.5: Tsheneke á tshe guma azœ mbœrœ tshambatshanœ asœmœ, kœdœ Ndjaba. Tshe za Ɨshirɨ nœ ye fœ azœ tœ ndanga nœ ɔtshɔrœ á tshe gbɔndœ nœ fœ azœ ɓa lafo.
5.6: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, a su kolœnœ dœ kœyindœrœ tœ lɔsu azœ. A wusœ nœ adœke ɓata á a sœpe damba lœ ɔkɔnœ asœke, a sœ ɓa ushu tœ anda nœ azœ, lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ tœ Gbozu.
5.7: Gbambanœ nene, a sœ kœro manda kœyindœrœ kashe œ dœ́dœ́ manda œneke á a sœ kœwu dœ ala azœ nene.
5.8: Adjapu, a su dœ kœyindœrœ tœ lɔsu azœ yé a gbe kœkatœ anda œnœ ɔkɔ azœ asœke mbœrœ kœna kœsœ ndoo dœ Gbozu.
5.9: Kashe ataa œdœ a kœsœ lœ ɔkɔ asœke too a kœgitœ azœ lœnœ, ogo nœ azœ utshunœ kɔ kœdœ adœke a za yanga fœ she.
5.10: Gbambanœ nene, œ li adœke azœ kɔ a na ga utshu Kristu mbœrœ adœke tshe wa ngbanga nœ azœ. Dœ tœnœ ataa, uzu dœ uzu œ gbɔ œrœ tshangba œneke á tshe mbœrœ lœ soro ye ɓa pa ɔshɔ, too lœ ɔtshɔrœ too lœ ekperœ. O'o tœ upu nœ kœgi ayo
5.11: Ɓata á 'a wusœ mara á li adœke a kpa dœ awa Gbozu asœmœ, 'a sœ kœmbœrœ kɔ adœke azu yindœ o'onœ asœmœ. Ndjaba wusœ azœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ yé mœ sœ kœgbe adœke ɓa lœ 'e dœ tœ 'e, 'e wu ndje sœ mœ ye.
5.12: 'A kpa yiyindœ kœdonga tœ 'a dœ tœ 'a ɓa utshu 'e nene, kashe 'a sœ kœgbe adœke 'e donga tœ 'e mbœrœ 'a. Ataa, á 'e kœwusœ kœgi o'o fœ azu á endje sœ kœdonga tœ endje tœ œneke á sœ kœmatœ endje ngbɨ ga tœ ala azu, kashe á endje wuwusœ œneke á sœ ɓa lɔsu uzu nene.
5.13: Œ kœsœ dœ adjapu adœke 'a wuta agbakɨndɨ azu, 'a wuta ataa mbœrœ upu nœ Ndjaba. Kashe œ kœsœ adœke 'a wuta azu nœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ, 'a wuta ataa mbœrœ 'e.
5.14: Gbambanœ nene, kœyindœsho nœ Kristu ropa azœ, yé a wusœ nœ adœke uzu bale tshu tœ upu nœ azu kɔ, azu kɔ tshu dœ she awa bale.
5.15: Tshe tshu tœ upu nœ azu kɔ mbœrœ adœke endjeneke á endje sœ dœ soro, kœsœsœ dœ tœnœ mbœrœ endje dœ tœ endje nene, kashe endje sœ dœ tœnœ mbœrœ tsheneke á tshe tshu yé á kwatœ ye ga lœ soro mbœrœ endje.
5.16: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, kœto kpesheke, 'a kpa wuwusœ uzu bale tœ mara nœ azu nene. Ataa œdœ 'a kœwu lima sœ Kristu ɓata uzu gbaa, ngɔngɔnœ asœke 'a kpa wuwusœ ye atamœ nene.
5.17: Œdœ uzu kœngbɔtœ ye bale dœ Kristu, tshe wuta tafo uzu ye: œneke á dœ ongboro œrœ yiwa ye, kashe tafo œrœ dá sœ zœ.
5.18: Œrœ asœmœ kɔ to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba. Tshe gi ayo ga ugurutœ azœ dœ she lœ awa nœ Kristu yé œ za akwa nœ kœgi ayo fœ azœ.
5.19: Gbambanœ nene, lœ awa nœ Kristu, Ndjaba gi ayo ga ugurutœ ye dœ azu kɔ; tshe gbegbe dœ ekperœ nœ endje nene. Yé tshe za o'o nœ kœgi ayonœ asœmœ fœ azœ.
5.20: Dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Kristu dá 'a dœ aayi avwa, yé Ndjaba dœ tœ ye dá sœ kœ'e 'e lœ awa nœ 'a. 'A sœ kœkɨ fœ 'e dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Kristu adœke 'e zatœ 'e tɨ adœke Ndjaba gi ayo ga ugurutœ 'e dœ she.
5.21: Kristu mbœmbœrœ lima ekperœ nene, tshe gbɔ œtœnœ mbœrœ azœ. Tshe li ga lœ ekperœ nœ asœmœ mbœrœ adœke a kœwuta ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba lœ awa nœ ye.

6.1: Ataa, ɓata á 'a sœ kœmbœrœ akwa awa bale dœ Ndjaba, 'a sœ kœkɨ fœ 'e adœke 'e wuwu ɔtshɔ lɔsu á tshe ma ga ndœ 'e gbambanœ nene.
6.2: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba pa adœke: «Dœ lɔndɔ á mœ sœ lima kœma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ mœ, mœ dji lima ɓœ. Dœ olo nœ kœshe, mœ tɨ kane zœ ga lafo.» 'E wu ngɔngɔ asœke lɔkɔ á li dœ Ndjaba kœma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ azu dœke. Œtœnœ kœdœ olo kœgbɔ kœshe.
6.3: 'A yiyindœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á li adœke uzu bale te nene mbœrœ 'a yiyindœ nœ adœke endje kɨtœ œsœ akwa nœ 'a nene.
6.4: Kashe 'a sœ kœpara lœ œrœ kɔ adœke 'a sœ ɓata ɔtshɔ aayi akwa nœ Ndjaba, 'a sœ kœru lɔsu 'a lœ œrœ oyo kɔ tœ lɔsu 'a, lœ œrœ kanga kɔ œdœ lœ œneke kɔ á sœ kœza lɔsu 'a ga lafo.
6.5: Endje ɓi 'a yé œ ko 'a ga lœ kánga, endje tshi azu ga lafo ndœ 'a. 'A mɔ dœ ɔgbɔ akwa, 'a lolo olo yé œ zɨ œrœ nene.
6.6: 'A matœ 'a tœ aayi akwa nœ Ndjaba lœ awa nœ œyerœ lɔsu 'a, lœ awa nœ kœwusœrœ nœ 'a, lœ awa nœ ugu lɔsu, lœ awa nœ ɔtshɔ́ ɔtshɔ, lœ awa nœ akwa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, œdœ pe lœ awa nœ adja kœyindœsho nœ 'a.
6.7: 'A matœ 'a tœ aayi akwa nœ Ndjaba lœ awa nœ kœyisœ adja o'o œdœ mangba gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba. Kowo nœ 'a kœyi dœ koshe œdœ kœkɔ dœ koshe kœdœ kœmbœrœ œneke á sœ ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba.
6.8: Azu sœ kœlɨsœ 'a, anga endje sœ kœmɔ 'a. Azu sœ kœpa ekpe o'o tœ upu nœ 'a, anga endje sœ kœpa ɔtshɔ o'o nœ 'a. Azu sœ kœwu 'a ɓata aayi wala andaa 'a sœ kœpa adja o'o.
6.9: Azu sœ kœwu 'a ɓata angbɨ azu, andaa endje wusœ 'a dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Azu sœ kœwu 'a ɓata a'a kœdœ akuzu, andaa 'a sœ dœ soro. Azu sœ kœza djofele fœ 'a, kashe endje wowo 'a nene.
6.10: Azu sœ kœza oyo ga tœ lɔsu 'a, andaa 'a sœ kolœ dœ yanga. A'a kœdœ aayi oyo, kashe azu ndjoro te aayi kœgbɔrœ mangba 'a. 'A sœ ɓata azu á endje gugu dœ œrœ nene, andaa 'a sœ dœ œrœ kɔ.
6.11: E'e dœ azu Koriti, 'a pa adja o'o fœ 'e, 'a kɔrɔ lɔsu 'a tœ egerœnœ fœ 'e.
6.12: 'A yindœ 'e waa, kashe e'e dá yiyindœ 'a nene.
6.13: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e ɓata mœ sœ kœpa fœ agbolo nœ mœ adœke, 'e yi ndje ndœ 'a ɓata á 'a yindœ 'e asœmœ yé œ kɔrɔ lɔsu 'e tœ egerœnœ fœ 'a. Polo gbota tshelœ utu azu Koriti
6.14: Adja 'e ngbɔngbɔtœ 'e awa bale dœ azu á endje gugu dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Kristu asœmœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, œrœ á sœ ndjii li kœngbɔtœ ye dœ ekperœ ye a? Ɨngbɨsho li kœngbɔtœ ye dœ ubu osho ye a?
6.15: Kristu li kœdjitœ ye dœ djaboro ye a? Too ga panœ, œrœ gaɗe dá yindœ Kristu œ gbɔ awa bale dœ uzu á tshe yiyindœ Kristu nene a?
6.16: Œrœ gaɗe bale dá li kœngbɔɓa Tepelo nœ Ndjaba dœ andjaba nœ angbɨ azu a? Gbambanœ nene, a'a, 'a kœdœ Tepelo nœ Ndjaba nœ soro ɓata á Ndjaba pa dœ tœ ye adœke: «Mœ sœ bala yé œ na bala ana ugurutœ endje. Mœ dœ bala Ndjaba nœ endje yé endje dœ bala azu nœ mœ.»
6.17: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Gbozu pa adœke: «Œ li adœke 'e gitœ 'e tœ endje yé œ sœ kpi. 'E tuturu tœ œrœ uburu nœ endje nene, yé atamœ, mœ yi bala ndœ 'e.
6.18: Œmœ Gbozu nœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ, mœ pa adœke mœ dœ bala aba 'e, yé 'e dœ ndje bala agbolo yakoshe œdœ ayawuru nœ mœ.»

7.1: E'e dœ anga mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa, œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ á Ndjaba pandœ nœ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ azœ. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, a vwaratœ azœ tœ œrœ kɔ á mbœrœ adœke ɔkɔ uzu too ɨshirɨ uzu sœ dœ uburu. A pa avwara kœsœ adja ayerœ azu lœ kœkpa awa Ndjaba. Yanga nœ Polo
7.2: 'E kɔrɔ lɔsu 'e fœ 'a! 'A mbœmbœrœ ekperœ fœ uzu bale nene, 'a mbœmbœrœ adœke uzu bale te nene, 'a bɨbɨlɨ ndje anga uzu bale mbœrœ kœgbɔ œrœ tshaabrœ ye nene.
7.3: Mœ sœsœ kœpa ataa mbœrœ kœwa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ 'e nene. Gbambanœ nene, mœ pandœ nœ fœ 'e adœke e'e kœdœ azu á 'e sœ ɓa tœ lɔsu 'a, azu á 'a ngbɔtœ 'a bale dœ endje lœ soro too lœ kuzu.
7.4: Mœ za lɔsu mœ tœ egerœnœ ga ndœ 'e, mœ donga tœ mœ mbœrœ 'e waa. Lœ oyo nœ 'a kɔ tœ lɔsu 'a, mœ sœ kolœ dœ gbɔgbɔ œdœ dœ yanga kœropa nœ.
7.5: Ataa ndje dœ lɔkɔ kœwuta 'a ga lœ ogo Masedwane, 'a yaya lima tœ 'a nene. 'A gbɔ tshelœ aka oyo kɔ tœ lɔsu 'a: oyo neke á sœ ɓa shu tœ 'a œdœ awa á sœ ɓa ugurutœ 'a.
7.6: Kashe Ndjaba á tshe sœ kœgi gbɔgbɔ fœ azu neke á endje mɔ, to gbɔgbɔ fœ 'a lœ awa nœ kœyi kumu Tito.
7.7: Yé œ dœ́dœ́ kolœ mbœrœ kœyi kumu ye asœmœ dá to gbɔgbɔ fœ 'a nene, kashe lœ awa nœ gbɔgbɔ á tshe gbɔ ɓa ndœ 'e. Tshe pandœ egerœ agbe nœ 'e ndœ kpa kœwu mœ, ɨkɨ nœ 'e œdœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ 'e ga ndœ mœ, fœ 'a ye. Yé mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ kpa sœ dœ yanga kœropanœ.
7.8: Ataa œdœ mbeti á mœ su fœ 'e kœza oyo ga tœ lɔsu 'e, mœ gbegbetshelœ mœ ndœ nœ ngɔngɔnœ asœke nene. Mœ gbe má tshelœ mœ œdœ mœ kœwu má adœke œndœ oyo á mbetinœ asœmœ za fœ 'e œ dɨ nene.
7.9: Kashe ngɔngɔnœ asœke mœ sœ dœ yanga; œ dœ́dœ́ mbœrœ á za oyo ga tœ lɔsu 'e nene, kashe mbœrœ á oyonœ asœmœ mbœrœ adœke 'e fatshalɔsu 'e. Ataa 'a mbœmbœrœ ekperœ bale fœ 'e nene gbaa, oyonœ asœmœ, Ndjaba dá yi lima ndœ nœ.
7.10: Gbambanœ nene, oyo tœ lɔsu á sœ lindœ gbetshelœ nœ Ndjaba sœ kœto tœ kœfatshalɔsu uzu á sœ kœgi osho ndœ kœshe dœ mara adœke gbetshelœ sœ mbœrœ tœnœ nene. Kashe oyo tœ lɔsu á to tœ tshapashɔ asœke, sœ kœza kuzu.
7.11: Ngɔngɔnœ asœke, 'e wu œrœ tshangba oyo tœ lɔsu 'e á sœ lindœ gbetshelœ nœ Ndjaba dœke: 'a sœ dœ yanga kœpa o'o tshapa 'e, 'e vwaratœ 'e tœ œneke á ro utshunœ, 'e sœ kœkpa awa Ndjaba, 'e sœ dœ ogo nœ kpa kœwu mœ, 'e sœ kœzatœ 'e ga tœ akwa yé œ sœ kœza djofele fœ uzu á tshe mbœrœ lima ekperœ. Kɔkɔ asœmœ sœ kœma ngbɨ adœke 'e gugu lima dœ upu lœ o'onœ asœmœ nene.
7.12: Ataa œdœ mœ kœsu lima mbeti asœke fœ 'e, œ sœsœ lima mbœrœ uzu á tshe mbœrœ ekperœ nene, œ sœsœ ndje lima mbœrœ tsheneke á endje mbœrœ ekperœ fœ she nene. Kashe œ sœ lima mbœrœ kœma ɓa utshu 'e ɓa tœ ala Ndjaba adœke ogo nœ 'e ga ndœ 'a sœ tœ egerœnœ.
7.13: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œrœ á 'e mbœrœ to gbɔgbɔ fœ 'a. Œ dœ́dœ́ kolœ mbœrœ tœnœ nene, kashe 'a sœ dœ yanga kœropa nœ kœwu mara á Tito sœ lima dœ yanga mbœrœ á 'e mbœrœ lima adœke lɔsu ye sœ zɨtɨ.
7.14: Œdœ mœ kœsœ kœdonga tœ mœ tœ upu nœ 'e ɓa utshu ye, œ sœ mbœrœ á 'e zaza ókó fœ mœ nene. Kashe ɓata o'o kɔ á 'a pa fœ 'e kœdœ adja o'o, awa bale ndje, kœdonga tœ 'a tœ upu nœ 'e ɓa utshu Tito wuta ndje adja o'o.
7.15: Yé ataa, lɔkɔ á tshe kœsœ kœgbe dœ mara á 'e zatœ 'e fœ she œdœ dœ mara á 'e za osho kœsœ fœ she dœ kœkpa awa ye dopanœ, kœyindœsho nœ ye ga ndœ 'e sœ kœgerœ tœnœ.
7.16: Mœ sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ kœza lɔsu mœ djigi á mœ za ga pa 'e.

8.1: Alaya, 'a yindœ nœ adœke 'e wusœ mara á Ndjaba ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ azu Ikrizia ɓa lœ ogo Masedwane.
8.2: Lœ oyo ndjoro tœ lɔsu endje, endje sœ dœ egerœ yanga. Yé ataa endje sœ lœ egerœ oyo gbaa, endje to œrœ kœrosœ nœ.
8.3: Œmœ kœdœ timunœ, endje to œrœ lindœ kœgbɔ œrœ nœ endje. Endje to œrrr tɔpanœ kpuru. Endje to œrœnœ lindœ gbetshelœ nœ endje.
8.4: Endje shendœ kœyu 'a adœke 'a za awa fœ œne dœ́ œne ngbɔtœ œne dœ 'a tœ upu nœ kœvwa œrœ fœ ayindœ Ndjaba ɓa lœ ongbo Yerusaleme.
8.5: Endje to œrœ kœrosœ œneke á 'a gbe má adœke endje to. Utshunœ, endje zatœ endje fœ Gbozu, yé manda nœ, endje zatœ endje fœ 'a lindœ œrœ á Ndjaba yindœ nœ.
8.6: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'a kɨ fœ Tito adœke tshe na ɓa ndœ 'e ɓa zœ œ mbœrœ udu akwa nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsunœ asœmœ œrrr ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ, akwanœ á tshe te lima kœmbœrœ tœnœ asœmœ.
8.7: 'E sœsœ dœ oyo œrœ bale nene: kœyindœrœ, kœwusœ kœpa o'o, kœwusœrœ, egerœ ogo kœmbœrœ akwa œdœ pe kœyindœsho á 'a yisœ nœ fœ 'e. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'a yindœ nœ adœke 'e ma ndje tœ 'e tœ aayi kœgbɔrœ lœ kœto œrœ nœ 'e dœ lɔsu nœ yanga.
8.8: Œ dœ́dœ́ awa o'o dá mœ sœ kœza fœ 'e nene, kashe mœ kœsœ kœpandœ kœmbœrœ œrœ dœ yanga nœ anga azu fœ 'e, mœ sœ kœza awa fœ 'e adœke 'e tondœ adja kœyindœsho nœ 'e.
8.9: Gbambanœ nene, 'e wusœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu ye. Ataa tshe dœ lima ayi kœgbɔrœ gbaa, tshe zatœ ye tœ ayi oyo mbœrœ 'e adœke 'e gbɔ œrœ ndjoro lœ oyo nœ œne.
8.10: Ataa, mœ sœ kœza gbetshelœ nœ mœ lœ upunœ asœke fœ 'e: œ li dœ 'e adœke 'e mbœrœ kolœ akwa ɓata á 'e mbœrœ lima ungu utshunœ, e'e lima kœdœ azu á 'e gbɔ gbetshelœnœ asœmœ utshunœ œdœ aayi kœmbœrœ tœnœ dœ akwa.
8.11: Ataa, ngɔngɔ asœke, 'e mbœrœ adœke akwanœ asœmœ ka. 'E mbœrœ akwanœ dœ lɔsu 'e bale adœke œ ka ɓata á 'a pa tœnœ yé dœ tœnœ ataa, lindœ kœgbɔrœ nœ 'e.
8.12: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ uzu kœza lɔsu ye bale ga panœ, Ndjaba œ yindœ œrœ nœ uzunœ asœmœ á tshe to dœ kœgbe dœ œrœ á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ dœ kœgbe dœ œneke á tshe gugu dœ tœnœ nene.
8.13: Œ sœsœ adœke uzu ko œrœ nœ ye kɔ mbœrœ kœshe dœ anganœ á kpa kœsœ œnœ ye lœ oyo nene, kashe œ li adœke tshe kurutshelœnœ li tœnœ œ li.
8.14: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, e'e kœdœ aayi kœgbɔrœ yé œ li adœke 'e tɨ kane endjeneke á endje gugu dœ œrœ nene ga lafo. Manda nœ, œdœ 'e kœgugu dœ œrœ nene yé á endje sœ dœ tœnœ ndjoro, endje li kœtɨ ndje kane 'e ga lafo. Atamœ dá 'e liili,
8.15: ɓata á endje sú ɓa la Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Uzu á tshe rɔ lima rœgo ndjoro, œ ngbangba tshaabrœ ye nene, yé tsheneke á tshe rɔ lima teasho, sœ dœ œrœ ndjoro.» Tito œdœ pe anganœ
8.16: 'A gi ɔtshɔrœ fœ Ndjaba á tshe za egerœ ogo nœ kœmbœrœ awa bale ɓata á 'a sœ ndje dœ tœnœ, fœ Tito adœke tshe mbœrœ fœ 'e.
8.17: Tito yindœ kœyɔndœrœ nœ 'a. Ga panœ dœmœ, tshe kpa yi lima ndœ nœ dœ tœ ye adœke œne na ɓa ndœ 'e.
8.18: 'A vwa she awa bale dœ anga aya azœ á azu Ikrizia kɔ sœ kœdonga she tœ upu nœ kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o.
8.19: Ga panœ, azu Ikrizia dá ke she adœke tshe ro tœ awanœ bale dœ 'a mbœrœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu. 'A sœ kœmbœrœ akwanœ mbœrœ mokɔ nœ Gbozu dœ tœ ye œdœ kœmbœrœ œrœ dœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ.
8.20: 'A sœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu gbagbagbara 'a tœ mara kœkurutshelœ ngendja ndjoro á 'a sœ kœgbɔndœ nœ nene.
8.21: 'A yiyindœ kœmbœrœ kolœ ɔtshɔrœ ga tœ ala Gbozu nene, kashe 'a yi ndje ndœ kœmbœrœ ɓa tœ ala azu kɔ.
8.22: 'A vwa azunœ bisha tœ awanœ bale dœ anga aya azœ á 'a sœ kœwu lɔsu ye ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, yé tshe sœ dœ egerœ ogo kœmbœrœ akwa dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu. Kashe ngɔngɔnœ asœke, egerœ ogo kœmbœrœ akwa dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye kpa gerœ kœrosœ nœ. Gbambanœ nene, tshe ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ 'e.
8.23: Tœ upu nœ Tito, œshe kœdœ yanga mœ á 'a na tœ awa bale dœ she ɓa ndœ 'e, œshe ndje kœdœ uzu á 'a sœ lœ ama akwa bale dœ she. Kashe tœ udu aaya azœ bisha asœke, azu Ikrizia dá vwa endje fœ 'e yé endje sœ kœmbœrœ akwa mbœrœ mokɔ nœ Kristu.
8.24: 'E ma fœ endje adœke 'e yindœ endje tako mbœrœ á azu Ikrizia kœyindœ nœ yé á kœwusœ nœ adœke 'a sœ kœdu okoro 'a mbœrœ 'e.

9.1: Adja ádá adœke mœ su mbeti fœ 'e tœ upu nœ kœtɨ kane ayindœ Ndjaba ɓa lœ ongbo Yerusaleme gugu nene.
9.2: Gbambanœ nene, mœ wusœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ nœ 'e ye, yé mœ sœ kœdu okoro mœ tœ upu nœ 'e fœ azu ogo Masedwane adœke: «Azu Akayi gumatœ endje kœto œrœ dœ ngbugu á ro lima utshunœ asœke.» Egerœ ogo kœmbœrœ akwa dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ 'e ndjingɨvwɨ azu Ikrizia ndjoro.
9.3: Mœ vwa anga aaya azœ fœ 'e mbœrœ adœke kœdu okoro mœ mbœrœ 'e tœ upunœ asœmœ kœsœsœ gbambanœ nene. Mœ yindœ nœ adœke 'e kotœ 'e ga lœ vola ɓata á mœ pa lima ndœ nœ.
9.4: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ 'a kœna ɓa zœ awa bale dœ azu ogo Masedwane yé á kœgbɔ 'e á 'e kœgugumatœ 'e nene, 'a gbɔ tshula mbœrœ á 'a ko adja lɔsu 'a ga pa 'e. Yé atamœ, tshulanœ œdœ ndje œnœ 'e.
9.5: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ gbe dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke mœ vwa aaya azœ asœke utshunœ ɓa ndœ 'e mbœrœ kœngbɔɓa œrœ á 'e pa lima tœnœ. Ataa œ kœsœ zœ á mœ yikumu mœ ga zœ, œ ma adœke 'e to dœ lɔsu 'e bale kashe œ dœ́dœ́ dœ lɔsu bisha nene.
9.6: 'E gbe dœ o'o asœke kane: uzu á tshe lu ngwarœ teasho, tshe kɔ ndje teasho, yé tsheneke á tshe lu ndjoro, tshe kɔ ndje ndjoro.
9.7: Œ li adœke uzu dœ uzu to ɓata á lɔsu ye yindœ nœ, kashe dœ oyo tœ lɔsu ye too adœke uzu kakapa ye nene. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba yindœ uzu á tshe sœ kœto œrœ dœ yanga.
9.8: Yé Ndjaba li tœ kœgi tshelœ aka anga œrœ kɔ ga mangbanœ fœ 'e mbœrœ adœke 'e sœ kolœ dœ œrœ á li, yé ga panœ dœmœ 'e sœ dœ œrœ yeka á kœsœ kœto ndœ ɔtshɔ akwa kɔ.
9.9: Ɓata á endje sú ɓa la Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Tshe kurutshelœ œrœ, œ to fœ aayi oyo, yé mara kœmbœrœ œrœ nœ ye ndjii sœpe waa dœ waa.»
9.10: Ndjaba á tshe sœ kœto indji ngwarœ fœ aayi kœlu ngwarœ œdœ kœzɨrœ, tshe to bala indji ngwarœ kɔ á 'e gbe dœ tœnœ fœ 'e. Tshe mbœrœ adœke 'e mbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii waa dœ waa.
9.11: Tshe fa 'e tœ aayi kœgbɔrœ dœ mara kɔ œdœ dœ ada ɔlɔ kɔ mbœrœ adœke á 'e kœkakatœ kœto œrœ fœ anga 'e nene. Ataa, azu ndjoro œ gi mershe fœ Ndjaba tœ upu nœ 'e mbœrœ œrœ á 'e sœ kœto fœ endje lœ awa nœ 'a.
9.12: Gbambanœ nene, akwa á 'e sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ sœsœ kolœnœ adœke ayindœ Ndjaba gbɔ œrœ á endje gbe dœ tœnœ nene, kashe œ sœ ndje kœmbœrœ adœke azu ndjoro gi mershe fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ tœnœ.
9.13: Azu ndjoro á endje wu adœke akwanœ asœke sœ dœ ádá waa, endje donga bala Ndjaba mbœrœ mara kœmbœrœtœ 'e lindœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Kristu asœmœ. Endje donga ndje Ndjaba mbœrœ mara á 'e kurutshelœ œrœ nœ 'e tœ endje œdœ tœ anga azu kɔ.
9.14: Endje za bala avwala mbœrœ 'e dœ kœma kœyindœsho nœ endje ga ndœ 'e mangba ɔtshɔ lɔsu á ropa nœ, á Ndjaba za fœ 'e.
9.15: Kaka adœke a gi mershe fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ kœtorœ nœ ye á ropa œrœ kɔ.

10.1: Œmœ Polo, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ tœ mœ dœ ɔmɔ lɔsu œdœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Kristu adœke, anga azu sœ kœpa adœke œdœ mœ kœsœ ugurutœ 'e, mœ sœ kœzatœ mœ ga atɨ ga ndœ 'e, yé œdœ mœ kœgugu ugurutœ 'e nene, mœ gbɔɔgbɔ ga ndœ 'e.
10.2: Mœ sœ kœkɨ fœ 'e adœke 'e kakapa mœ adœke mœ mbœrœ œrœ dœ ɔgbɔ, lɔkɔ á mœ kœna ɓa ndœ 'e nene. Gbambanœ nene, mœ gbe kœyisœ gbɔgbɔ nœ mœ fœ azu á endje sœ kœpa adœke 'a sœ kœmbœrœ akwa tœ mara nœ azu nœ tshapashɔ.
10.3: Œ sœ adjapu adœke a'a kœdœ azu tshapashɔ, kashe 'a sœsœ kœnga koshe dœ mara nœ adja azu tshapashɔ nene.
10.4: Lœ kœnga koshe nœ 'a, œrœ kœnga dœ koshe nœ 'a toto ɓa ndœ azu nene, kashe gbɔgbɔnœ to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba mbœrœ kœndɨ tshelœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ayingba. 'A sœ kœndɨ tshelœ gbetshelœ nœ egerœ kumu
10.5: œdœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ á sœ kœza egerœ kumu adœke azu kœwuwusœ Ndjaba nene. 'A sœ kœmbœrœ adœke endje fa gbetshelœ nœ endje kɔ mbœrœ adœke endje mbœrœtœ endje lindœ Kristu.
10.6: Yé lɔkɔ á 'e kœsœ kœmbœrœtœ 'e dœ ɔtshɔnœ, 'a kpalatœ 'a nene kœza djofele fœ endjeneke á endje sœsœ kœmbœrœtœ endje dœ awanœ nene.
10.7: 'E sœ kœwu kolœ tshapa œrœ. Œdœ anga uzu kœgbe adœke œne kœdœ uzu nœ Kristu, tshe gbetshelœ ye tœ œrœ asœke kane: azœ kœdœ azu nœ Kristu awa bale dœ she ndje.
10.8: Ataa œdœ mœ kœdu okoro mœ tœ tshagbozu á Gbozu Yisu za lima fœ mœ, mœ sœ dœ tshula mbœrœ tœnœ nene. Tshe za lima fœ mœ mbœrœ kœguma 'e, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ mbœrœ adœke œ ndɨ 'e nene.
10.9: Mœ yiyindœ nœ adœke mbeti nœ mœ á mœ su za awa fœ 'e nene.
10.10: Gbambanœ nene, anga azu sœ kœpa adœke: «Mbeti nœ Polo lɨɨlɨ dœ pe gbɔgbɔ, kashe lɔkɔ á tshe kœsœ ugurutœ azœ, tshe mɔmɔ yé mara kœpa o'o ye lɨlɨ nene.»
10.11: Œ li adœke uzu á tshe pa mara o'o ataa wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke, mara á 'a su dœ mbeti nœ 'a lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ, tshetœ maranœ asœmœ dá 'a mbœrœ dœ tœnœ œdœ 'a kœsœ ɓa ugurutœ 'e.
10.12: 'A yiyindœ kœzatœ 'a awa bale too kœzatœ 'a ɓata anga azu á endje sœ kœdonga tœ endje dœ tœ endje asœmœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, endje kœdœ agbakɨndɨ azu. Endje sœ kœwutœ endje dœ tœ endje. Endje sœ kœzatœ endje ɓata kœgerœ œrœ.
10.13: Tœ a'a nœ 'a, 'a sœ dœ egerœ kumu adœke 'a rosœ mapaka kɔ nene, kashe 'a mbœrœ akwa kolœ kpœtœ ama osho neke á Ndjaba to fœ 'a, yé á yindœ nœ adœke 'a wuta œrrr ɓa ndœ 'e.
10.14: Gbambanœ nene, a'a dá dœ adja azu utshunœ á 'a na dœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Kristu fœ 'e. 'A roropa mapaka nœ akwa nœ 'a nene ataa œdœ 'a kœroro má ga ndœ 'e nene.
10.15: Dœ tœnœ ataa, 'a sœsœ kœdu okoro 'a kœropanœ mbœrœ akwa nœ anga angbɨ azu nene, kashe 'a wusœ nœ adœke kœyindœrœ nœ 'e œ gerœ yé 'a kpa mbœrœ adœke œ sœ kolœ kœgerœ tœnœ lindœ mapaka nœ 'a.
10.16: Manda nœ, 'a na kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o ɓa lœ anga angbɨ ogo djagakele 'e. Ataa, 'a du okoro 'a mbœrœ akwa nœ anga angbɨ azu á endje mbœrœ ɓa tœ osho akwa nœ endje nene.
10.17: Andaa, endje sú ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Œdœ uzu kœyindœ kœdu okoro ye, tshe du okoro ye tœ œneke á Gbozu mbœrœ.»
10.18: Gbambanœ nene, endje dodonga uzu á tshe sœ kœzatœ ye mbœrœ gbetshelœ nœ ye dœ tœ ye bale nene, kashe endje donga tsheneke á Gbozu sœ kœma o'o tœ upu nœ ye.

11.1: Mœ yindœ nœ adœke 'e ru lɔsu 'e tœ o'o mœ á sœ ɓata œnœ ayi iyi. Adja 'e ru lɔsu 'e tœ mœ.
11.2: Mœ sœ dœ úkú tœ upu nœ 'e waa, yé úkúnœ asœmœ to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba. Gbambanœ nene, mœ pandœ kœko 'e fœ anga yakoshe bale adœke 'e i she, yakoshenœ kœdœ Kristu. Yé mœ gbe ndœ kœma 'e fœ she ɓata akpɔ yawuru á tshe wuwu damba sœ yakoshe nene.
11.3: Kashe mœ sœ dœ awa adœke, ɓata á yakoro fara lima Eva dœ ekpe ɔtshɔ ye, mœ sœ kœgbe adœke anga uzu fafara ndje kœwusœrœ nœ 'e yé œ gi 'e zara tœ mara á 'e zatœ 'e yé á sœ yerœ ga ndœ Kristu nene.
11.4: Gbambanœ nene, mœ wu adœke œdœ anga uzu kœna kœmɨndœ anga angbɨ Yisu á 'a mɨmɨndœ ye fœ 'e nene, 'e sœ kolœ kœdji she; 'e sœ kœyindœ ɨshirɨ á sœ kpi tœ Ɨshirɨ neke á 'e gbɔ lima; 'e sœ ndje kœyindœ Ɔtshɔ O'o á sœ kpi tœ œneke á 'a yi lima sœ nœ fœ 'e.
11.5: Azu á 'e sœ kœwu endje ɓata agboro aayi avwa nœ 'e asœmœ, roropa mœ nene.
11.6: Ataa mœ wuwusœ kœpa o'o dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene gbaa, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ tœ upu nœ kœwusœrœ nene. 'A yi lima sœ nœ fœ 'e para œdœ dœ mara kɔ.
11.7: Lɔkɔ á mœ yisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Ndjaba fœ 'e, mœ yi lima sœ nœ gbambanœ. Mœ za lima tœ mœ ga atɨ mbœrœ kœtɨ 'e ga lafo. Ataa, œrœnœ á mœ mbœrœ asœmœ kœdœ ekperœ a?
11.8: Azu tshelœ anga angbɨ Ikrizia dá to lima œrœ fœ mœ, yé œ ma lima tœ ye adœke mœ sœ kœshe mbœrœ endje mbœrœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ 'e.
11.9: Yé dœ lɔndɔ á mœ sœ lima ɓa ndœ 'e, ataa mœ sœ lima dœ ogo œrœ gbaa, mœ yɔyɔndœ œrœ tshaabrœ uzu bale nene. Gbambanœ nene, aaya azœ á endje to ɓa lœ Masedwane dá na lima dœ œrœ á mœ gbe lima dœ tœnœ fœ mœ. Mœ gbɔndœtœ mœ lima mbœrœ kœdœ́dœ́ egerœ kongba pa 'e nene, yé mœ gbɔndœtœ mœ kolœ atamœ waa dœ waa.
11.10: Lœ awa nœ adja o'o nœ Kristu á sœ lœ mœ, mœ sœ kœpa tœnœ ngbɨ adœke: uzu bale ɓa lœ ogo Akayi œ li kœkɔ mœ tœ upu nœ kœdongatœshonœ asœmœ nene.
11.11: Mbœrœ gaɗe á mœ pa o'onœ asœmœ a? Œ sœ kœma adœke mœ yiyindœ 'e nene a? Ndjaba wusœ nœ dœ adœke mœ yindœ 'e ye!
11.12: Mœ sœpe kolœ kœmbœrœ ɓata á mœ mbœrœ ngɔngɔ nœ asœke mbœrœ á kœgi ekpe gbetshelœ lœ azu á endje sœ kœdu okoro endje ɓata endje liili dœ 'a.
11.13: Azunœ asœmœ kœdœ aayi avwa nœ wala, endje sœ kœfatœ endje adœke œne kœdœ aayi avwa nœ Kristu.
11.14: Anga œrœ bale kœkatœ ama osho tɨ ɔsɔ ndœnœ gugu kpœtœmœ nene, Satana dœ tœ ye sœ kœfatœ ye tœ andjelu nœ ɔlɔ.
11.15: Ataa œdœ aayi akwa nœ ye kœsœ kœfatœ endje adœke œne kœdœ aayi akwa á œne sœ ndjii, œ dœ́dœ́ upu kœkɨtœ œsœnœ nene. Ɓa tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ, endje gbɔ kolœ œrœ neke á liili dœ akwa nœ endje. Polo shi gbɨ lœ kœwu oyo
11.16: Mœ kpa sœ kœpa o'onœ asœmœ adœke: uzu bale zaza mœ ɓata ayi iyi nene. Kashe œdœ 'e kœgbe adœke mœ sœ dœ iyi, 'e yindœ nœ adœke mœ sœ dœ tœnœ mbœrœ adœke mœ donga tœ mœ ndje teasho.
11.17: Adjapu, œneke á mœ sœ kœpa tœnœ ngɔngɔ asœke, mœ sœsœ kœpa ɓata á Gbozu yindœ nœ nene, kashe mœ sœ kœpa ɓata mœ sœ dœ iyi lœ kœza lɔsu mœ ga pa œneke á mœ sœ kœdongatœ mœ tœnœ.
11.18: Ɓata á azu ndjoro sœ kœdonga tœ endje tœ œrœ nœ endje œnœ tshapashɔ, œmœ ndje mœ donga ndje bala tœ mœ.
11.19: E'e dœ azu á 'e sœ dœ kœwusœtœ, 'e yindœ nœ dœ tœ 'e kœru lɔsu 'e tœ aayi iyi.
11.20: 'E sœ kœru lɔsu 'e adœke endje mbœrœ œrœ ɓata akanga fœ 'e, endje gbɔtœ œrœ nœ 'e, endje fara 'e, endje wu 'e gbambanœ tœ ala endje yé œ da ala 'e.
11.21: Mœ sœ dœ tshula kœpa adœke a'a kœdœ azu á 'a mɔɔmɔ. Andaa, o'o á endje sœ kœpa tœnœ, mœ sœ kœpa ɓata ayi iyi: œmœ ndje, mœ lii kœpa tœnœ.
11.22: Endje sœ kœdonga tœ endje adœke œne kœdœ Aebre, œmœ ndje kœdœ Ebre! Endje kœdœ azu ogo Israyele, œmœ ndje kœdœ uzu ogo Israyele! Endje kœdœ aata Abrayamo, œmœ ndje kœdœ atanœ.
11.23: Endje kœdœ aayi akwa nœ Kristu, œmœ ndje, mœ mbœrœ akwa nœ ye kœropa endje. Mœ sœ kœpa o'o ɓata mœ sœ dœ iyi. Mœ mɔ lima lœ akwa kœrosœ endje, endje za mœ ga lœ kánga kœropa endje, endje ɓi mœ kœrosœ endje, mœ li lima ga lœ kuzu awa ndjoro kœrosœ endje.
11.24: Ayuda sɔ mœ dœ ndjapa zazu bale dœ ndjokpa dœ mindu dœ amanœ vana. Endje sɔ mœ ataa awa mindu.
11.25: Azu ogo Roma sɔ mœ dœ ndjapa awa votɔ yé œ ve mœ dœ badja awa bale. Mœ nduru dœ agba awa votɔ yé œ mbœrœ olo bale dœ butshɔ bale la ungu.
11.26: Lœ ana nœ mœ ndjoro á mœ na dœ ada mœ, ɔgbɔ œrœ á wuta ga tœ mœ to ɓa tœ ungu á sœ kœtu ga lœ agba too ɓa ndœ aayi angba; ɔgbɔ œrœ á to ɓa ndœ anga mœ dœ Ayuda too ɓa ndœ angbɨ azu; ɔgbɔ œrœ á wuta ga tœ mœ ɓa lœ ongbo too ɓa lœ kpagagasho, œ wuta ga tœ mœ ɓa la ungu ɨngbɨrɨ œdœ ɓa ugurutœ ekpe azu á endje pa adœke œne kœdœ azu nœ Kristu.
11.27: Mœ mɔ dœ akwa yé œ wu oyo waa. Kpala kpala, mœ lolo olo nene; mœ sœ kœsœ dœ ogo kœzɨrœ œdœ pe dœ ogo ungu yé œ sœ kœmbœrœ lima adœke mœ sœ kœyotshelœma mœ kpala kpala. Mœ wu oyo dœ ɨzɨ œdœ tœ upu nœ lœba waa.
11.28: Tœ kœdɨ udu œrœnœ kɔ nene, ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ mœ sœ kœgbe dœ Ikrizia para kɔkɔ.
11.29: Œdœ anga uzu nœ Kristu kœmɔ, ngbewo mœ mɔ ndje ye. Œdœ anga kœtɨtœ ye tœ kœyindœrœ, ngbewo lɔsu mœ sœ kœka mœ.
11.30: Œ kœsœ adœke mœ donga tœ mœ, mœ donga tœ mœ tœ kœmɔ nœ mœ.
11.31: Ndjaba, Aba Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu á endje sœ kœdonga she waa dœ waa, wusœ nœ adœke mœ sœsœ kœpa wala nene.
11.32: Lɔkɔ á mœ sœ lima ɓa lœ Damaseke, gbozu á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ gbozugo Aretase, ko azu ɓa tœ manda ongbo mbœrœ á endje kœza mœ.
11.33: Kashe endje za mœ ga lœ kingi yé œ yi mœ ga atɨ ɓa ushu lœ anga ogoro bale á sœ lœ egerœ muru nœ ongbonœ, yé á mœ kpa.

12.1: Œ li adœke mœ donga tœ mœ ataa œ gugu dœ ádá nene gbaa. Kashe ngɔngɔnœ asœke mœ yindœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ kœwu œrœ lœ ulu œdœ tœ upu nœ kœma œrœ á Gbozu yisœ nœ fœ mœ.
12.2: Manda ungu ndjokpa dœ vana, mœ wusœ anga uzu nœ Kristu bale á Ndjaba tɨ she œrrr ɓa lafo ɓa ndœ ye. Œdœ undu ye dá ɔ adja lima ga lafo too œdœ ulu dá mœ lu, mœ wuwusœ nœ nene, kashe kolœ Ndjaba kutɨ ye dá wusœ nœ.
12.3: -4 Adjapu, mœ wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba tɨ uzunœ asœmœ œrrr ɓa lœ paradizo. (Œdœ undu ye dá ɔ adja ga lafo too œdœ ulu dá mœ lu, mœ wuwusœ nœ nene, kashe kolœ Ndjaba kutɨ ye dá wusœ nœ). Ɓa zœ, tshe dji o'o á azu lili kœpa tœnœ nene yé endje zaza ndje awa fœ uzu bale ɓa pa ɔshɔ kpa kœpa tœnœ nene.
12.5: Mœ donga bala tœ mœ tœ upu nœ uzunœ asœmœ ye, kashe tœ œmœ nœ mœ, mœ donga bala kolœ tœ mœ tœ kœmɔ nœ mœ.
12.6: Œdœ mœ kœyi má ndœ kœdonga tœ mœ, mœ sœ má dœ iyi nene, mbœrœ mœ pa má adja o'o. Kashe mœ sœ kœkpawa kœdonga tœ mœ. Gbambanœ nene, mœ yiyindœ nœ adœke endje gbɔ gbetshelœ neke á ropa œrœ á endje sœ kœwu mœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ too œneke á endje sœ kœdji ɓa ndœ mœ nene.
