10.9: Yé tshe kpa pa adœke: «Wu, mœ na mbœrœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á ɓœ yindœ nœ.» Tshe sœ kœwo ongboro mara kœdonga Ndjaba mbœrœ kœza tafonœ.
10.10: Yisu Kristu mbœrœtœ ye lindœ œrœ á Ndjaba yindœ nœ; tshe zatœ ye tœ makabo awa tshebabale fœ Ndjaba, yé œtœnœ ataa dá a wuta ayerœ azu mbœrœ she.
10.11: Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, nganga Ndjaba bale dœ bale sœ kœka ga lafo ndœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ ye, yé œ sœ kœto tshetœ tokóró kpœpanœ kpœpanœ; tokórónœ asœmœ á sœsœ kœgi ekperœ pa azu ɔlɔ bale nene.
10.12: Kashe tœ upu nœ Kristu, manda kœzatœ ye tœ tokóró awa tshebabale ndœ ekperœ nœ azu, tshe sœ ga pa kuni Ndjaba waa dœ waa.
10.13: Ngɔngɔ asœke, tshe sœ kœkate ɔlɔ á Ndjaba œ ko ayingba ye ga tshada ye.
10.14: Gbambanœ nene, lœ kœzatœ ye tœ makabo awa tshebabale asœmœ, tshe mbœrœ adœke endjeneke á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ adœke endje wuta yerœ lœ ekperœ nœ endje, te azu á endje li.
10.15: Tœnœ kœdœ neke á Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ dœ tœ ye sœ kœmatœ nœ fœ azœ. Gbambanœ nene, manda kœpa adœke:
10.16: «Asœke kœdœ ayo á mœ lu bala dœ endje manda olonœ asœmœ, Gbozu pa adœke: ndœ kœza awa akwa nœ mœ, Mœ su bala awa akwa nœ mœ ga lœ gbetshelœ nœ endje œdœ ga lɔsu endje.»
10.17: Yé tshe kpa pa adœke: «Mœ kpa gbe dœ ngbɨndɨrœ œdœ dœ ekperœ nœ endje nene.»
10.18: Andaa, ɓa tœ osho á kœdjerœndœ ekperœ sœ zœ, ádá nœ kœto makabo mbœrœ ekperœ gugu bale nene. A na ga ndœ Ndjaba
10.19: Atamœ, alaya, a sœ kœyindœ nœ dœ lɔsu azœ adœke a li ga tœ œyerœ osho lœ awa nœ indji Yisu.
10.20: Tshe kɔrɔ tafo awa á sœ dœ soro fœ azœ lœ awa nœ rido, œ yindœ kœpa adœke lœ awa nœ undu ye dœ tœ ye.
10.21: Yé a sœ dœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba á Ndjaba za she ga tœ kumu akwa tshasœnda nœ ye.
10.22: Ataa, a na ga ndœ Ndjaba dœ lɔsu azœ ndjii œdœ lœ kœyindœrœ djigi mbœrœ tshe gi azœ lœ ngbɨndɨrœ á sœ tœ lɔsu azœ, yé œ djutɔ undu azœ dœ ungu á sœ yerœ ye.
10.23: A mɔmɔ nene, a sœpe kolœ kœyindœ œrœ á a za lɔsu azœ ga panœ; gbambanœ nene, tshe sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ lindœ œneke á tshe pa tœnœ.
10.24: A gbɔndœtœ azœ lœ ugurutœ azœ dœ anga azœ á kœmbœrœ adœke a yindœ anga azœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ dœ pe kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa.
10.25: A kpakpa lœ angbɔtœ nœ azœ nene ɓata á anga anga azœ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ, kashe a to gbɔgbɔ lœ tœ azœ mbœrœ 'e sœ kœwu adœke olonœ sœ kœndo tœnœ.
10.26: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ a kœsœpe kœmbœrœ ekperœ dœ lɔsu azœ manda kœwusœ adja o'o, tokóró tœ upu nœ ekperœnœ asœmœ kpa gugu nene.
10.27: Kashe, œ sœpe kolœnœ adœke a kate ɔgbɔ ngbanga á Ndjaba œ wa ga tœ azu dœ pe egerœ owo á ju ayingba ye.
10.28: Uzu neke á tshe dara pa awa akwa nœ Moyize, endje wu oyo ye nene, œdœ azu bisha too votɔ kœpa timunœ, ngbewo endje wo she ye.
10.29: Uzu neke á tshe wu Gbolo nœ Ndjaba gbambanœ, á gu œsœ indji ayo á mbœrœ adœke tshe wuta yerœ, yé á dara pa Ɨshirɨ nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu, 'e sœ dœ gbetshelœ adœke tshe gbɔ bala egerœ djofele á ropa nœ.
10.30: Gbambanœ nene, a wusœ uzu neke á tshe pa lima adœke: «Œmœ dá gi tshangba ekperœnœ asœmœ fœ endje, œmœ dá za bala djofele fœ endje»; yé ga panœ: «Gbozu œ wa bala ngbanga ga tœ azu nœ ye.»
10.31: Œ sœ tœ ekpenœ waa adœke uzu gbɔ o'o tshakane Ndjaba nœ soro.
10.32: Kashe 'e gbe dœ ali olo nœ 'e lima kane: 'e gbɔ ɨngbɨsho yé lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, 'e shi lima gbɨ lœ egerœ koshe á gbɔɔgbɔ.
10.33: Endje sœ lima kœgu anga anga 'e ugurutœ 'e dœ pe kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ endje tœ ala azu, kashe e'e kɔ, 'e yi lima ndœ kœsœ awa bale dœ anga 'e asœmœ lœ mara kœwu kanganœ ata.
10.34: Yé 'e sœ ndje lima kœwu oyo dœ aayi kánga; ataa endje gbɔtœ œrœ nœ 'e gbaa, 'e sœ kolœ dœ yanga mbœrœ tœnœ, mbœrœ 'e wusœ nœ adœke 'e gbɔ bala ɔtshɔrœ neke á œndœnœ œ dɨ waa zœ.
10.35: 'E kakatœ kœyindœ œrœ á 'e sœ kœko lɔsu 'e ga pa nœ tɨ nene, mbœrœ 'e gbɔ egerœ œrœ tshangbanœ zœ.
10.36: Œ li dœ 'e kœshi gbɨ lœ kœru lɔsu 'e, yé á kœmbœrœ œrœ neke á Ndjaba yindœ nœ yeka á kœgbɔ œrœ neke á tshe pa lima tœnœ.
10.37: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala buku adœke: «Œ sœpe olo teasho, olo teasho gbambanœ, yé uzu neke á tshe na, œ na bala zœ, tshe kpalatœ ye nene.
10.38: Andaa, uzu nœ mœ á tshe sœ ndjii œ sœ dœ soro lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ nœ ye, kashe œdœ tshe kœkwa ga manda nœ, lɔsu mœ œ sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ she nene.»
10.39: Azœ, a dœ́dœ́ azu nœ kœkwa ga manda nœ yeka á kœli ga lœ kuzu nene, kashe azœ kœdœ azu nœ kœyindœrœ mbœrœ kœshe nœ uvuru azœ.

11.1: Kœyindœrœ kœdœ mara á uzu gbɔ dœ œrœ neke á tshe za lɔsu ye ga pa nœ, œtœnœ kœdœ mara kœwusœ adja œrœ neke á uzu œ wu dœ ala ye nene.
11.2: Ndjaba ma lima o'o tœ upu nœ anga azu utshunœ mbœrœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje.
11.3: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, a sœ kœwusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba mbœrœ tshapashɔ dœ o'o ama ye. Ataa, œrœ para á a sœ kœwu tœnœ, œ to lœ neke á a wu nene.
11.4: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Abele to ɔtshɔ tokóró fœ Ndjaba kœropa œnœ Kayina. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Ndjaba ma she adœke, œshe kœdœ uzu á tshe sœ ndjii. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba ma ngbɨ adœke œne yindœ kœtorœ nœ ye. Mangba kœyindœrœ nœ ye, ataa tshe tshu gbaa, tshe sœpe kœpa o'o zœ.
11.5: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Enoke wuwu kuzu dœ ala ye nene yé endje gbɔgbɔ she nene. Ndjaba za she gutœnœ ga lafo ga ɨndɨrɨ ye; yé utshu nœ kœɔ she ga lafo, endje ma lima o'o tœ upu nœ ye adœke tshe ga lima tœ ala Ndjaba.
11.6: Andaa œdœ uzu kœgugu dœ kœyindœrœ nene, tshe ga tœ ala Ndjaba nene. Gbambanœ nene, uzu neke á tshe yindœ kœna ga ndœ Ndjaba, œ li adœke tshe yindœ nœ adœke Ndjaba sœ zœ, yé tshe sœ kœgi tshangba œrœ fœ azu á endje sœ kœpara she.
11.7: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Nowa dji lima o'o ama Ndjaba lɔkɔ á tshe ma œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje bala mbatsha fœ she. Nowa za o'onœ dœ ádá yé œ mbœrœ egerœ agba ndœ kœshe azu tshelœ bɨngɨ nœ ye. Ataa, tshe wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga pa azu nœ tshapashɔ yeka á wuta lima uzu ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba mbœrœ kœyindœrœ.
11.8: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Abrayamo dji lima Ndjaba á tshe e she kœna ga lœ ogo á tshe pa lima ndœ kœza tœnœ fœ she. Abrayamo katœ ogo ye tɨ ndœ kœna ga tœ osho á tshe wuwusœ nœ nene.
11.9: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Abrayamo na kœsœ ɓata gene ɓa tœ osho á Ndjaba pa tœ nœ fœ she. Tshe sœ lima kœlo sœnda gbanda tande bale dœ Izaka œdœ Yakobo á o'onœ á Ndjaba pa lima ndœ nœ, sœ ndje mbœrœ endje.
11.10: Gbambanœ nene, Abrayamo sœ lima kœkate ongbo neke á sœ dœ kiti anda ndjoro, á Ndjaba dœ tœ ye dœ ayi kœyisœ mara kœmɔ tœnœ œdœ ayi kœmɔ tœnœ.
11.11: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Sara ndje, ataa ungu nœ kœzu agbolo ro lima ye, tshe zu lima gbolo mbœrœ á tshe za Ndjaba tœ uzu á tshe yayapa o'o ama ye nene.
11.12: Mbœrœ tœnœ ndje ataa, uzu bale á tshe ndo dœ kuzu, zu azu ndjoro á endje sœ ɓata angerepe ɓa lafo dœ pe mindu tœ ama egerœ ungu á endje li kœdɨ tœnœ nene.
11.13: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, azu para á endje tshu lima, endje gbɔgbɔ lima œrœ á Ndjaba pa tœnœ fœ endje nene. Kashe endje wu lima œtœnœ œ yindœ nœ lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ yé œ wusœ nœ adœke œne kœdœ agene œdœ aayi kœna ana pa ɔshɔ.
11.14: Gbambanœ nene, azu á endje pa mara o'o ataa, sœ kœma ngbɨ adœke œne sœ kœpara ogo nœ œne.
11.15: Yé œdœ endje kœsœ kœgbe dœ ogo á endje to lima lœnœ, endje kwa má tœ endje ga zœ ye.
11.16: Dœ adjapu, endje sœ lima kœpara ogo á ga dopanœ, ogo ɓa lafo. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Ndjaba sœsœ dœ tshula adœke endje e œne Ndjaba nœ endje nene; yé tshe guma ongbo bale fœ endje.
11.17: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Ndjaba wu lɔsu Abrayamo, tshe za gbolo nœ ye Izaka tœ tokóró, tshe za gbolo nœ ye tshebabale, andaa Ndjaba pa lima tœ œrœ fœ she.
11.18: Yé Ndjaba pa lima fœ she adœke: «Lœ awa nœ Izaka dá ɓœ gbɔ bala aata zœ á mœ patœ endje fœ ɓœ.»
11.19: Abrayamo sœ lima kœpa adœke Ndjaba li kœshe she uzu lœ kuzu. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, tshe wu lima gbolo nœ ye ɓata uzu á tshe she lœ kuzu.
11.20: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ ndje, Izaka to kane ye ga pa Yakobo dœ pe Ezawu ndœ tshambatsha.
11.21: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Yakobo ndo ndœ kœtshu tœnœ, œ to kane ga pa agbolo nœ Yozefu bale dœ bale yé œ gote dœ kœtra kumu ye ga tœ mato tshɔngbɔlɔ, yé á donga Ndjaba.
11.22: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, ndoo dœ olo kuzu Yozefu, tshe gbara o'o tœ upu nœ kœwuta agbolo Israyele lœ Ezipito yé œ za awa o'o tœ mara á endje mbœrœ dœ ngbabi ye.
11.23: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Moyize, manda kœzu she, abanœ dœ ayinœ za lima she yiwatœ nœ manda yapu votɔ mbœrœ endje wu lima kœga nœ gbolo nœ endje, yé endje sœsœ lima dœ awa awa o'o nœ gbozugo nene.
11.24: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, lɔkɔ á Moyize wuta gbozu, tshe vwara lima tœ ye adœke endje e œne gbolo nœ yawuru nœ Farawo.
11.25: Tshe yi lima ndœ nœ adœke œne wu oyo awa bale dœ azu nœ Ndjaba, yé œ vwaratœ ye tœ œsœ nœ kœsœ lœ yanga nœ ekperœ á œndœ nœ œ dɨ nene.
11.26: Tshe wu lima kœyiangba Kristu ɓa ndœ ye ɓata kœgbɔrœ ndjoro á rosœ kœgbɔrœ nœ Ezipito; gbambanœ nene, tshe ko lima ala ye ga pa kœgbɔ bala œrœ tshangbanœ.
11.27: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, tshe katœ Ezipito tɨ œ kpakpa awa oko nœ gbozugo nene, yé tshe shi gbɨ ɓata uzu á tshe sœ kœwu Ndjaba á endje sœsœ kœwu she nene.
11.28: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, tshe mbœrœ lima angbo Pake dœ azu Israyele, yé œ pa fœ endje adœke endje dja indji agea ga pa manda nœ endje mbœrœ andjelu nœ kœwo azu kœro, á kœwowo aeya agbolo yakoshe nœ endje nene.
11.29: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, azu Israyele zu lima egerœ odoro ungu ɨngbɨrɨ ɓata ɔɔrɔ osho, yé azu Ezipito yi lima ndœ kœzu manda endje yeka á ungu su ga pa endje kpɔlirɔ.
11.30: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Azu Israyele fa lima dje ɨndɨrɨ gbagba Yeriko manda olo mindu dœ bisha (7) yeka á kavwa.
11.31: Lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, Rahabe, yashe gugatɨ tshutshu lima awa bale dœ azu á endje vwaratœ endje ndœ kœdji Ndjaba nene, mbœrœ tshe za lima osho kœsœ fœ agene á endje na kœwu osho utshunœ yeka á kœgu kœvatɔ nœ.
11.32: O'o gaɗe dá mœ kpa pa a? Mœ sœsœ dœ lɔkɔ ndjoro ndœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ Jedeyo, Barake, Samesone, Jefete, Davidi, Samwele dœ pe aayi kœgbara o'o nene.
11.33: Mangba kœyindœrœ, endje gbɔ lima tœ osho nœ anga azu ogo, endje za lima o'o nœ kœsœ ndjii ga tœ akwa, endje gbɔ lima œrœ á Ndjaba pa tœnœ fœ endje ye, endje i lima ama amuru ga tœnœ;
11.34: endje ru lima gbɔgbɔ nœ owo, endje she lœ kuzu ɨngɨrɨ yakamba, endje á endje sœ lima dœ koɓa she dœ ɔtshɔnœ, endje sœ lima dœ gbɔgbɔ lœ koshe, endje gɔrɔ lima angbɨ aturugu.
11.35: Ayashe wu lima azu nœ endje á endje tshu, kœkwa dœ soro. Kashe anga azu wu lima oyo waa, ataa endje vwaratœ endje kœwuta lœ ekperœ mbœrœ á kœgbɔ kœshe lœ akuzu.
11.36: Ayingba endje sœ lima kœmɔ endje dœ kœɓi endje dœ ndjapa, kœi endje dœ djingiri dœ kœko endje va ga lœ anda kánga.
11.37: Endje ve lima endje dœ badja á wo endje, œ wa tshelœ anga endje dœ sii, œ wo anga endje dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba, endje sœ lima kœlo djezœ ngbangbangba, endje verœ lima ɔkɔ apata too œnœ ayaburu; endje gugu lima dœ œrœ nene, endje sœ lima kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ endje, endje sœ lima kœwu oyo waa,
11.38: endje á tshapashɔ gaga dœ endje nene. Endje sœ lima ɓa lœ kpagagasho œdœ ɓa pa kaga, endje sœ lima ɓa lœ ɔngɔ badja dœ pe ɓa lœ gorokpa.
11.39: Endje kɔ, endje ma o'o tœ upu nœ endje mangba kœyindœrœ nœ endje, kashe endje gbɔgbɔ œrœ á Ndjaba pa lima tœ nœ nene.
11.40: Yé Ndjaba kpa guma lima sœ œrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kœrosœ nœ fœ azœ, œ li adœke azœ dœ endje, a sœ awa bale á kœli.

12.1: Ataa, azœ ndje á a sœ dœ atimu ndjoro ɨndɨrɨ azœ, a katœ kongba nœ azœ kɔ œdœ ekperœ á sœ kœlɨ azœ lœ ana nœ azœ, a kpa ɔrɔ dœ kœru lɔsu lœ awa á endje za ga utshu azœ.
12.2: A ko ala azœ ga pa Yisu á tshe mbœrœ adœke a sœ dœ kœyindœrœ tœ alinœ œrrr ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ. Tshe yindœ kœtshu pa kurushi yé œ gbegbe dœ tshula neke á sœ mbœrœ mara kuzu ataa nene, mbœrœ tshe vwara lima tœ ye tœ yanga neke á endje gumasœ nœ fœ she, yé ngɔngɔ asœ tshe sœ ga pa kuni ngande tshagbozu nœ Ndjaba.
12.3: 'E gbe dœ she tœ mara á tshe ru lɔsu ye lœ œrœ kɔ á aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ mbœrœ ga tœ ye yeka á 'e kœmɔmɔ lœ gbetshelœ nœ 'e nene.
12.4: Gbambanœ nene, lœ koshe nœ 'e mbœrœ ekperœ, 'e nganga damba anganœ œrrr ga lœ kuzu nene.
12.5: Yé œndœ upu á endje sœ kœmɨ fœ 'e ɓata agbolo djerœ 'e ye a? «Gbolo nœ mœ, vwavwaratœ zœ tœ djofele nœ Gbozu nene, mɔmɔ lœ gbetshelœ nœ zœ nene lɔkɔ á tshe kœsœ kœgbagbara ɓœ.
12.6: Gbambanœ nene, Gbozu sœ kœyɔrɔ uzu á tshe yindœ ye, yé œ sœ kœza djofele fœ gbolo kɔ á tshe yindœ ye.»
12.7: Mbœrœ kœmbœrœ ala fœ 'e dá 'e sœ kœwu oyo. Ndjaba sœ kœmbœrœ dœ 'e ɓata agbolo nœ ye. Gbolo ɗe dá abanœ zaza djofele fœ she nene a?
12.8: Œdœ endje kœzaza djofele fœ 'e ɓata á endje za fœ agbolo kɔ nene, dá 'e dœ́dœ́ agbolo nœ Ndjaba nene, kashe 'e kœdœ agbolo á alaba 'e sœ kpi.
12.9: Alaba azœ pa ɔshɔ kœdœ aayi kœmbœrœ ala fœ azœ, yé a sœ kœdji endje. Tœ kœrosœ nœ kɔ, œ li adœke a dji Aba azœ nœ ɨshirɨ yeka á kœgbɔ soro lœ ye.
12.10: Yé endje, endje sœ lima kœza djofele fœ azœ ndœ olo teasho ɓata á endje yi lima ndœ nœ. Kashe Ndjaba sœ kœza djofele nœ ye fœ azœ mbœrœ adœke a sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ dœ pe kœgi mara á tshe sœ yerœ dœ tœnœ fœ azœ.
12.11: Lɔkɔ á azu sœ kœgbɔ djofele, endje sœ kœwu adœke tœnœ kœdœ œrœ nœ yanga nene, kashe œrœ nœ oyo. Kashe œrrr manda nœ, azu á endje wu mara djofelenœ asœmœ œ gbɔ œrœ á sœ kœza kœsœ gee œdœ kœmbœrœ adœke uzu sœ ndjii. Kœmɨ upu œdœ kœgbota tshelœ utu
12.12: Ataa, 'e yɔrɔ tshelœ kane 'e á mɔɔmɔ œdœ matshukuda 'e á sœ vwelevwele.
12.13: Yé mbœrœ ada 'e, 'e guma awa ndjii mbœrœ adœke aayi gbada kœkoko ada endje tɔsho dœ uku nene, kashe endje she.
12.14: 'E para kœsœ gee dœ azu kɔ, dœ pe kœsœ yerœ á mbœrœ tœnœ nene, uzu bale œ wu Gbozu nene.
12.15: Ala 'e gbɔ adœke uzu bale wuwuta lœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba nene. Uzu bale sœsœ ɓata eshe ɔyɔ á shuushu, á kœtetœ kœndanga too kœli ga lœ azu ndjoro nene.
12.16: Ala 'e gbɔ tœ kœmbœrœ angba budu too ayi kœmbœrœtœ œrœ á sœ yerœ ɓata á Ezawu mbœrœ lima á ka tshagbozu nœ ye kolœ mbœrœ kœzɨrœ awa bale.
12.17: Gbambanœ nene, 'e wusœ nœ manda nœ adœke, tshe yi lima ndœ nœ adœke aba œne to kane ye ga pa œne á œne kœgbɔ ɔtshɔrœ á Ndjaba pa lima tœnœ, yé tshe lili lima ndœ kœgbɔ tœnœ nene. Tshe gbɔgbɔ awa ndœ kœfa gbetshelœ nœ abanœ nene, ataa kœdɨ tshelœma nœ ye dœ kœkɨ dœ ngola ye gbaa.
12.18: E'e, 'e nana ndoo dœ anga adja œrœ á endje li kœgoro tœnœ nene: ɓata owo á sœ kœju tœnœ, ubu osho, osho á wu narɨ, ndavuru yugu,
12.19: tshama ngbake, tshama azu. Azu á endje sœ lima kœdji tshama œrœ ataa, vwaratœ endje ndœ kœdji anga o'o ga pa nœ ye.
12.20: Gbambanœ nene, endje lili lima kœru lɔsu endje tœ awa o'o asœke nene: «Uzu á tshe ɔ ga pa kaga asœ, œdœ agea, œ li adœke endje ve she dœ badja.»
12.21: Œrœ á endje sœ lima kœwu tœnœ za awa fœ endje, yé Moyize pa adœke: «Mœ sœ kœde gbaragbara dœ awa.»
12.22: Kashe e'e, 'e na ndoo dœ kaga siyona dœ pe lœ ongbo nœ Ndjaba nœ soro, dœ Yerusaleme nœ tshalafo, osho á aandjelu kutu dœ kutu sœ dœ angbɔtœ nœ angbo,
12.23: œdœ angbɔtœ nœ aeya agbolo á endje sú ɨ'ɨrɨ endje ɓa lafo, á Ndjaba ayi kœwa ngbanga nœ azu para, dœ pe ɨshirɨ azu á endje li.
12.24: 'E na ga ndœ Yisu á tshe dœ uzu ugurutœ tafo ayo, á indji ye gɔrɔ ekperœ para yé á kpa sœ kœpa o'o kœropa indji Abele.
12.25: Ala 'e gbɔ adœke 'e vwavwaratœ 'e ndœ kœdji uzu á tshe sœ kœpa o'o fœ 'e nene! Gbambanœ nene, endje gbɔ lima djofele lɔkɔ á endje vwaratœ endje kœdji uzu á tshe sœ lima kœgbota tshelœ utu endje ɓa pa ɔshɔ. Endje á endje gbɔ djofelenœ ataa, á kœfutœ azœ a? A gbɔ ndje djofele œdœ á kœvwaratœ azœ kœdji tsheneke á tshe sœ kœpa o'o fœ azœ ɓa lafo.
12.26: Œshe á ɔshɔ sœ kœturu tœnœ ndœ tshama ye, ngɔngɔ asœke tshe sœ kœpa fœ azœ adœke: «Tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ, mœ mbœrœ adœke kolœ ɔshɔ dá turu nene, kashe tshalafo ndje.»
12.27: O'onœ á tshe kpa pa awa bale tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ adœke œrœ kɔ á tshe mbœrœ lima ga pa tshapashɔ á sœ kœturu tœnœ œ yiwa, yé œneke á sœsœ kœturu tœnœ nene œ sœpe.
12.28: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, a gbɔ ogo neke á turu nene, a tepa ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Lœ awa nœ œtœnœ, a mbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba dœ mara á tshe yindœ nœ, a dji she dœ pe kœkpa awa ye.
12.29: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba nœ azœ kœdœ owo á ju œrœ.

13.1: 'E sœpe kœyindœtœ 'e dœ anga 'e ɓata aayazu.
13.2: Œndœ kœza osho kœsœ fœ azu djedjerœ 'e nene. Gbambanœ nene, mangbanœ dá anga azu za lima osho kœsœ fœ aandjelu, kashe endje wuwusœ nœ ataa nene.
13.3: 'E gbe ndje dœ endjeneke á endje sœ lœ anda kánga ɓata 'e dœ aayi kánga awa bale dœ endje kane. 'E gbe ndje dœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ endje, mbœrœ e'e ndje, 'e sœ dœ ɔkɔ ɓata endje.
13.4: Œ li adœke azu kɔ lɨsœ totœ, yé anga ayi totœ bale lolo dœ anga angbɨ uzu kpi nene. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba œ wa bala ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ aayi angba budu œdœ ga tœ ayi totœ á tshe para angbɨ uzu.
13.5: Œ lili adœke kœyindœsho mbœrœ ngendja ndɨ ɔtshɔ 'e nene; 'e za lɔsu 'e ga pa neke á 'e sœ dœ tœnœ mbœrœ Ndjaba dœ tœ ye pa adœke: «Mœ katœ zœ tɨ bala nene, œndœ zœ œ djerœ mœ bala nene.»
13.6: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, a li dœ lɔsu azœ djigi kœpa adœke: «Gbozu kœdœ ayi kœtɨ kane mœ, mœ sœsœ dœ awa nœ œrœ bale nene. Œrœ gaɗe dá uzu li kœmbœrœ tœ mœ a?»
13.7: 'E gbe dœ agbozu tshapa 'e á endje pa O'o ama Ndjaba fœ 'e kane. 'E gbe dœ mara á soro endje ka dœ tœnœ, yé œ mbœrœtœ 'e lindœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje.
13.8: Yisu Kristu yayapatœ ye nene, tshe sœ awa bale libi, kpesheke œdœ waa dœ waa.
13.9: 'E zazatœ 'e tɨ lœ djingili ndœ o'o nœ wala nœ angbɨ azu nene. Gbambanœ nene, œ li adœke ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba to gbɔgbɔ fœ 'e, 'e zaza lɔsu 'e ga pa awa o'o tœ upu nœ kœzɨrœ nene. Endjeneke á endje sœ kœza o'o nœ kœzɨrœ ga tœ akwa, endje gbɔ tshangbanœ nene.
13.10: A sœ dœ ndaba á aayi akwa ɓa lœ gbanda tande lili kœko œneke á endje to dœ tokóró ga panœ á kœzɨ nene.
13.11: Gbambanœ nene, endje sho undu agea, á egerœ nganga Ndjaba œ na dœ indji ye ga tœ œyerœ osho mbœrœ kœyɔndœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœnœ, ɓa ushu tœ gbagba.
13.12: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Yisu, ndœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu wuta yerœ lœ indji ye dœ tœ ye, tshe wuta ɓa ushu tœ ongbo á tshu.
13.13: Ataa, a wuta lœ gbagba ndœ kœna kœgbɔtœ azœ dœ she, yé œ yindœ nœ adœke endje gu azœ dœ mara á endje gu lima she.
13.14: Gbambanœ nene, pa ɔshɔ asœke, a sœsœ dœ ogo kpirɨ nene, kashe a sœ ndœ kœpara awa ogo neke á na bala.
13.15: Lœ awa nœ Yisu, a kœto makabo nœ kœdonga Ndjaba, tœnœ kœdœ itshi á a donga dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye.
13.16: Œndœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ djedjerœ 'e nene, dœ pe kœtɨ kane 'e lœ tœ 'e, mbœrœ mara tokóró ataa dá sœ kœga tœ ala Ndjaba.
13.17: 'E dji agbozu tshapa 'e yé œ zatœ 'e ga atɨ utshu endje. Gbambanœ nene, endje dœ tœ endje dá sœ kœgbɔndœ ɨshirɨ 'e mbœrœ endje dá pa bala ndœ upunœ fœ Ndjaba. Ataa, endje mbœrœ dœ yanga kashe dœ kœpulœma endje nene, ete nene 'e gbɔ œrœ tshangbanœ nene.
13.18: 'E za avwala mbœrœ 'a. Gbambanœ nene, 'a yindœ nœ adœke 'a sœ dœ adja ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ tœ lɔsu 'a ndœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ.
13.19: 'E mbœrœ œtœnœ, mœ sœ kœyɔndœ nœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ adœke 'e za avwala tœ upu nœ mœ á Ndjaba kœza awa fœ mœ katsha ndœ kœkwa ga ndœ 'e. Avwala
13.20: Kaka Ndjaba nœ kœsœ gee, á tshe she lima Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu á fa she tœ ayi kœgbɔndœ apata, á tshe mbœrœ ayo nœ waa dœ waa dœ indji ye,
13.21: to gbɔgbɔ nœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ kɔ á tshe yindœ nœ adœke 'e mbœrœ. Tshe mbœrœ fœ azœ œneke á ga tœ ala ye lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu á mokɔ sœ mbœrœ she lœ ngbugu dœ ngbugu. Ame! Ndɔngɔlɔ o'o œdœ abala
13.22: Alaya, mœ yɔndœ nœ ga ndœ 'e adœke 'e ru lɔsu 'e tœ kœyisœ o'o ama Ndjaba asœ! Mœ susu o'onœ ndjoro nene.
13.23: 'E wusœ nœ adœke aya azœ dœ Timote wuta lœ kánga ye. Œdœ tshe kœna ga mœ katsha, mœ na kœwu 'e awa bale dœ she zœ.
13.24: 'E bala agbozu tshapa 'e para dœ pe ayerœ azu kɔ. Ayerœ azu tshelœ ogo Itali vwa abala fœ 'e.
13.25: Kaka ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba sœ dœ 'e para.

1.1: Abala nœ 'e dœ azu tshelœ mara ndjokpa dœ bisha nœ Ayuda, á 'e ndjɔtshelœtœ 'e lœ ogo djezœ. Œmœ Jake, ayi akwa nœ Ndjaba œdœ Gbozu Yisu Kristu, mœ sœ kœsu mbetinœ asœke fœ 'e. O'o tœ upu nœ kœru lɔsu
1.2: Aaya mœ, œdœ tshelœ áká ɔgbɔ o'o kɔ kœsœ kœna ga tœ 'e, 'e sœ dœ yanga waa mbœrœ tœnœ.
1.3: Gbambanœ nene, 'e wusœ nœ adœke lɔkɔ á 'e kœli ga lœ ɔgbɔ o'o, á kœyindœrœ nœ 'e kœsœpe sheko ga ndœ Yisu, œ mbœrœ adœke 'e shi gbɨ lœ nœ yé 'e yo nene.
1.4: Kashe œ li adœke kœshi gbɨ nœ 'e gerœ yeka á mara kœmbœrœtœ 'e kœsœ tœ ɔtshɔnœ lœ œrœ kɔ, yekane anga œrœ bale kœroro 'e nene.
1.5: Œdœ anga uzu bale ugurutœ 'e kœgugu dœ kœwusœtœ nene, œ li adœke tshe yɔndœ nœ ɓa ndœ Ndjaba á tshe kœto fœ she. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba sœ dœ ayo waa lœ mara kœto dœ œrœ fœ azu para kɔkɔ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu œdœ dœ kœgbagbara osho nene.
1.6: Œ li adœke uzu e osho ndœ nœ dœ kœyindœrœ, kashe dœ sharapu nene, mbœrœ ayi sharapu sœ ɓata loko á yugu œ ɨvwɨ na tœnœ tœ osho kɔ.
1.7: Uzu ataa gbegbe adœke œne œ gbɔ œrœ bale ɓa ndœ Gbozu nene.
1.8: Mbœrœ adœke gbetshelœ nœ ye sœsœ bale nene yé tshe kaka kpirɨ lœ awa nœ ye nene. Ayi oyo dœ ayi kœgbɔrœ
1.9: Kaka adœke gbolo nœ Ndjaba á tshe kœdœ ayi oyo donga tœ ye tœ œneke á Ndjaba œ tɨ she ga lafo,
1.10: yé tsheneke á sthe kœdœ ayi kœgbɔrœ donga tœ ye tœ œneke á Ndjaba œ ku she ga atɨ asœmœ. Gbambanœ nene, œndœ ayi kœgbɔrœ œ dɨ nene mbœrœ tshe sœ ɓata aya ɔyɔ tshelœ kpagagasho.
1.11: Ɔlɔ œ tɔ vwege vwege, œ ɔrɔ ɔyɔnœ, ndɔkɔnœ œ yo ga atɨ yé modonœ œ ka. Awa bale ɓata anga ɔlɔ bale ayi kœgbɔrœ œ ndɨ bala lœ ama akwa nœ ye kɔ. Ndjaba vwavwa uzu ndœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ nene
1.12: Uzu á tshe wusœ kœru lɔsu ye lœ ɔgbɔ o'o, œshe kœdœ uzu nœ yanga. Gbambanœ nene, manda kœma kœru lɔsu nœ ye lœ ɔgbɔ o'o, Ndjaba œ za soro fœ she ɓata œrœ tshangba akwa á tshe gumasœ nœ tœ kœto fœ endjeneke á endje yindœ ye.
1.13: Œ kœsœ adœke lɔsu uzu vwa she ndœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, adja tshe papa adœke: «Ndjaba dá vwa mœ ndœ nœ» nene. Ndjaba gbegbe tœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ nene yé tshe vwa vwa ndje uzu ndœ ekperœ nene.
1.14: Ogo nœ uzu dœ tœ ye dá mbœrœ adœke lɔsu ye vwa she ga lœ ekperœ.
1.15: Manda kœgerœ ekpe ogonœ asœmœ, ekperœ œ wuta lœ nœ yé œ kœsœ adœke ekperœnœ gerœ yekane á kuzu œ wuta lœ nœ.
1.16: Œrœ bale fafara 'e dœ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa asœke nene.
1.17: Ɔtshɔ œrœ kɔ á uzu œ gbɔ gbambanœ to ɓa lafo ɓa ndœ Ndjaba ayi kœmbœrœ ɔlɔ, yapu œdœ pe angerepe. Ɓa ndœ ye, tshe yayapatœ ye nene. Ɓa ndœ ye, aya ubu osho gugu nene.
1.18: Ndjaba yindœ nœ yeka á za soro fœ azœ dœ awa o'o ama ye á dœ́ adja o'o adœke azœ dœ azu utshunœ ugurutœ œrœ kɔ á tshe mbœrœ. Kœdji o'o ama Ndjaba œdœ kœza ga tœ akwa
1.19: E'e dœ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa, 'e wusœ nœ kɔ tœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke: Œ li adœke uzu dœ uzu vwara tœ kœdji o'o kashe tœ kœpa o'o katsha katsha dœ pe kœso ókó katsha katsha nene.
1.20: Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ ókó, tshe lili tœ kœmbœrœ œneke á sœ ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba nene.
1.21: Atamœ, 'e katœ œrœ tshula dœ pe ndje kœmbœrœ ekperœ kɔ tɨ, yé œ yindœ o'o á Ndjaba za fœ 'e dœ ɔmɔ lɔsu. Gbambanœ nene, o'onœ li tœ kœshe 'e.
1.22: Œ li adœke 'e za o'o ama Ndjaba ga tœ akwa, gbetshelœ nœ 'e vwavwa 'e kolœ ndœ kœdjidji nene.
1.23: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ uzu kœdji o'o ama Ndjaba, á kœzaza ga tœ akwa nene, tshe sœ ɓata uzu á tshe sœ kœwu tshatshu ye ɓa la wushirɨ.
1.24: Yé manda kœwu tshatshu ye, tshe gitœ ye yé œndœ tshatshu ye á tshe wu má ro she ye.
1.25: Kashe œdœ uzu kœza awa akwa nœ Ndjaba á li tœ kœvwara uzu lœ kánga, á yindœ nœ dœ lɔsu bale, œdœ œndœnœ kœroro she nene á tshe kœsœ kœdji tœnœ á sœ kœza ga tœ akwa, uzunœ asœmœ œ sœ dœ yanga lœ œrœ nœ ye para kɔkɔ.
1.26: Œdœ anga uzu kœgbe adœke œne kœdœ ayi kœdonga Ndjaba, á kœwuwusœ kœgbɔndœ ama ye nene, gbetshelœ nœ ye sœ tœ kœfara she gbambanœ. Kœdonga Ndjaba nœ ye sœ gbambanœ.
1.27: Œrœ á Aba azœ dœ Ndjaba yindœ nœ adœke uzu mbœrœ tœ kœdonga œne dœ ɔtshɔnœ dœke: kœgbe dœ ayasuru dœ ayashe koya lœ oyo nœ endje, œdœ ndje pe kœgbɔndœ undu ye lœ ekperœ tshapashɔnœ asœke kɔ.

2.1: Aaya mœ, œ kœsœ adœke 'e sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu á tshe sœ lœ mokɔ, adja 'e keke azu ndœ kœwu tshatshu endje nene.
2.2: 'E gbe dœ o'o asœke kane. Œdœ uzu bale kœverœ œrœ kane asœ dœ ɔrœ, á verœ ɔtshɔ lœba á li ga tœ œsœ́ ngbɔtœ nœ 'e, á anga uzu neke á tshe kœdœ ayi oyo kœverœ agba lœba á li ndje dœ tœnœ,
2.3: œ kœsœ adœke 'e lɨsœ́ ayi kœverœ ɔtshɔ lœbanœ, á pa fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ á ɓœ sœ ke, sœ ga atɨ kpœke ga tœ ɔtshɔ osho asœke», yé á kœpa fœ ayi oyonœ adœke: «Œɓœ asœke, ka dœ ada zœ ɓa e», too ndje «sœ ga atɨ, ga tœ ɔshɔ ɓa tœ osho á mœ ko ada mœ tɔ ga tœ nœ»,
2.4: œneke á 'e mbœrœ asœmœ má adœke 'e sœ kœwu tshatshu azu, yé 'e wuta ɓata azu kœwa o'o á endje wa ngbanga dœ ekpe gbetshelœ.
2.5: E'e dœ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa, 'e dji mœ kane. Ndjaba ke ayi oyo pa ɔshɔ adœke endje sœ tœ ayi kœgbɔrœ lœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu yeka á endje kœli ga lœ ogo gbozu á Ndjaba pandœ nœ adœke, œne za fœ azu á endje yindœ œne.
2.6: Kashe e'e, 'e wuwu ayi oyo lœ ala 'e gbambanœ nene. Azu aɗe dá sœ kœmbœrœ agbɔ œrœ dœ kumu 'e a? Aɗe dá sœ kœna dœ 'e ga utshu ayi kœwa ngbanga a? Œ dœ́dœ́ ayi kœgbɔrœ nene a?
2.7: Œ dœ́dœ́ kolœ endje dá sœ kœndɨ ɔtshɔ ɨ'ɨrɨ á Ndjaba za ga pa e'e nene a?
2.8: Adja 'e sœ kœmbœrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ œdœ 'e kœsœ kœza awa akwa nœ Gbozu Ndjaba ga tœ akwa. Awa akwanœ á Buku nœ Ndjaba œ pa tœnœ adœke: «Yindœ yanga zœ ɓata á ɓœ yindœtœ zœ dœ tœ zœ.»
2.9: Kashe œ kœsœ adœke 'e ke azu mbœrœ kœwu tshatshu endje, 'e sœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ. Ataa, awa akwa nœ Ndjaba yisœ nœ adœke 'e te dœ o'o ye.
2.10: Yé uzu á tshe kœza awa akwanœ djigi ga tœ akwa, á kœkatœ anganœ bale, tshe te dœ tœnœ para kɔkɔ ye.
2.11: Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe pa adœke: «Adja papara awo uzu too akɔ uzu nene», pa ndje adœke: «Adja ɓœ wowo uzu nene.» Œ kœsœ adœke ɓœ papara awo uzu too akɔ uzu nene, kashe ɓœ kœwo uzu, ɓœ te dœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba para kɔkɔ.
2.12: 'E pa o'o, 'e mbœrœtœ 'e ɓata azu á Ndjaba œ wa ngbanga pa endje liaka awa akwanœ á vwara azœ lœ ekperœ.
2.13: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba œ wu oyo nene œ kœsœ adœke tshe wa ngbanga pa uzu á tshe wuwu ndje oyo azu nene. Kashe kœwu oyo azu ropa kœwa ngbanga ye. Kœyindœrœ œdœ ɔtshɔ akwa
2.14: Aaya mœ, œ kœsœ adœke anga uzu pa adœke œne sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba, á tshe kœmbœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa nene, ádá kœyindœrœ nœ ye sœ zœ dœmœ a? Yé kœyindœrœnœ asœmœ œ she má she kotoo?
2.15: Œ kœsœ adœke anga aya 'e too yingɔ 'e, á tshe kœgugu dœ lœba kœverœ ga tœ ye nene, too ndje dœ rœgo kœzɨ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ nene,
2.16: á anga uzu bale ugurutœ e'e kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E verœ lœba ɨzɨ yé œ gu yé œ zɨ œrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ», kashe 'e toto œrœ á endje gbe dœ tœnœ fœ endje nene, ataa ádá o'onœ á 'e pa sœ zœ dœmœ a?
2.17: Œ sœ ndje awa bale mbœrœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba. Gbambanœ nene, œ kœsœ adœke uzu sœ dœ kœyindœrœ, kashe tshe kœmbœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa nene, kœyindœrœ nœ ye tshu ye.
2.18: Kashe œ kœsœ adœke anga uzu pa adœke: «Œɓœ á ɓœ sœ ke, sœ dœ kœyindœrœ, yé mœ mbœrœ akwa», mœ gi fœ she adœke: «Ma fœ mœ mara á uzu li kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba á kœgugu dœ akwa nene, ataa lœ awa akwa nœ mœ, mœ ma mara á mœ sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba fœ ɓœ.»
2.19: Ɓœ wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba sœ tshebabale? Tœ ɔtshɔnœ. Kashe ekpe ɨshirɨ wu ndje sœ nœ atamœ, yé endje de gbara gbara dœ awa.
2.20: Ɓœ gugu dœ kœwusœrœ nene. Ɓœ yindœ nœ adœke mœ ma fœ ɓœ adœke kœyindœrœ á gugu dœ akwa nene sœ gbambanœ a?
2.21: Ata azœ dœ Abrayamo wuta lima ɔtshɔ uzu tœ ala Ndjaba mbœrœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa, á mbœrœ adœke tshe yi lima ndœ kœza gbolo nœ ye Isaka tœ tokóró fœ Ndjaba.
2.22: Wusœ nœ adœke kœyindœrœ œdœ akwa nœ ye na lima awa bale: kœyindœrœ nœ ye wuta dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ akwa á tshe mbœrœ.
2.23: O'onœ mbœrœtœ ye ɓata á Buku nœ Ndjaba pa adœke: «Abrayamo yindœ o'o ama Ndjaba yé mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Ndjaba wu she tœ uzu á tshe sœ ndjii.» Mbœrœ tœnœ atamœ, Ndjaba e she adœke yanga œne.
2.24: 'E wusœ nœ adœke, uzu œ wuta ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba mbœrœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa, kashe œ sœsœ kolœ mbœrœ kœyindœrœ bale nene.
2.25: Œ sœ ndje awa bale tœ upu nœ Rahabe yashe gu ga atɨ ɓa lœ Yeriko. Œ dœ́dœ́ mbœrœ akwa nœ ye dá tshe wuta lima uzu ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba na a? Tshe za lima osho kœsœ fœ ayi avwa nœ Ayuda, á ko endje kpa wuta tœnœ dœ angbɨ awa.
2.26: Ɓata uzu kœwuwu nene, tshe tshu ye, awa bale œdœ kœyindœrœ nœ uzu kœvwavwa she ndœ kœmbœrœ akwa nene, kœyindœrœ nœ tshu ndje ye.

3.1: Aaya mœ, adja azu ndjoro ugurutœ e'e yiyindœ nœ adœke œne te aayi kœyisœrœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba œ wa bala ɔgbɔ ngbanga pa azœ dœ ayi kœyisœrœ, kœropa œnœ udu anga azu.
3.2: Azœ kɔ, a sœ kœyo tœnœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ. Œ kœsœ adœke uzu mbœrœ ekperœ lœ o'o á tshe pa nene, uzunœ asœmœ kœdœ ɔtshɔ uzu tako. Tshe li ndje kœsœ tœ gbozu tshapa undu ye kɔ.
3.3: A ko yarakowo ga lœ ama ambarata adœke endje dji azœ, yé a yɔrɔ endje adœke endje na tœ awa á a yindœ nœ.
3.4: 'E gbe ndje dœ masuwa: œ sœ tœ egerœnœ gbaa, œdœ ndje ndavuru yugu sœmœ á vwi masuwanœ gbaa, ayi kœgbota tœnœ œ turu kolœ tœ aya yindanœ teasho yekane á fa masuwanœ ngoro ngoro ngoro ga tœ osho á tshe gbe kœfa ga tœ nœ.
3.5: Awa bale dœ tima azœ: œtœnœ kœdœ aya œrœ teasho lœ undu uzu, yé œ sœ kœmbœrœ ko ogboro œrœ. 'E gbe dœ aya owo teasho á tetœ egerœ gusu, yé gusunœ œ ju kpa.
3.6: Tima kœdœ œrœ kote uzu á sœ ɓata owo. Œtœnœ kœdœ anda ekperœ. Œ ndɨ undu azœ dœ uburu yé œ tshi ɓata owo lifelo. Œ ju uzu kœto ɓa tœ kœzu she œrrr kpa ga tœ kuzu ye.
3.7: Uzu kɔ mbœrœ adœke œne dœ gbozu tshapa mara agea kɔ, agea gusu dœ pe ayanu, dœ agea á endje ɔrɔ tœ ɔshɔ, dœ ageatshalangu, yé endje dji she.
3.8: Kashe uzu bale lili tœ kœsœ tœ gbozu tshapa tima ye nene. Tœnœ kœdœ ekperœ á uzu lili kœtepa nœ pa ɔshɔ nene, œ suusu dœ ekpe ɔyɔ tœ kœwo azu.
3.9: A donga Gbozu á tshe dœ Aba azœ dœ tima azœ, yé œ darandœ azu, á Ndjaba mbœrœ endje ɓata ɨshirɨ ye dœ tœ ye, kolœ dœ tima bale asœmœ.
3.10: Ɔtshɔ o'o kœdonga dœ Ndjaba ndje dœ ekpe o'o kœdarandœ azu wuta kɔ kolœ ama azœ. Aaya mœ, œ lili adœke œrœ atake mbœrœtœ ye nene.
3.11: Adja ɔtshɔ ungu dœ ekpe ungu wuta ɓa lima lœ ogoro bale a?
3.12: Aaya mœ, ɔyɔ fige zu ele olive yeka œdœ ɔyɔ vinu á zu ele fige ma? Awa bale ungu kœndjoondjo wuwuta lœ ogoro bale dœ ungu ɨngbɨrɨ nene. Kœwusœtœ á to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba
3.13: Œɗe ugurutœ 'e kɔ kœdœ uzu kœwusœtœ œdœ kœwusœrœ a? Kaka tshe yisœ nœ lœ awa kœmatœ ye tœ uzu nœ ɔtshɔ́ ɔtshɔ yé œ mbœrœ akwa nœ ye para kɔkɔ dœ ɔmɔ lɔsu œdœ pe kœwusœrœ.
3.14: Kashe, 'e kœsœ dœ gbetshelœ kœropa anga 'e, á lɔsu 'e kœsu dœ ekpe úkú, adja 'e koko ombo ga tœ 'e nene yé œ pa wala dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ adja o'o nene.
3.15: Mara kœwusœtœnœ asœke toto ɓa ndœ Ndjaba nene, œ dœ kœwusœtœ tshapashɔ nœ asœke, kœwusœtœ nœ azu, kœwusœtœ á to lœ ekpe ɨshirɨ.
3.16: Gbambanœ nene, úkú œdœ pe kœko ombo ga tœ azu dá sœ kœzu djingili œdœ pe ala ekperœ kɔ.
3.17: Kashe uzu á tshe sœ dœ kœwusœtœ á to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba, tshe kœdœ uzu nœ œyerœ lɔsu, tshe bœbœrœtœ ye nene, tshe sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu, œ sœ ndje dœ lɔsu nœ kœdji azu, tshe dœ́ uzu nœ kœwu oyo anganœ. Tshe kœdœ uzu nœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa, uzu nœ kœwu tshatshu azu nene yé tshe dœ́dœ́ wulapatshɔ nene.
3.18: Azu neke á ndje yindœ kœsœ gee, endje lœ ɓata azu kœdjo kɨndɨ á endje gɨ kœsœ gee dji kpata ɨndɨrɨ endje yé ngwarœ á endje rɔ kœdœ soro á sœ ndjii.

4.1: Œbœrœ œdœ pe koshe ugurutœ 'e to kpœta a? Asœmœ kɔ to lœ ogo nœ e'e dœ tœ 'e á sœ kœdutœ endje lœ gbetshelœ nœ 'e asœmœ nene a?
4.2: 'E sœ dœ ogo kœgbɔ œrœ kashe 'e gbɔ nene yé 'e wuta ayi kœwo azu. 'E sœ dœ úkú mbœrœ œrœ ndjoro yé ɓata á 'e sœsœ kœgbɔ œrœnœ nene, 'e fa ga lœ koshe. 'E gbɔgbɔ œrœ á 'e sœ kœpara nene mbœrœ á 'e ee osho ndœ nœ ga ndœ Ndjaba nene.
4.3: Œ kœsœ adœke 'e e osho ndœ nœ ga ndœ Ndjaba, 'e gbɔ nene mbœrœ á 'e sœ kœ'e osho nœ dœ ekpe gbetshelœ; gbambanœ nene, 'e e osho ndœ œrœ kɔ mbœrœ ogo undu 'e dœ tœ 'e.
4.4: 'E sœ kœfara Ndjaba, 'e fatœ 'e ɓata ayashe angba. 'E wuwusœ nœ nene adœke kœyindœ tshapashɔ nœ asœke kœdœ kœyiangba Ndjaba a? Uzu á tshe kœyindœ tshapashɔ asœke, tshe wuta ngbewo ayingba Ndjaba.
4.5: Buku nœ Ndjaba pa adœke: «Ndjaba sœ dœ úkú waa mbœrœ ɨshirɨ á tshe za ga lœ azœ.» 'E gbe adœke o'onœ asœmœ wuta gbambanœ a?
4.6: Kashe Ndjaba sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ azœ kœropa nœ, gbambanœ nene Buku nœ ye pa adœke: «Ndjaba vwaratœ ye tœ ayengɔ egerœ kumu, kashe tshe sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ endjeneke á endje zatœ endje ga atɨ.»
4.7: Atamœ, 'e zatœ 'e ga tœ o'o ama Ndjaba, œ vwaratœ 'e tœ Satana á tshe kœgitœ ye tœ 'e lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ.
4.8: 'E gitœ 'e ndo dœ Ndjaba yeka á tshe kœgitœ ye ndje ndœ 'e. E'e dœ azu kœmbœrœ ekperœ, 'e yapa ɔtshɔ 'e. E'e á 'e sœ dœ lɔsu bisha bisha, 'e mbœrœ adœke 'e wuta dœ lɔsu bale.
4.9: 'E yindœ nœ adœke 'e dœ́ azu oyo, 'e kɨ. 'E katœ kœmɔtœ 'e yé œ kɨ dœ ngola. 'E katœ kœsœ dœ yanga kashe 'e sœ dœ oyo.
4.10: 'E zatœ 'e ga atɨ utshu Gbozu yeka á tshe kœtɨ 'e ga lafo. Wawa ngbanga pa yanga zœ nene
4.11: Aaya, 'e papa ekpe o'o goro œsœ́ anga 'e nene. Uzu tsheneke á tshe kœpa ekpe o'o goro œsœ́ yanganœ too ndje á kœwa ngbanga pa yanganœ, œ sœ ɓata tshe pa ekpe o'o ga tœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba too ndje tshe wa ngbanga pa nœ. Œdœ ɓœ kœwa ngbanga pa awa akwa, ɓœ kœdœ ayi kœwa ngbanga pa nœ kashe ɓœ dœ́dœ́ ayi kœza ga tœ akwa nene.
4.12: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba bale dá dœ ayi kœza awa akwa dœ pe ayi kœwa ngbanga, œshe dá li kœshe azu too kœwo endje. Kashe œɓœ kœdœ ɗe yekane á kœwa ngbanga pa yanga zœ a? 'E katœ kœdonga tœ 'e dœ tœ 'e
4.13: 'E dji mœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, e'e dœ azu á 'e pa adœke: «Kpœsheke too ɓa mbatsha 'a na ɓa lakpɨ asœke, 'a lo ɓa zœ ngbugu bale, 'a ka œrœ nœ 'a yé 'a gbɔ ngendja.»
4.14: Andaa 'e wuwusœ œrœ neke á wuta ga tœ e'e ɓa mbatsha nene. 'E sœ ɓata ngawo á da yé œndœnœ œ dɨ nene yeka á yiwa.
4.15: 'E li má kœpa adœke: «Œ kœsœ adœke Gbozu yindœ nœ, á 'a kœsœpe dœ soro, 'a mbœrœ œrœ neke, too ndje œneke asœke.»
4.16: Kashe ngɔngɔ asœ, 'e sœ kœdonga tœ 'e tœ œrœ á 'e gbe tœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ. Kœdongatœsho kɔ nœ mara asœke sœ tœ ekpenœ.
4.17: Atamœ, uzu á tshe wusœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ á yiyindœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene, sœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ.

5.1: 'E dji mœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, e'e dœ ayi kœgbɔrœ: ngɔngɔ asœ 'e kɨ, 'e sa rawa mbœrœ oyo á sœ kœkate 'e!
5.2: Œrœ nœ 'e á 'e gbɔ fu yé akɔkɔ zɨ lœba nœ 'e ye.
5.3: Ɔrœ nœ 'e dœ pe kowo nœ 'e ko ngbandji. Ngbandjinœ má fœ 'e adœke 'e ndo tœ kœsho 'e dœ owo. 'E ngbɔɓa kœgbɔrœ ndjoro mbœrœ e'e dœ tœ 'e, andaa kœka tshapashɔnœ asœke ndo ye.
5.4: 'E wu œrœ tshangba akwa kɨndɨ á ayi akwa nœ e'e mbœrœ fœ 'e á 'e vwaratœ 'e kœko fœ endje. Œ sœsœ ndjii nene! 'E dji mara á endje sœ kœkɨ tœnœ yé Gbozu á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ dji ɨkɨ endje.
5.5: 'E gbɔ œrœ waa lœ soro 'e pa ɔshɔ yé 'e mbœrœ œneke á lɔsu 'e yindœ nœ. 'E wuta ɓata ayarœ ojoro á endje gbɔndœ endje tœ kœwo endje.
5.6: 'E wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga pa azu, 'e wo endjeneke á endje sœ ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba yé endje vwavwaratœ endje nene. Kœru lɔsu
5.7: Atamœ aaya, 'e sœ dœ kœru lɔsu œrrr ga tœ kœkwa Gbozu Yisu. 'E gbe dœ kœru lɔsu nœ ayi kœdjo kɨndɨ: manda kœni ali yavuru, tshe tɔrɔ kɨndɨ nœ ye. Tshe kate anga yavuru œrrr ga tœ anga osho mbœrœ kœzɨ ngwarœ kɨndɨ nœ ye.
5.8: E'e ndje awa bale, œ li adœke 'e sœ dœ kœru lɔsu, œ shi gbɨ tœ lɔsu 'e; gbambanœ nene, lɔkɔ kœkwa Gbozu ndo ye.
5.9: Aaya, 'e pupulœma 'e ugurutœ 'e tœ upu nœ anga 'e nene mbœrœ á endje kœwawa ngbanga pa 'e nene. 'E wu: ayi kœwa ngbanga ka lœ talamanda.
5.10: Aaya, 'e mbœrœ mara œrœ nœ aayi kœgbara o'o á endje sœ lima kœpa o'o dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu: mara á endje sœ liya kœru lɔsu endje lœ ɔgbɔ o'o á sœ lima kœna ga ndœ endje.
5.11: 'E wu: a e endje azu yanga mbœrœ kœru lɔsu nœ endje. 'E dji o'o tœ upu kœshi gbɨ nœ Yobo yé 'e wu œneke á Gbozu mbœrœ fœ she manda nœ; gbambanœ nene, Gbozu sœ lima dœ ugu lɔsu œdœ pe lɔsu nœ kœwu oyo.
5.12: Kœropa nœ kɔ, aaya mœ, adja 'e wawa ɨgɨ 'e ndje dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Ndjaba nene, too dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ uzu nene, too ndje dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ anga œrœ bale nene. Kaka adœke 'e le «Œ̃» œ kœsœ adœke 'e yindœ o'onœ. Á 'e kœle «œ̃œ̃» œ sœ adœke 'e vwaratœ 'e tœ o'onœ mbœrœ adœke 'e tete dœ o'o utshu Ndjaba nene. Kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba
5.13: Œ kœsœ adœke anga uzu bale ugurutœ 'e sœ kœwu oyo, tshe kɨ ga ndœ Ndjaba. Á œ kœsœ adœke tshe kœsœ dœ yanga, tshe donga Ndjaba.
5.14: Œ kœsœ adœke anga uzu bale ugurutœ 'e sœ dœ koɓa, tshe e agbozu Ikrizia, yé endje kɨ fœ Ndjaba tœ ye manda kœta kada ga tœ ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu.
5.15: Kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba dœ kœyindœrœ œ she uzu lœ koɓa. Gbozu kpa to gbɔgbɔ fœ she œ ɨvwɨ she ga lafo yé œdœ tshe kœmbœrœ ekperœ, Ndjaba œ djerœndœ nœ.
5.16: Atamœ, œ li adœke 'e pandœ ekperœ nœ 'e uzu dœ uzu fœ yanga nœ, 'e kɨ fœ Ndjaba uzu dœ uzu mbœrœ yanga nœ yekane á 'e kœshe. Gbambanœ nene, ákpálá ɨkɨ nœ uzu á tshe sœ ndjii fœ Ndjaba li kœmbœrœ egerœ akwa.
5.17: Eliya kœdœ lima uzu ɓata azœ. Tshe kɨ fœ Ndjaba dœ lɔsu ye bale adœke, yavuru nini nene, yé œ mbœrœ ngbugu votɔ dœ yapu mindu dœ amanœ bale, yavuru nini pa ɔshɔ nene.
5.18: Manda nœ, tshe kpa kɨ fœ Ndjaba, ngbewo yavuru ni, yé ele ɔyɔ ko pa ɔshɔ.
5.19: Aaya, œdœ uzu bale ugurutœ 'e kœdji awa, yé anga uzu kœgi she ga tœ awa,
5.20: 'e wusœ nœ adœke uzunœ á tshe gi ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ lœ ekpe awa, she ayanœ yé Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ukpulu ekperœ nœ ye á tshe mbœrœ asœmœ.

1.1: Œmœ Petro, ayi avwa nœ Yisu Kristu, mœ sœ kœsu mbetinœ asœke fœ 'e dœ azu á Ndjaba ke 'e, á 'e ndjɔtshelœtœ 'e á wuta agene ɓa lœ ogo Po, Galate, Kapadose, Azi, œdœ pe Bitini.
1.2: Ndjaba Aba wu ɓa lima sœ 'e katshatsha utshunœ, yé á ke 'e adœke 'e dœ azu nœ ye. Tshe mbœrœ adœke 'e wuta ayerœ azu lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ nœ ye, adœke 'e dji o'o ama Yisu Kristu yekane á tshe kœdjutɔ ekperœ nœ 'e dœ indji ye. Kaka Ndjaba yisœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu œdœ kœsœ gee nœ ye fœ 'e tɔ pa nœ kpuru. A donga Ndjaba mbœrœ tafo soro á tshe za fœ azœ lœ Yisu Kristu
1.3: A donga Ndjaba á tshe dœ́ Aba Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu; gbambanœ nene, tshe sœ dœ oyo waa ga ndœ azœ. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, tshe za tafo soro fœ azœ lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu á tshe shé she ugurutœ akuzu. Ndjaba mbœrœ ataa mbœrœ a kœko lɔsu azœ ga tœ soronœ á a gbɔ asœmœ,
1.4: a sœ dœ ɔtshɔrœ á Ndjaba gumasœ nœ kate azœ ɓa lafo. Œtœnœ kœdœ œrœ á yiwa nene, œ za ngbandji nene yé œ gba ndje nene.
1.5: Ndjaba œ gbɔndœ 'e dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ye mbœrœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e ga ndœ ye œrrr adœke 'e gbɔ kœshe á ndo tœ kœmatœ ye dœ lɔkɔ kœka tshapashɔ.
1.6: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e sœ dœ yanga, œdœ œ kœsœ adœke ngɔngɔ asœke 'e wu oyo tœ tshelœ aka ɔgbɔ œrœ kɔ á wuta ga tœ 'e.
1.7: Œ li adœke endje yamba kœyindœrœ nœ 'e ɓata endje yamba ɔrœ dœ owo. Andaa kœyindœrœ nœ 'e ropa ɔrœ ye; gbambanœ nene, ɔrœ kœdœ œrœ á œndœnœ œ dɨ nene. Œdœ 'e kœtepa kœyindœrœ nœ 'e kperœ, adja Ndjaba œ donga 'e, œ za mokɔ dœ kœlɨsœtœ fœ 'e dœ lɔkɔ á Yisu œ kwatœ ye.
1.8: Œshe á 'e wuwu she dœ ala 'e nene kashe 'e yindœ ye, 'e wuwu she nene kashe 'e sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e sœ dœ egerœ yanga nœ mokɔ, á uzu œ li kœpandœ maranœ kɔ nene.
1.9: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba œ za kœshe fœ 'e ɓata œrœ tshamanda kœyindœrœ nœ 'e.
1.10: Aayi kœgbara o'o nœ Ndjaba pa lima o'o tœ upu nœ kœshenœ yé endje gbara o'o tœ upu nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba ga ndœ 'e asœmœ.
1.11: Gbambanœ nene, Ɨshirɨ nœ Kristu sœ lima pa endje yé œ gbara lima o'o fœ endje tœ upu nœ œrœ kanga á Kristu œ wu, œdœ ndje mokɔ á tshe gbɔ manda nœ. Aayi kœgbara o'onœ para lima awa kɔ adœke œne wusœ lɔkɔnœ œdœ pe mara á œrœnœ asœmœ œ mbœrœtœ endje.
1.12: Yé Ndjaba yi lima sœ nœ fœ aayi kœgbara o'o adœke, endje gbara lima o'onœ asœmœ tœ upu nœ endje dœ tœ endje nene kashe tœ upu nœ 'e dá aayi kœgbara o'onœ gbara lima o'o á ngɔngɔ asœ aayi kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Yisu Kristu na dœ tœnœ fœ 'e. Endje yi lima sœ nœ lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ á Ndjaba vwa lima she kœto ɓa lafo, yé ngɔngɔ asœke aandjelu sœ ndje dœ yanga mbœrœ kœwusœ nœ. Mara kœmbœrœtœ uzu á za yanga fœ Ndjaba
1.13: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e guma gbetshelœ nœ 'e mbœrœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba. 'E dœ agbozu tshapa undu 'e dœ tœ 'e yé 'e ko lɔsu 'e kɔ ga pa ɔtshɔrœ á 'e gbɔ dœ lɔkɔ á Yisu Kristu œ kwatœ ye.
1.14: Ɓata e'e kœdœ agbolo kœdji o'o ama Aba 'e, 'e zaza lɔsu 'e ga pa œrœ nœ́ anga 'e nene ɓata á sœ lima utshunœ adœke 'e wusœ œrœ.
1.15: Kashe ɓata tsheneke á tshe e 'e, œshe kœdœ Œyerœ Ndjaba, œ li adœke e'e, 'e sœ ndje yerœ lœ mara kœmbœrœtœ nœ 'e kɔ.
1.16: Mbœrœ tœnœ dá endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «'E sœ yerœ gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ yerœ.»
1.17: Yé œdœ 'e kœsœ kœ'e Ndjaba adœke Aba lɔkɔ á 'e kœsœ kœza avwala nœ 'e fœ she, œ li adœke 'e kpa awa ye lœ olo kœsœ nœ 'e pa ɔshɔ mbœrœ tshe wuwu tshatshu uzu nene, kashe tshe wa o'o nœ uzu dœ uzu kœli dœ akwa nœ ye.
1.18: 'E wusœ nœ adœke mara kœmbœrœtœ 'e utshunœ á 'e gbɔ lima manda aata 'e gaga nene. Ndjaba she 'e lœ nœ kɔ, tshe sheshe 'e dœ œrœ á ndɨ ɓata ngendja too ɔrœ nene.
1.19: Kashe tshe she 'e dœ indji Kristu á amanœ gbɔ waa. Tshe sœ ɓata aya pata á anga œrœ kote ye ndɨndɨ bale nene, á œndœ uburu teasho gugu tœ ye nene.
1.20: Ndjaba ke lima she utshunœ adœke tshe mbœrœ tshapashɔ, yeka á mbœrœ adœke tshe na dœ ndɔngɔlɔ oshonœ asœke tœ upu nœ 'e.
1.21: Lœ awa nœ ye, 'e sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba á tshe shé she lœ kuzu, yé á za mokɔ fœ she dœ mara adœke kœyindœrœ nœ 'e œdœ pe lɔsu 'e sœ ga pa Ndjaba.
1.22: 'E wuta yerœ mbœrœ á 'e tetœ kœza adja o'o ga tœ akwa. Œtœnœ dá sœ kœvwa 'e adœke 'e sœ dœ adja kœyindœsho, ataa 'e kakatœ nœ nene, 'e yindœtœ 'e ugurutœ 'e dœ lɔsu 'e djigi.
1.23: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba zu 'e tœ bishanœ lœ awa nœ o'o ama ye á dœ́ soro, á sœpe ungu dœ ungu. Kashe œ sœsœ lœ awa nœ uzu á tshe tshu nene.
1.24: Endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Azu para kɔkɔ sœ ɓata a'eara ɔyɔ, mokɔ nœ endje sœ ɓata ndɔkɔ a'eara ɔyɔ: a'eara ɔyɔ œ ɔrɔ yé ndɔkɔnœ œ yo.
1.25: Kashe o'o ama Gbozu Ndjaba œ sœpe waa dœ waa.» Andaa o'onœ asœmœ, œtœnœ kœdœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ á endje yisœ nœ fœ 'e.

2.1: Mbœrœ tœ nœ ataa, 'e katœ ekperœ kɔ, dœ kœfara osho kɔ œdœ úkú, dœ mara wulapatshɔ kɔ, dœ egerœ ogo kœgbɔ œrœ, dœ ndje kœpa ekpe o'o ga tœ uzu kɔ tɨ ye.
2.2: Kashe 'e sœ ɓata awaya. Endje sœ kolœ dœ ogo kœa ɔngɔ ayi endje, ɔngɔnœ á li adœke 'e para kœdœ adja o'o yekane á 'e kœgerœ á kœgbɔ kœshe.
2.3: Gbambanœ nene, œ sœ ɓata á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «'E wusœ nœ dœ tœ 'e adœke adja Gbozu sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.» Badja soro mbœrœ anda nœ Ndjaba
2.4: 'E na ga ndœ ye, œshe kœdœ badja soronœ á azu za lima vwi'i kashe Ndjaba ke lima, yé œ wu adœke amanœ gbɔ waa.
2.5: E'e ndje atamœ, 'e wuta ɓata badja soro á Ndjaba sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ dœ anda á Ɨshirɨ nœ ye sœ lœ nœ. Tshe fa 'e tœ ayerœ anganga Ndjaba, mbœrœ á 'e kœko tokóró nœ Ɨshirɨ neke á za yanga fœ she lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu.
2.6: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «'E wu, mœ ke anga badja á anda œ shi mbœrœ tœnœ, á amanœ gbɔ waa á za tɔ ɓa lakpɨ Siyona mbœrœ kœmɔ anda nœ mœ ga pa nœ. Uzu kɔ á tshe za lɔsu ye ga pa nœ, tshe gbɔ tshula bale nene.»
2.7: Mbœrœ 'e á 'e yindœ ye asœmœ, tshe sœ ɓata badja á amanœ gbɔ waa; kashe mbœrœ azu á endje yiyindœ ye nene, ádá badjanœ asœmœ gugu nene. Endje su ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Badjanœ á aayi kœmɔ anda vwaratœ endje tœnœ wuta badja á anda œ shi mbœrœ tœnœ.»
2.8: Endje kpa su ndje adœke: «Badjanœ asœmœ, azu œ ko ada endje tɔ tœnœ, yé œ ko endje vesho.» Endje sœ kœko ada endje tɔ tœnœ mbœrœ á endje sœsœ kœyindœ kœdji o'o ama Ndjaba nene. Ataa œrœ á yi lima ndœ kœmbœrœtœ ye fœ endje asœmœ, dá na asœmœ.
2.9: Kashe e'e, 'e kœdœ azu tshelœ mara á Ndjaba ke. E'e kœdœ anganga nœ Gbozu. E'e kœdœ ayerœ azu nœ Ndjaba, á tshe ke 'e adœke 'e gbara ɔtshɔrœ á tshe mbœrœ fœ azu. Œshe dá gbota 'e lœ ubu osho mbœrœ kœko 'e ga lœ mokɔ nœ ye á ropa nœ ye.
2.10: Utshunœ, 'e dœ́dœ́ lima azu nœ Ndjaba nene; kashe ngɔngɔnœ asœ, 'e wuta azu nœ ye. Utshunœ, Ndjaba wuwu lima oyo 'e nene; kashe ngɔngɔ asœ, tshe wu oyo 'e ye. E'e kœdœ akanga nœ Ndjaba
2.11: Aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa, 'e sœ ɓata azu á endje sœ kœroro tœnœ, azu á endje dœ agene pa ɔshɔ. Atamœ, mœ sœ kœmɨ upu fœ 'e adœke: 'e vwaratœ 'e tœ ekpe gbetshelœ nœ ɔkɔ á sœ kœnga koshe dœ ɨshirɨ 'e.
2.12: 'E mbœrœtœ 'e dœ ɔtshɔnœ ugurutœ ayingba Yisu. Ataa œdœ endje kœpa adœke e'e kœdœ azu kœmbœrœ ngbɨndɨrœ gbaa, endje wu ɔtshɔ akwa nœ 'e á 'e mbœrœ yé endje donga Ndjaba lɔkɔ á tshe kœkwatœ ye.
2.13: 'E lɨsœ agbozu tshapa ɔshɔnœ asœke mbœrœ 'e kœdœ azu nœ Gbozu Yisu, œdœ ndje gbozugo á tshe sœ pa azu para kɔkɔ asœmœ,
2.14: ndje dœ pe agbozu á tshe vwa endje ndœ kœza djofele fœ aayi kœmbœrœ ngbɨndɨrœ ndje dœ kœdonga aayi kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ asœmœ.
2.15: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba yindœ nœ adœke 'e mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ yeka azu á endje ndɨ lœ ekperœ á wuwusœ œrœ nene, kœsœsœ dœ o'o ndœ kœpa tœ upu nœ 'e nene.
2.16: 'E mbœrœtœ 'e ɓata azu á endje kpa dœ́dœ́ akanga nene. Kashe adja œneke kpa zaza awa fœ 'e kœmbœrœ ekperœ nene, kashe 'e mbœrœtœ 'e ɓata akanga nœ Ndjaba.
2.17: 'E lɨsœ azu para kɔkɔ yé œ yindœ aaya 'e. 'E kpa awa Ndjaba, yé œ lɨsœ gbozugo nœ 'e. A mbœrœ mara œrœ nœ Kristu
2.18: 'E dœ aayi akwa, 'e lɨsœ ayengɔ 'e. 'E lɨlɨ kolœ œsœ́ endjeneke á endje sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ ndje dœ endjeneke á endje sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nene, kashe 'e lɨ ndje sœ endjeneke á endje sœ dœ ɔgbɔ lɔsu.
2.19: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ uzu kœru lɔsu ye lœ œrœ kanga á lili má adœke tshe wu nene mbœrœ kœkpa awa Ndjaba, œ ga waa.
2.20: Ataa, ɔtshɔrœ gaɗe dá uzu œ gbɔ œ kœsœ adœke tshe wu oyo mbœrœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ a? Kashe œ kœsœ adœke tshe wu oyo mbœrœ á tshe mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ, œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ tœ ala Ndjaba.
2.21: Asœmœ kœdœ œrœ á Ndjaba e 'e mbœrœ tœnœ, gbambanœ nene Kristu dœ tœ ye wu lima oyo mbœrœ 'e. Tshe yisœ awa fœ 'e adœke, 'e wu mara á tshe mbœrœ lima asœmœ yé œ mbœrœtœ 'e ndje liaka nœ.
2.22: Tshe mbœmbœrœ lima ekperœ nene yé wala hiaru wuwuta lima lœ ama ye nene.
2.23: Azu gu she, kashe tshe gigi fœ endje nene. Endje mbœrœ ɔgbɔ œrœ ga tœ ye, yé tshe susuku dœ uzu nene kashe tshe za lima tœ ye fœ Ndjaba á tshe wa o'o dœ adjapu.
2.24: Lɔkɔ á endje wo lima she pa kurushi, tshe za lima agba ekperœ nœ azœ ga pa ye. Tshe mbœrœ lima ataa yeka á a kœwuta azu á endje tshu tœ œneke á dœ́ ekperœ yé á sœ dœ soro ndœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii. Œshe, á ukunœ á tshe gbɔ asœmœ, œ she 'e.
2.25: Gbambanœ nene, 'e sœ lima ɓata apata á endje djingili awa; kashe ngɔngɔnœ asœke, 'e fatœ 'e ga ndœ ayi kœgbɔndœ apata, á tshe kœdœ ayi kœgbɔndœ ɨshirɨ 'e.

3.1: E'e dœ ayashe ndje, 'e lɨsœ aakɔ 'e mbœrœ œ kœsœ adœke anga endje vwaratœ endje tœ kœdji o'o ama Ndjaba, yé œdœ 'e kœyiyi ndje sœ o'o ama Ndjaba fœ endje nene gbaa, endje fatshalɔsu endje mbœrœ kœmbœrœtœ nœ 'e dœ awo endje,
3.2: kœwu kolœ okporo mara kœmbœrœtœ nœ 'e œdœ ndje pe mara á 'e sœ kœlɨsœ endje.
3.3: Adja kœga nœ 'e mama kolœ tœ ye ɓa ushu nene: ɓata mara kœguma dœ sukumu 'e, dœ kœverœ œrœ á endje mbœrœ dœ ɔrœ ga tœ 'e, ndje dœ kœverœ lœba á ga waa.
3.4: Kashe œ li adœke, a sœ dœ kœga á zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ ɓa tœ lɔsu azœ. Asœmœ kœdœ kœga neke á ndɨ nene: kœsœ dœ lɔsu zɨtɨ œdœ kœsœ gee, œtœnœ dá amanœ gbɔ waa tœ ala Ndjaba.
3.5: Atamœ dá ayerœ ayashe liya utshunœ á endje ko lima lɔsu endje ga tœ Ndjaba, á sœ lima kœlɨsœ aakɔ endje, endje guma lima tœ endje dœ maranœ asœke.
3.6: Ɓata Sara á tshe dji lima o'o akɔnœ dœ Abrayamo, yé á e lima she gbozu nœ ye. 'E wuta ayawuru nœ ye œ kœsœ adœke 'e sœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ yé œdœ 'e kœkakatœ 'e tɨ adœke anga œrœ bale za awa tœ 'e nene.
3.7: 'E dœ ayakoshe ndje, lœ kœsœ nœ 'e dœ awo 'e, 'e wusœ nœ adœke endje kœdœ amɔ azu kœropa 'e. 'E lɨsœ endje, mbœrœ endje ndje, endje gbɔ soronœ á Ndjaba œ za fœ azu awa bale dœ 'e. 'E mbœrœ ataa yeka anga œrœ bale kœkukundœ avwala nœ 'e ga ndœ Ndjaba nene. 'E wu oyo tœ upu nœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii
3.8: Ndangba o'o nœ mœ fœ 'e kœdœ adœke, e'e para kɔkɔ 'e sœ dœ gbetshelœ bale, 'e sœ dœ lɔsu kœtɨ kane anga 'e, 'e yindœtœ 'e ɓata aaya azu, 'e wu oyo anga 'e yé œ kotœ 'e ga atɨ.
3.9: Adja 'e gigi ekperœ manda ekperœ nene, 'e gugu ndje azu neke á endje gu 'e nene. Kashe 'e to kane 'e ga pa endje gbambanœ nene, mbœrœ tœnœ dá Ndjaba e 'e adœke œne to kane œne ga pa 'e.
3.10: Œ sœ ɓata œneke á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Uzu á tshe kœyindœ kœsœ dœ ɔtshɔ soro, yé œ sœ dœ yanga pa ɔshɔnœ asœke, œ li adœke adja tshe gbɔndœ tima ye tœ ekpe o'o, yé œ gbɔndœ ama ye tœ kœpa wala.
3.11: Œ li adœke tshe katœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, yé œ mbœrœ kolœ ɔtshɔrœ. Tshe mbœrœ dœ mara kɔ adœke, œne sœ dœ kœsœ gee dœ azu yé œ shi gbɨ.
3.12: Gbambanœ nene, ala Ndjaba sœ pa azu á endje sœ ndjii, yé utu ye sœ ndœ kœdji avwala nœ endje, kashe tshe fa tshaangba ye fœ aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ.»
3.13: Œɗe dá mbœrœ ekperœ fœ 'e œdœ 'e kœzatœ 'e djigi ndœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ a?
3.14: Œdœ azu kœsœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ 'e mbœrœ á 'e sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii, 'e sœ dœ yanga. 'E kpakpa awa endje bale nene yé 'e koko lɔsu 'e ga lafo nene.
3.15: Kashe 'e tepa Kristu ga tœ lɔsu 'e ɓata œyerœ Gbozu nœ 'e. 'E gumatœ 'e ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ mbœrœ kœpa ádá á 'e za lɔsu 'e ga pa Kristu fœ azu á endje yu 'e tœnœ.
3.16: Kashe 'e gi o'o fœ endje dœ ɔmɔ lɔsu, dœ kœlɨsœ endje œdœ pe ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ yekane azu á endje sœ kœpa adœke e'e kœdœ ekpe azu, á sœ kœpatœ ɔtshɔ 'e kœgbɔ tshula.
3.17: Kashe œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke 'e wu œrœ kanga tœ upu nœ ɔtshɔrœ á 'e sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ œdœ Ndjaba kœyindœ nœ. Œneke asœ da ga kœropa kœwu œrœ kanga manda kœmbœrœ ekperœ.
3.18: Gbambanœ nene, Kristu dœ tœ ye tshu lima awa bale ngbewo lœ kumu ekperœ nœ azu, œshe á tshe sœ ndjii tshe tshu mbœrœ azu á endje sœsœ ndjii nene, mbœrœ kœko 'e na tœnœ ga ndœ Ndjaba. Endje wo kolœ undu ye kashe tshe she lœ kuzu dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.
3.19: Yé dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɨshirɨnœ asœmœ, tshe na ndœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ aɨshirɨ endjeneke á endje lœ lœ kánga ɓa lœ ogo nœ akuzu.
3.20: Endje vwara lima tœ endje tœ kœdji o'o ama Ndjaba kashe Ndjaba kate lima endje dœ ugu lɔsu dœ lɔkɔ á Nowa sœ lima kœmbœrœ egerœ agba á kolœ azu teasho, mindu dœ votɔ li lima ga lœ nœ yekane á she lima la ngunœ.
3.21: Ungunœ asœmœ má batisimu á she 'e lœ ekperœ nœ 'e ngɔngɔ asœ: ungunœ œ djutɔ uburu tœ undu uzu nene, kashe œ she uzu œdœ tshe kœzatœ ye fœ Ndjaba dœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ. Batisimunœ she 'e mbœrœ á Yisu Kristu she lœ kuzu ye.
3.22: Tshe gu ga lafo yé œ sœ ga atɨ ga pa kuni Ndjaba. Tshe kœdœ Gbozu tshapa aandjelu, ga pa tshagbozu kɔ œdœ ga pa gbɔgbɔ kɔ ɓa lafo.

4.1: Ataa, ɓata á Kristu wu oyo lœ ɔkɔ ye, œ li adœke 'e sœ dœ gbetshelœ nœ kœru lɔsu lœ ɔgbɔ œrœ ɓata œnœ ye. Gbambanœ nene, uzu kɔ á tshe sœ kœwu oyo lœ ɔkɔ ye, katœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ ngbewo.
4.2: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e kpa nana manda ogo nœ ɔkɔ nene kashe 'e mbœrœ œrœ á Ndjaba yindœ nœ lœ udu soro 'e pa ɔshɔnœ asœke.
4.3: Lima utshunœ, 'e mbœrœ lima œrœ á azu á endje wuwusœ Ndjaba nene sœ lima dœ yanga kœmbœrœ tœnœ. 'E sœ lima kœmbœrœ angba budu, kœza lɔsu 'e ga pa œrœ nœ́ anga 'e, kœndjo œrœ œrrr adœke œ mbœrœ 'e, kœzɨ œrœ dœ pe kœndjo œrœ dœ wuma tɔpanœ kpuru, kœdonga lima andjaba á dœ́ ekperœ á gaga nene.
4.4: Kashe ngɔngɔ asœ, azu á endje wuwusœ Ndjaba nene za ama endje tɨ asɔ tœ kœwu 'e yé œ tetœ kœgu 'e mbœrœ á 'e kpa sœsœ kœngbɔtœ 'e dœ endje lœ kœmbœrœ kœngba œrœ tshulanœ alœmœ nene.
4.5: Andaa ɔlɔ bale, endje pa o'o tœ mara kœmbœrœtœ endje fœ Ndjaba á tshe gumatœ ye ndœ kœwa ngbanga pa azu á endje sœ dœ soro ndje dœ azu á endje tshu.
4.6: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, tshe yi ndje lima sœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ akuzu adœke manda kœwa ngbanga pa endje ɓata azu, endje sœ dœ soro ɓata Ndjaba lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ. Mara kœmbœrœtœ nœ azu nœ Kristu
4.7: Œrœ kɔ ndo kœwuta ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ ye. 'E ma kœwusœtœ yé œ dœ agbozu tshapa undu 'e adœke 'e kœli tœ kœza avwala nœ 'e fœ Ndjaba.
4.8: Utshunœ kɔ, œ li adœke 'e yindœtœ 'e ugurutœ 'e dœ lɔsu 'e bale. Gbambanœ nene, kœyindœshonœ asœ œ za awa fœ 'e adœke 'e djerœndœ ekperœ ndjoro.
4.9: Œ li adœke 'e za osho kœsœ fœ anga 'e kashe 'e mbœmbœrœ dœ kœpulœma 'e nene.
4.10: Ɓata á Ndjaba ko 'e tœ aayi kœgbɔndœ œrœ nœ ye, yé á to gbɔgbɔ liakanœ fœ 'e asœmœ, œ li adœke uzu dœ uzu za gbɔgbɔnœ ga tœ akwa mbœrœ kœtɨ kane anganœ.
4.11: Œdœ anga uzu ugurutœ 'e kœsœ kœpa o'o, œ li adœke tshe pa o'o á to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba. Yé uzu nœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ azu, tshe mbœrœ dœ gbɔgbɔ á Ndjaba za fœ she. 'E mbœrœ adœke mara kœmbœrœtœ 'e lœ œrœ kɔ donga Ndjaba lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu, á tshe sœ dœ mokɔ, dœ gbɔgbɔ neke á sœ waa dœ waa. Ame! 'E ru lɔsu 'e lœ ɔgbɔrœ ɓata azu nœ Kristu
4.12: Aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa, 'e zaza ama 'e tɨ asɔ mbœrœ ɔgbɔrœ á na ga ndœ 'e nene. 'E wuwu ndje ɓata anga œrœ kpi nene.
4.13: Kashe œ kœsœ adœke 'e wu oyo ɓata á Kristu wu lima, 'e sœ dœ yanga adœke lɔkɔ á mokɔ nœ ye œ matœ endje, e'e ndje, 'e sœ dœ yanga kœropa nœ kpuru.
4.14: Œdœ endje kœpa ekpe o'o ga tœ 'e mbœrœ á 'e kœdœ azu nœ Kristu, 'e kœdœ azu nœ yanga. Gbambanœ nene, Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba á sœ dœ mokɔ asœmœ sœ pa 'e.
4.15: Adja anga uzu bale ugurutœ 'e wuwu oyo mbœrœ á tshe kœdœ ayi kœwo azu, too ayi angba, too ayi kœmbœrœ ngbɨndɨrœ, too ayi kœli ga lœ o'o nœ azu nene.
4.16: Kashe œdœ tshe kœwu oyo mbœrœ á tshe dœ uzu nœ Kristu, adja tshe sœsœ dœ tshula tœnœ nene, tshe donga Ndjaba mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨnœ á endje za ga pa ye.
4.17: Ɔlɔ kœwa ngbanga nœ Ndjaba tɔ, yé tshe tetœ kœwa tœnœ utshunœ pa azu nœ ye. Œ kœsœ adœke tshe tetœ kœwa ngbanganœ pa azœ, ataa azu á endje vwaratœ endje tœ kœyindœ Ɔtshɔ O'o, endje ka kpœta a?
4.18: Œ sœ ɓata á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Œ kœsœ adœke uzu á tshe sœ ndjii œ wu oyo utshunœ yekane á Ndjaba œ she she, ataa œrœ gaɗe dá wuta ga tœ uzu á tshe vwaratœ ye tœ Ndjaba œdœ uzu kœmbœrœ ekperœ a?»
4.19: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, azu á endje sœ kœwu oyo mbœrœ endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á Ndjaba yindœ nœ, œ li adœke endje sœpe kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ yé œ za lɔsu endje djigi ga tœ Ndjaba á tshe mbœrœ œrœ kɔ, á tshe yayapa o'o ama ye nene.

5.1: Mœ sœ kœmɨ upu fœ agbozu Ikrizia ugurutœ 'e. Œmœ kœdœ ndje gbozu Ikrizia ɓata 'e, mœ wu œrœ kanga á Kristu wu dœ ala mœ yé mœ gbɔ ndje bala mokɔnœ á ndo tœ kœmatœ ye asœmœ.
5.2: 'E gbɔndœ azu nœ Ndjaba á tshe ko endje fœ 'e ɓata aayi kœgbɔndœ apata œ mbœrœ. 'E mbœmbœrœ akwanœ ɓata endje vwa 'e ndœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ dœ ɔgbɔ nene, kashe 'e mbœrœ dœ lɔsu 'e bale ɓata á Ndjaba yindœ nœ. Adja 'e gbɔgbɔndœ endje dœ gbetshelœ nœ kœgbɔ œrœ ndjoro lœ kumu endje nene, kashe 'e zatœ 'e kɔ ndœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
5.3: Adja 'e zazatœ 'e ga pa endjeneke á Ndjaba ko endje fœ 'e asœmœ ɓata agbozu nene, kashe 'e dœ azu kœyisœ mara ɔtshɔ neke á sœ tœ ɔtshɔnœ fœ endje.
5.4: Yeka lɔkɔ á egerœ Ayi kœgbɔndœ apatanœ kœkwa bala tœ ye, á tshe kœko œrœ tshangbanœ á dœ kpoto mokɔ, á ndɨ nene fœ 'e.
5.5: Awa bale, 'e dœ amodo, 'e lɨsœ agbozu Ikrizia. 'E dœ azu para kɔkɔ, 'e zatœ 'e ga atɨ lœ kœsœ 'e dœ anga 'e; gbambanœ nene, endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Ndjaba vwaratœ ye tœ azu egerœ kumu, kashe tshe ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ azu kœzatœ endje ga atɨ.»
5.6: 'E zatœ 'e ga atɨ ga tshagudɨ kane gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba, adœke tshe ko 'e ga lafo dœ lɔkɔ á tshe guma.
5.7: 'E katœ gbetshelœnœ á za oyo fœ 'e kɔ fœ Ndjaba; gbambanœ nene, tshe to œrœ á 'e gbe dœ tœnœ fœ 'e.
5.8: 'E dœ agbozu tshapa undu 'e, yé ala 'e gbɔ kane! Gbambanœ nene, Satana á tshe kœdœ yingba 'e sœ kœfa djezœ tœ osho kɔ ɓata bamara kœpara uzu ndœ kœsuru tshelœ ye.
5.9: 'E vwaratœ 'e tœ ye yé œ ka ngbɨrɨ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e. 'E wusœ nœ adœke, oyonœ á 'e wu asœke, anga anga 'e dœ aayi kœyindœrœnœ lœ ndje kœwu tœnœ pa tshapashɔ asœ djigi.
5.10: Ngɔngɔ asœ 'e sœ kœwu oyo yé œndœnœ œ dɨ nene, kashe Ndjaba á tshe sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu kɔ, á tshe e 'e kœngbɔtœ 'e bale dœ Kristu lœ mokɔ á ka nene, tshe kpa guma 'e dœ tœ ye manda kœwu oyo teasho tœ 'e, tshe mbœrœ adœke 'e mɔmɔ lœ kœyindœrœ nene, tshe to gbɔgbɔ fœ 'e adœke 'e kœshi gbɨ.
5.11: Kaka tshe dœ Gbozu ga pa œrœ kɔ waa dœ waa. Ame! Ndɔngɔlɔ o'o
5.12: Mœ su ondo mbetinœ asœ fœ 'e lœ awa nœ aya azœ dœ Sila, á tshe zatœ ye djigi fœ Ndjaba. Mœ yindœ kœza kœru lɔsu fœ 'e, œdœ ndje kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba á dœ́ adjapu, adœke 'e shi ngbɨrɨ lœ nœ.
5.13: Azu Ikrizia lœ Babilone ɓa ke á Ndjaba ke endje ndje ɓata 'e asœmœ vwa abala fœ 'e. Gbolo nœ mœ ndje dœ Marke vwa abala fœ 'e.
5.14: 'E za abala kœyindœsho nœ mœ ga ugurutœ 'e ɓata aaya azu. Kaka Ndjaba za kœsœ gee fœ 'e para kɔkɔ, e'e á 'e ngbɔtœ 'e bale dœ Kristu.

1.1: Œmœ Shimu Petro, ayi akwa nœ Yisu Kristu œdœ ndje ayi avwa nœ ye, mœ sœ kœsu mbetinœ asœ fœ e'e á 'e wuta aayi kœyindœrœ. 'E gbɔ kœyindœrœ á amanœ gbɔ waa, awa bale ɓata 'a lœ awa nœ Ndjaba nœ azœ á tshe sœ ndjii œdœ Yisu Kristu Ayi kœshe azœ.
1.2: Kaka 'e sœ dœ egerœ kœsœ gee lœ awa nœ kœwusœ Ndjaba œdœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu, yé endje ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ endje ga ndœ 'e tɔpanœ kpuru. 'E pa avwara adœke mara kœmbœrœtœ 'e sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ
1.3: Dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ye œnœ Ndjaba, Yisu Kristu to œrœ kɔ á li dœ azœ lœ soro ndje dœ ɔtshɔ mara kœmbœrœtœsho utshu Ndjaba. Œshe dá e azœ lœ awa nœ mokɔ nœ ye dœ tœ ye, á mbœrœ adœke a wusœ ye ndje dœ ɔtshɔ akwa nœ ye.
1.4: Ataa, tshe ko œrœ á amanœ gbɔ waa á tshe pa lima ndœ kœko fœ azœ yekane lœ awa nœ kœgbɔ tœnœ, á 'e kœli kœwuta lœ ekperœ tshapashɔnœ á azu sœ dœ ogo kœmbœrœ tœnœ á ndɨ endje asœmœ, yé 'e kœza mara nœ œne dœ Ndjaba.
1.5: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e pa avwara adœke 'e za ɔtshɔ kœmbœrœtœsho ga pa kœyindœrœ nœ 'e. Ga pa ɔtshɔ kœmbœrœtœsho nœ 'e asœmœ, 'e dœ azu nœ kœwusœrœ.
1.6: Ga pa kœwusœrœnœ, 'e dœ agbozu tshapa undu 'e; ga pa nœ, 'e sœ dœ kœru lɔsu. Ga pa kœru lɔsunœ, 'e zatœ 'e djigi ndœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba.
1.7: Ga pa nœ, 'e sœ dœ kœyindœsho, yé œ sœ dœ ayo.
1.8: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ 'e kœsœ kœmbœrœ œneke kɔ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, œ za awa fœ 'e ndœ kœmbœrœ akwa á zu leyɔ fœ Ndjaba. Ataa, œ mbœrœ adœke 'e wusœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu.
1.9: Kashe uzu á tshe kœsœsœ kœmbœrœtœ ye atake nene, tshe sœ ɓata uzu á ala ye bu á tshe sœ kœtaɓa osho na tœnœ. Tshe djerœndœ nœ adœke Ndjaba djutɔ ekperœnœ á tshe mbœrœ lima kɔ.
1.10: Ataa aaya mœ, 'e kpa pa avwaratœ 'e adœke 'e sœpe azu á Ndjaba e 'e, yé á ke 'e asœmœ. Œdœ 'e kœmbœrœ ataa, 'e yo ga lœ ekperœ bale nene.
1.11: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, sharapu œ gu nene, Ndjaba œ kɔrɔ awa fœ 'e tœ kœli ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu, Ayi kœshe azœ, yé 'e sœ ɓa zœ waa dœ waa.
1.12: Ádánœ ataa, mœ kpa katœ kœpandœ œrœnœ alœke fœ 'e nene, ataa 'e wu ɓalima sœ nœ yekane á shi gbɨ lœ adjapu á endje yisœ nœ fœ 'e asœmœ.
1.13: Kashe mœ wu ndjii adœke, ɓata á mœ sœ damba lœ ɔkɔnœ asœ, mœ sœ kolœ kœpa o'onœ asœke adœke 'e gbe dœ tœnœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ.
1.14: Gbambanœ nene, mœ wusœ nœ adœke olo kuzu mœ ndo ye ɓata á Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu yisœ nœ fœ mœ.
1.15: Kashe mœ mbœrœ kɔ adœke manda kœtshu mœ, 'e li tœ kœgbɔndœ o'onœ asœke tœ osho kɔ. Azu á endje wu mokɔ nœ Kristu
1.16: 'A pa o'o fœ 'e adœke 'e wusœ mara á Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu œ kwatœ ye dœ gbɔgbɔ. O'onœ asœke dœ́dœ́ ndœmatoro á azu guma liaka gbetshelœ nœ endje nene. Kashe 'a wu she lœ mokɔ nœ ye dœ ala 'a.
1.17: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba Aba donga she œ za mokɔ fœ she, mokɔ nœ ye ropa œrœ kɔ, yé á pa lima adœke: «Tsheneke kœdœ Gbolo nœ mœ á mœ yindœ ye waa, mœ sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ she.»
1.18: Adja a'a dœ tœ 'a, 'a dji lima tshamanœ asœ kœto ɓa lafo lɔkɔ á 'a sœ lima tœ œsœnœ dœ she, ɓa pa œyerœ kaga.
1.19: Ga pa œneke asœke, 'a wusœ nœ adœke o'o á aayi kœgbara o'o gbara lima asœmœ, œtœnœ kœdœ adjapu. Œ li adœke 'e dara utu 'e ndœ kœdji kœgbara o'onœ asœmœ, mbœrœ œ sœ ɓata miinda á tshi lœ ubu osho œrrr ga tœ kœkɔrɔ osho yekane á tombele kœtɔ girigiri ɓa tœ lɔsu 'e.
1.20: Utshunœ kɔ, 'e wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke, kœgbara o'onœ á aayi kœgbara o'o sú ɓa la Buku nœ Ndjaba asœmœ, anganœ bale toto lœ gbetshelœ nœ endje dœ tœ endje nene.
1.21: Gbambanœ nene, o'o ama aayi kœgbara o'o toto lœ awa akwa nœ azu nene, kashe Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ dá li ga lœ gbetshelœ nœ endje yekane á endje gbara o'o á to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba asœmœ.

2.1: Utshunœ lima, aayi kœgbara o'o dœ wala wuta lima ga ugurutœ azu Israyele. Awa bale, aayi kœyisœrœ dœ wala œ wuta ndje ga ugurutœ 'e, yé œ yisœ œrœ á li tœ kœndɨ tshelœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e. Endje vwaratœ endje tœ Gbozu á tshe ko lima endje ga shu lœ ekperœ, yé manda aya olo endje gbota kuzu nœ gbaga ga pa endje.
2.2: Azu ndjoro œ za awa œrœ tshula nœ endje asœmœ, yé kpœlœ kumu endje, azu œ gu œsœ́ awa adja o'o nœ Ndjaba.
2.3: Aayi kœyisœrœ dœ walanœ asœmœ, endje sœ dœ egerœ ogo kœgbɔ œrœ waa. Endje pa wala mbœrœ kœbɨlɨ dœ 'e yeka á kœgbɔ œrœ tshakane 'e. Kashe Ndjaba wa ɓa lima ngbanga pa endje ye, yé kuzu nœ gbaga sœ kœkate endje.
2.4: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ ndje aandjelu á endje mbœrœ lima ekperœ, Ndjaba wuwu lima oyo endje nene kashe tshe ko lima endje va ga lœ kudu owo, ɓa tœ osho á bu kongorole dœ djingiri tœ endje. Tshe gbɔndœ endje kœkate lɔkɔ á tshe wa dœ ngbanga.
2.5: Œ sœ ndje ataa awa bale ɓata á Ndjaba wuwu lima oyo azu pa osho nene dœ lɔkɔ á endje vwara lima tœ endje tœ kœdji she. Kashe tshe mbœrœ lima adœke endje nduru dœ lɔkɔ nœ egerœ kœsu ungu pa ɔshɔ djigi. Kashe tshe she lima kolœ Nowa á tshe sœ lima kœmɨndœ o'o á sœ ndjii, awa bale dœ anga azu mindu dœ bisha (7).
2.6: Manda nœ, tshe wa lima ngbanga pa azu ogo Sodomo dœ pe Gomora yé œ sho lima endje dœ owo, yé endje ju lima kɔ. Tshe mbœrœ œneke lima tœ kœma œrœ á wuta mbatsha ga tœ aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ kɔ.
2.7: Kashe Ndjaba she lima Lota, uzu á tshe sœ ndjii, á lɔsu ye sœ lima kœka she tœ œrœ tshulanœ á azunœ sœ lima kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
2.8: Gbambanœ nene, uzunœ á tshe sœ ndjii, á sœ lima ugurutœ endje asœmœ, wu lima endje kœmbœrœ ekperœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, yé œ dji lima endje kœpa ekpe o'o. Kashe ɓata œshe kœdœ lima uzu á tshe sœ ndjii, lɔsu ye sœ lima kœka she tœ ekperœ nœ endje.
2.9: Asœke kɔ sœ kœma adœke, Gbozu Ndjaba wusœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu nœ ye wuta lœ ɔgbɔrœ. Kashe tshe gbɔndœ aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ ndœ kœza djofele fœ endje dœ lɔkɔ nœ kœwa ngbanga.
2.10: Utshunœ kɔ, tshe za ɔgbɔ djofele fœ aayi kœza ekpe awa nœ ɔkɔ, á endje vwaratœ endje adœke Ndjaba dœ́dœ́ Gbozu nœ œne nene. Aayi kœyisœrœ dœ walanœ asœmœ gbe adœke awa akwa nœ œne dœ tœ œne li ye. Endje kœdœ aayi egerœ kumu, endje sœsœ dœ awa kœgu œsœ aayi mokɔ ɓa lafo nene.
2.11: Andaa œdœ ndje aandjelu á endje ropa endje dœ egerœ gbɔgbɔ, endje papa o'o tœ kœgu œsœ aayi mokɔnœ asœke utshu Ndjaba nene.
2.12: Kashe azunœ asœmœ sœ ɓata agea á endje gugu dœ kœwusœrœ nene, á Ndjaba mbœrœ endje adœke azu gɨ uku endje, œ wo endje, yé endje fu. Endje sœ kœgu œsœ œrœ á endje wuwusœ ádánœ nene. Endje fu ɓata agea.
2.13: Endje gbɔ bala œrœ tshangba ekperœ kɔ á endje sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ, endje sœ kolœ dœ yanga ndœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ dœ adja ɔlɔ. Œdœ 'e kœsœ kœzɨ œrœ dœ endje tœ osho bale, endje sœ kœsœ dœ yanga kœbɨlɨ 'e yé mara kœmbœrœtœ endje sœ kœndɨ ɨ'ɨrɨ 'e.
2.14: Ala endje fa kolœ ndœ kœmbœrœ angba budu, endje sœsœ kœmɔ dœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ nene yé endje sœ kœbɨlɨ azu á endje mɔɔmɔ ndœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ. Lɔsu endje sú dœ ogo kœgbɔ œrœ. Ataa, Ndjaba œ wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga pa endje tako.
2.15: Endje katœ awa á sœ ndjii yé œ gu ndœ awa Balaame, gbolo nœ Bosɔre á tshe yi lima ndœ kœgbɔ ngendja lœ awa nœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ.
2.16: Kashe Ndjaba gbagbara lima Balaame mbœrœ ekperœ á tshe mbœrœ. Mbœrœ mbarata á tshe papa o'o nene te lima tœ kœpa o'o fœ Balaame ɓata uzu, yé œ pakata ye adœke tshe gbagbara o'o iyinœ asœmœ nene.
2.17: Aayi kœyisœrœ dœ walanœ asœmœ sœ ɓata kumu ungu á ɔrɔ, endje sœ ɓata yavuru á bu kpikpikpi, kashe œ ni nene. Ndjaba guma ɓalima osho kœsœ á bu kporokoto kœ vu dœ endje.
2.18: Endje sœ kœpa o'o á ádánœ gugu nene mbœrœ kœmatœ endje. Endje sœ kœgbota azu á endje wuta damba ngɔngɔ ugurutœ azu á endje sœ lœ djingili, adœke endje kpa kwatœ endje ndœ kœmbœrœ œrœ tshula á undu endje sœ kœvwa endje ndœ nœ.
2.19: Endje sœ kœmɨndœ nœ adœke aayi kœza awa œne wuta tshakudu kanga ye, andaa endje kœdœ adja akanga nœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á yi osho ga lœ ufu œrœ. Gbambanœ nene, œdœ uzu kœtɔpe œrœ deorrr, tshe te kanga nœ œrœnœ asœmœ.
2.20: Azunœ asœmœ wu lima sœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu á tshe kœdœ Ayi kœshe azœ, yé mbœrœ kœwusœrœnœ asœmœ, endje wuta lima lœ œrœ tshapashɔnœ asœke á ndɨ azu. Kashe œ kœsœ adœke endje kpa kwatœ endje ndœ nœ yé á kpa kotœ endje djigi ga lœnœ dœ mara adœke gbɔgbɔnœ ropa endje, atamœ kœsœ nœ endje ngɔngɔ asœ wuta tœ ekpenœ kœropa œneke lima utshunœ.
2.21: Gbambanœ nene, œ sœ má lima dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke endje wu lima sœ awa kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ nene. Kashe œ sœ tœ ekpenœ kœropa nœ mbœrœ endje á endje wusœ nœ yeka á manda nœ á endje kpa katœ œyerœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba á endje yi lima sœ nœ fœ endje.
2.22: Œneke á mbœrœtœ endje fœ endje asœke li dœ gbaguru á pa adœke: «Yavoro ndja œ kpa kwatœ ye kœzɨ kœndja nœ ye» too ndje adœke: «Endje djutɔ kote kɔso yé katsha tshe kpa vwɨrɨtœ ye lœ kpata.»

3.1: Aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa, asœke kpa kœdœ bisha mbeti á mœ su fœ 'e. Yé ɓala mbetinœ kɔ bibisha asœke, mœ su o'o tœ kœjo 'e tœ upu á 'e wu ɓa lima sœ nœ adœke 'e wuta dœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ.
3.2: 'E gbe dœ o'onœ á ayerœ aayi kœgbara o'o pa lima utshunœ kane, yé œ gbe ndje dœ awa o'onœ á Gbozu á tshe kœdœ Ayi kœshe osho ko lima fœ 'e lœ awa nœ aayi avwa á tshe vwa lima endje fœ 'e.
3.3: Utshunœ kɔ, 'e wusœ nœ adœke, ndo dœ lɔkɔ kœka bala tshapashɔ, aayi kœmɔ osho á endje sœ kœna manda ogo undu endje dœ tœ endje, endje wuta. Endje tetœ kœmɔ 'e,
3.4: yé œ pa adœke: «Adja Yisu œ kwatœ ye liaka œneke á tshe pa lima zœ da a? Gbambanœ nene, aata azœ tshu ɓalima yé œrœ bale yayapatœ ye manda endje nene. Œrœ kɔ sœpe kolœ liaka œneke á Ndjaba mbœrœ lima kœto tœ ali kœmbœrœ œrœ pa ɔshɔnœ asœke.»
3.5: Azunœ á endje pa o'onœ asœke djerœndœ nœ adœke, lima utshunœ Ndjaba pa o'o yé tshalafo dœ tshaatɨ wuta. Tshe mbœrœ ɔshɔnœ asœke lœ awa nœ ungu, yé œ sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ mbœrœ ungu.
3.6: Yé Ndjaba ndɨ ndje lima tshapashɔnœ asœke dœ awa nœ egerœ kœsu ungu á su lima pa osho djigi.
3.7: Kashe kolœ dœ o'o ama ye bale, tshe pa lima adœke œne gbɔndœ tshalafo œdœ tshapashɔ nœ ngɔngɔ asœ ndœ kœsho tœnœ dœ owo dœ lɔkɔ á œne wa ngbanga œdœ dœ lɔkɔ kœndɨ aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ.
3.8: Kashe e'e dœ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa asœke, anga œrœ bale á li adœke 'e djedjerœndœ nœ nene dœke: Gbozu wu olo bale tœ ala ye ɓata ngbugu kutu bale, yé œ wu ndje ngbugu kutu bale tœ ala ye ɓata olo bale.
3.9: Gbozu gbegbeletœ ye tœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á tshe pa tœnœ nene ɓata anga azu œ gbe. Kashe tshe sœ dœ ugu lɔsu ga ndœ 'e mbœrœ á tshe yiyindœ nœ adœke uzu bale ndɨ nene. Kashe tshe yindœ nœ adœke, azu para kɔkɔ fatshalɔsu endje.
3.10: Olo kœkwa Gbozu œ sœ ɓata kœna ayi angba. Dœ olonœ asœmœ, tshalafo œ yiwa yé anga ndavuru tshama œrœ œ kɨ. Owo œ ju œrœ tshalafo para kɔkɔ yé ɔshɔnœ asœ dœ pe œrœ tshapa nœ kɔ œ ju.
3.11: Yé ɓata œrœ kɔ œ ju ataa, œ li dœ 'e kœdœ azu aɗe? 'E mbœrœ kotoo á soro 'e kœsœ yerœ a? 'E mbœrœ kotoo kœlɨsœ Ndjaba a?
3.12: 'E kate olo kœwa ngbanga nœ Ndjaba yé 'e kpa pa avwara adœke olonœ wuta gbara. Olonœ asœmœ, owo œ tetœ kœju tshalafo, yé œrœ tshelœnœ kɔ œ tshanga.
3.13: Kashe a sœ kœkate tafo tshalafo œdœ pe tshapashɔnœ á Ndjaba pa lima o'o tœ nœ adœke œne mbœrœ asœmœ. Azu á endje sœ pa nœ œ dœ kolœ aayi kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii. O'o tœ upu nœ gbɔdjela
3.14: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e dœ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa, lœ kœkate olonœ asœmœ, 'e pa avwara adœke œ gbɔ 'e tœ azu á endje sœ ndjii, á Ndjaba œ gbɔ œrœ bale tœ kœgbagbara 'e lœ kumunœ nene yekane á 'e kœsœ dœ kœsœ gee utshu ye.
3.15: 'E wusœ nœ adœke ugu lɔsu nœ Gbozu nœ azœ kœdœ awa nœ kœshe 'e. Mbœrœ tœnœ dá aya azœ dœ Polo á a yindœ ye waa asœmœ su lima mbeti fœ 'e lœ awa nœ kœwusœtœ á Ndjaba za lima fœ she asœmœ.
3.16: Œtœnœ ndje dá tshe sœ kœpa tœnœ ɓala mbeti nœ ye para kɔkɔ, kashe átá ádánœ gbɔ waa tœ kœwu tshelœ katanœ kporo. Yé anga azu á endje wuwusœ œrœ nene, œdœ endjeneke á endje yayamba œrœ nene, endje sœ kœfa tshelœ o'onœ dœ mara á lili nene. Endje mbœrœ ɓa lima kolonœ ataa dœ anga angbɨ mbeti, endje sœ kœpara kuzu dœ tœ endje.
3.17: Atamœ e'e dœ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e waa, mœ va ɔtɔnœ fœ 'e utshunœ ye. Ala 'e gbɔ adœke azunœ á endje vwaratœ endje tœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba asœmœ kœfafara 'e yeka á kœko 'e vesho nene; yé endje gbogbota 'e lœ œrœ á 'e za lɔsu 'e ga pa nœ nene.
3.18: Kashe œ li adœke 'e sœ kœgerœ lœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu œdœ lœ kœwusœrœ nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu, Ayi kœshe azœ. Kaka tshe gbɔ mokɔ ngɔngɔ asœke, ndje waa dœ waa! Ame.

1.1: A sœ kœsu o'o á wu Uzu á tshe sœ lima katshatsha utshu ali kœmbœrœ œrœ para kɔkɔ. A dji lima she yé a wu ndje lima she dœ adja ala azœ, a wu lima she dœ ɔtshɔnœ yé a goro lima ndje she dœ kane azœ. Œshe kœdœ O'onœ á za adja soro.
1.2: Soronœ asœmœ ma lima tœ ye ga ndœ azu, a wu lima dœ ala azœ, a sœ kœpandœ nœ yé á sœ kœmɨndœ nœ tœ upu nœ ye. Uzunœ á tshe za soro neke á ka nene sœ lima awa bale dœ Aba yekane á na kœmatœ ye fœ azœ.
1.3: Œneke á a wu lima yé a dji, a sœ kœyi ndje sœ nœ fœ 'e dœ ádánœ adœke 'e ngbɔtœ 'e dœ 'a á 'a ngbɔ ndje tœ 'a bale dœ Aba œdœ pe Gbolo nœ ye dœ Yisu Kristu.
1.4: Yé 'a sœ kœsu œneke fœ 'e mbœrœ adœke adja lɔsu azœ su dœ yanga. Ndjaba sœ ɓata ɔlɔ
1.5: O'o á a dji ɓa ndœ Yisu Kristu yé a sœ kœpandœ nœ fœ 'e dœke: Ndjaba sœ ɓata ɔlɔ, ubu osho gugu ɓa ndœ ye bale nene.
1.6: Œdœ a kœpa adœke a ngbɔtœ azœ bale dœ she, kashe a kpa kœsœ kœna lœ ubu osho, dá azœ kœdœ ayi wala, a sœsœ kœmbœrœtœ azœ lindœ adja O'o nene.
1.7: Kashe œdœ a kœsœ kœna tœ ɔlɔ ɓata á Ndjaba dœ tœ ye sœ ɓata ɔlɔ, dá azœ kɔ a ngbɔtœ azœ bale, yé indji Gbolo nœ ye dœ Yisu œ djutɔ azœ lœ ekperœ kɔ.
1.8: Œdœ a kœpa adœke a mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene, a sœ kœfaratœ azœ dœ tœ azœ yé adja o'o gugu lœ azœ nene.
1.9: Kashe œdœ a kœsœ kœpandœ ekperœ nœ azœ ngbɨ ga ushu, Ndjaba á tshe sœ ndjii, tshe za o'o ama ye ga tœ akwa. Tshe djerœndœ ekperœ nœ azœ yé tshe djutɔ azœ lœ kœmbœrœ œrœ nœ azœ kɔ á sœsœ ndjii nene.
1.10: Œdœ a kœpa adœke a mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene, dá a fa Ndjaba tœ ayi wala, yé o'o ama ye sœsœ lœ azœ nene.

2.1: Agbolo nœ mœ, mœ sœ kœsu œneke fœ 'e adœke 'e mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene. Kashe œdœ anga uzu bale kœmbœrœ ekperœ, a sœ dœ ayi kœnga pa azœ bale á tshe sœ ɨndɨrɨ Aba: Œshe kœdœ Yisu Kristu, á tshe sœ ndjii.
2.2: Gbambanœ nene, Yisu Kristu za lima tœ ye fœ kuzu mbœrœ kœgi kuɗa tshangba ekperœ nœ azœ. Œ sœsœ kolœ mbœrœ ekperœ nœ azœ bale nene, kashe ndje mbœrœ œnœ azu pa ɔshɔ kɔ.
2.3: Œdœ a kœmbœrœ tœ azœ lindœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba dá a sœ dœ kœyindœrœ adœke a wusœ ye tako.
2.4: Uzu á tshe kœpa adœke: «Mœ wusœ ye», kashe tshe kœsœsœ kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ awa akwa nœ ye nene, œshe kœdœ ayi wala yé adja o'o gugu lœ ye nene.
2.5: Kashe tsheneke á tshe gbɔndœ o'o ama Ndjaba, dá sœ kœma adœke tshe yi adja ndœ ye dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Matamœ dá a wusœ nœ adœke a ngbɔtœ azœ dœ she bale.
2.6: Tsheneke á tshe du okoro ye adœke œne sœ lœ ngbɔtœ dœ Ndjaba, œ li adœke tshe mbœrœtœ ye ɓata á Yisu mbœrœ lima. Tafo awa akwa
2.7: 'E dœ́ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e, œ dœ́dœ́ tafo awa akwa dá mœ su fœ 'e asœke nene. Œtœnœ kœdœ ongboro awa akwa á 'e wu ɓa lima sœ nœ. Gbambanœ nene, tœnœ kœdœ o'onœ á 'e dji lima katshatsha utshunœ.
2.8: Ataa atamœ gbaa, œtœnœ kœdœ tafo awa akwa dá mœ su fœ 'e. Œ sœ kœmatœ ye lœ mara kœmbœrœtœ Yisu œdœ ndje 'e adœke œ dœ adjapu, mbœrœ á ubu osho tetœ kœyiwa tœnœ yé adja ɔlɔ tetœ kœtɔ tœnœ.
2.9: Uzu á tshe kœsœ kœje ama ye adœke œne sœ lœ ɔlɔ á kpa sœ kœyiangba ayanœ, tshe sœpe lœ ubu osho.
2.10: Uzu á tshe kœyindœ ayanœ, tshe sœ lœ ɔlɔ, yé mbœrœ tœnœ ataa nene, tshe kpa gugu dœ anga gbetshelœ teasho adœke œne gɨ úkú ga tœ awa uzu nene.
2.11: Kashe tsheneke má á tshe yiangba ayanœ, tshe sœ lœ ubu osho. Tshe sœ kœna lœ ubu osho yé œ wuwusœ osho neke á tshe sœ kœna ga tœnœ nene, mbœrœ ubu oshonœ bu ala ye ga tœ nœ ye.
2.12: Agbolo nœ mœ, mœ sœ kœsu œneke fœ 'e gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba djerœndœ ekperœ nœ 'e mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye dœ́ Yisu Kristu.
2.13: Alaba, mœ sœ kœsu œneke fœ 'e mbœrœ 'e wusœ tsheneke á tshe sœ lima utshu ali kœmbœrœ œrœ kɔ. Amodo, mœ sœ kœsu œneke fœ 'e gbambanœ nene, 'e ropa ekpe uzunœ.
2.14: Agbolo nœ mœ, mœ sœ kœsu œneke fœ 'e, gbambanœ nene 'e wusœ Aba. Alaba, mœ sœ kœsu œneke fœ 'e, gbambanœ nene, 'e wusœ tsheneke á tshe sœ lima utshu ali kœmbœrœ œrœ kɔ. Amodo, mœ sœ kœsu œneke fœ 'e, gbambanœ nene, 'e sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ, yé o'o ama Ndjaba sœ lɔsu 'e yé 'e ropa ekpe uzunœ.
2.15: Adja 'e yiyindœ tshapashɔ œdœ pe œrœ tshapa nœ kɔ nene. Œdœ uzu kœyindœ tshapashɔ, dá tshe yiyindœ Aba nene.
2.16: Œrœ tshapashɔnœ dœke: Kœyindœ kœmbœrœ œneke á ga tœ gbetshelœ nœ zœ dœ tœ zœ, too kœyindœ kœsœ dœ œneke á a sœ kœwu tœnœ pa ɔshɔ, kœsœ dœ egerœ kumu ga pa œrœ tshapashɔ. Œtœnœ para kɔkɔ, œ toto ɓa ndœ Aba azœ nene, kashe œ to ɓa pa ɔshɔnœ asœke.
2.17: Tshapashɔ œdœ pe œrœ kɔ pa ɔshɔ á azu œ gbe dœ tœnœ œ ka. Kashe tsheneke á tshe mbœrœ œrœ lindœ gbetshelœ nœ Ndjaba, tshe sœ dœ soro á ka nene. Ayingba Kristu
2.18: Agbolo nœ mœ, a wuta ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔ osho. Endje mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke anga yingba Kristu bale sœ kœna tœnœ, kashe a sœ kœwu ngɔngɔ asœ adœke ayingba Kristu sœ andjoro zœ. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, a wusœ nœ adœke a wuta ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔ osho ye.
2.19: Azu asœmœ wuta lima lœ ugurutœ azœ, kashe endje dœ́dœ́ lima adja azu nœ azœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, œdœ endje kœdœ má lima azu nœ azœ, endje sœ má pe lima tœ œsœnœ bale dœ azœ. Kashe endje wuta lima ugurutœ azœ yé œ sœ kœma adœke endje dœ́dœ́ azu nœ azœ nene.
2.20: Tœ e'e nœ 'e, Yisu to Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ fœ 'e mbœrœ adœke á 'e kœwusœ adja o'o.
2.21: Œdœ mœ kœsu o'onœ asœ fœ 'e, œ yiyindœ kœpa adœke mbœrœ á 'e wuwusœ adja o'o nene, kashe œ sœ ataa mbœrœ á 'e kœwusœ nœ. 'E wu ndje sœ nœ adœke adja o'o gugu dœ wala bale nene.
2.22: Atamœ, ayi wala kœdœ ɗe? Œshe kœdœ uzu á tshe sœ kœmɨndœ nœ adœke Yisu dœ́dœ́ Kristu nene. Œshe asœmœ kœdœ yingba Kristu, tshe vwaratœ ye tœ Aba œdœ pe Gbolo.
2.23: Gbambanœ nene, uzu kɔ á tshe vwaratœ ye tœ Gbolo, tshe sœsœ awa bale dœ Aba nene. Uzu á tshe pa ngbɨ adœke Yisu kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba, sœ awa bale dœ Aba.
2.24: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e gbɔndœ o'onœ á 'e dji katshatsha utshunœ asœmœ ga lɔsu 'e dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Œdœ 'e kœgbɔndœ o'o á 'e dji katshatsha ɓa lima utshunœ asœmœ ga tœ lɔsu 'e dœ ɔtshɔnœ, dá 'e ndje, 'e sœ bale dœ Gbolo œdœ pe Aba.
2.25: Yé œrœnœ á Kristu pandœ nœ dœ tœ ye adœke œne za fœ azœ asœmœ kœdœ soro á ka nene.
2.26: Mœ su o'onœ asœ fœ 'e tœ upu nœ endje má endje sœ kœpara awa kœfara 'e.
2.27: Tœ 'e nœ 'e, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ á Kristu to lima fœ 'e sœpe lœ 'e zœ, 'e kpa gugu lœ o'o kœyisœ œrœ nœ anga angbɨ azu nene. Gbambanœ nene, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ sœ kœyisœ œrœ kɔ fœ 'e: Tshe sœ kœyisœ adja o'o kashe œ dœ́dœ́ wala nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e mbœrœ œneke á tshe yisœ nœ fœ 'e: 'e ngbɔtœ 'e bale dœ Kristu.
2.28: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa agbolo nœ mœ, 'e sœ dœ lɔsu bale dœ Kristu, mbœrœ lɔkɔ á tshe kpa kœkwa bala tœ ye, á lɔsu azœ kœsœ zɨtɨ yé a kœgbɔgbɔ tshula nene lɔkɔ á tshe kpa kœkwatœ ye.
2.29: Ɓata á 'e wusœ nœ adœke Kristu sœ ndjii asœmœ, 'e wu ndje sœ nœ adœke uzu á tshe mbœrœ œneke asœ ndjii, œshe kœdœ gbolo nœ Ndjaba.

3.1: 'E wu mara á Aba yindœ azœ! Tshe yindœ azœ adœke tshe e azœ agbolo nœ ye. Yé a dœ́ adja agbolo nœ Ndjaba. Wu ádánœ á azu tshapashɔ lili tœ kœwusœ azœ nene dœke: endje wuwusœ Ndjaba nene.
3.2: 'E dœ́ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e, ngɔngɔ asœke azœ kœdœ agbolo nœ Ndjaba, kashe endje mama damba mara á 'a sœ bala dœ tœnœ ngbɨ fœ azœ nene. Atamœ gbaa, a wusœ nœ adœke lɔkɔ á Kristu kœkwa bala tœ ye, a sœ ɓata she mbœrœ a wu she kolœ ɓata á tshe sœ.
3.3: Uzu kɔ á tshe kœsœ dœ gbetshelœ ga ndœ ye ataa, tshe mbœrœ kɔ adœke ekperœ sœsœ lœ œne nene ɓata á ekperœ gugu ndje lœ Kristu nene.
3.4: Uzu kɔ á tshe sœpe kœmbœrœ ekperœ, tshe vwaratœ ye tœ kœza awa akwa nœ Ndjaba ga tœ akwa. Gbambanœ nene, mbœrœ ekperœ kœdœ kœtshapu kœmbœrœ œrœ lindœ awa akwa.
3.5: Kashe 'e wusœ nœ adœke Yisu Kristu na mbœrœ kœvwara azœ lœ ekperœ, yé tshe mbœmbœrœ ekperœ teasho nene.
3.6: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, uzu á tshe ngbɔtœ ye bale dœ she, tshe mbœrœ ekperœ nene. Yé tsheneke á tshe kœsœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, tshe wuwu she too œ wusœ ye bale nene.
3.7: Agbolo nœ mœ, uzu bale fafara 'e nene! Uzu á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ œneke á sœ ndjii, tshe sœ ndjii ɓata Yisu Kristu sœ ndjii.
3.8: Tsheneke á tshe mbœrœ ekperœ, œshe kœdœ uzu nœ djaboro, mbœrœ djaboro kœdœ ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ petœ ali kœmbœrœ œrœ kɔ. Gbolo nœ Ndjaba na mbœrœ kœndɨ tshelœ akwa nœ djaboro.
3.9: Uzu kɔ á tshe te gbolo nœ Ndjaba, tshe kpa mbœrœ ekperœ nene, mbœrœ gbɔgbɔ nœ soro nœ Ndjaba sœ lœ ye. Yé ɓata á tshe kœdœ gbolo nœ Ndjaba, tshe kpa mbœrœ ekperœ nene.
3.10: Œrœ á kuru tshagurutœ agbolo nœ Ndjaba dœ endje nœ djaboro dœke: uzu kɔ á tshe kœsœsœ kœmbœrœ œneke á sœ ndjii nene, tshe dœ́dœ́ gbolo nœ Ndjaba nene; yé tsheneke á tshe yiangba ayanœ, dœ́dœ́ ndje gbolo nœ Ndjaba nene. A yindœtœ azœ dœ anga azœ
3.11: O'o má 'e dji lima katshatsha utshunœ dœke: A yindœtœ azœ dœ anga azœ.
3.12: A sœsœ ɓata Kayina á tshe dœ uzu nœ ekpe uzu yé á wo ayanœ nene. Mbœrœ gaɗe á tshe wo lima she a? Mbœrœ akwa tshelœ ye dœ́ kayina gaga lima nene, kashe œnœ ayanœ dá sœ lima ndjii.
3.13: Alaya, œdœ azu tshapashɔ kœyiangba 'e, 'e kɨkɨtœ nœ nene.
3.14: A wusœ nœ adœke a wuta lœ kuzu ndœ kœgbɔ soro, mbœrœ á a sœ kœyindœ aaya azœ. Tsheneke á tshe kœsœsœ dœ kœyindœsho nene, tshe sœpe lœ kuzu.
3.15: Uzu á tshe kœyiangba ayanœ, œshe kœdœ ayengɔ kowo. Ɓata á 'e wusœ nœ, anga ayengɔ kowo bale á tshe gbɔ soro nœ wa dœ wa œ gugu nene.
3.16: Yisu zatœ ye fœ kuzu lœ kumu azœ. Asœke má mara kœyindœsho fœ azœ. A za ndje tœ azœ fœ kuzu mbœrœ aaya azœ.
3.17: Œdœ anga uzu bale kœsœ dœ œrœ tshapashɔ asœ, yé á wu ayanœ á tshe sœ dœ oyo kashe á tshapu kœto fœ she, dá tshe sœ dœ kœyindœsho nœ Ndjaba zœ dœ mœ a?
3.18: Agbolo nœ mœ, 'e yiyi kolœ ndœsho dœ o'o too dœ ɔtshɔ o'o neke á wuta lœ ama 'e nene, kashe 'e ma ndje adja kœyindœshonœ lœ awa nœ kœmbœrœ œrœ.
3.19: Dœ mara atake, a wusœ nœ adœke azœ kœdœ azu á a sœ kœna lœ awa adja o'o, tœnœ ata dá lɔsu azœ œ sœ gee ɓa utshu Ndjaba.
3.20: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ lɔsu azœ kœsœ kœpa fœ azœ adœke a mbœrœ ekperœ, Ndjaba sœ tœ egerœnœ kœropa lɔsu azœ yé tshe wusœ œrœ kɔ.
3.21: 'E dœ́ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e, œdœ lɔsu azœ kœpa adœke a mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene, asœmœ dá a za avwala fœ Ndjaba dœ lɔsu azœ zɨtɨ.
3.22: Œneke kɔ á a yɔndœ nœ, a gbɔ ɓa ndœ ye ye mbœrœ a sœ kœmbœrœtœ azœ liaka awa akwa nœ ye, yé œ sœ kœmbœrœ œneke á ga tœ ala ye.
3.23: Œneke á Ndjaba pandœ nœ fœ azœ adœke a mbœrœ dœke: a sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Gbolo nœ œne dœ Yisu Kristu, yé œ yindœtœ azœ dœ anga azœ ɓata á Kristu pa lima tœnœ fœ azœ adœke a mbœrœ.
3.24: Uzu á tshe kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba, tshe ngbɔtœ ye dœ Ndjaba bale yé Ndjaba sœ ndje dœ she awa bale. A wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba sœ dœ azœ awa bale lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ á tshe za ga lœ azœ.

4.1: 'E dœ́ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e, adja 'e yiyindœ o'o nœ azu kɔ á endje sœ kœpa adœke œne sœ dœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ nene, kashe 'e mesho yé œ wu akwa tshelœ endje yeka á kœyindœ nœ adœke ɨshirɨnœ to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba. Gbambanœ nene, aayi kœgbara o'o nœ wala za tshapa ɔshɔ djigi.
4.2: Œrœ á ma fœ 'e adœke 'e wusœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba dœke: uzu á tshe sœ kœpa adœke Yisu Kristu fa adja uzu, uzunœ asœmœ sœ dœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba lœ ye.
4.3: Kashe uzu á tshe kœvwaratœ ye tœ kœpandœ nœ atamœ dœ ádá nœ Yisu, dá Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba gugu lœ ye nene. Kashe tshe sœ dœ ɨshirɨ nœ yingba Kristu á 'e dji lima o'o tœ upunœ adœke endje sœ kœna tœnœ, yé ngɔngɔ asœ œ sœ ɓa pa ɔshɔ zœ.
4.4: Kashe 'e dœ agbolo nœ mœ, e'e kœdœ azu nœ Ndjaba yé 'e ropa aayi kœgbara o'o nœ wala. Gbambanœ nene, Ɨshirɨ á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ akwa lœ 'e ropa ɨshirɨ á sœ lœ azu tshapashɔnœ asœke ye.
4.5: Azu kœgbara o'o nœ wala kœdœ azu tshapashɔ. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, endje sœ kœgbara liaka mara azu tshapashɔnœ asœke, yé endjeneke á endje dœ́dœ́ azu nœ Ndjaba nene, dá sœ kœdji endje.
4.6: Kashe tœ azœ nœ azœ, a kœdœ azu nœ Ndjaba. Uzu á tshe wusœ Ndjaba, tshe dji azœ kashe tsheneke á tshe dœ́dœ́ uzu nœ Ndjaba nene, tshe dji azœ nene. Tœnœ dá za awa fœ azœ tœ kœwusœ Ɨshirɨ nœ kœyisœ adja o'o ndje dœ ɨshirɨ nœ kœyisœ wala. Ndjaba kœdœ kœyindœsho
4.7: 'E dœ́ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e, a yindœtœ azœ dœ anga azœ, mbœrœ kœyindœsho to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba. Uzu nœ kœyindœsho kœdœ gbolo nœ Ndjaba yé tshe wusœ Ndjaba.
4.8: Uzu á tshe kœgugu dœ kœyindœsho nene, tshe wuwusœ Ndjaba nene mbœrœ Ndjaba kœdœ kœyindœsho.
4.9: Mara á Ndjaba má kœyindœsho nœ ye fœ azœ dœke: tshe vwa Gbolo nœ ye tshebabale ga pa ɔshɔ mbœrœ á a kœgbɔ soro lœ awa nœ ye.
4.10: Kœyindœsho sœ atake: œ sœsœ adœke azœ dá yindœ Ndjaba nene, kashe œshe dá yindœ azœ yeka á vwa Gbolo nœ ye, á tshe zatœ ye fœ kuzu mbœrœ kœgi kuɗa tshangba ekperœ nœ azœ.
4.11: 'E dœ́ aaya mœ á mœ yindœ 'e, œdœ Ndjaba kœyindœ azœ atamœ, œ li ndje dœ azœ adœke a yindœtœ azœ dœ anga azœ.
4.12: Uzu bale wuwu Ndjaba nene. Kashe œdœ a kœyindœtœ azœ dœ anga azœ, Ndjaba œ sœ dœ azœ awa bale, yé ayo nœ ye œ matœ endje djigi fœ azœ.
4.13: Œrœ á sœ kœma adœke a sœ awa bale dœ Ndjaba yé tshe sœ ndje awa bale dœ azœ dœke: tshe za Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ nœ ye ga lœ azœ.
4.14: Adja Aba vwa lima Gbolo nœ ye adœke tshe she azu tshapashɔ. 'A sœ kœmɨndœ nœ mbœrœ a wu lima she dœ ala 'a.
4.15: Œdœ uzu kœpandœ nœ adœke Yisu kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba, Ndjaba œ sœ dœ she awa bale yé tshe sœ ndje dœ Ndjaba awa bale.
